title: Hurricane SO/HO RAM/DODGE/JEEP JB4 MAP Sensor Bypass Extensions
descriptionEn: These plug and play connectors make installing and removing your JB4 or other piggyback systems fast and hassle free. By relocating the connection point away from the difficult to access MAP sensor, you can quickly bypass the sensor by simply connecting the extensions together. Sold in pairs. The Hurricane SO/HO MAP Sensor Bypass Extensions are designed to mount in an easily accessible location above the factory MAP sensor, eliminating the need to reach down into tight areas. This allows for quick disconnection and reconnection whenever you need to remove or reinstall your JB4 or other piggyback system. title: Jeep Compass 2.0L JB4 Tuner
sku: Alfa Romeo JB4 + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 40hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle The JB4 is the most advanced and highly featured tuning system available for your 2023+ Jeep Compass 2.0L 4-cylinder turbo. Power gains are up to 40hp to the wheels (55hp crank) on a completely stock car on pump gas and gains with bolt-on parts or ethanol mixed in are even higher!The JB4 Tuner features a simple plug and play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other tune. Including on the fly map switching from your phone/tablet between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, progressive water/methanol support, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, and much more. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 40hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Jeep• 2023+ Jeep Compass 2.0L 4-cylinder Turbo All trims including Sport, Latitude, Latitude Lux, Altitude, Limited, Trailhawk, (RED) Edition, High Altitude. More Info For the install guide, map guide, and the latest firmware, click here. What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and the DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. DYNO RESULTS - Same engine as the 2023+ Jeep Compass 2.0L The JB4 is simply the best tuner for the Jeep Compass 2.0L

title: BMS 2026+ Dodge Charger Scat Pack Dual Oil Catch Can System (PCV & CCV)
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your Scat Pack Charger Air Intake System! It's no secret that Dodge Charger Hurricane I6 turbo motors can suffer from oil control problems causing the oil to blow through and coat the water-to-air intercooler and charge pipes, gunking up intake valves and the intake system, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels and the higher the mileage the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The Burger Motorsports dual oil catch can system. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV/CCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV/CCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor to the atmosphere. Most are simply repackaged oil catch cans from smaller/lower power motors shoehorned into the Dodge Charger engine bay. To solve these problems Burger Motorsports designed their oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the 2026 and newer Dodge Charger Scat Pack "Six Pack" application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The cans themselves are guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The heavy-duty hoses match the OEM PCV/CCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV/CCV vapor from leaking to atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Install takes around 30 minutes, includes all required hardware, OEM fittings, and is 100% reversible. Unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during or between oil changes.The BMS dual catch can system features two catch cans for complete protection:Low Side (PCV) – Captures oil vapors at idle and cruiseHigh Side (CCV) – Captures oil vapors under boost Vehicle Fitment Dodge• 2026+ Dodge Charger Scat Pack 3.0L "SixPack" I6 Hurricane Twin Turbo Can dimensions Can dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) TallCan Diameter: 2.7" (68.5mm)Lid Length: Back to nozzle end: 4" (101mm)Nozzle Outer Diameter: .625" (15.87mm) Nozzle Inner Diameter: 0.46" (11.70mm) Can Capacity: 2.5 oz (74 ml) What's Included • (2) Charger Billet Oil Catch Cans• (1) 3 piece Charger CNC billet bracket• (1) 10" Heavy-duty 5/8" hose with a "IN" 90º PCV fitting • (1) 7.75" Heavy-duty 5/8" hose with a "OUT" 90º PCV fitting• (1) 19" Heavy-duty 5/8" hose with a "IN" 90º PCV fitting • (1) 20" Heavy-duty 5/8" hose with a "OUT" straight PCV fitting• (4) Bracket to can screws M5x0.8x12mm internal hex• (2) Bracket screws M5x0.8x12mm internal hex• (2) Bracket screws M5x0.8x16mm internal hex

title: BMS BMW/Supra Gen 1 B46 B48 Charge Pipe Blow-Off Valve (BOV) Kit
sku: B48 BOV Chargepipe with Turbosmart BOV
descriptionEn: BMS BMW/Supra Gen 1 B46 B48 Charge Pipe Blow-Off Valve (BOV) Kit Finally, that blow-off valve sound you've been waiting for on your Gen 1 B46 B48 2.0L powered BMW/Supra. The massive Turbosmart® Raceport® blow-off valve lets unused charge air to vent to the atmosphere giving off the desired "Pshhhh" blow-off sound all turbo owners love. The BMS Elite is the highest quality B46 B48 charge pipe upgrade on the market. Our charge pipe is constructed from high-gauge aluminum featuring a CNC throttle body and turbo flange for a snug, OEM-style fit. It is completed with a matte black textured finish to coordinate with the engine bay and boasts two 1/8" NPT bungs ideal for an external boost gauge or methanol nozzles. Also includes a heavy-duty replacement coupler, o-ring, c-clip, and all required installation hardware. This version features the Turbosmart® Raceport® blow-off valve to release excess pressure in the charge pipes when letting off the gas. In addition to intoxicating sound, it reduces compressor surge and improves overall reliability at higher boost levels. Compatible with factory tuning, JB4, and flash tuning. Replaces OEM BMW Part #13718601683 Charge air duct For use with the factory intake we recommend this BMS G Chassis B48 BMW Aluminum Long Turbo Inlet Upgrade or our B48 Competition Intake Features and Benefits • Amazing blow-off valve sound• Improved reliability at higher boost levels• Snug OEM fitment• Increased diameter for better airflow• CNC machined throttle body and turbo flange• Reduces compressor surge• Compatible with factory tuning, JB4, and flash tuning.• Includes three 1/8' NPT bungs for methanol/water injection or boost gauges• Heavy-duty reinforced silicone coupler• 100% reversible. title: Kia Stinger & Genesis G70/G80 3.3L Charge Pipe Injection (CPI) Kit
descriptionEn: Kia Stinger/Genesis G70/G80 charge pipe injector (CPI) kit For those running E85 mixtures and higher boost levels, the factory high pressure fuel pump has proven to be a limiting factor to performance. Previously installing water/meth injection was the only way around this limit but the Fuel-It! CPI kit now offers a clean and easy to use alternative!CPI adds a 7th fuel injector in the charge pipe, similar to a water/meth nozzle, only rather than having a separate tank/pump it's attached to the factory low fuel pressure system. Fuel is metered via JB4 FSB integration or a stand alone fuel injector controller. The result is an additional 75-100hp worth of fueling capacity! Just enough room to max out factory turbos on E85 mixtures!The full kit includes a Fuel-It! flex fuel sensor for precise E85 readings allowing the JB4 to meter CPI flow appropriately. The CPI kit features a CNC machined injector holder, quality AN fuel lines, and all required fittings for installation. Requires a 1/8" NPT bung with adequate clearance for the injector housing. For those running a BMS intercooler, the included 1/8" NPT bung placement is ideal. Note CPI can not be installed with the BMS MAP sensor WMI nozzle adapter. You can drill/tap an 1/8" NPT hole on your factory chargepipe if needed. We now have a new flex fuel option: BMS CANflex ECA = This is our latest kit with the new BMS CANflex LED ECA that includes both a digital display box to monitor ethanol mixtures as well as a voltage output for those running a JB4. Note the display box is not weather proof and must be routed either inside the glove box or under a cover in the engine bay for protection from the elements. This kit also supports CANbus operation and our 10bar low fuel pressure sensor kit making it ideal for future expansion. Vehicle FitmentKIA• 2018-2023 Kia StingerGenesis• 2018+ Genesis G70/G80 Full kit: Fuel line adapter Wire harness -4AN Fuel line Cam lock Tee with -4AN adapter Single CPI adapter with 950cc injector CPI tool Standard harness for Stinger FF kit Choice of ECA's Ethanol Sensor (429) If you already have our flex fuel kit, choose the "I already have your Flex Fuel kit" option. This kit is for those that have already installed our flex fuel kit and only need to add CPI. Fuel line adapter Wire harness -4AN Fuel line Cam lock Tee with -4AN adapter Single CPI adapter with 950cc injector CPI tool Available controllers: FSB JB4 Port Injection Controller: https://burgertuning.com/products/fsb-controller-for-upgrading-older-kitsOptional: Quick Install 3.3L Charge Pipe Injection (CPI) Mount KitThis easy to install kit mounts to the factory intercooler and lets you add up to 2 Fuel Injectors or Methanol Injection nozzles. Questions and AnswersQ: What is CPI? A: Charge Pipe Injection (CPI) is our new proprietary system that allows you to add an additional to your boosted application with any standard 1/8" NPT female connection in your charge pipe or intake system. Q: Is it expandable?A: Yes, we have two types of injector bodies. The first has one input that can be run by itself or we have an injector body with two connections so you can daisy chain in additional injector fed from the same fuel source. For those looking to run more than one injector, we recommend staggering the injectors and not running them directly opposed for this application. Q: How is it controlled?A: You must use a port injection controller, You can run a stand alone controller or if running a JB4, you can use the BMS port injector controller or FSB. Q: Can I use this without a secondary injector controller?A: No, this is a PWM controlled injector that must be programmed. Q: Is tuning included with this kit?A: For those running a JB4 free tuning advice is provided, no tuning support is provided for those running flash only. Q: What kind of fuel can I run?A: These kits are compatible with methanol, ethanol, E85, race gas, and pump gas. Q: Where do I connect to the fuel source?A: This kit includes our stock fuel line adapter for the fuel source. Q: What is the difference between WMI and CPI and which is better for me?A: https://www.jb4tech.com/forums/showthread.php?t=67992 Dyno Results: 2022 Kia Stinger, JB4, CPI, Intake, Exhaust, 45% E85.
selectedVariant: Full Kit with BMS CANflex ECA / Do NOT add BMS FSB Controller / No Thank You

title: BMS Billet Strut Cross Braces for 2020+ Toyota GR Supra
descriptionEn: BMS Billet Strut Cross Braces for the 2020+ Toyota GR Supra. Designed and made in the USA from billet aluminum with the BMS logo engraved on the top middle. These strut braces are a solid one-piece design and give extra stabilization to the chassis you can feel along with an exclusive look under the hood.Sold in pairs. Available in Black, Blue, and Red anodized. FEATURES & BENEFITS The perfect addition to your Supra engine bay 1 piece design machined from a solid block of billet aluminum Improved chassis rigidity Decreased flex during cornering Direct bolt-on replacement, no drilling required Easy installation Made in the USA Vehicle Fitment Toyota GR Supra Mk5 B58 3.0L 6 cyl.• 2020 Mk5 Toyota GR Supra all models (Select: mounting hardware included)• 2021+ Mk5 Toyota GR Supra all models (Select: factory mounting hardware used)Vehicles with factory strut braces reuse the factory hardware.Toyota GR Supra Mk5 B48 2.0L 4 cyl.• 2020+ Mk5 Toyota GR Supra all models (Select: mounting hardware included) Toyota Supra Kit Includes (without factory hardware)(2) CNC machined billet aluminum strut braces(2) Short flange bolts (front) (M10x 1.5 mm Thread, 35mm long)(2) Long flange bolts (rear) (M8 x 1.25mm thread x 50mm long)(2) lock nuts (M8 x 1.25mm Thread) Vehicles with factory strut braces reuse the factory hardware. 🔧 Installation instructions for vehicles with factory strut braces: Unbolt your factory strut braces, and replace them with the Burger Motorsports billet strut braces. Next attache the supplied lock nut to the bolt inside the wheel well and tighten from underneath by the spring. Next thread the shorter supplied bolt through the front brace threaded hole. Repeat on the other side. Supra Strut Brace Review & Install Video 2020+ Toyota GR Supra with black BMS strut braces installed.

title: JB4 for Ford F150 Raptor R Supercharged (BETA)
sku: Raptor R JB4 + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 122whp to the wheels on a stock supercharged RAPTOR R without the risks of flashing! This plug and play tuner attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and increased engine response.Installation is very discrete and unlike flash remaps which are quick to install but can never be fully removed with a JB4 the vehicle is never aware it's making more than the factory power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged and it's compatible with all driving modes including towing.Unlike other less advanced systems, the JB4 includes CANbus functionality allowing it to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU for real-time tuning. The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and much more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data no less incorporate it real-time into their tuning algorithms. CANbus allows the JB4 to provide huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery.The JB4 includes multiple maps including those for 91 octane, 93 octane, factory tuning, VALET mode, E85 mixtures, and unleaded race gas. In addition, it offers boost by gear settings to improve launches, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more. The JB4 is designed in the USA and includes a 5-year warranty. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Includes our all new JB4PRO Bluetooth adapter and free app! The JB4PRO app allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more info on how to use the JB4PRO free app click here. JB4 Power Gains, Features, & Benefits • Power gains of up to 120hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment • 2023+ Ford F-150 Raptor R 5.2L Supercharged• 2020-2022 Ford Mustang Shelby GT500 5.2L Supercharged What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU.

sku: E Series Flex Fuel Kit ***BT AND 0-5v***
descriptionEn: Know your exact ethanol content in real-time via the Fuel-It! or JB4 mobile app on your smartphone or tablet. If you are running E85 or ethanol mixes in your BMW, you need this kit! This is a complete plug and play kit to install a Bluetooth ethanol sensor in your E-Chassis BMW. This kit replaces the stock fuel lines from the fuel tank to the engine bay with an upgrade -6an E85 compatible fuel line and adds an ethanol sensor and Bluetooth analyzer to monitor your ethanol content. Includes both Bluetooth App & 5v analog output for JB4 or flash tuning Bluetooth (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this feature) If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here For your fuel line upgrade, choose the option that supports your current configuration. HPFP to the fuel tank: (Stock) This upgrade replaces both stock fuel lines with one upgraded continuous fuel line from the fuel tank to the HPFP and adds the ethanol sensor. Port Injection to the fuel tank: If you are running our port injection kit, this upgrade replaces the stock fuel lines from the tank to the engine bay, integrates the ethanol sensor and then utilizes a Y adapter to supply the HPFP and PI with fuel. Our custom fittings remove those tee's and extra fittings for a cleaner high flow setup. Phoenix Racing Manifold to the fuel tank: If you are running the Phoenix Racing Manifold port injection kit, this upgrade also replaces the stock fuel lines from the tank to the engine bay, integrates the ethanol sensor and then utilizes a Y adapter to supply the HPFP and PI with fuel. Our custom fittings remove those tee's and extra fittings for a cleaner high flow setup. Non-Fuel-It! port injection to fuel tank: Choose this option if you are running a port injection kit that we did not manufacture or sell. This kit includes a longer 18" feedline from the Y to the port injection rail. You then cut the feed line to the length you need and install the included -6an female fitting or -6an female elbow to make the connection to your port injection rail. All of our kits utilize our custom billet aluminum fittings to integrate with the stock fittings so no modifications are needed. *For the BMW N54 E-series JB4 platform connect the white wire to position #15 on the JB4 25 pin harness. Select WMI Ethanol Setup option 1 to enable pin location 15/16 flex fuel input. *For the BMW N55 E-series JB4 platform connect the white wire to position #16 on the JB4 25 pin harness. Select WMI Ethanol Setup option 1 to enable pin location 15/16 flex fuel input.

title: JB4PRO for 2025+ C8 Chevrolet Corvette ZR1 LT7 (BETA)
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 100whp peak and 220whp under the curve! JB4 is finally here for your C8 ZR1 Corvette! Featuring our latest JB4PRO hardware this system attaches to easy to reach connections in the engine bay, as well as your OBDII port, to retune the LT7 for higher power and torque levels. By intercepting and altering specific sensor signals dynamically the JB4 can safely reshape your boost, timing, and AFR profiles without having to unlock the ECU or rewrite any ECU tables. The JB4 includes several maps including a map for pump gas, race gas mix, straight race gas, up to 30% E85 mixtures, and a bypass/factory map. Using the free JB4PRO app you can change maps on the fly and make various tuning adjustments including boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, setting maximum boost safety levels, and even reshape your desired boost/torque curve manually. The JB4PRO app also includes data logging, tuning insights, performance estimates, code management, and much more, giving you full control over your tuning experience. Note ZR1 systems are low volume and currently made to order, expect a 1-2 week delay in shipping Includes the JB4PRO app! Wirelessly connect the JB4 to your iOS or Android device to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. The JB4PRO app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. More information on the JB4PRO app is available here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 220whp under the curve on a stock vehicle with high octane• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment • 2025+ Chevrolet Corvette C8 ZR1 What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and it's DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide.Is the JB4 a real tune?Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. MUST WATCH! First Tuned C8 ZR1

title: BMS High Output Ignition Coil Kits for VW Audi Porsche
descriptionEn: High-Performance Ignition Coil Upgrade by Burger Motorsports Looking for a reliable ignition coil upgrade for your VW or Audi? Burger Motorsports High-Performance Ignition Coils are precision-engineered to deliver up to +10% more energy output than stock coils, ensuring a stronger, more consistent spark for improved throttle response, smoother acceleration, and fewer misfires. These direct plug-and-play ignition coils are an ideal replacement for old, failing, or weak factory coils and offer a noticeable performance boost for both stock and tuned engines. Whether you're chasing better reliability, improving engine bay appearance, or planning your next power upgrade, BMS ignition coils keep your engine firing at its best. Ignition coils are a common failure part on Volkswagen and Audi. Don’t wait. Typical symptoms of a failing ignition coil include engine misfires, uneven idling, reduced power output, poorer fuel efficiency, hard starting, illuminated check engine light, and in extreme situations engine stalling or backfiring. Common fault codes for a bad coil include P0300 (random/multiple cylinder misfire) and P035X (ignition coil primary/secondary circuit malfunction, where "X" is the cylinder number). Other associated codes include P0301, P0302, P0303, and P0304. Available in a bright red custom housing color, these coils not only perform but also make a visual statement under the hood. Upgrade your ignition system with Burger Motorsports coils and experience more power, better drivability, and long-term durability. Fits a wide range of VW and Audi performance applications. Mk7 and Mk8 ignition coils are NOT interchangeable; please select the option that matches your vehicle’s model year and engine generation. title: 2025+ RAM 1500 Hurricane SO Charge Pipe Injection (CPI) Kit
descriptionEn: Add a 7th fuel injector to your RAM Hurricane for up to +30hp! For the standard output (SO) hurricane model its single high pressure fuel pump has proven to be a limiting factor for performance, especially for those running E85 mixtures. There is now finally an upgrade! Our CPI kit adds a 7th 950cc fuel injector to the charge pipe augmenting the direct injection system. The result is an additional 75-100hp worth of fueling capacity! You can finally run an E40 mix on map4 without crashing your fuel pump! Our full kit includes a Fuel-It! ethanol sensor which allows the JB4 to precisely meter the required additional fuel based on your current mixture and tuning needs. The CPI kit features a CNC machined injector holder, quality AN and CNC machined fuel lines and fittings, and all required fittings for installation. The kit is relatively easy to install and fully reversible with no permanent changes required. Includes the BMS CANflex ECA = Our latest kit includes a digital display box to monitor ethanol mixtures, a free iOS/Android app, as well as an output for those running a JB4 or ECU tuning. Vehicle Fitment SO Engines Only. descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 75whp and 79wtq to the wheels on a stock Nissan Armada/Patrol This plug and play tuner attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag.Installation is very discrete and unlike flash remaps which are quick to install but can never be fully removed with a JB4 the vehicle is never aware it's making more than the factory boost or power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged and it's compatible with all driving modes. Unlike other less advanced systems, the JB4 includes CANbus functionality allowing it to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU for real-time tuning. The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and much more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data no less incorporate it real-time into their tuning algorithms. CANbus allows the JB4 to provide huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery.The JB4 includes multiple maps including those for 91 octane, 93 octane, factory tuning, E85 mixtures, and unleaded race gas. In addition, it offers boost by gear settings to improve launches, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more. The JB4 is made in the USA and includes a 5-year warranty. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more info on how to use the JB4PRO free app click here. title: B58 BMW/Supra BMS Oil Catch Can Oil Filler Cap Dual Vent Connection Kit
descriptionEn: Upgrade Your B58 Catch Can System with a True Dual-Vent Solution Take your B58 BMW or Supra’s crankcase ventilation performance to the next level with the BMS Oil Filler Cap Dual Vent Connection Kit = the missing link for ultimate catch can and engine efficiency. This precision-machined billet cap replaces the factory oil filler cap and creates a second dedicated exit point for dirty PCV gases. That means both the crankcase vent and the valve cover breather can now be routed into your oil catch can. Twice the inputs into your catch can means twice the oil vapor capture, keeping harmful oil mist out of your intake tract. Cleaner air, cleaner intake valves, and a more efficient PCV system, more efficient engine, it’s a simple upgrade with major payoffs. Why This Matters: Double the Captured Flow: Adds a second breather port for PCV/vapor extraction so you pull more blow-by gasses into your catch can. Reduces Piston Resistance: This creates a slight negative pressure (vacuum) in the crankcase, reducing the resistance the pistons face as they move, improving fuel economy and performance. Manages Pressure: "Blow-by" gases (unburned fuel, air, combustion byproducts) get past piston rings into the crankcase, creating pressure. Cleaner Combustion Air: Reduces oil vapor recirculation that leads to intake valve carbon buildup. Maximized Catch Can Efficiency: Works with the BMS catch can to let it do more of its job. Perfect For: Anyone running a B58 BMS oil catch can looking to squeeze every bit of performance and protection from their PCV system, especially on tuned or high-boost builds. Precision-Built Fit: CNC billet aluminum construction replaces the factory filler cap for a secure, purposeful connection. All Hardware Included: Includes billet cap, AN fittings, high-temp hose, T-fitting, and clamps for a clean install. Vehicle FitmentGen 2 B58-powered BMW and Supra and Gen 3 B58-powered BMW For use with BMS Oil Catch Can for G Chassis Gen 2 B58 BMW M240 M340 M440 BMS Oil Catch Can for 2020+ B58 Toyota Supra GR MK5 BMS Oil Catch Can for G Chassis Gen 3 2025+ B58 BMW M340 M440B58 Vehicle Fitment BMW 2 Series• 2022+ G42 B58 BMW M240i BMW 3 Series• 2019+ G20 G21 B58 BMW M340i BMW 4 Series• 2021+ G22 G23 G26 B58 BMW M440i Toyota • 2020-2026 Toyota GR Supra Mk5 B58What's Included:(1) BMS B58 BMW Billet Oil Filler Breather Cap (1)-12ORB 90º to -12AN fitting(1)-12 AN barbed straight Fitting(1) Heavy-duty custom silicone hose(1) Barbed PCV T- fitting(3) Hose clamps ⚠️ ATTENTION: This installs differently than the OEM oil filler cap. To install, line the grooves up with the tabs on the filler neck on the car, push all the way down and twist down tightly. Be sure they cap is seated and tightly sealed before use to prevent leaks.

title: BMS Differential Support Bracket Brace for G Chassis BMW/Supra
descriptionEn: Bolt On Improved Traction The Problem Hard launches, aggressive shifts, and high torque loads all expose a weakness in the factory rear differential mounting. Excessive differential movement leads to wheel hop, inconsistent launches, added stress on differential bearings, and a vague or unstable feeling from the rear of the car. Over time, that movement does more than hurt performance. It accelerates wear and compromises drivetrain reliability. Especially at higher power levels. The Solution - The BMS Differential Brace The BMS Diff Brace was engineered to eliminate unwanted differential movement by rigidly tying the rear differential to the subframe. The result is a planted, confidence-inspiring rear chassis that puts power down cleanly and consistently. This is not a generic brace. Every contour of the BMS Differential Brace was designed using high-resolution 3D laser scanning of the factory subframe and differential housing. This ensures a perfect, stress-free fit with zero guesswork. The one-piece heavy-gauge steel construction removes the flex points found in multi-piece designs, while oversized M12 hardware provides clamping force far beyond OEM and typical aftermarket solutions. The end result is a component that feels like it belongs on the car from the factory, only stronger, tighter, and engineered for performance. What You Will Feel • Sharper, more controlled launches• Dramatically reduced wheel hop• A tighter, more stable rear chassis under acceleration• Reduced load and shock on differential bearings Engineering Highlights • Designed using precision 3D laser scanning for an exact OEM-level fit• One-piece heavy-gauge steel construction for maximum rigidity• Oversized M12 mounting hardware eliminates common weak points• Reduces differential movement and bearing stress• Improves traction and launch consistency• Easy bolt-on installation with all hardware included• Designed and manufactured in the USA This is not just a brace. It is a structural upgrade to the rear of your car, engineered to handle real power and real driving. Vehicle Fitment BMW 2 Series• 2022+ G42 BMW 3 Series• 2020-2024 G20 G21 BMW 4 Series• 2021-2024 G22 G23 G26 BMW Z4• 2019+ BMW G29 Toyota Supra• 2020-2026 Toyota GR Supra Mk5 NOTE: Drilling of two holes required to mount the upper bracket. Best diff brace for the G Series BMW and Supra. Period.

title: BMW Port Injection Kits for N54 Motors
descriptionEn: The Ultimate Fueling Solution for Your N54 Equipped BMW! These kits add six supplemental low pressure fuel injectors allowing fueling of up to 1000+ WHP using E85, methanol or other performance fuels. Our manifold spacers are offered in Basic and Elite formats, both are CNC machined and anodized for a long service life. These kits includes all required installation hardware, gasket set, and a plug and play fuel line adapter. The Elite kit is anodized black with an additional return port, has an upgraded fuel line, and features increased machining allowing fitment for additional applications such as the BMW S55. Basic kit is compatible with all E chassis and F chassis BMW N54 & N55 engines. Elite Kit is compatible with all E chassis and F chassis engines including the S55. We also offer complete intake manifold replacements with integrated fuel injection. When it comes to intake manifolds, it doesn't get any better than this. The Phoenix Racing intake manifold replaces your weak factory plastic N54/N55 manifold with a direct fit high flow and high strength aluminum manifold. Features port injection bungs located on the top of the manifold for easy access and optimal injector spray pattern, expansion vacuum ports perfect for larger diameter blow-off valve references, additional gauges, Hobb's switches, and any other expansion you can imagine. Includes high-quality o-rings and all required hardware. Available with required port injection hardware (calibrated injectors with plug and play fuel line), or ala-cart without the extra fueling hardware. To complete these kits, you will need at least the basic Fuel Line, Fuel Injectors and a Port Injection Controller available separately or they can be added to your package. Optional accessories are also available and can be purchased separately. E-series Flex Fuel Kits F-series Flex Fuel Kits Methanol conversion kits Optional Flow Matched DW or IDX Port Fuel InjectorsHigh performance DW or IDX 42mm fuel injectors come packaged in flow matched sets of six and are compatible with the Fuel-It!, Phoenix Racing, and other port injection kits. title: BMW M2, M3, M4, X3M, & X4M Port Injection Kit for the S58 Motor
descriptionEn: If you're making big power or running E85 with your 2020+ S58 powered BMW, you need this kit! This is a complete plug & play kit to install port injection on your 2020+ S58 Equipped BMW in about 30 minutes. The Fuel-It! S58 BMW Port Injection Kit is the ultimate fueling solution for your S58 powered BMW. It adds six supplemental low-pressure fuel injectors allowing fueling of up to 1000+ whp using various fuels. This kit is compatible with pump gas, race gas, methanol, and E85. CNC machined and anodized for long service life. Made in the USA. Fuel Injectors, Stand Alone Controller, or BMS JB4 Controller can be purchased separately or added to your package. What's Included in the basic kit: (1) Fuel-It! S58 Billet Fuel Rail(1) Stainless steel braided fuel line with black nylon sheathing to protect your other engine bay components(1) Billet tee fitting for fuel supply that is compatible with stock fuel lines and our flex fuel kit. (1) -6AN ORB fitting (1) -6AN ORB plug(2) 1/8" NPT plugs (3) 14 x 1 Stainless steel screws to secure the rail to your manifold (1) Injector installation jig(1) 8 x 3/4" screw for the installation jig(1) 21/64 drill bit to open the factory injector bosses(1) Superlube® Suggested optional accessories: Injectors: Our kits use high quality Flow Matched DW or IDX Port 42mm Fuel Injectors. You can order them with the kit or supply your own injectors but you will need to add injectors for the kit to function. Injectors are available in 550cc, 750cc, 950cc, and 1050cc flow ratings. Port Injection Controller: You must use a controller to run the additional injectors. If you are running a JB4, then you will select the BMS port injection controller. If you are not running a JB4 and just running a flash or factory ECU, you will need to stand alone (flash only) controller. Flex Fuel: If you are running ethanol mixes or E85, we highly recommend you run our flex fuel kit to integrate with the JB4 and to read your actual ethanol content. The content can vary greatly from station to station and fill up to fill up. If you already have one of our flex fuel kits installed, you can order the port injection kit and select "I already have your flex fuel kit" to receive the correct line from the ethanol sensor to the Tee fitting. The supplied lines with your original flex fuel kit will work but the line from the ethanol sensor to the HPFP is bit long once you add the Tee fitting. title: BMS High Output Ignition Coil Kits for BMW, MINI, & Supra
descriptionEn: High-Performance Ignition Coil Upgrade by Burger Motorsports Looking for a reliable ignition coil upgrade for your BMW, MINI, or Supra? Burger Motorsports High-Performance Ignition Coils are precision-engineered to deliver up to 10% more energy output than stock coils ensuring a stronger, more consistent spark for improved throttle response, smoother acceleration, and fewer misfires. These direct plug-and-play ignition coils are an ideal replacement for old, failing, or weak factory coils and offer a noticeable performance boost for both stock and tuned engines. Whether you're chasing better reliability, want to dress up your engine, or planning your next power upgrade, BMS ignition coils keep your engine firing at its best.Ignition coils are a common failure part on BMWs. Don't wait. Typical symptoms of a failing BMW ignition coil are engine misfires, uneven idling, and reduced power output, poorer fuel efficiency, hard starting, illuminated check engine light, and in extreme situations, engine stalling or backfiring. Common codes for a bad BMW coil are P0300 (random/multiple cylinder misfire) and P035X (ignition coil primary/secondary circuit malfunction, where 'X' is the cylinder number). Other associated codes are P0301, P0302, P0303, P0304. Available in three custom coil housing colors, black, red, and blue, these coils don’t just perform, they make a visual statement under the hood. Upgrade your ignition system with a set of Burger Motorsports coils and experience more power, better drivability, and long-term durability. Fits a wide range of BMW and performance applications. Please check fitment before ordering. Features and Benefits Up to 10% more energy output than stock Black, Blue, and Red housing with BMS Logo Designed for better performance Direct plug-and-play Vehicle Fitment ⚠️ ATTENTION: Not for use on Gen 3 B58/B48 Engines. title: JB4 for 2024+ Toyota Land Cruiser 2.4L Turbo
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 75hp on a stock 2.4L Land Cruiser! The JB4 PRO is the newest, most advanced and highly featured tuning system available for your 2024-Present Toyota Land Cruiser 2.4L. Power gains are up to 60hp to the wheels (75hp crank) on a completely stock car on pump gas, gains with bolt-on parts, higher octane, E85 mixtures are even higher.The JB4 features a simple plug and play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other Land Cruiser tune. Including on the fly in dash map switching between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, performance estimates, and much more.Remember the JB4 Land Cruiser tuner does not require any additional modifications! Simply install the JB4 as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new fast and smooth racing experience. Includes the JB4PRO app! Wirelessly connect the JB4 to your iOS or Android device to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. The JB4PRO app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. More information on the JB4PRO app is available here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 60hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 times and 1/4 mile times• Preloaded with custom JB4 2.4L Land Cruiser tuning software and up to 8 maps for various fuel and modification levels• Ethanol (E85) compatible tuning maps• Able to read/delete fault codes• View and record up to 20 different gauges/engine parameters in real-time with the JB4PRO app.• Boost by gear in 1st, 2nd, and 3rd can be controlled via the JB4PRO app for a perfect launch• Compatible with the FREE JB4PRO app for smartphone logging, tuning changes, and adjustment• The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip• Quick Plug & Play Installation• CANbus OBDII integration offering unrivaled tuning features and performance• Improved performance over non-integrated chip tunes• Runs as smoothly as stock. This is how your vehicle should have come from the factory• Compatible with all driving modes• Fuel economy unchanged during normal driving• 91 octane fuel or better required for performance gains• Not VIN locked and can be removed without a trace and resold down the road• Designed and Assembled in the USA• 5 year warranty Vehicle Fitment Toyota• 2024+ Toyota Land Cruiser 2.4L Turbocharged 4-cyl Hybrid i-Force MAX (all trims) What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU.

title: Fuel-It! Gen 1 & 2 B58 BMW Billet Port Injection Manifold
descriptionEn: 2000hp Capable B58 Port Injection Intake Manifold When it comes to intake manifolds it doesn't get any better than this. The Fuel-It! intake manifold replaces your weak factory plastic B58 manifold with a direct fit high flow high strength billet aluminum manifold. Features a huge intercooler core capable of supporting up to 2000hp, port injection bungs located on the top of the manifold for easy access and optimal injector spray pattern, and 1/8" expansion ports perfect for direct port nitrous, water/methanol, or anything else you can imagine! Includes high-quality o-rings and all required hardware. Available with required port injection hardware (calibrated injectors with plug and play fuel line), or ala-cart without the extra fueling hardware. The optional high quality Flow Matched Bosch® or IDX Port Fuel Injectors 42mm fuel injectors are offered in 550cc, 750cc, 950cc, and 1050cc options. ⚠️ ATTENTION: Gen 1 B58 manifold installs require slight modification to the cowl brace and plastic cowl cover. Click here for the guideThis kit includes a FREE ($99.00 Value) Burger Motorsports B58 Phenolic Thermal Intake Manifold Spacer which is required for proper BMS manifold installation. The Burger Motorsports B58 Phenolic Thermal Intake Manifold Spacer is constructed from fiber-embedded phenolic material and helps to prevent heat transfer from the cylinder head to the intake manifold, thereby increasing engine efficiency and decreasing heat soak. This advanced technology will lower intake air temperature, allowing denser air to enter the cylinders, thus reducing detonation and promoting more efficient combustion. This kit includes FREE ($99.00 Value) Fuel-It! Fuel Line This kit includes FREE ($60.00 Value) Burger Motorsports Port injector plugs For those not ready yet for port injection these dummy injectors fit in place of actual port injection injectors to block the holes. Allows use of port injection manifolds without actually having port injection. title: BMS BOV Spacer for VW/Audi EA888 Gen5 2.0L
descriptionEn: The Burger Motorsports Blow Off Valve (BOV) mounts between the factory bypass solenoid and the vehicle, causing the unused charge air to vent to the atmosphere giving off the desired "Pshhhh" blow-off sound all turbo owners love.Easy install. title: Group 20: JB4 for VW/Audi EA888 Gen5 2.0T
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 40whp & 55wtq to the wheels on a stock vehicle The JB4 is a plug and play Tiguan tuner that plugs into easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. Unlike other tuning systems the JB4 includes a fully programmable CANbus system, upgradable firmware, and data logging capability. CANbus allows the JB4 to take into account pedal input, throttle position, gear, engine speed, air/fuel ratio, fuel trims, ignition advance, knock, and many other factors and incorporate those into the performance mapping. It can also read/delete fault codes, includes unique safety features such as keeping boost pressure low until oil and water is up to temperature to provide proper engine and turbo lucubration and drop to a low boost map if the engine starts to overheat, run lean, excessively knock, or over boost. The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip.The default JB4 map1 runs 4psi over stock peak and tuned maps, including stock and valet mode can be selected on the fly using a BMS diagnostics cable or JB4 mobile smartphone adapter. Installation is very discreet and it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Includes maps for 91 octane, 93 octane, and E85 (ethanol fuel) mixtures. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more info on how to use the JB4PRO free app click here. JB4 Features and Benefits • Power gains of up to 40whp and 55wtq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Volkswagen• 2025+ VW Tiguan 201hp• 2025+ VW Tiguan 268hp Audi • 2026+ Audi B10 A5 • 2026+ Audi B10 Q5 What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune?Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. Volkswagen Tiguan Install guide Audi B10 A5/ Q5 Install guide Audi A5 Dyno - Stock vs. JB4 Tuned 2025 VW Tiguan Dyno - Stock vs. JB4 Tuned

title: BMS Kia Stinger/Genesis G70 3.3L Oil Catch Can
descriptionEn: Keep oil out of your 3.3L intake manifold! The BMS Kia Stinger/Genesis G70 Oil Catch Can (OCC) keeps oil from being sucked through the PCV system and coating your intake manifold, cylinder head, and valves. In addition to the long term damage and maintenance headaches crankcase oil can cause over time it also reduces engine efficiency and lowers effective octane sapping performance. The system is fully CNC machined for precision performance and fully sealed to retain full factory emissions performance. Installation takes only minutes, is fully reversible, and includes all required hardware. Made in the USA. Note the Stinger/Genesis 3.3L has two separate PCV paths, a vacuum side, and a boost side. The BMS Kia Stinger OCC is for the vacuum side which we've found contributes ~95% of the manifold PCV oil contamination. With the Stinger, we have not found any significant benefit to adding a separator to the boost side (driver side) system and suggest leaving it factory. FEATURES AND BENEFITS • Increases Engine Efficiency & Longevity• Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Double Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large Intake/Outlet No Tapering Down• Anodized Black Aluminum• Made in USA & Guaranteed for Life• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs • Precision CNC Machined in the USA 🇺🇸 Vehicle Fitment • 2018-2023 KIA Stinger GT, GT1, GT2 3.3L V6• 2018+ Genesis G70 3.3L V6Does not fit 2.0L 4 cylinder models. What's Included • (1) BMS Billet Oil Catch Can• (1) Billet hoop• (1) Billet bracket• (1) Heavy-duty 180º custom formed silicone outlet hose• (2) Heavy-duty hose clamps• (1) Bracket dowel screw M6x1.0x12mm internal hex• (1) Bracket dowel screw M6x1.0x20mm internal hex

title: BMS CANtool for JB4PRO App BETA
descriptionEn: JB4PRO app without a JB4! This unique OBDII tool allows flashed and factory-tuned BMW vehicles to use the free JB4PRO app for vehicle logging, advanced diagnostics, performance metrics, code read/delete, and much more! It also includes a convenient LED gauge which can be used to display engine information including boost pressure, ignition advance, fuel pressure, fuel trims, and more! The JB4PRO app provides a variety of industry leading features including auto-logging in the background so you never miss the action! It checks your tuning data when viewing logs including confirming boost levels, AFR levels, fuel trims, fuel pressure, and more, are within safe parameters. In addition the JB4PRO app will estimate your 0-60mph, 40-90mph, 60-130mph, 1/8th mile, and 1/4 mile metrics allowing you to confirm your vehicle is operating at peak performance. Also includes CANflap (for 3 and 4 series models), allowing exhaust flapper control via the turn signal button or JB4PRO app! Installation is as quick as plugging CANtool into your OBDII port under the dash! It can then be routed under the seat for invisible operation, or routed to the center console if you want to use the LED gauge feature. The system automatically turns on and off with the ignition system and won't drain your battery while attached!Includes free firmware updates as we add new app and logging features! Optional CANflap operation: Full data logging capabilities of over 40 parameters, including estimated 0-60mph, 40-90mph, 60-130mph, 1/8th mile, and 1/4 mile metrics. Vehicle Fitment Most BMW F and G Chassis Models

title: Coolant Pressure Sensor Adapter (CPA) for BMW & Supra
descriptionEn: Real-time coolant pressure monitoring! Worried about lifting a head gasket on your high boost BMW or Supra turbo? The all-new Burger Motorsports BMW Coolant Pressure Gauge Adapter allows your JB4 to monitor your engine coolant pressure in real-time! As your heads start to lift due to excessive power your coolant pressure will increase. This sensor can detect that increase and alert the JB4 to quickly reduce power to prevent a bad situation from getting worse. Includes a female 1/8 NPT port with can be used with either our sensor or a sensor of your choice. Installation is easy! The adapter fits inline on the coolant overflow tank and plugs in to the JB4 harness using an included posi-tap for power and DSUB pin for signal. Vehicle Fitment ⚠️ May fit other BMW vehicles not listed. title: Kia Stinger / Genesis G70 3.3L Turbo JB4 Performance Tuner (V1)
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 100hp and 100tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app! The JB4 is a plug and play Kia Stinger / Genesis G70 3.3L tuner that plugs into easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. Unlike other tuning systems the JB4 includes a fully programmable CANbus system, upgradable firmware, and data logging capability. CANbus allows the JB4 to take into account pedal input, throttle position, gear, engine speed, air/fuel ratio, fuel trims, ignition advance, knock, and many other factors and incorporate those into the performance mapping. It can also read/delete fault codes, includes unique safety features such as keeping boost pressure low until oil and water is up to temperature to provide proper engine and turbo lucubration and drop to a low boost map if the engine starts to overheat, run lean, excessively knock, or over boost. The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip.Installation is very discrete and it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Includes maps for 91 octane, 93 octane, and E85 (ethanol fuel) mixtures. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes. Also now available with our new JB4PRO board for more heavily modified cars which includes built in Bluetooth, built in ethanol sensor processing eliminating the need for a separate ECA, built in CPI/WMI control eliminating the need for a separate FSB, onboard data-logging memory, plug and play o2 bias wires, built in wiring ports for our 10 bar pressure sensors for low fuel pressure and/or coolant pressure, optional plug and play EWG harness add on, and includes many additional features to be unlocked in the future via free firmware updates! JB4PRO is the ultimate tuning tool for those looking to push their cars to the max!It's well documented the Kia and Genesis platforms are prone to spark blow out at both stock and higher than stock boost levels. If your spark plugs have more than 25k miles on them we'd also suggest upgrading them when running higher boost levels Click here for the suggested 3.3L spark plugs and spark plug gapping tool. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Includes our all-new JB4PRO smartphone connection to wirelessly connect the JB4 via Bluetooth to your iOS or Android device. The JB4PRO Free app allows you to change maps, record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, and update JB4 firmware as we release newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more info on how to use the JB4PRO Free app click here. JB4 Features and Benefits • Power gains of up to 100hp and 100tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 times and 1/4 mile times• Preloaded with custom JB4 tuning software and up to 8 maps for various fuel and modification levels• Ethanol (E85) compatible tuning maps• Able to read/delete fault codes• View and record up to 40 gauges/engine parameters in real-time with the JB4 app.• Boost by gear in 1st, 2nd, and 3rd can be controlled via the JB4 app for a perfect launch• Compatible with JB4PRO app for smartphone logging, tuning changes, and adjustment• The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip• Quick Plug & Play Installation• CANbus OBDII integration offering unrivaled tuning features and performance• Improved performance over non-integrated chip tunes• Runs as smoothly as stock. This is how your vehicle should have come from the factory• Compatible with all driving modes• Fuel economy unchanged during normal driving• 91 octane fuel or better is required for performance gains• Not VIN locked and can be removed without a trace and resold down the road• Includes the rugged JB4 billet aluminum enclosure for protection• Designed and assembled in the USA• 5 year warranty Vehicle Fitment JB4 is compatible across the entire Kia/Hyundai/Genesis turbocharged lineup! If you don't see your vehicle listed, send a quick photo of your engine bay to sales@burgertuning.com & we can verify which JB4 is compatible.KIA• 2018-2023 KIA Stinger GT, GT1, GT2 3.3L Turbo Genesis• 2018+ Genesis G70/G80 3.3L Turbo• 2017+ Genesis G90 3.3L Turbo What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune?Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. descriptionEn: MORE AIR = MORE POWER & BETTER SOUND! Featuring high-quality inverted cone filters, the BMS Elite Performance Intake for the 2025+ G90 G99 BMW M5 offers the highest possible airflow in an attractive and easy-to-install package. Not to mention the intoxicating sound. The BMS Elite Performance Intake retains everything good about the OEM intake system including cold air ducting and lightweight heat shielding airbox bottom, while completely replacing the restrictive top end with new high-flow ducting and two inverted cone performance filters to match. Includes all required hardware. No cutting, drilling, or permanent modifications required. The BMS Elite Intake provides up to 10whp gains at 25psi+ boost levels. Sound and turbo spool-up speed are also improved.We offer two high quality filter options. Our oiled cotton renewable performance filter can be cleaned using an S&B cleaning kit every 15-20k miles and should last the life of your G9x M5. We also offer a Dry extendable filter option, which offers superior filtration for extreme conditions. Our dry performance filters can be easily cleaned with compressed air from the inside out, however will eventually will need to be replaced. Our Burger Motorsports renewable inverted cone filter not only outflows your stock paper filter and last the life of your vehicle, they also include a built-in velocity stack. Velocity stacks allow even more air to be smoothly sucked into your intake system and are used in most racing applications. title: BMS 2025+ RAM 1500 Hurricane SO/HO Dual Oil Catch Can System (PCV & CCV)
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your Hurricane SO/HO Air Intake System! It's no secret that Hurricane turbo motors can suffer from oil control problems causing the oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves and the intake system, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels and the higher the mileage the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The Burger Motorsports dual oil catch can system. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV/CCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV/CCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor to the atmosphere. Most are simply repackaged oil catch cans from smaller/lower power motors shoehorned into place in the RAM 1500 Hurricane engine bay. To solve these problems Burger Motorsports designed their oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the 2025 and newer RAM 1500 Hurricane SO/HO applications. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The cans themselves are guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The heavy-duty hoses match the OEM PCV/CCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV/CCV vapor from leaking to atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Install takes around 30 minutes, includes all required hardware, OEM fittings, and is 100% reversible. Unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during or between oil changes.The BMS dual catch can system features two catch cans for complete protection:Low Side (PCV) – Captures oil vapors at idle and cruiseHigh Side (CCV) – Captures oil vapors under boost Vehicle FitmentCompatible with both SO and HO Hurricane motorsRAM• 2025+ RAM 1500 WARLOCK 3.0L I6 Hurricane SO Twin Turbo• 2025+ RAM 1500 LARAME® 3.0L I6 Hurricane SO Twin Turbo• 2025+ RAM 1500 REBEL® 3.0L I6 Hurricane SO Twin Turbo• 2025+ RAM 1500 BIG HORN® 3.0L I6 Hurricane Twin Turbo• 2025+ RAM 1500 RHO 3.0L I6 Hurricane HO Twin Turbo• 2025+ RAM 1500 LIMITED 3.0L I6 Hurricane HO Twin Turbo• 2025+ RAM 1500 TUNGSTEN 3.0L I6 Hurricane HO Twin Turbo Can dimensions Can dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) TallCan Diameter: 2.7" (68.5mm)Lid Length: Back to nozzle end: 4" (101mm)Nozzle Outer Diameter: .625" (15.87mm) Nozzle Inner Diameter: 0.46" (11.70mm) Can Capacity: 2.5 oz (74 ml) What's Included • (2) RAM Oil Catch Cans• (1) 3 piece CNC billet bracket• (1) 29" Heavy-duty 5/8" hose with a "IN" 45º PCV fitting • (1) 31" Heavy-duty 5/8" hose with a "OUT" 90º PCV fitting• (1) 29" Heavy-duty 5/8" hose with a "IN" 90º PCV fitting • (1) 18" Heavy-duty 5/8" hose with a "OUT" straight PCV fitting• (4) Bracket to can screws M5x0.8x12mm internal hex• (2) Bracket screws M5x0.8x12mm internal hex• (2) Bracket screws M5x0.8x16mm internal hex

title: JB4 Tuner for 2024+ Maserati Granturismo Trofeo & Modena
descriptionEn: The JB4 is a plug and play tuner that attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. It features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 800 times per second using dedicated 10 bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance. Unlike other tuning systems for the Ghibli, it also includes a fully programmable CANbus system, upgradable firmware, and data logging capability. The default map is 4psi over stock peak and maps can be changed using a BMS data cable or Bluetooth adapter. Installation is very discrete and it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO app click here. More info is available soon. Join the discussion here: JB4 Features and Benefits • Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Maserati Vehicle Fitment • 2024+ Maserati GranTurismo Modena 3.0L twin‑turbo V6 • 2024+ Maserati GranTurismo Trofeo 3.0L twin‑turbo V6 What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU.
