title: JB4 for 2025+ Toyota 4Runner 2.4L Turbo
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 75hp on a stock 4Runner! The JB4 PRO is the newest, most advanced and highly featured tuning system available for your 2025-Present Toyota 4Runner 2.4L. Power gains are up to 60hp to the wheels (75hp crank) on a completely stock car on pump gas, gains with bolt-on parts, higher octane, E85 mixtures are even higher.The JB4 features a simple plug and play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other 4Runner tune. Including on the fly in dash map switching between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, and much more. Remember the JB4 Toyota 4Runner tuner does not require any additional modifications! Simply install the JB4 as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new fast and smooth racing experience. Includes the JB4PRO app! Wirelessly connect the JB4 to your iOS or Android device to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. The JB4PRO app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. More information on the JB4PRO app is available here. JB4 Features and Benefits • Power gains of up to 60HP to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Toyota• 2024+ Toyota 4Runner 2.4L Turbocharged I4Fits trims including: Limited, SR, SR5, TRD Off-Road, TRD PreRunner, and TRD Sport, Platinum, TRD Pro, and Trailhunter. What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. 2024 Tacoma dyno for reference (same engine as the 2025+ 4Runner/non-hybrid)

title: Coolant Pressure Sensor Adapter (CPA) for KIA
descriptionEn: Real-time coolant pressure monitoring! Worried about lifting a head gasket on your high boost 3.3L turbo? The all-new Burger Motorsports Kia Coolant Pressure Gauge Adapter allows your JB4 to monitor engine coolant pressure in real time. As cylinder heads begin to lift under excessive power, coolant pressure increases. This sensor detects that rise and alerts the JB4 to quickly reduce power, preventing a minor issue from becoming a major failure. Installation is easy. The adapter installs inline on a coolant hose and plugs directly into the JB4 harness using the included Positap for power and DSUB pin for signal.We offer two separate versions, designed specifically for the JB4 and JB4PRO. title: Fuel-It! CANfuel Sequential Port Fuel Injection Controller (BETA)
descriptionEn: Fuel-It! CANfuel allows your ECU to control up to 8 fuel injectors sequentially in addition to an ethanol content sensor, low fuel pressure sensor, extra pressure sensors, EGT probes, external fuel pumps, and much more. All using the same CANbus technology your ECU already uses to communicate with factory control modules! We’ve redesigned sequential port injection control from the ground up for an easier install, safer operation, and maximum flexibility. With an industry-leading 8 analog inputs, including 5v and signal ground references built in, you'll never run out of sensor I/O. For maximum flexibility we also include 5 analog outputs perfect for running external gauges, signal clamps, and more. And CANfuel even includes onboard Bluetooth for use with our free Android/iOS app! A lot of engineering time has gone into the CANfuel design to set it apart from the competition. For example should it ever fail to get or lose sync with the crankshaft its programmed to revert to batch fire safety mode ensuring your engine never skips a beat. And our high current PWM outputs are setup to source 12v allowing you to ground the other side of your solenoid, relay, etc, for simpler and more reliable wiring! CANfuel is housed in a rugged weatherproof aluminium enclosure and includes a high quality plug and play harness system. Our G Chassis harness fits all G chassis automatic transmission vehicles, while our universal harness is suitable for all other BMW applications, including G chassis manual transmission, F chassis, and E chassis. CANfuel has the following operational modes: JB4 Slave Mode (available now): Those running a JB4 will use slave mode for seamless JB4 tuning integration. In this mode, the CANfuel box integrates with your JB4 allowing it to fully control all the new I/O including sequential fuel injection, ethanol sensor/fuel pressure inputs, external boost solenoids, monitor injection status, and more, right from the JB4 app. The JB4 PI algorithm is configured to accommodate tip-in, auto-tuning based on various ethanol mixtures, low fuel pressure scaling, and much more. In addition, with unlocked ECUs, we provide free unlocked MHD backend flash maps that allow for real-time ECU scaling based on port injection volume and ethanol mixture on the fly. All without having to pay for expensive custom flash tuning! Stand Alone Operation (coming soon!): In this mode, CANfuel operates independently allowing direct port injection mapping using our free CANfuel Bluetooth app. Featuring a 32x32 primary injection table with modifiers for ethanol mixture, fuel pressure, tip-in, EGT, full external solenoid boost PID control, and much more. And our free app allows real-time tuning adjustment! ECU Slave Mode (coming soon!): In this mode, CANfuel fully integrates with your custom MHD-tuned ECU, similar to JB4 Slave mode, allowing the ECU to fully control port injection, external boost solenoids, read external inputs, monitor injection status, and more. CANfuel includes onboard Bluetooth and a free app. The app allows you to independently monitor and log all CANfuel I/O, injector current, and a variety of passive CANbus data being pulled in such as engine temperatures, gear, vehicle speed, and more. Useful for diagnostics or when operating in stand-alone mode. In addition the app lets you load free CANfuel firmware updates with new features and functions as we release them! All without having to struggle with a laptop. CANfuel Specifications:Outputs:8x fuel injectors (sink) with real time injector current/status monitoring4x high load digital PWM up to 2-4 amps (source) 30-100hz (external relays, external boost solenoid, line lock, extra fuel pumps, and more)5x Analog out (sensor offsets and scaling, signal clamping, and more)Inputs:3x Digital In (crankshaft, camshaft, ethanol sensor, MAF, and more)8x Analog In (boost, low fuel pressure, coolant pressure, exhaust back pressure, and more)2x EGT probeAdditional:4x 5v reference pins for powering external sensors4x Signal ground connections for external sensorsBluetooth (free app for Android & iOS)USB (for old timers!)Onboard memory for full background logging Connector pinout: CANfuel N54 JB4 Wiring Guide Install Guide - Click to download CANfuel Sequential Port Fuel Injection Controller Install Guide

title: BMS Magnetic Billet Aluminum Oil Filter Cap for 2015-2020 Ford F150 2.7L V6
descriptionEn: Upgrade your weak plastic F150 oil filter housing cap The Burger Motorsports billet aluminum magnetic F150 oil filter cover directly replaces your weak OE plastic cap for greater protection, ease of removal/install, and great looks under the hood. You can use a 3/8" inch drive ratchet or torque wrench to install and remove. The built-in 32mm hex head does not require a special removal/install tool like the factory cap. Uses the OE oil filter, filter housing o-ring, and filter insert. Anodized for protection. This quality part is a must for any serious F150 owner.MAGNETIC: Equipped with an integrated samarium cobalt magnet to capture dangerous metal shavings and particles that would otherwise circulate through your engine oil and bearings. Unlike other oil filter caps that press fit smaller magnets leaving them vulnerable to damage and displacement during engine heat cycles, our magnets are secured in their precisely machined pockets to safely withstand extreme temperatures and pressure. COOLING FINS: Unlike the plastic OEM cap, our billet aluminum oil filter cap features precision-machined cooling fins that actively dissipate heat. As air flows over the fins, they draw heat away from the oil circulating through the filter housing—helping reduce overall oil temperatures and improve engine longevity. This added thermal efficiency is especially beneficial during aggressive driving, towing, or off-road conditions.🔧 Install: After removing the OEM oil filter cap, remove the filter and transfer the inner plastic filter guide/support to the new BMS billet aluminum oil filter cap and replace the exterior o-rings when installing. Replaces OE/OEM Part Number FT4Z-6A832-C and fits vehicles that use this part number. Features and Benefits • Solid aluminum design is much stronger than brittle plastic• Integrated heat sinks for better oil cooling• Special tools are not required for removal/install like the factory cap• Strong design won't fail under pressure• Reuses OE filter insert and o-ring• Uses factory cartridge filter• Anodized for protection• Looks great under the hood• Available in black, red, and blue• Made in the USA Vehicle Fitment Ford F150• 2015-2020 Ford F150 2.7L EcoBoost® 6 cyl. Turbo What's included?• (1) Billet Aluminum oil filter cap What is billet? In this case, A billet is a solid block of aluminum (lightweight metal) with a size larger than the part. Excess material from the billet is removed by precision CNC machining, essentially carving the part out of solid aluminum. CNC machined parts are consistently stronger, better looking, and last longer than cheaper cast and plastic versions. Please note some engine degreasers and harsh cleaners may fade or damage the anodized finish.

title: Universal LED Flex Fuel Kit with BMS CANflex ECA for JB4, CANbus, Bluetooth, & E85 Integration
descriptionEn: This is the complete solution for adding a ethanol sensor and analyzer to your vehicle with CANbus, Bluetooth, and an LED display in one unit! If you're running E85 in your vehicle, you need this kit! This is a complete kit to install a flex fuel kit in your vehicle in about 30 minutes. With our new custom 180 degree billet fittings, integration with your 5/16" or 3/8" fuel lines has never been easier! Simply disconnect your factory line, install the ethanol sensor with our new custom fittings and reconnect your factory lines...it's that simple! In addition, our new ECA's offer 4 ways to read your ethanol content! The LED display always shows your current ethanol content or you can use your mobile device to connect via bluetooth to read it on your phone! Or, if you have CANbus integration available (consult with your tuner on this) your ECU can now read the ethanol content for full flex fuel capability! As if that wasn't enough, you also connect the 0-5 volt output wire (blue wire) to your analog gauge or ECU to read the ethanol content. title: JB4 for 2024+ Lexus TX 500h 2.4L Turbo
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 75hp on a stock TX 500h! The JB4 PRO is the newest, most advanced and highly featured tuning system available for your 2024-Present Lexus TX 500h 2.4L. Power gains are up to 60hp to the wheels (75hp crank) on a completely stock car on pump gas, gains with bolt-on parts, higher octane, E85 mixtures are even higher. No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUs The JB4 features a simple plug and play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other Lexus TX 500h tune. Including on the fly in dash map switching between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, performance estimates, and much more.Remember the JB4 Lexus TX 500h tuner does not require any additional modifications! Simply install the JB4 as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new fast and smooth racing experience. Includes the JB4PRO app! Wirelessly connect the JB4 to your iOS or Android device to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. The JB4PRO app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. More information on the JB4PRO app is available here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 60hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Lexus• 2024+ Lexus TX 500h 2.4L Turbo What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU.

title: JB4 for B58 INEOS Grenadier
descriptionEn: Power gains up to 80WHP & 100WTQ on a stock Grenadier without the risks of flashing! The JB4 tuner for the B58 powered INEOS Grenadier is the most advanced plug & play tuning system available for the 3.0L turbocharged engine platform. Power gains of up to 80 horsepower and 100 lb-ft of torque at the wheels are possible on a completely stock Grenadier running pump gas. Vehicles equipped with bolt-on upgrades, higher octane fuel, E85 mixtures, or larger turbochargers can see even greater gains. Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! No ECU flash required and fully compatible with locked 🔒 ECUs. The JB4 features a simple plug & play installation harness for fast installation and removal while offering advanced tuning features not available with other tuning systems. These include in-dash map switching between stock and performance maps, optional in-dash boost gauge display, boost limiting by gear for improved traction, progressive water/methanol integration, built-in data logging, fault code reading and clearing, optional electronic wastegate control to prevent throttle closure with exhaust modifications, exhaust flapper control, and many additional features. Unlike many expensive tuning solutions, the JB4 does not require additional stages or supporting modifications. Simply install the JB4 as your first upgrade and immediately experience improved power delivery, smoother acceleration, and stronger turbo performance. The JB4 requires no manual setup for basic operation. However users who want to adjust maps, log engine data, or access advanced tuning features can add one of our optional Bluetooth smartphone adapters. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Map Guide Map0: Stock tuning – JB4 disabled Map1: +3psi over stock (91 octane) Map2: +4psi over stock (91–93 octane) Map3: +6psi over stock (93+ octane) Map4: +8psi over stock (Race gas or 30% E85) Map5: +10psi over stock (Race gas or 30% E85) Map6: Custom tuning map Map7: Progressive water/methanol map Map8: Valet / Low boost mode JB4 Power Gains, Features & Benefits • Up to 80hp and 100 lb-ft torque gains on a stock INEOS Grenadier• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment INEOS Grenadier 2023+ INEOS Grenadier 3.0L B58 SUV 2023+ INEOS Grenadier Quartermaster 3.0L B58 Pickup What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play performance tuner for turbocharged vehicles. It installs between engine sensors and the factory ECU allowing it to safely manipulate boost pressure, ignition timing, and fueling for substantial horsepower gains while maintaining factory safety systems. The JB4 stands apart from other tuning systems through advanced CANbus integration, smartphone connectivity, ethanol compatibility, and continuous firmware updates that expand functionality and performance over time. The JB4 system is not VIN locked and can easily be transferred to another vehicle or resold later. The JB4 has been the gold standard in plug-and-play turbocharged tuning for more than a decade and is used by enthusiasts in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes. The JB4 actively adjusts boost pressure, ignition timing, air-fuel ratios, and fuel trims using real-time engine data through its CANbus connection. This allows the JB4 to deliver performance gains comparable to ECU flash tuning while retaining factory safety systems and without permanently modifying the ECU. title: JB4PRO Bluetooth Adapter & Free App
descriptionEn: The new JB4 PRO free app and Bluetooth adapter are the perfect connection companion for your JB4! It starts with our newly designed Bluetooth adapter featuring a relatively simple, low-cost, high-power, and reliable BLE chipset. The new adapter is compact enough to fit fully inside your JB4 enclosure and powerful enough to ensure a consistent connection inside the car.The all-new JB4PRO free app, which runs exclusively on our new adapter was designed from the ground up in-house for ease of use, simplicity, and reliability. Able to operate fully offline, it includes all the features you've come to expect from a JB4 app, including map switching, live data monitoring, auto logging, read/delete fault codes, firmware updates, setting changes, and more. We've also added useful help functions to describe what the settings do, performance metrics and analysis tools so you can evaluate your car's performance, GPS elevation/speed as a logging channel, and often requested functions such as "restore default settings". Download the JB4PRO free app for Android here.Download the JB4PRO free app for iPhone here.The new JB4PRO adapter is compatible with most JB4 systems from 2020+. It is incompatible with E chassis BMW or older systems that require a separate power wire. Older systems can email a photo of their JB4 control board to sales@burgertuning.com for compatibility confirmation. The JB4PRO app requires compatible JB4 firmware. Check your firmware notes to ensure it states "Added support for JB4PRO free app" or let us know if there isn't compatible firmware posted yet for your application! NOTE: The JB4 always remains on the last map/settings selected, you only need to connect if you want to change maps, monitor engine data, or change settings! Have questions? Join the discussion here. The new JB4 PRO control unit fits conveniently inside the JB4 case. JB4 PRO is the latest JB4 tech.

title: LIGHTWEIGHT G90 G99 BMW M5 Wheel Spacers w/10 Bolts
descriptionEn: LIGHTWEIGHT G90 G99 BMW M5 Wheel Spacers For Less Rotating Mass Simple, bolt-on handling and looks for your BMWWider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks Introducing the all-new Lightweight G90 G99 BMW M5 Wheel Spacers by Burger Motorsports! Crafted for enthusiasts like you, these spacers are the ultimate upgrade for your G chassis BMW, designed to enhance both aesthetics and handling. These are a lightweight racing version of our popular G chassis BMW wheel spacers with new concentric Floating Seat bolts. What sets these apart? These lightweight racing spacers boast a cutting-edge hub-centric design featuring new concentric floating seat lug bolts, ensuring precision fitment and maximum performance on the track or the street. Backed by over a decade of expertise in wheel spacer design, technology, and manufacturing Burger Motorsports guarantees that these spacers are the pinnacle of innovation and quality.Wheel spacers are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your BMW. Our wheel spacers push your rims and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability, and handling. Spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset, or just making your M5 look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your BMW ensuring a perfect vibration-free fit. Comes with a packet of anti-seize grease to place on the factory hub to aid in later removal. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports wheel spacer is CNC machined from high grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our BMW Wheel Spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 10 extended concentric swivel washer lug bolts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. All Burger Motorsports wheel spacers are hub-centric and are safe to use on xDrive (all-wheel drive) BMW vehicles. Hub-Centric: This means our spacer's center bore matches your factory BMW hub and the factory-like hub on the Burger Motorsports spacers match the center bore in your wheel for a vibration-free fit. Concentric Floating Seat Lug Bolts: Each bolt is made from 12.9 Motorsport Grade steel for strength and safety and zinc plated for corrosion resistance. They contain a concentric floating seat washer to give the bolt a secure mating surface to torque to stay torqued and to reduce wheel seat chafing during installation and removal. What width wheel spacer should I get?Most G90 G99 M5 BMW vehicles with factory wheels and tire sizes take 13mm in the front and 15mm in the rear. We recommend measuring before ordering. The photos and guidelines on this website are for reference only. Your BMW might have different results with the same size spacers due to different wheels, tire sizes, packages, and offsets. Installation: Simply remove the wheel, place the spacer on the hub and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download the install guide. FREE Wheel Pin tool with purchase of 2 pairs of wheel spacers on the same receipt.To get the free wheel pin with a 2 pair wheel spacer purchase, add 2 pairs of wheel spacers to your cart, go to the link below and add the free wheel pin to the cart. When you hit the checkout button the items will be discounted to FREE!Click Here for the BMW Wheel Pin Tool ($10.00 Value) Vehicle Fitment BMW M5• 2025+ S68 G90 BMW M5• 2025+ S68 G99 BMW M5 TouringG90 G99 BMW M5 Wheel Spacer SpecificationsBolt Thread Size: M14 x 1.25Bolt Seat: Cone Seat / Concentric Wheel Fasteners: Extended 12.9 grade zinc coated lug boltsSpacer Material: Lightweight Anodized Black 7075-T6 AluminumTorque Specifications 105 ft-lbs (142 nm)What's included:(2) Lightweight Racing Wheel spacers(10) Extended 12.9 grade Concentric Swivel Washer Lug Bolts(1) Packet of anti-seize ⚠️ Read instructions before installing. title: Metal Oil Filter Housing Upgrade with Filter & Cooler for Gen 1 & 2 B58 BMW
descriptionEn: Upgrade your plastic Gen 1 & 2 B58 BMW oil filter housing to metal! An engine oil cooler and filter housing plays a critical role in maintaining optimal oil temperature, preventing the oil from breaking down under high heat and load, and filtering damaging particles out of your oil. The B58 BMW engine uses the engine’s coolant for thermal regulation of the oil. The problem is the OE housing is made out of brittle plastic. This part will suffer internal cracking and leaks at some point that lead to oil and coolant mixing, a known potentially catastrophic problem if left unchecked. Indicators like fluid leaks or “milkshake” oil might be noticeable if caught in time but it's just a matter of time. The solution is this complete metal housing upgrade with new gasket seals, oil filter cap, and heavy-duty oil filter, new bolts, and an upgraded oil cooler that all exceed OEM standards. If your B58 is stock, modded or has high(er) mileage we recommend this upgrade. Optional recommended billet aluminum oil filter cap available here. title: JB4 Tuner for 2025+ Land Rover Defender OCTA V8 Twin Turbo (BETA)
descriptionEn: Gains are 125whp on pump gas and up to 260whp on higher octane or E85 mixtures. Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! The ultimate tune for your 4.4L V8 powered Land Rover Defender OCTA. The JB4 allows you to go from factory stock to full race and everywhere in between. The JB4 installs and removes easily and includes many unique features not found in any other tune, including user-adjustable 1st and 2nd gear boost limiting, smartphone integration, electronic wastegate control (under development), ethanol fuel support, and built-in advanced CANbus-based diagnostic tools. Installation is easy and completely removable with no splicing or cutting of factory wires making the JB4 an excellent choice for your V8 OCTA engine.No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUs Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 FEATURES & BENEFITS • Gains are 125whp on pump gas and up to 260whp on higher octane or E85 mixtures.• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Land Rover• 2025+ Land Rover OCTA 4.4L V8 Twin Turbo What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and it's DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. 2025 Defender OCTA w/ JB4 Dyno Testing:

title: BMS Oil Catch Can for G Chassis Gen 3 2025+ B58 BMW M340 M440
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your Gen 3 B58 BMW Air Intake System! It's no secret that B58 BMW turbo motors can suffer from oil control problems causing the oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves and the VANOS system, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels and the higher the milage the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The Burger Motorsports oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor to the atmosphere. Most are simply repackaged oil catch cans from smaller/lower power motors shoehorned into place in the turbo BMW engine bay. To solve these problems Burger Motorsports designed their oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the 2025 and newer Gen 3 B58 turbo BMW application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking to atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Install takes around 20 minutes, includes all required hardware, and is 100% reversible. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here. Requires either the BMS B58 G20 Billet Intake or the BMS B58 BMW M240i M340i Competition Cold Air Intake to fit or if you would like to keep the factory intake you can use the BMS G20 B58 intake muffler delete to make room needed for the can. Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency • Promotes Engine Longevity • Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large Intake/Outlet No Tapering Down• Anodized Black Aluminum• Made in the USA & Guaranteed for Life• Simply unscrew the base every 3-6 months to empty or use the 1/8th NPT drain plug.• Non-Clogging, No Service Needed Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs • Large 16mm+ inlet and outlet exceeds OEM PCV sizing• Precision CNC Machined from Solid Blocks of High-Grade Aluminum Vehicle Fitment (GEN 3 B58) ⚠️ ATTENTION: This only fits the exact vehicles below. BMW 3 Series• 2025+ G20 G21 B58 GEN3 BMW M340i including xDriveBMW 4 Series• 2025+ G22 G23 G26 B58 GEN3 BMW M440i including Gran Coupe and xDrive Can dimensions Can dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) TallCan Diameter: 2.7" (68.5mm)Lid Length: Back to nozzle end: 4" (101mm)Nozzle Outer Diameter: .75" (19.2mm) Nozzle Inner Diameter: 0.669" (17mm) Can Capacity: 2.5 oz (74 ml) What's Included • (1) BMS G Chassis B58 BMW Oil Catch Can• (1) Billet B58 bracket• (1) Billet B58 90º 19mm nipple to PCV bracket adapter nipple• (1) Heavy-duty formed silicone inlet hose• (1) Heavy-duty straight 3" silicone outlet hose• (2) Bracket to can screws M5x0.8x12mm internal hexCars with factory intake• (1) BMS B58 intake muffle delete New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here.The main advantage of a transparent can is that you can easily see the contents inside. This allows for quick checks on oil levels, contamination, and sludge buildup without needing to open the can. ⚠️ ATTENTION: This product may not be suitable for use in regions where temperatures frequently drop to 32°F (0°C) or below.

Now you can extend the life of your automatic transmission by installing the new Burger Motorsports High Capacity Trans Cooler kit. title: LIGHTWEIGHT F Chassis BMW Wheel Spacers w/10 Bolts
descriptionEn: LIGHTWEIGHT BMW Wheel Spacers For Less Rotating Mass Simple, bolt-on handling and looks for your BMWWider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks Introducing the all-new Lightweight BMW Wheel Spacers by Burger Motorsports! Crafted for enthusiasts like you, these spacers are the ultimate upgrade for your F chassis BMW, designed to enhance both aesthetics and handling. These are a lightweight racing version of our popular F chassis BMW wheel spacers with new floating seat washer bolts. What sets these apart? These lightweight racing spacers boast a cutting-edge hub-centric design featuring new concentric floating seat lug bolts, ensuring precision fitment and maximum performance on the track or the street. Backed by over a decade of expertise in wheel spacer design, technology, and manufacturing Burger Motorsports guarantees that these spacers are the pinnacle of innovation and quality.Whether you're looking to achieve the perfect stance, improve cornering stability, or simply enhance the aggressive look of your BMW, or all of the above, BMS spacers deliver on every front. Enhance your driving experience with the best of the best.Wheel spacers are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your BMW. Our wheel spacers push your rims and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability, and handling. Spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset, or just making your BMW look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your BMW ensuring a perfect vibration-free fit. Comes with a packet of anti-seize grease to place on the factory hub to aid in later removal. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports wheel spacer is CNC machined from high grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our BMW Wheel Spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 10 extended concentric swivel washer lug bolts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. All Burger Motorsports wheel spacers are hub-centric and are safe to use on xDrive (all-wheel drive) BMW vehicles. Hub-Centric: This means our spacer's center bore matches your factory BMW hub and the factory-like hub on the Burger Motorsports spacers match the center bore in your wheel for a vibration-free fit. Concentric Floating Seat Lug Bolts: Each bolt is made from 12.9 Motorsport Grade steel for strength and safety and zinc plated for corrosion resistance. They contain a concentric floating seat washer to give the bolt a secure mating surface to torque to stay torqued and to reduce wheel seat chafing during installation and removal. What width wheel spacer should I get?Most F Chassis BMW vehicles with factory wheels and tire sizes take 10mm to 12mm in the front and 12mm to 15mm in the rear. 20mm is for specific G applications. We recommend measuring before ordering. The photos and guidelines on this website are for reference only. Your BMW might have different results with the same size spacers due to different wheels, tire sizes, packages, and offsets. Installation: Simply remove the wheel, place the spacer on the hub and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download the install guide. title: Stinger/G70 3.3t ECU/TCU map (DIGITAL DOWNLOAD)
descriptionEn: BMS ECU or TCU map for use with the EK1 flashing system. BMS ECU back end flash maps: We've got pretty solid JB4 back end flash maps developed now. Changes include revised air/fuel targets and scalar mapping for more consistent fueling, rescaling some annoyance limp mode limiters like turbine speed or boost too high, revised calculated torque for improved shifting, increasing shift timing for firmer shifts, and of course bumping up ignition advance for more power. With the BEF loaded you continue to use the JB4 maps as normal for determining how aggressive you want to run, boost by gear changes, etc. This gives you the best of both worlds. All the functionality and on the fly map changes a JB4 offers with the additional tuning tables a flash offers! RACE: Ignition advance set to around 17 degrees peak, AFR around 11.9:1 at peak HP, suggested for those running good quality 93 octane up through 30% E85. Typically cars that are not running CPI.RACE_IGN: Similar to RACE but ignition advance has been raised to 19 degrees peak, suitable for aggressive WMI applications running 93-E30.E85 IGN19: Ignition advance set for around 19 degrees peak, AFR around 12.4:1 at peak HP, suggested for those running E40+. 40% E85 can be run on the factory hardware but for higher mixtures require CPI, WMI, or our HPFP.All maps feature 9 degree minimum shift timing, and burble maps include exhaust burble in sport mode only. Note BMS complies with all emissions regulations and will not remove or disable any emissions equipment or monitor, so don't bother asking. BMS TCU Map: Shift points optimized for tuned stock turbo performance (1-4 around 5900rpm, 5th around 6300rpm for 60-130 runs), shift pressures increased for quicker shifts and reduced transmission wear. For models where applicable to launch use brake boost method: press brake down, press gas pedal to desired engine RPM/launch strength, release brake pedal, floor gas pedal. If this method won't work on your calibration we suggest our brake boost switch. Process for loading: 1) Order your EK1Lite here: https://burgertuning.com/products/ek1-mini2-by-sxth2) Ensure the EK1 has the latest firmware from https://ek1tuning.com/ which allows it to handle EKR files. Note if you have EKP files previously purchased from SXTH those can be converted to the new EKR format on ek1s site.3) Purchase your ECU and TCU maps from our store here: https://burgertuning.com/products/st...gital-download4) After purchase you will be receive an email asking for your calibration, EK1 serial number, and the last six if your vehicle VIN. Reply with that information and we will prepare and email your EKR file(s).5) Copy the EKR file to your EK1 and with your ignition fully on, engine off, select "write" to flash the appropriate module. Note patching is no longer required with EKR files.6) Note BMS does not provide original files and the new format only allows you to read your ECU/TCU application ID (calibration) but not the full file. So you can not generate your own original with their new system.7) Note the EK1 "ECU read cable" used to read out ECU/TCU data is NOT required unless you have some unique calibration that EK1 has not seen before. Video of how to lookup your ECU or TCU application ID (calibration): TCU: Module is named "CPTSH2.08.1" and application data ID (calibration) will looks like SIK0T33NH0 or TCK0T33NB0 for example. ECU: Module is named "Siemens SIMM2L 260" and application data ID (calibration) will look like IPNNDMNZ_N2A, CEMO3TMW_R0A, or CKKO3TM__G0A for example.

descriptionEn: Enhance your vehicle's performance and shifting precision with the BMS "dog bone" lower motor mount Insert. Designed to fill the voids in your flimsy factory lower engine mount, this high-quality 6061 aluminum alloy insert reduces excessive drivetrain movement, delivering crisper shifts and improved driving dynamics. Built to withstand aggressive driving, it prevents tire slip during wheel-hop and maintains the drivetrain's correct position, ensuring long-lasting performance and stability. Ideal for FWD vehicles and MQB & MQB 'EVO' models with 2.0 TSI, 1.8 TSI, 2.5 TFSI, and 2.0 TDI engines. Confirm compatibility with OE part number 5Q0198037F subframe mount before purchasing.🔧 Installation: Simply remove the lower motor mount bolt, place this upgrade inside the mount and replace the bolt. title: KIA Stinger/Genesis G70 Stage 2 High Pressure Fuel Pump (HPFP) Upgrade for the 2018+ 3.3L Motor
descriptionEn: This new KIA Stinger/Genesis G70 3.3L Stage 2 high pressure pump upgrade is a direct replacement for your factory high pressure pump offering over 80% more fuel flow capacity! Perfect for those looking to run heavy E85 mixtures without having to add on WMI or CPI. Includes all required installation hardware for a clean plug and play install in your 2018+ KIA Stinger/Genesis G70 3.3L. We now have a few variations to choose from based on your needs: HPFP Upgrade Only = This kit contains everything you need to upgrade your HPFP and includes the HPFP, adapter plate, harness adapter, fuel line, and hardware. HPFP Upgrade with BMS CANflex Kit = This kit contains the HPFP upgrade and adds a flex fuel kit to your selection. This variant integrates the new BMS CANflex LED ECA that includes both a digital display box to monitor ethanol mixtures as well as a voltage output for those running a JB4. Note the display box is not weather proof and must be routed either inside the glove box or under a cover in the engine bay for protection from the elements. This kit also supports CANbus operation and our 10bar low fuel pressure sensor kit making it ideal for future expansion. HPFP Upgrade for existing Flex Fuel Kit = If you're already running one of our flex fuel kits, this option will upgrade your HPFP while keeping your flex fuel kit. HPFP Install Kit Only = This kit contains everything you need to upgrade your HPFP and includes adapter plate, harness adapter, fuel line, and hardware. This kit does NOT include an HPFP. HPFP Install Kit Only with BMS CANflex Kit = This kit contains the HPFP Install Kit (HPFP NOT included) adds a flex fuel kit to your selection. This variant integrates the new BMS CANflex LED ECA that includes both a digital display box to monitor ethanol mixtures as well as a voltage output for those running a JB4. Note the display box is not weather proof and must be routed either inside the glove box or under a cover in the engine bay for protection from the elements. This kit also supports CANbus operation and our 10bar low fuel pressure sensor kit making it ideal for future expansion. HPFP Install Kit Only for existing Flex Fuel Kit = If you're already running one of our flex fuel kits this option will allow you to upgrade your HPFP while keeping your flex fuel kit. This kit does NOT include an HPFP. FAQ:What is the difference between this pump and CPI?Both CPI and the upgraded high pressure pump are meant to address the same issue, high fuel pressure dropping under higher boost levels on E85 mixtures. Without CPI on E40 fuel you're limited to around JB4 map3 or map4 boost levels (~18psi) before fuel pressure drops out. With this pump you'll be able to run JB4 map5 boost levels and above (~21psi) on E40 with the factory flash.CPI is generally less expensive but a little more involved to install and requires an 1/8" NPT bung to mount the nozzle. CPI requires a JB4 to control it. CPI may require some JB4 setting tweaks to get the right fuel volume for your specific car and situation. The high pressure pump is more of an install and forget it type solution with the main tradeoff being the higher cost.Can I run straight E85 with this pump?The pump itself is the same pump used in our BMW B58 Stage2 fuel pump kit which supports well over 600whp on straight E85. But running heavier ethanol mixtures requires tuning changes in addition to the fuel pump. While up to around E50 is relatively easy to dial in as you increase the E85 mixture certain changes to the fuel scalars, AFR mapping, spark dwell, cranking tables, ignition advance, and others are required for the car to operate properly. For JB4 customers these changes are addressed in our JB4 back end flash maps loaded via the EK1. Download the free BMS CANflex apps here: If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here! IOS coming soon! Vehicle Fitment • 2018-2023 KIA Stinger GT, GT1, GT2 3.3L V6• 2018+ Genesis G70 3.3L V6Does not fit 2.0L 4 cylinder models. The basic kit includes • (1) Upgraded High-Pressure Fuel Pump (HPFP)• (1) Billet Adapter Plate• (1) Low-pressure Line (Triple lined crimped fittings PTFE/SS/Nylon Braided)• (1) Custom wiring harness• (2) M6 x 1 x 50 fuel pump screws• (2) M6 x 1 x 20 adapter plate screws• (1) Super Lube®

title: BMS B58 BMW M240i M340i M440i Competition Cold Air Intake for Pure 900 Turbo
sku: 1123 Custom 4" filter - 9 airbox lid/heat shield screws, 2 maf screws. 12.25" of weather stripping-2
descriptionEn: For Gen 2 B58 powered vehicles equipped with the Pure 900 turbo. Introducing the Burger Motorsports Competition Cold Air Intake for the Gen 2 B58 powered 2019-2024 BMW M340i, 2022-2024 M440i, and 2022+ M240i equipped with an upgraded Pure 900 turbocharger. Designed from the ground up to be the best in every aspect with over a year invested in street and track testing. This is the first intake for the Gen 2 B58 that follows a clean OEM+ look and materials but has the intoxicating sound and performance of an open intake. Inside, you'll find our proprietary 4" outlet renewable inverted cone performance filter; outside, you'll find unsurpassed OEM fitment, materials, and quality. The BMS competition intake has a clear window on top for quick filter inspection, uses the OEM cold air inlet, and has a huge inlet hole on the cold side of the airbox for more cold air for your Pure 900 turbo and fantastic sound! The factory heat shield is reused to keep those intake temps as low as the factory intended. The rubber accordion hose and factory resonator are replaced with a huge smooth 4" pipe to the Pure 900 turbo. This intake keeps IATs as low as possible while maximizing airflow to your Pure 900 Turbo. Our Burger Motorsports renewable inverted cone filters include a built-in velocity stack. Velocity stacks allow even more air to be smoothly sucked into your intake system and are used in most racing applications. OPTIONAL: Welded on .75" (19mm) PCV fitting for oil catch cans. ⚠️ ATTENTION: Requires slight trimming of the factory intake heat shield to clear the large 4" tube when used with the BMS Competition Intake airbox. Designed to work with OEM or BMS Billet Strut BracesB58 Turbo & Intake Heat Shield recommended for use with this intake. Features & Benefits • Enclosed intake system for Pure 900 turbos• 4" Intake tube• Retains OEM heat shield for low IATs• Dual Cold Air Inlets• Retains OEM cold air ducting• Looks great under the hood• Renewable inverted cone air filter Gen 2 B58 Vehicle Fitment (Pure 900 Turbo) BMW 2 Series• 2022+ G42 Gen 2 B58 BMW M240i and M240i xDrive BMW 3 Series• 2019-2024 G20 G21 Gen 2 B58 BMW M340i and M340i xDrive BMW 4 Series• 2021-2024 G22 G23 G26 Gen 2 B58 BMW M440i and M440i xDrive including Gran Coupe What's included• (1) Airbox lid with clear window• (5) Stainless Steel button head M6 x 1mm thread, 10mm long hex drive airbox lid screws • (4) Stainless Steel button head M6 x 1mm thread, 10mm long hex drive heat shield screws• (2) Stainless steel M4 x 0.7mm Thread, 8mm Long MAF sensor screws• (1) Modified High flow airbox bottom• (1) 4" Blue Inverted cone BMS renewable performance filter (PURE-1123-4-W-PS-BLUE)• (1) 4" High flow intake tube• (1) 4" Custom 90º silicone coupler• (2) 4" heavy-duty 90-110 hose clamps• (1) 12.25" piece of rubber weather strippingPerformance air filter cleaning & oil kit available here.Replacement intake Blue Oil filters are available here. title: F9x BMW M5/M8 S63TU Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Kit
descriptionEn: Make tremendous amounts of power on pump gas! Water/Methanol/Alcohol injection commonly referred to as WMI allows you to make tremendous amounts of power on pump gas. The effect is similar to running 100 octane race gas or E85 fuel all the time with the additional cooling benefits allowing for more power than you can make on race gas or E85 alone. The key to a safe and effective WMI setup is tuning integration. The BMS S63TU F90 BMW M5/M6 WMI kit integrates into the JB4 tuning system allowing for precise mapping based on boost, throttle position, engine speed, intake temperature, advance, gear, and other data elements available to the JB4 through its CANbus system. In addition, a pump flow signal is fed back to the JB4 allowing for a safe and smooth progressive boost mapping. If the tank runs empty or flow drops for any reason the JB4 will safely back down performance to avoid detonation. Boost is held low until WMI is properly flowing to avoid tip in knock common with non-integrated WMI setups. In addition, WMI can be activated or disabled right from the JB4 Mobile app , will automatically disengage during traction control or safety map situations, and WMI flow data can be displayed via your JB4 Mobile logging device.The BMS water/methanol injection (WMI) kit includes a high quality Aquatec WMI pump made to our specifications, high speed solenoid with leak-free compression fittings, a WMI filter, and basic wiring and hardware.For 1 gallon clear tank users that can mount with the pump in front of the firewall simplifying the install process. Alternatively, the pump can be attached to the washer fluid reservoir eliminating the need for a separate tank. NOTE no bracket is provided to mount the pump or tank and customers will need to setup this aspect of the installation on their own. For our development, we used zip-ties to attach the pump to the strut brace and connected it to the washer fluid tank. Customers may also choose to mount the 1 gallon tank in the trunk or to not use the 1 gallon tank and explore one of our larger trunk mount tank options such as the 2 gallon integrated tank. OPTIONAL: FSB JB4 Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) controller The BMS JB4 Failsafe Box (FSB) Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) controller allows the JB4 to control your WMI pump and solenoid for dynamic progressive flow mapping. It also allows the JB4 to monitor pump current to overlay it with CANbus feedback for tuning parameters such as fuel trims and fuel pressure to provide a comprehensive flow-based safety system. OPTIONAL: AEM Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) controller The key to a safe and effective Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) setup is tuning integration. The base kit includes the AEM water/methanol controller featuring large, turn-resistant knobs and larger numbering to easily set accurate start and full activation points, with covered status LED and test buttons for added splash resistance. A plug is integrated into the controller housing for mating to the redesigned wiring harness's positive-lock connector. The Boost Dependent controller housing has a molded-in, barbed nipple to accept a boost vacuum reference and color coded wiring harness. Vehicle Fitment • 2018-2024 BMW F90 M5 and M5 Competition • 2020+ BMW F92 M8 Coupe and M8 Competition • 2020+ BMW F93 M8 Gran Coupe• 2020+ BMW F91 M8 Convertible Standard Kit contains: WMI PumpWMI solenoid & filter assemblyF90 plug and play nozzle adaptersTwo BM7 nozzlesCompression fittings for nozzles, solenoid, tee, & filter15' of WMI fluid line15' black and red wiring10 amp fuse Grounding forks for FSB, pump, and power splice Install Gude General directions and discussion thread here: https://www.jb4tech.com/forum/model-specific-engine-tuning-modification-discussion/m/28012- Burger Motorsports F90 BMW M5 WMI nozzles and adapters in place F90 WMI hose integration with windshield washer reservoir Optional Upgraded Billet WMI tank cap w/safety check valve This high quality custom billet WMI cap includes an integrated check valve to let air in and prevent dangerous WMI vapor/fumes from getting out! Made in USA. Available here.

title: BMW B38/B46/B48 JB4 Tuner
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 100HP on a stock vehicle without the risks of flashing! The JB4 is the most advanced and highly featured tuning system available for your B38, B46, and B48 powered BMW. Power gains are up to 40hp to the wheels (55hp crank) for a B48, gains with bolt-on parts, higher octane, E85 mixtures, and larger turbos are even higher. Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUsThe JB4 features a simple plug & play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other tune. Including on the fly in-dash map switching between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, progressive water/methanol support, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, direct EWG control to prevent throttle closure with exhaust modifications, exhaust flapper control (most models), and much more. Other more expensive tuners may claim to equal the JB4's technology but upon closer examination lack most if not all of the JB4's features.Remember the JB4 does not require any additional modifications or previous stages. Simply install it as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new, fast, and smooth racing experience. The JB4 also does not require any user setup or customization, but for those who are interested in changing maps, logging, customization, and loading new features as we add them, we suggest adding one of our Bluetooth phone adapters!The JB4 automatically detects between the B38, B46, B48 models at boot up making installation and setup a snap. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Map Guide: Map0: Stock tuning, fully disable JB4Map1: 3psi over stock added (91 octane)Map2: 4psi over stock added (91-93 octane)Map3: 6psi over stock added (93+ octane)Map4: Absolute target map with peak target of 20psi (93+ and/or 30% E85, EWG connector suggested) Map5: Absolute target map with peak target of 22psi (30% E85+ fuel, EWG connector suggested)Map6: Custom tuning map -- see details on JB4tech.com B58 JB4 pageMap7: Progressive WMI map with tuning a function of meth flow and user-defined boost additive. Map8: VALET / Low Boost MapJB4_B58 is CARB Approved Under Executive Order (EO) No.D-744-4 for all 2016-2018 BMW 230i, 330i, 430i, 530i, 340i, 440i, 740i, M240i, and X1 applications. JB4 Power Gains, Features, & Benefits • Power gains of up to 100hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 times and 1/4 mile times• Preloaded with custom JB4 BMW tuning software and up to 8 maps for various fuel and modification levels• Ethanol (E85) compatible tuning maps• Able to read/delete fault codes• View and record up to 40 different gauges/engine parameters in real time with the JB4 app.• Boost by gear in 1st, 2nd, and 3rd can be controlled via the JB4 app for a perfect launch• Exhaust flap control for via BC button for most models.• Compatible with JB4 Mobile for smartphone logging, tuning changes, and adjustment• The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip• Quick Plug & Play Installation• CANbus OBDII integration offering unrivaled tuning features and performance• Improved performance over non-integrated chip tunes• Runs as smoothly as stock, this is how your vehicle should have come from the factory• Compatible with all driving modes• Fuel economy unchanged during normal driving• 91 octane fuel or better required for performance gains• Not VIN locked and can be removed without a trace and resold down the road• Includes the rugged JB4 billet aluminum enclosure for protection• Designed and assembled in the USA• 5-year warranty B38/B46/B48 Vehicle Fitment Note: If your BMW has a B38/B46/B48 engine and you don't see your exact model on the list below please email us. BMW 1 Series• 2019-2024 F40 M135i • 2020+ F40 B48 BMW 128ti• 2019-2019 F40 B38 BMW 118i• 2016-2019 F20/F21 B48 BMW 120i, 125i• 2015-2019 F20/F21 B38 BMW 116i, 118i BMW 2 Series• 2022+ G42 B48 BMW 220i, 230i• 2017-2021 F22 F23 B48 BMW 230i including xDrive• 2017-2021 F22 F23 B48 BMW 225i including xDrive• 2017-2021 F22 F23 B46 BMW 220i including xDrive• 2015-2021 F22 F23 B38 BMW 218i• 2015-2021 F45 F46 B38 BMW 216i Active tourer and GT• 2014-2020 F45 F46 B38 BMW 218i, 220i Active tourer and GT• 2019+ F44 B48 BMW M235i Gran Coupé including xDrive BMW 3 Series• 2019+ G20 G21 B46 B48 BMW 318i, 320i, 320Li, 320e, 330i, 330e, 320Li including xDrive• 2016-2018 F30 B48 BMW 330i, 330e including xDrive• 2016-2018 F30 B48 BMW 325i including xDrive• 2016-2018 F30 B46 BMW 320i including xDrive• 2016-2018 F30 B46 BMW 318i including xDrive BMW 4 Series• 2021+ G22 G23 G26 B48 BMW 420i, 430i including Gran Coupe and xDrive • 2016-2020 F32 F33 F36 B48 BMW 430i including Gran Coupe and xDrive • 2016-2020 F32 F33 F36 B48 BMW 425i including xDrive • 2016-2020 F32 F33 F36 B46 BMW 420i including xDrive• 2016-2020 F32 F33 F36 B38 BMW 418i BMW 5 Series• 2017-2023 G30 B46 BMW B48 530i 530e including xDrive• 2021-2023 G30 BMW 545e BMW 6 Series• 2018+ G32 G33 B48 BMW 630i including xDrive BMW 7 Series• 2016-2022 G11 G12 B48 BMW 730i including xDrive BMW X Series• 2016+ F48 B46 B48 BMW X1 28i including xDrive• 2018+ F47 B46 B48 BMW X2 28i including xDrive• 2018+ G01 B48 BMW X3 2.0i, X3 3.0i including xDrive• 2019+ G02 B48 BMW X4 2.0i, X4 3.0i including xDrive• 2019+ G05 B48 BMW X5 30i including xDrive BMW Z4• 2019+ G29 B46 B48 BMW Z4 30i and Z4 20i What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. title: Dual BMS Oil Catch Can Kit for 2021+ KIA K5/Hyundai Sonata 1.6L (Vacuum & Boost)
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your KIA/Hyundai 1.6L Air Intake System! It's no secret that the KIA/Hyundai 1.6L turbocharged motors suffer from oil control problems causing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The KIA/Hyundai 1.6L dual PCV+CCV oil catch can kit. While there are other dual catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor / ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor to the atmosphere. Most are simply repackaged universal oil catch cans from smaller / lower power motors shoe horned into place in the turbo BMW engine bay.To solve these problems BMS designed our oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbo KIA/Hyundai 1.6L application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The cans themselves are guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking to atmosphere. The mounting location was selected to allow more efficient operation and retain a stealth look. Install takes around 25 minutes, includes all required hardware, and is 100% reversible. Simply unscrew the base of the cans or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. Boost Side (PCV) Our boost side OCC separates oil traveling through the PCV while the engine is operating under boost pressure (e.g. heavy throttle) and our vacuum side OCC separates oil traveling through the PCV while the engine is operating under vacuum (idle and low throttle). When used together they provide the ultimate protection keeping oil from coating your intake ports and valves during all phases of engine operation! Vacuum Side (CCV) The BMS vacuum side oil catch can works in conjunction with the boost side can to prevent engine oil and PCV gunk from coating your intake valves and hurting engine efficiency under engine vacuum operation. Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency • Promotes Engine Longevity • Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Double Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large Intake/Outlet No Tapering Down• Stealth Mounting on Cool Side of the Motor• Anodized Black Aluminum• Made in USA & Guaranteed for Life• Simply unscrew base every 3-6 months to empty or use the 1/8th NPT drain plug.• Non-Clogging, No Service Needed Air/Oil Separation Double Baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs • Inlet and outlet OEM PCV sizing• Precision CNC Machined from Solid Blocks of High Grade Aluminum Vehicle Fitment KIA• 2021+ KIA K5 1.6L SmartStream® Turbo• 2021+ Hyundai Sonata 1.6L SmartStream® TurboMay work on other 1.6L SmartStream® Engines. Please email us a pic of your engine. title: LIGHTWEIGHT 2020-2026 Toyota GR Supra Mk5 Wheel Spacers w/10 Bolts
descriptionEn: LIGHTWEIGHT MK5 Supra Wheel Spacers For Less Rotating Mass Simple, bolt-on handling and looks for your SupraWider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks Introducing the all-new Lightweight Supra Wheel Spacers by Burger Motorsports! Crafted for enthusiasts like you, these spacers are the ultimate upgrade for your A90 Supra, designed to enhance both aesthetics and handling. These are a lightweight racing version of our popular Supra wheel spacers with new concentric floating seat bolts. What sets these apart? These lightweight racing spacers boast a cutting-edge hub-centric design featuring new concentric floating seat lug bolts, ensuring precision fitment and maximum performance on the track or the street. Backed by over a decade of expertise in wheel spacer design, technology, and manufacturing Burger Motorsports guarantees that these spacers are the pinnacle of innovation and quality.Whether you're looking to achieve the perfect stance, improve cornering stability, or simply enhance the aggressive look of your Supra, or all of the above, BMS spacers deliver on every front. Enhance your driving experience with the best of the best.Wheel spacers are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your Mk5 Supra. Our wheel spacers push your rims and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability, and handling. Spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset, or just making your Supra look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your Supra ensuring a perfect vibration-free fit. Comes with a packet of anti-seize grease to place on the factory hub to aid in later removal. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports wheel spacer is CNC machined from high grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our Toyota Supra Wheel Spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 10 extended concentric swivel washer lug bolts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. All Burger Motorsports wheel spacers are hub-centric and are safe to use on xDrive (all-wheel drive) Supra vehicles. Hub-Centric: This means our spacer's center bore matches your factory Supra hub and the factory-like hub on the Burger Motorsports spacers match the center bore in your wheel for a vibration-free fit. Concentric Floating Seat Lug Bolts: Each bolt is made from 12.9 Motorsport Grade steel for strength and safety and zinc plated for corrosion resistance. They contain a concentric floating seat washer to give the bolt a secure mating surface to torque to stay torqued and to reduce wheel seat chafing during installation and removal. What width wheel spacer should I get?Most Mk5 Supra vehicles with factory wheels and tire sizes take 10mm to 13mm in the front and 13mm to 15mm in the rear. 20mm is for very specific custom Supra applications. We recommend measuring before ordering. The photos and guidelines on this website are for reference only. Your Supra might have different results with the same size spacers due to different wheels, tire sizes, packages, and offsets. Installation: Simply remove the wheel, place the spacer on the hub and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download the install guide. FREE Wheel Pin tool with purchase of 2 pairs of wheel spacers on the same receipt.To get the free wheel pin with a 2 pair wheel spacer purchase, add 2 pairs of wheel spacers to your cart, go to the link below and add the free wheel pin to the cart. When you hit the checkout button the items will be discounted to FREE!Click Here for the Wheel Pin Tool ($10.00 Value) Toyota Supra MK5 Applications Toyota Supra• 2020-2026 GR Supra Mk5 B58 3.0L 6 cyl.• 2020-2026 GR Supra Mk5 B48 2.0L 4 cyl. title: BMS Intake for 2024+ Toyota Tacoma & 2025+ 4Runner 2.4L Turbo
sku: Tacoma intake + Blue 1123 Filter + Black TACINTK Silicone Tube
descriptionEn: More Air = More Power + Dramatic Sound Improvement! Our new 2024+ Toyota Tacoma & 2025+ 4 Runner cold air intake offers horsepower gains and intoxicating sound while retaining the superior air filtration and intake temperature reduction of a fully closed intake system! Performance. Sound. Style. It's all here.Fully customizable filter color and color upgraded silicone turbo inlet tube for extra personalization. It starts with our oversized inverted cone filter available either red or blue oiled. Featuring 50% more airflow potential than the factory intake. In addition we've completely redesigned the intake lid to remove numerous choke points in the factory intake, accommodate our larger performance cone filter, have dual air inlets, a taller lid, added an upgraded silicone turbo inlet tube, and have a clear inspection window. Together these improvement provide huge power gains and reduce turbo lag while retaining factory-like heat isolation and filtration performance. Don't forget about the great looks under the hood and terrific sound. The BMS intake installs in minutes and includes a clear window for easy filter inspection. We offer two high quality filter options. Our oiled cotton renewable performance filter can be cleaned using an S&B cleaning kit every 15-20k miles and should last the life of your Tacoma. We suggest oiled filters for most applications. For those who are frequently off-roading in very sandy/dusty environments, we suggest our dry extendable filter option, which offers superior filtration for extreme conditions. Our dry filter can be cleaned by blowing out with compressed air from the inside out. title: BMW 135i & 335i Bluetooth Flex Fuel Kits and fuel lines for the E-Chassis N54 and N55 Motors
descriptionEn: Know your exact ethanol content in real-time via the Fuel-It! or JB4 mobile app on your smartphone or tablet. If you are running E85 or ethanol mixes in your BMW, you need this kit! This is a complete plug and play kit to install a Bluetooth ethanol sensor in your E-Chassis BMW. This kit replaces the stock fuel lines from the fuel tank to the engine bay with an upgrade -6an E85 compatible fuel line and adds an ethanol sensor and Bluetooth analyzer to monitor your ethanol content. Includes both Bluetooth App & 5v analog output for JB4 or flash tuning Bluetooth (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this feature) If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here For your fuel line upgrade, choose the option that supports your current configuration. HPFP to the fuel tank: (Stock) This upgrade replaces both stock fuel lines with one upgraded continuous fuel line from the fuel tank to the HPFP and adds the ethanol sensor. Port Injection to the fuel tank: If you are running our port injection kit, this upgrade replaces the stock fuel lines from the tank to the engine bay, integrates the ethanol sensor and then utilizes a Y adapter to supply the HPFP and PI with fuel. Our custom fittings remove those tee's and extra fittings for a cleaner high flow setup. Phoenix Racing Manifold to the fuel tank: If you are running the Phoenix Racing Manifold port injection kit, this upgrade also replaces the stock fuel lines from the tank to the engine bay, integrates the ethanol sensor and then utilizes a Y adapter to supply the HPFP and PI with fuel. Our custom fittings remove those tee's and extra fittings for a cleaner high flow setup. Non-Fuel-It! port injection to fuel tank: Choose this option if you are running a port injection kit that we did not manufacture or sell. This kit includes a longer 18" feedline from the Y to the port injection rail. You then cut the feed line to the length you need and install the included -6an female fitting or -6an female elbow to make the connection to your port injection rail. All of our kits utilize our custom billet aluminum fittings to integrate with the stock fittings so no modifications are needed. *For the BMW N54 E-series JB4 platform connect the white wire to position #15 on the JB4 25 pin harness. Select WMI Ethanol Setup option 1 to enable pin location 15/16 flex fuel input. *For the BMW N55 E-series JB4 platform connect the white wire to position #16 on the JB4 25 pin harness. Select WMI Ethanol Setup option 1 to enable pin location 15/16 flex fuel input. *These kits are available for off-road use only *Free shipping in USA on complete kits only.
