title: JB4 for Kia / Hyundai / Genesis 2.5T SmartStream including N (V2)
sku: Kia V2 Harness + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 65hp and 80tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle The JB4 is a plug and play Kia / Hyundai / Genesis tuner that plugs into easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. Unlike other tuning systems the JB4 includes a fully programmable CANbus system, upgradable firmware, and data logging capability. CANbus allows the JB4 to take into account pedal input, throttle position, gear, engine speed, air/fuel ratio, fuel trims, ignition advance, knock, and many other factors and incorporate those into the performance mapping. It can also read/delete fault codes, includes unique safety features such as keeping boost pressure low until oil and water is up to temperature to provide proper engine and turbo lucubration and drop to a low boost map if the engine starts to overheat, run lean, excessively knock, or over boost. The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip.The default JB4 map1 runs 4psi over stock peak and tuned maps, including stock and valet mode can be selected on the fly using a BMS diagnostics cable or JB4 mobile smartphone adapter. Installation is very discrete and it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Includes maps for 91 octane, 93 octane, and E85 (ethanol fuel) mixtures. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes. More information at JB4tech.com Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. Kia / Hyundai JB4 Features and Benefits • Power gains of up to 65hp and 80tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment If you don't see your vehicle listed, send a quick photo of your engine bay to sales@burgertuning.com & we can verify which JB4 is compatible. Click here for previous KIA/Hyundai/Genesis models Kia• 2020-2023 Kia Stinger 2.5L Turbo 4-cylinder• 2020+ Kia Sorento 2.5L Turbo 4-cylinder• 2019+ Kia K5 2.5L Turbo 4-cylinderHyundai• 2020+ Hyundai Santa Fe 2.5L Turbo 4-cylinder• 2020+ Hyundai Sonata 2.5L Turbo 4-cylinder• 2022+ Hyundai Santa Cruz 2.5L Turbo 4-cylinder• 2022+ Hyundai Kona 2.5L Turbo 4-cylinder Genesis• 2020+ Genesis G70 2.5L Turbo 4-cylinder• 2020+ Genesis GV70 2.5L Turbo 4-cylinder• 2020+ Genesis G80 2.5L Turbo 4-cylinder• 2020+ Genesis GV80 2.5L Turbo 4-cylinder What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. 2021 Genesis GV80 2.5L with JB4 VIDEO

title: Transparent BMS Oil Catch Can Base (Clear Can Base Only)
descriptionEn: The Burger Motorsports billet oil catch cans are designed to collect excess oil and vapors that might otherwise enter the intake system. When comparing a clear see through catch can to our solid billet aluminum can, several benefits emerge: Visual Monitoring: The main advantage of a clear catch can is that you can easily see the contents inside. This allows for quick checks on oil levels, contamination, and sludge buildup without needing to open the can. Maintenance Alerts: With a clear can, it's easier to notice changes in color or clarity, indicating the need for maintenance or cleaning. This proactive approach can help maintain engine health. Aesthetic Appeal: A clear catch can adds a custom look to your engine bay while being functional.Lightweight: Our Transparent catch can base weighs 2.9oz compared to the 6.4oz billet aluminum version. ⚠️ ATTENTION: The optional transparent can base is not suitable for use in regions where temperatures frequently drop to 32°F (0°C) or below.

title: BMS Magnetic Billet Aluminum Oil Filter Cap for 2021+ Ford Bronco 2.7L V6
descriptionEn: Upgrade your weak plastic Bronco oil filter housing cap The Burger Motorsports billet aluminum magnetic Bronco oil filter cover directly replaces your weak OE plastic cap for greater protection, ease of removal/install, and great looks under the hood. You can use a 3/8" inch drive ratchet or torque wrench to install and remove. The built-in 32mm hex head does not require a special removal/install tool like the factory cap. Uses the OE oil filter, filter housing o-ring, and filter insert. Anodized for protection. This quality part is a must for any serious Bronco owner.MAGNETIC: Equipped with an integrated samarium cobalt magnet to capture dangerous metal shavings and particles that would otherwise circulate through your engine oil and bearings. Unlike other oil filter caps that press fit smaller magnets leaving them vulnerable to damage and displacement during engine heat cycles, our magnets are secured in their precisely machined pockets to safely withstand extreme temperatures and pressure. COOLING FINS: Unlike the plastic OEM cap, our billet aluminum oil filter cap features precision-machined cooling fins that actively dissipate heat. As air flows over the fins, they draw heat away from the oil circulating through the filter housing—helping reduce overall oil temperatures and improve engine longevity. This added thermal efficiency is especially beneficial during aggressive driving, towing, or off-road conditions.🔧 Install: After removing the OEM oil filter cap, remove the filter and transfer the inner plastic filter guide/support to the new BMS billet aluminum oil filter cap and replace the exterior o-rings when installing. Replaces OE/OEM Part Number FT4Z-6A832-C Features & Benefits • Solid aluminum design is much stronger than brittle plastic• Integrated heat sinks for better oil cooling• Special tools are not required for removal/install like the factory cap• Strong design won't fail under pressure• Reuses OE filter insert and o-ring• Uses factory cartridge filter• Anodized for protection• Looks great under the hood• Available in black, red, and blue• Made in the USA Vehicle Fitment Ford Bronco• 2021+ Ford Bronco 2.7L EcoBoost® 6 cyl. Turbo What's included• (1) Billet Aluminum oil filter cap What is billet? In this case, A billet is a solid block of aluminum (lightweight metal) with a size larger than the part. Excess material from the billet is removed by precision CNC machining, essentially carving the part out of solid aluminum. CNC machined parts are consistently stronger, better looking, and last longer than cheaper cast and plastic versions. Please note some engine degreasers and harsh cleaners may fade or damage the anodized finish.

title: BMS Magnetic Billet Oil Filter Cap for S58 BMW M2/M3/M4 & X3M/X4M
descriptionEn: Upgrade your weak plastic S58 oil filter housing cap The Burger Motorsports billet aluminum S58 oil filter cover directly replaces your weak OE plastic cap for greater protection, ease of removal/install, and great looks under the hood. You can use a 3/8" inch drive ratchet or torque wrench to install and remove. The built-in 32mm hex head does not require a special removal/install tool like the factory cap. Uses the OE oil filter, filter housing o-ring, and filter insert. Anodized for protection. This quality part is a must for any serious BMW owner. MAGNETIC: Equipped with an integrated samarium cobalt magnet to capture dangerous metal shavings and particles that would otherwise circulate through your engine oil and bearings. Unlike other oil filter caps that press fit smaller magnets leaving them vulnerable to damage and displacement during engine heat cycles, our magnets are secured in their precisely machined pockets to safely withstand extreme temperatures and pressure. COOLING FINS: Unlike the plastic OEM cap, our billet aluminum oil filter cap features precision-machined cooling fins that actively dissipate heat. As air flows over the fins, they draw heat away from the oil circulating through the filter housing—helping reduce overall oil temperatures and improve engine longevity. This added thermal efficiency is especially beneficial during aggressive driving. 🔧 Install: After removing the OEM oil filter cap, remove the filter and be sure to remove the plastic oil filter bypass valve and transfer it to the new BMS billet oil filter cap (see below install video). Be sure to replace the exterior o-ring gasket also when installing. Features and Benefits • Solid aluminum design is much stronger than brittle plastic• Integrated heat sinks for better oil cooling• Special tools are not required for removal/install like the factory cap• Strong design won't fail under pressure• Reuses OE filter insert and o-ring• Anodized for protection• Looks great under the hood• Available in black, red, silver, and blue• Made in the USA S58 Vehicle Fitment BMW M2• 2023+ S58 G87 BMW M2BMW M3• 2021+ S58 G80 BMW M3• 2021+ S58 G80 BMW M3 Competition BMW M4• 2021+ S58 G82 BMW M4• 2021+ S58 G82 BMW M4 Competition• 2023+ S58 G82 BMW M4 CSL• 2022+ S58 G83 BMW M4 Convertible BMW X3M• 2020+ S58 F97 BMW X3M• 2020+ S58 F97 BMW X3M Competition BMW X4M• 2020+ S58 F98 BMW X4M• 2020+ S58 F98 BMW X4M Competition What is billet? In this case, A billet is a solid block of aluminum (lightweight metal) with a size larger than the part. Excess material from the billet is removed by precision CNC machining, essentially carving the part out of solid aluminum. CNC machined parts are consistently stronger, better looking, and last longer than cheaper cast and plastic versions. Please note some engine degreasers and harsh cleaners may fade or damage the anodized finish. B58 Oil Filter Cap Install (same as S58)

title: Water/Methanol Injection Adapter
descriptionEn: These plug and play adapters allow you to quickly install a BMS Water/Methanol Injection Kit without drilling/tapping your chargepipe! Audi S4 Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Nozzle Adapter This CNC machined plug and play adapter allows you to mount single or dual BMS Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) nozzles WITHOUT the expense and headache of removing and drilling your factory charge pipe. Shaves a ton of time off the Audi S4 WMI install and best of all is fully reversible. We suggest the BM10 nozzle for most S4 applications. Nozzles not included. Made in the USA. Plug and play Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) adapter for all B58 BMW motors Normally you'd replace the factory charge pipe to install a water/methanol kit but in the case of the B58 engine, the factory charge pipe is very sturdy and difficult to remove. So we've designed this plug and play adapter for quick installation and removal of BMS dual nozzle water/meth kits without having to replace the factory charge pipe. Simply unscrew three bolts, insert the CNC machined adapter with integrated o-ring in place, and tighten the included longer length bolts, to allow mounting of two meth nozzles with a perfect seal. Includes dual 1/8" NPT methanol bungs appropriately machined for a clean spray pattern which is critical for proper atomization with the B58 motor. For most B58 water/methanol applications we suggest dual CM5 nozzles. F / G chassis BMW Vehicle Fitment(Gen 1 B58 Engines) Your B58 powered vehicle not listed? title: JB4 for 2024+ Toyota Tacoma 2.4L Turbo
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 75hp on a stock Tacoma! The JB4 PRO is the newest, most advanced and highly featured tuning system available for your 2024-Present Toyota Tacoma 2.4L. Power gains are up to 60hp to the wheels (75hp crank) on a completely stock car on pump gas, gains with bolt-on parts, higher octane, E85 mixtures are even higher.The JB4 features a simple plug and play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other Tacoma tune. Including on the fly in dash map switching between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, performance estimates, and much more.Remember the JB4 Tacoma tuner does not require any additional modifications! Simply install the JB4 as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new fast and smooth racing experience. Includes the JB4PRO app! Wirelessly connect the JB4 to your iOS or Android device to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. The JB4PRO app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. More information on the JB4PRO app is available here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Toyota• 2024+ Toyota Tacoma SR, SR5, Limited, TRD Off-Road, TRD PreRunner, TRD Sport, TRD Pro and Trailhunter including hybrid models What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU.

title: JB4 for 2024+ Chevrolet Trax
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 30hp and 45tq to the wheels with a stock Trax! This plug and play tuner attaches to easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag.Installation is very discrete and unlike flash remaps which are quick to install but can never be fully removed with a JB4 the vehicle is never aware it's making more than the factory boost or power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged and it's compatible with all driving modes.Unlike other less advanced systems, the JB4 includes CANbus functionality allowing it to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU for real-time tuning. The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and much more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data no less incorporate it real-time into their tuning algorithms. CANbus allows the JB4 to provide huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery.JB4 includes multiple maps including those for 91 octane, 93 octane, factory tuning, VALET mode, E85 mixtures, and unleaded race gas. In addition, it offers boost by gear settings to improve launches, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more. The JB4 is made in the USA and includes a 5-year warranty. Optional JB4 Harness Extensions: These plug and play connectors simplify the installation and removal of JB4 and other Cadillac/GM piggyback systems. Once installed you can bypass the difficult to reach lower MAP sensor by attaching the two connections to each other. Sold in pairs. Available here. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. descriptionEn: Coldest Air Intake = 17+ more wheel horsepower along with terrific sound. Finally, a silicone intake system worthy of your G8x & F9x S58 Powered BMW! The Front Mount (behind the grille) BMS S58 Performance Intake completely removes the restrictive OEM intake and replaces it with 3.5" high flow ducting and BMS inverted cone performance air filters. The filters are placed behind the front grilles for maximum cold air induction, amazing sound, and intriguing looks. In addition to freeing up power, turbo spool speed is greatly improved and there's an incredible sound improvement. You'll finally be able to hear your turbos spooling! Compared to our aluminum S58 front mount intake our silicon intake is able to maintain the full 3.5" piping right up to the turbos! Our Burger Motorsports renewable inverted cone filters not only outflow your stock paper filter and last the life of your vehicle they also include built-in velocity stacks. Velocity stacks allow even more air to be smoothly sucked into your intake system. Installation is easy with very minor plastic panel trimming required. See the install guide for details. Our proprietary high-flow filters can be cleaned every 15-20k miles using a cleaning kit and will last the life of the car. title: LIGHTWEIGHT G Chassis BMW Wheel Spacers w/10 Bolts
descriptionEn: LIGHTWEIGHT BMW Wheel Spacers for less rotating mass Simple, bolt-on handling and looks for your BMWWider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks Introducing the all-new Lightweight BMW Wheel Spacers by Burger Motorsports! Crafted for enthusiasts like you, these spacers are the ultimate upgrade for your G chassis BMW, designed to enhance both aesthetics and handling. These are a lightweight racing version of our popular G chassis BMW wheel spacers with new floating seat washer bolts. What sets these apart? These lightweight racing spacers boast a cutting-edge hub-centric design featuring new concentric floating seat lug bolts, ensuring precision fitment and maximum performance on the track or the street. Backed by over a decade of expertise in wheel spacer design, technology, and manufacturing Burger Motorsports guarantees that these spacers are the pinnacle of innovation and quality.Whether you're looking to achieve the perfect stance, improve cornering stability, or simply enhance the aggressive look of your BMW, or all of the above, BMS spacers deliver on every front. Enhance your driving experience with the best of the best.Wheel spacers are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your BMW. Our wheel spacers push your rims and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability, and handling. Spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset, or just making your BMW look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your BMW ensuring a perfect vibration-free fit. Comes with a packet of anti-seize grease to place on the factory hub to aid in later removal. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports wheel spacer is CNC machined from high grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our BMW Wheel Spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 10 extended concentric swivel washer lug bolts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. All Burger Motorsports wheel spacers are hub-centric and are safe to use on xDrive (all-wheel drive) BMW vehicles. Hub-Centric: This means our spacer's center bore matches your factory BMW hub and the factory-like hub on the Burger Motorsports spacers match the center bore in your wheel for a vibration-free fit. Concentric Floating Seat Lug Bolts: Each bolt is made from 12.9 Motorsport Grade steel for strength and safety and zinc plated for corrosion resistance. They contain a concentric floating seat washer to give the bolt a secure mating surface to torque to stay torqued and to reduce wheel seat chafing during installation and removal. What width wheel spacer should I get?Most G Chassis BMW vehicles with factory wheels and tire sizes take 10mm to 13mm in the front and 13mm to 15mm in the rear. 20mm is for specific G applications. We recommend measuring before ordering. The photos and guidelines on this website are for reference only. Your BMW might have different results with the same size spacers due to different wheels, tire sizes, packages, and offsets. Installation: Simply remove the wheel, place the spacer on the hub and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download the install guide. FREE Wheel Pin tool with purchase of 2 pairs of wheel spacers on the same receipt.To get the free wheel pin with a 2 pair wheel spacer purchase, add 2 pairs of wheel spacers to your cart, go to the link below and add the free wheel pin to the cart. descriptionEn: Maximize Power & Efficiency with the Performance Air Filter for Toyota Tacoma/4Runner 2.4L Don’t let your turbo choke on a restrictive factory filter. title: BMS Oil Catch Can for GEN2 B58 G05 X5 40i & G06 X6 40i BMW
sku: G2x B48 OCC w/2x OCC screws, B58-X5-OCC hose, X5 OCC bracket, GX5 Silicone Tube + X2 90-110 hose clamps
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of Your G Chassis GEN2 B58 X5/X6 BMW Air Intake System It’s no secret that turbo BMW motors can suffer from oil control problems, allowing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping. This buildup contaminates intake valves and the VANOS system, lowers effective octane, and degrades engine performance. The higher the boost, the more apparent these problems become. The solution has finally arrived: the Burger Motorsports Oil Catch Can. While many catch cans exist, they fall short in critical areas. Some are mounted on the hot turbo side, preventing proper vapor condensation. Others use undersized hoses or excessive routing that restrict PCV flow and can cause crankcase pressure and sealing issues. Many feature ineffective or overly restrictive baffle systems, and some even vent crankcase gases to the atmosphere. Burger Motorsports engineered this oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for turbo BMW applications. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long service life. The can is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. Oversized hoses exceed OEM PCV diameter and maintain consistent flow throughout the system, eliminating horsepower-robbing crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS oil separator retains a fully closed-loop factory PCV system, preventing vapor from escaping into the atmosphere. Carefully chosen mounting locations minimize hose length, improve efficiency, and maintain a stealth OEM-style appearance. Installation takes approximately 10 minutes, includes all required hardware, and is fully reversible. Empty the can during oil changes by unscrewing the base or using the drain plug. Made in the USA. New transparent oil catch can base available as an option or sold separately as an upgrade here. ⚠️ The BMS silicone intake hose is required to install and use this catch can. Works with the OEM intake or the BMS Billet Intake for 2019–2023 G Chassis BMW X5, X6, and X7 . Features & Benefits Increases air intake efficiency Promotes engine longevity Non-clogging triple-baffle air/oil separation Free-flow, anti-restriction design Retains factory closed-loop PCV operation Large inlet and outlet with no tapering Stealth mounting Anodized black aluminum construction Made in the USA and guaranteed for life Service by unscrewing base every 3–6 months or using 1/8” NPT drain plug High-flow design eliminates crankcase pressure 16mm+ inlet and outlet exceeds OEM PCV sizing Precision CNC-machined from solid high-grade aluminum Vehicle Fitment 2019–2023 G05 GEN2 B58 BMW X5 40i (including xDrive) 2021+ G05 GEN2 B58 BMW X5 45e (including xDrive) 2020+ G06 GEN2 B58 BMW X6 40i xDrive Catch Can Dimensions & Specifications Height with lid: 4.4 in (111 mm) Can diameter: 2.5 in (63.7 mm) Lid length (back to nozzle): 4 in (101 mm) Nozzle outer diameter: 0.75 in (19.2 mm) Nozzle inner diameter: 0.669 in (17 mm) Can Fluid Capacity: Up to 5.5 fl oz (162.6 mL) What’s Included (1) BMS G2x B48 oil catch can (1) Billet two-piece mounting bracket with hardware (1) B58-X5-OCC heavy-duty silicone hose (2) M5x0.8x12mm internal hex bracket-to-can screws A mixture of oil, water, fuel, and sludge safely captured and kept out of the engine. New transparent oil catch can base available as an option or sold separately here. The transparent base allows quick visual inspection of oil level, contamination, and sludge buildup without opening the can. ⚠️ ATTENTION: The optional transparent can base is not suitable for use in regions where temperatures frequently drop to 32°F (0°C) or below.
selectedVariant: Please include the required silicone intake hose / Billet aluminum can base with 1/8" NPT bung

title: 2022+ Lexus LX600 Wheel Spacers
descriptionEn: Wider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks Burger Motorsports wheel spacers for the 2022+ Lexus LX600 are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your truck. Our wheel spacers push your wheels and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability and handling. Spacers are also great for gaining clearance for bigger tires, aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, or just making your truck look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your 2022+ Lexus LX600 ensuring a perfect vibration free fit. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports wheel spacer is CNC machined from high-grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our wheel spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 12 pre-installed 10.9 grade studs and 12 lug nuts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole truck you will need 2 spacer kits. They are hub-centric and have the factory hub on them.Width: Available in 1" and 1.5" widths. Measure in the front and rear with a ruler and see what width is right for you. Either way your truck will look better! 🔧 Installation: Simply remove wheel, place spacer on the hub, add some blue thread-locker to the factory studs, bolt the spacer to the hub with the supplied wheel bolts, and bolt the wheel back up with the existing lug nuts. Torque specs are listed below. Vehicle Fitment Lexus• 2022+ Lexus LX600 3.4L including F Sport Hub-Centric Wheel Spacers SpecificationsThickness: 1" Inch (25.4mm)Thickness: 1.5" Inch (38.1mm)Center Bore: 95mmBolt Thread Size: M14 x 1.5Wheel Bolt Pattern: 6x139.7 (6 LUG)Wheel Fasteners: 10.9 gradeStuds: 10.9 gradeSpacer Material: Lightweight Anodized Black 7075-T6 Aluminum Torque Specifications: Alloy wheels 18" and above - 97 ft·lbs (131 N-m) for all lug nuts. 18" steel wheels - 97 ft·lbs (131 N-m) for inner lug nuts. 154 ft·lbs (209 N-m) for outer lug nuts. Outer lugs should be checked/retorqued after 50 miles of driving. What's included(2) Wheel spacers(12) M14x1.5 10.9 grade wheel studs (pre-installed)(12) M14x1.5 (19mm HEX) lug nuts

title: BMS V2 Transmission Oil Cooler for 2018+ Kia Stinger & Genesis G70/G80
descriptionEn: Keep your transmission oil temps low for better performance and longevity! Everyone knows that heat is the enemy of your automatic transmission. And everyone knows that higher power levels generate more transmission fluid heat. Now you can extend the life of your automatic transmission and get better performance by installing the new BMS Heavy-Duty High Capacity Trans Cooler kit in your Kia Stinger or Genesis G70. This unique plug and play kit is a high-capacity heavy-duty front-mounted air to trans fluid radiator. This upgrade has 100% more surface area and a thicker, more efficient cooling core! Our latest version 2 transmission oil cooler is not only larger than our original upgrade but also connects directly to the factory coolant lines for an even easier installation! Installs inside the front bumper providing ample airflow over the large cooling core via existing openings. The result is dramatically reduced transmission temperature, better transmission performance, and extended transmission life. This kit is strongly suggested for any Kia Stinger/Genesis G70 running higher power levels than stock and/or in warmer climates. OEM fitment with aftermarket performance. Compatible with most aftermarket intercoolers and increases transmission fluid capacity by about a quart. Minor plastic trimming of the inside of the bumper required for some models. Transmission cooler dimensions: Stock vs. BMS Stock unit: Length: 21" Width: .75" Height: 3.25"Upgraded BMS unit: Length: 20.5" Width: 1.25" Height: 6.5" FEATURES AND BENEFITS • 100% more surface area and a thicker, more efficient cooling core• Dissipates excess transmission fluid heat• Reduces transmission fluid temperature• Increases transmission life• Increases transmission oil capacity• Direct plug and play installation Vehicle Fitment KIA Stinger • 2018-2023 Kia Stinger 3.3L Twin Turbo • 2018-2023 Kia Stinger 2.0L Twin Turbo Genesis• 2018+ Genesis G70 3.3L Twin Turbo • 2018+ Genesis G70 2.0L Twin Turbo • 2017+ Genesis G80 3.3L Twin Turbo with modification (see below) Genesis G80 modification: The left bracket will need to be slightly bent and the lower bolt hole will need to to be modified to line up with the hole on the car. The right bracket will need an extension to reach the mounting point. Please email sales@burgertuning.com for more information. What's included: (1) Transmission Oil cooler

title: JB4 Tuner for 2023+ Dodge Hornet 1.3L & 2.0L I4 Turbo
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 30hp and 80tq to the wheels peak on a stock Dodge Hornet 1.3L & 2.0L! The JB4 is the most advanced and highly featured tuning system for your Dodge Hornet with the 2.0L I4 Turbo engine. Peak power gains are up to 30 wheel horsepower and 80 wheel torque on a completely stock 2.0L Hornet on pump gas, with gains as high as 65hp to the wheels under the curve. Potential gains with bolt-on parts, higher octane, or E85 fuel mixtures are even higher! No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUsThe JB4 features a simple plug and play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other tune. Including on-the-fly in dash map switching between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, progressive water/methanol support, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, and much more. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 30hp and 80 tq peak to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 times and 1/4 mile times • Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Dodge• 2023+ Dodge Hornet 1.3L I4 Turbo PHEV R/T, & R/T Plus• 2023+ Dodge Hornet 2.0L I4 Turbo Hurricane 4 GT, GT Plus What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. 2024 Dodge Hornet, JB4, ~93 octane, no other modifications 2023+ Dodge Hornet JB4 install video

Our Burger Motorsports inverted cone filters not only outflow and last longer than your stock filter, they also include a built-in velocity stack. Velocity stacks allow even more air to be smoothly sucked into your intake system and are used in most racing applications. title: BMS Oil Catch Can System for 2021+ Ford Bronco 2.7L V6
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your Bronco air intake system! It's no secret that Ford 2.7L V6 turbo motors suffer from oil control problems causing the oil, water, and fuel vapor to blow through and coat the intake manifold and gunking up throttle body and intake valves, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The BMS dual oil catch cans. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor to the atmosphere. To solve these problems BMS designed our oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbocharged V6 Ford Bronco application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The cans themselves are guaranteed for the life of the vehicle and contain a triple baffle. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking to atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, make checking and emptying the cans easy, and look good at the same time.The BMS dual catch can system features two catch cans for complete protection:Low Side (PCV) – Captures oil vapors at idle and cruiseHigh Side (CCV) – Captures oil vapors under boost Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. Made in the USA. Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency• Promotes Engine Longevity• Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation• Large Intake/Outlet No Tapering Down• Anodized Black Aluminum• Mounts to the firewall above the engine• Made in the USA & Guaranteed for Life• Simply unscrew the base every 3-6 months to empty or use the 1/8th NPT drain plug.• Non-Clogging, No Service Needed Air/Oil Separation Double Baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs• Large 16mm+ inlet and outlet exceeds OEM PCV sizing• Precision CNC Machined from Solid Blocks of High-Grade Aluminum Vehicle Fitment Ford Bronco• 2021+ Ford Bronco 2.7L V6 Turbo Catch can dimensions and specsCan dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) TallCan diameter: 2.5" (63.7mm)Lid length: Back to nozzle end: 4" (101mm)Nozzle outer diameter: .75" (19.2mm)Nozzle inner diameter: 0.669" (17mm)Can Fluid Capacity: Up to 5.5 fl oz (162.6 mL) What's included in the PCV side kit(1) Burger Motorsports triple baffle oil catch can(1) Custom metal bracket(2) Bracket flanged nuts 6mm x 1.00 coarse thread(2) 90º billet nipple fittings with circlips(1) Heavy-duty 10.75" OUT silicone hose(1) Heavy-duty 13" IN silicone hose(4) Hose clamps What's included in the Vacuum CCV Side kit(1) Burger Motorsports triple baffle oil catch can(1) 90º billet nipple fitting with circlip(1) Straight billet nipple fitting with circlip(1) Heavy-duty OUT silicone hose(1) Heavy-duty IN silicone hose(4) Hose clamps Full Protection Kit Shown (PCV & CCV) New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here. The main advantage of a transparent can is that you can easily see the contents inside. This allows for quick checks on oil levels, contamination, and sludge buildup without needing to open the can. ⚠️ ATTENTION: The optional transparent can base is not suitable for use in regions where temperatures frequently drop to 32°F (0°C) or below.
selectedVariant: Full Protection Kit (PCV and CCV) with mounting bracket / Billet aluminum can base with 1/8" NPT bung

title: BMS Oil Catch Can for 2022+ Subaru WRX
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your 2022+ Subaru WRX Air Intake System! It's no secret that 2022+ Subaru WRX turbo motors can suffer from oil control problems, causing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler, gunk up intake valves, lower the effective octane, and generally degrade engine performance. The higher your boost levels, the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived: the Burger Motorsports oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market, they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted poorly, utilize hoses that are too small, or runs that are too long, preventing proper PCV ventilation and causing internal motor and ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or overly restrictive internal baffle systems. Others bypass the PCV system altogether, venting crankcase gas and odor into the atmosphere. Most are simply repackaged oil catch cans from smaller, lower power motors shoehorned into the WRX engine bay. To solve these problems, Burger Motorsports designed this oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbo Subaru application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses retain OEM PCV piping diameter so flow rate is maintained throughout the entire system, ensuring no horsepower-robbing crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS oil separator retains the factory fully closed-loop PCV operation, preventing any PCV vapor from leaking to the atmosphere. Mounting locations are selected for easy access, efficient operation, and a stealth look. Installation takes around 20 minutes, includes all hoses and required hardware, and is 100% reversible. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil during oil changes. Made in the USA. title: BMS StandAlone Universal Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Kit with AEM controller
descriptionEn: Make tremendous amounts of power on pump gas! Water/Methanol/Alcohol injection commonly referred to as WMI allows you to make tremendous amounts of power on pump gas. The effect is similar to running 100 octane race gas or E85 fuel all the time with the additional cooling benefits allowing for more power than you can make on race gas or E85 alone. AEM Methanol Injection ControllerThe key to a safe and effective Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) setup is tuning integration. The base kit includes the AEM water/methanol controller featuring large, turn-resistant knobs and larger numbering to easily set accurate start and full activation points, with covered status LED and test buttons for added splash resistance. A plug is integrated into the controller housing for mating to the redesigned wiring harness's positive-lock connector. Boost Safe Feature These new controllers offer a simple "Boost Safe" injection failsafe system, which is an output that will activate if there is a short, loss of continuity or high or low voltage or low fluid condition, allowing users to define their failsafe strategy from something as simple as flashing a warning light to more advanced strategies like pulling boost or ignition, or switching fuel maps on a standalone engine management system. Simplified Wiring The new wiring harness is terminated with a positive-lock connector on one end and has color-coded wires to ease installation. An integrated Pump Ground circuit is included in the harness which simplifies the wiring process and eliminates any chance of the pump accidentally activating from a short in the system. An additional wire is included for adding an optional on/off solenoid to stop fluid flow when the system is inactive. BMS kits include a high quality 220psi Aquatec WMI pump (the industry standard), methanol compatible solenoid with filter, compression fittings reducing the risk of dangerous leaks, and all required wiring and mounting hardware. The base kit includes a WMI pump, solenoid, AEM Controller, WMI solenoid, filter, 20' of WMI line, and required fittings. Using the options when adding to cart you can add on a WMI nozzle (BM10 suggested for most applications), and tank. Optional check valve tank tap to keep vapors inside the tank is available at the bottom of the page Injection Nozzle Options: (Single or Dual Nozzles) The nozzles are determined by the intended power and how many bungs your charge pipe has. The nozzles are 1/8” NPT and screw into bungs included on most aftermarket charge pipes. Our "super atomizing" nozzles are well known for their great atomization and flow characteristics. The nozzle number represents the approximate gallons per hour of fluid when at full flow. Generally speaking, running two smaller nozzles is preferred to one larger nozzle for an equal flow to improve fluid atomization and distribution. Feel free to email us for nozzle advice if your situation is unique. What's inside our methanol injection nozzles? Water Methanol Injection Nozzle guide 4 cylinder: BM7 6 cylinder: BM10 or Dual BM58 cylinder: Dual BM5 or BM10 if larger turbos Optional BMS Elite Steel Braided Hardline UpgradeThis kit includes 18 feet of upgraded stainless steel braided lines. They feature an inner teflon seal for leak free operation, stainless steel braid, and a black outer nylon mesh for abrasion resistance and a stealthy look. These lines not only look great they are also equipped with BMS Elite AN fittings and can withstand extreme pressure and temperature conditions. Includes all required AN fittings. 1.25 GALLON HEAVY-DUTY UNIVERSAL TANKThe Burger Motorsports 1.25 gallon heavy-duty tank is compact and flexible allowing for a wide range of mounting on any flat vertical surface in the trunk. This tank is thicker and stronger than our basic 1-gallon WMI tank. This tank features an easy fill filler nozzle, an anti-starvation reservoir with a pre-threaded bung for the included 90º compression pump feed fitting, a spill-catcher reservoir around the filler cap, a 2-way vented black plastic cap, and is translucent to allow visually checking the fluid level.Comes with a standard 2 way vented black plastic cap/lid. Upgraded billet cap/lid with 1-way check valve available in the drop-down menu when ordering. Tank dimensions: L 11" x W 4.5 x H 9" ApplicationsUniversal trunk mount 2 gallon universal low profile tank The Burger Motorsports 2 gal. universal tank allows the methanol pump to mount to the bottom of the tank making for a clean and fast installation. It’s universal in nature and will fit a wide variety of trunk applications. The larger capacity means more time between WMI fill ups. Offered in black and in clear to allow visually checking the fluid level. Includes a 2-way vented black plastic cap and a compression pump feed fitting. Upgraded billet lid with a 1-way check valve available. Comes pre-tapped for the pickup fitting. W orks with all DDP 5800 pumps. Made in USA.Tank dimensions: L 15.5" x W 8" x H 8.25" ApplicationsUniversal trunk mount BMS 3 gal. STEALTH TANK BMS Stealth TankWith our 3 gallon stealth tank the WMI pump mounts directly to the tank and the entire assembly fits cleanly within the existing trunk cavity in your F3X or F8X vehicle below the trunk floor. Works with all DDP 5800 pumps. Made in the USA.Comes with a standard 2 way vented black plastic cap.Upgraded billet lid with 1-way check valve available below.Tank dimensions: L 26.75" x W 9.75" X H 7.5" Vehicle Fitment BMW• 2012-2018 BMW 3 Series F30 sedan • 2015-2020 BMW F80 M3• 2014-2020 BMW 4 Series F32 coupe• 2015-2020 BMW F82 M4 (does not fit convertible) BMS 2 Gallon Stealth Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) for F10 5 Series BMW hides under the trunk deck This completely custom design fits cleanly within the existing trunk cavity in your F10 BMW for the ultimate easy to install no compromise kit. The Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) pump mounts directly to the bottom of the tank allowing for a quick and clean installation. The bottom of the tank includes a sump and baffle allowing for consistent performance even as the tank drains. Includes 2-way vented black plastic cap and a compression pump feed fitting. title: Titanium Coolant Bleeder Screw Upgrade for BMW, MINI, & Supra
descriptionEn: Titanium Coolant Bleeder Screw Upgrade for BMW, MINI, & Supra Say goodbye to the frail OEM plastic coolant bleeder screw that's prone to cracking and failure. Crafted from premium titanium, this upgraded replacement not only enhances the aesthetics under your hood but also provides the essential durability your engine demands. The factory plastic components endure relentless cycles of heating and cooling, inevitably succumbing to brittleness and potential failure. With our titanium upgrade, you're investing in longevity and peace of mind. Titanium's exceptional strength, twice that of aluminum, coupled with its lightweight nature, 45% lighter than steel yet equally robust, ensures unparalleled performance and resilience for your vehicle's coolant system. It's not just an upgrade; it's a necessity.CNC machined from a solid block of lightweight titanium with the Burger Motorsports logo laser etched on top. Each of our lightweight titanium coolant bleeder screws are individually burned by hand to make amazing color patterns. Therefore each one will have its own unique color. No two are the exact same and may vary form the photos. Replacement heavy-duty o-ring included. Fits Most BMW & Mini models OEM PN# 11537793373, 17111712788, 17110141325 🔧 To install, let engine completely cool. Next remove your old plastic coolant bleeder screw and replace with the new upgraded titanium screw. Features & Benefits • Upgrades your factory bleeder plastic bleeder screw• CNC Machined from Grade 5 aerospace titanium.• Includes chemical resistant Viton® O-ring.• Easy to install/remove with 4mm allen head• A must-have upgrade for street and track Vehicle Fitment BMW1 Series • E82 E88 (N51 N52 N55 N54)2 Series• F22 F23 F87 (N20 N26 B46 N55 B58)3 Series• E46 (M54 M52 M54 M56)• E90 E92 (N52 N52 N54 N55 S65)• F30 (N20 N26 N47 N55 B46 B48 B58)• G20 G21 (B46 B48 B58)4 Series• F32 F33 F36 (N20 N26 B46 B48 N55)5 Series• F10 (N20)• G30 G31 (B46 B48 B58 N63R)6 Series• G32 (B58)7 Series• G11 G12 N63R B48 B58 N74BMW i8• I12 (B38)X1 • X1 E84 (N20 N55)X3 • E83 F25 (N52 N20)X4 • F26 (N20)X5• E70 F15 G05 F85 (M57 S63 N63 N20 S63)X6• E71 E72 F86 (N54)X7 • X7 G07 X7 (N63M)Z4• E85 E89 G29 (M54 N52 N20 N54 B46 B58)MINI• R55 R56 R57 R58 R59 R60 R61 LCI Cooper S JCW Convertible (N16 N18)Toyota • 2020-2024 GR Supra Mk5 B58 3.0L 6 cyl.• 2020-2024 GR Supra Mk5 B48 2.0L 4 cyl.What's included(1) Titanium Coolant Bleeder Screw(1) Heavy-duty Viton® O-ring 1302N36

title: S58 BMW G80 M3 & G82 M4 Water/Methanol Port Injection Kit
descriptionEn: Make tremendous amounts of power on pump gas! The Fuel-It! S58 BMW Port Injection Kit is the ultimate fueling solution for your S58 powered BMW. It adds six supplemental low-pressure fuel injectors, depending on injector choice allowing fueling of up to 1000+ whp using water/methanol blends. This kit includes stainless steel BMS Elite braided lines. They feature an inner Teflon seal for leak-free operation, stainless steel braid, a black outer nylon mesh for abrasion resistance and a stealthy look. These lines not only look great they are also equipped with BMS Elite AN fittings and can withstand extreme pressure and temperature conditions. The included Burger Motorsports DDP 5800 water/methanol alcohol Injection pump is a heavy-duty pump used in all of our BMS Water Injection kits. 200 psi bypass for smooth and high pressure and 1.3 GPM open flow. Made in the USA. The Fuel-It! CANfuel Sequential Port Fuel Injection Controller attaches to the JB4 allowing it to directly control both traditional port injection kits and WMI port injection kits. Click here for the JB4 port injection FAQ and additional information on wiring and requirements.This kit includes your choice of 550cc, 750cc, of 950cc quality Bosch EV14 42mm fuel injectors come packaged in flow matched sets of six. Stealth Tank for G20 G22 & G80 M3 & G82 M4 BMW tucks neatly in the side pocket of your trunk! This water/methanol injection (WMI) tank is a completely custom design that neatly hides away in the left side trunk cavity found in most G20 G22 & G80 M3 & G82 M4 BMW vehicles. The pump mounts directly to the back of the tank allowing for a quick, clean, and completely stealth installation. The bottom of the tank includes a rear sump allowing for consistent performance even as the tank drains. Includes 2-way vented black plastic cap and a compression pump feed fitting. Optional upgraded blue billet water/methanol injection (WMI) with 1-way check valve available here. OPTIONAL: Fuel-It! CANfuel Sequential Port Fuel Injection ControllerSave $100.00 When purchased with this manifold. Fuel-It! CANfuel allows your ECU to control up to 8 fuel injectors sequentially in addition to an ethanol content sensor, low fuel pressure sensor, extra pressure sensors, EGT probes, external fuel pumps, and much more. All using the same CANbus technology your ECU already uses to communicate with factory control modules! Click here for more information on the Fuel-It! CANfuel SequentialPort Fuel Injection Controller or to purchase separately. Features & Benefits • Included tank leaves trunk completely clear for full use of space• Super low profile design tucks neatly into the existing left side trunk cavity• 3.5 Gallon (13.25 liters) capacity • Available in transparent white for visually checking fluid levels and opaque black for a stealth appearance. • DDP 5800 pump mounts directly to the tank (pump sold separately)• Includes 2-way vented black plastic cap• Optional upgraded blue billet lid with 1-way check valve available here.• Includes all mounting hardware S58 Powered Vehicle Fitment: BMW M3• 2021+ S58 G80 BMW M3• 2021+ S58 G80 BMW M3 Competition BMW M4• 2021+ S58 G82 BMW M4 (requires modification for tank fitment)• 2021+ S58 G82 BMW M4 Competition (requires modification for tank fitment) What's included (1) Fuel-It! S58 Billet Fuel Rail (6) 550cc Fuel Injectors (1) 15' Stainless steel braided water/Methanol line with black nylon sheathing (1) BMS Water/Methanol Pump (4) Pump Screws - Phillips Passivated Stainless 10-32 Thread, 1-1/4" Long (1) -6AN ORB fitting (1) -6AN ORB plug (2) 1/8" NPT plugs (3) 14 x 1 Stainless steel screws to secure the rail to your manifold (1) Injector installation jig (1) 8 x 3/4" screw for the installation jig (1) 21/64 drill bit to open the factory injector bosses (1) Superlube® (1) BMS JB4 Port Injection Controller (7) Wire nuts (1) inline fuse holder (1) 12V Relay (1) 15' of red power wire (1) 15' of black power wire 3.5 Gallon Tank: What's included (1) 3.5 Gallon Stealth Tank (1) 2-way vented black plastic filler cap (1) brass Compression Tube Fitting for 1/4" Tube OD x 1/4 NPT Male (1) 18" of 1/4" nylon meth line (2) Powder coated stainless lower bracket (2) Rubber lower bracket grommets (2) BMS custom bell washers (2) Stainless Steel Flanged Button Head Screws M6 x 1 mm Thread, 8 mm Long (1) Plastic upper bracket (2) Self Tapping upper bracket screws 1/4" Size, 1-1/2" Long (4) Pump Screws - Phillips Passivated Stainless 10-32 Thread, 1-1/4" Long (1) Billet 1/4 push male to -4AN male 90º (pump out) (1) 1/4 push male to female 90º (pump in) (1) Button Head Hex Drive Screw 18-8 Stainless M8 x 1.25 Thread Size, 15mm Long (bracket to chassis) (1) Nylon lock nut - M8 x 1.25 mm Thread, 9.5 mm High (bracket to chassis) (1) Button Head Hex Drive Screw Passivated 18-8 Stainless Steel, M10 x 1.50 mm Thread, 16mm Long (bracket to chassis) Fuel-It! title: Porsche 718 Bluetooth FLEX FUEL KIT for all 982 Cayman, Boxster, & Spyder Models
descriptionEn: Know your exact ethanol content in real-time via the Fuel-It! or JB4 app on your smartphone or tablet. If you're running E85 or ethanol mixes in your Porsche 718, you need this kit! As many of you know the Porsche 718 motors can be very picky about how much ethanol you run to achieve peak performance but not run lean. Consequently, we have put together a kit enabling you to easily install an ethanol sensor to monitor your ethanol content with no permanent modifications needed. You will simply disconnect your low pressure fuel line and install our kit. It's a complete plug and play solution that utilizes our Bluetooth app to monitor your ethanol content. When you are ready to return to stock, you will simply remove the kit as there are no permanent modifications. The complete kit includes the following: Genuine Continental ethanol sensor Fuel-It! Bluetooth Universal Analyzer One stainless steel braided fuel line with black nylon sheathing to protect your other engine bay components Proprietary custom billet fitting for plug and play OEM integration One custom plug and play wiring harness 1 tube of SuperLube® Bluetooth Model Supports stand-alone Bluetooth operation with the Fuel-It! app Bluetooth (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this feature) If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here Compatible platforms: Porsche All 2.0L Turbo 982 Cayman & Boxster 718's All 2.5L Turbo 982 Cayman & Boxster 718's All 4.0L 982 GT4, GT4-RS, Spyder, and Spyder RS 718's * Location: This kit is installed under the motor on the drivers side by rear wheel. See install video for complete instructions. INSTALL VIDEO

title: BMS Oil Catch Can for G2x G4x B46/B48 BMW 230i 330i 430i
sku: G2x B48 OCC, G2x B48 OCC hose, B58/Supra OCC bracket, 2x OCC screws
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your G Chassis B46/B48 BMW Air Intake System! It's no secret that G chassis B46/B48 turbo BMW motors can suffer from oil control problems causing the oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves and the VANOS system, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The Burger Motorsports oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffle systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system altogether venting crankcase gas and odor into the atmosphere. Most are simply repackaged oil catch cans from smaller/lower power motors shoehorned into place in the BMW engine bay. To solve these problems Burger Motorsports designed their oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbo BMW application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no horsepower robbing crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS oil separator retains the factory fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking to the atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Install takes around 10 minutes, includes all required hardware, and is 100% reversible. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. Made in the USA.New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here. Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency • Promotes Engine Longevity• Non-Clogging Air Oil Separation Triple Baffle• Free Flow Anti-Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large Intake/Outlet No Tapering Down• Stealth Mounting• Anodized Black Aluminum• Made in the USA & Guaranteed for Life• Simply unscrew base every 3-6 months to empty or use the 1/8th NPT drain plug.• Non-Clogging, No Service Needed Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs• Large 16mm+ inlet and outlet exceeds OEM PCV sizing• Precision CNC Machined from Solid Blocks of High-Grade Aluminum Vehicle Fitment (G chassis only) B46/B48 Vehicle Fitment BMW 2 Series• 2022+ G42 G43 B46/B48 BMW 220i 230i 2.0L including Gran Coupe and xDrive BMW 3 Series• 2019-2024 G20 G21 G28 B46/B48 BMW 330i 2.0L including Gran Coupe and xDrive• 2019+ G20 G21 B46/B48 BMW 330e 2.0L including xDrive• 2019+ G20 G21 B46/B48 BMW 320i 2.0L including xDriveBMW 4 Series• 2021+ G22 G23 G26 B46/B48 BMW 420i 430i 2.0L including Gran Coupe and xDrive Catch can dimensions and specs Can dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) TallCan diameter: 2.5" (63.7mm)Lid length: Back to nozzle end: 4" (101mm)Nozzle outer diameter: .75" (19.2mm) Nozzle inner diameter: 0.669" (17mm) Can Fluid Capacity: Up to 5.5 fl oz (162.6 mL) What's Included • (1) BMS G2x B48 Oil Catch Can• (1) Billet B58/Supra bracket• (1) G2x B48 heavy-duty silicone OCC hose• (2) Bracket to can screws M5x0.8x12mm internal hex New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade. More info here.The main advantage of a transparent can is that you can easily see the contents inside. This allows for quick checks on oil levels, contamination, and sludge buildup without needing to open the can. ⚠️ ATTENTION: The optional transparent can base is not suitable for use in regions where temperatures frequently drop to 32°F (0°C) or below.

title: BMW Bluetooth/CANbus Flex Fuel Kits for S58 M2 M3 M4 X3M X4M
descriptionEn: Integrate ethanol mixture into your tuning using our unique CANflex system! If you're running E85 and/or plan to run port injection in your S58, you need this kit! This is a complete plug & play kit to install a flex fuel kit in your S58 equipped BMW in about 30 minutes. Our new CANflex ECA sends your ethanol mixture four different ways for the ultimate tuning integration: CANbus via user selectable addressing for MHD, BM3, EcuTek, and JB4 integration Free CANflex Bluetooth app for iOS and Android LED display built into the head unit for quick visual readout 5v output for legacy support (older ECUs or non-CANbus JB4 integration) Offered in both a plug and play harness and a universal harness. Manual transmission vehicles and BM3 require using the universal harness with posi-taps for CANbus. Vehicle Fitment 2020+ F97 X3M and all variants 2020+ F98 X4M and all variants 2023+ S58 G87 M2 2021+ S58 G80 M3 2021+ S58 G82 / G83 M4 2023+ S58 G82 M4 CSL The complete S58 kit with CANflex includes: Genuine Continental® ethanol sensor BMS CANflex LED ECA for use with JB4, MHD, EcuTek, and BM3 Stainless steel braided fuel lines with black nylon sheathing to protect engine bay components Custom fitting allowing easy addition of optional port injection lines via 1/8" NPT port Plug & play harness (optional) BMW/Supra Accessory Harness for S58/B58 motors Download the free BMS CANflex app Wiring diagram for the new BMS Bluetooth CANflex Harness Red: (originally Red/Green) 12v switched power via fuse tap or posi-tapBlack: Chassis groundBrown: (originally Orange) CAN-Green: (originally Red/Blue) CAN+Blue: 5V legacy output for input into JB4 Also available with the original Fuel-It! title: BMS V2 F30 N55 BMW Performance Intake
descriptionEn: Gain up to 10+whp along with terrific sound Finally, an intake system worthy of your N55 TwinPower motor! The BMS F2x F3x N55 Performance Intake retains everything good about the OEM N55 intake system, including the cold air ducting and lightweight heat shielding airbox bottom; but, it completely replaces the restrictive top end of the OEM intake with new high flow ducting and a performance reusable air filter to match. During our extensive dyno testing, the BMS N55 Intake out-performed all other available N55 intake systems posting gains of up to 10+ horsepower to the wheels. In addition to freeing up some power, turbo spool speed is improved. Not to mention incredible sound improvement. You'll finally be able to hear your turbo spooling! Installation is effortless, taking the average enthusiast only five minutes to install or remove right in their driveway. In addition, our proprietary high flow filter can be cleaned every 15-20k miles using the performance oil cleaning kit. Features & Benefits • Adds up to 10+ Horsepower• Dramatic sound improvement• Quick install and removal• Improves throttle response • Retains OEM airbox base as a heat shield• Retains OEM cold air ducting• Looks great under the hood• Cleanable and reusable filter• Made in the USA Vehicle Fitment (F Chassis N55 Engines shown below only)See another N55 BMW intake here if your N55 engine is not pictured below5, 6, and X Series N55 BMW intake available hereE chassis N55 BMW intake is available here BMW M135 • 2012-2015 F20/F21 M135i including xDriveBMW M235 • 2014-2018 F22/F23 M235i• 2016-2017 F87 M2 (N55 engine only) for N55 powered M2 select automatic transmission when ordering if you have a manual or automatic.BMW 3 Series • 2012-2015 F30 335i Sedan/Hybrid 3 including xDrive• 2012-2015 F31 335i Touring including xDrive• 2013-2015 F34 335i Gran Turismo including xDriveBMW 4 Series • 2014-2016 F32 435i including xDrive• 2014-2016 F33 435i Convertible including xDrive• 2014-2016 F36 435i Gran Coupe including xDrive What's Included(1) BMS polymer V2 intake tube(1) Renewable BMS performance air filter w/clamp (BMS111)(1) Metal "L" bracket(4) M4x.70x12 Phillips MAF and bracket screwsAutomatic Transmission and all N55 powered M2(1) Hollow rubber grommet(1) Billet vacuum hose fittingManual Transmission(1) Rubber grommet plug Replacement BMS111 Blue Oil intake filters are available here.Replacement BMS111 Red Oil intake filters are available here.Performance air filter cleaning & oil kit available here. The BMSM111 filter needs approximately 30 grams of oil when re-oiling.V2 Install Guide V1 Install Guide The BMS F30 N55 Performance Intake retains everything that is good about the OEM N55 intake system including the cold air ducting and lightweight heat shielding airbox bottom; but, completely replaces the restrictive top end of the OEM intake with new high flow ducting and a performance reusable air filter to match. title: Porsche 911 Bluetooth FLEX FUEL KIT for the 991.1 and 991.2
descriptionEn: Know your exact ethanol content in real-time via the Fuel-It! or JB4 app on your smartphone or tablet. If you're running E85 or ethanol mixes in your Porsche 911, you need this kit! As many of you know the Porsche 911 motors can be very picky about how much ethanol you run to achieve peak performance but not run lean. Consequently, we have put together a kit enabling you to easily install an ethanol sensor with no permanent modifications needed. You will simply remove your low pressure fuel line in the engine bay and plug in our kit. It's a complete plug and play solution that utilizes our Bluetooth app to monitor your ethanol content. When you are ready to return to stock, you will simply remove the kit and re-install the stock fuel line. The complete kit includes the following: Genuine Continental ethanol sensor Fuel-It! title: BMW E-Chassis 535i and Z4 Fuel Line and Ethanol Sensor Upgrades
descriptionEn: Fuel-It! BMW E Chassis Fuel Line and Ethanol Sensor Upgrades for the E60 535i and E89 Z4 We currently offer a variety of options to upgrade the fuel feed lines on your N54 and N55 equipped 535i or Z4 E-series BMW. All fuel line upgrades are 3/8" (AN6) and E85 compatible. In addition, we utilize our own custom fittings made specifically for your BMW so that you can maintain the stock connections at the HPFP, the tank, and the ethanol sensor should you choose to install one. HPFP to the Tank: This upgrade replaces both stock fuel lines with one upgraded continuous fuel line from the fuel tank to the HPFP. HPFP to Port Injection: This option adds the Tee line you need to integrate your port injection kits but retains all your current fuel lines and is compatible with the stock lines as well as upgrade lines and flex fuel kits. HPFP to the Tank with Ethanol Sensor: For those that want to run ethanol, we also offer this upgrade with an integrated ethanol sensor. Port Injection Spacer to the Tank: If you are running our port injection kit, this upgrade replaces the stock fuel lines from the tank to the engine bay and then utilizes a Y adapter to supply the HPFP and PI with fuel. Our custom fittings remove those tees and extra fittings for a cleaner high flow setup Port Injection Spacer to the Tank with Ethanol Sensor: For those that want to run ethanol, we also offer this upgrade with an integrated ethanol sensor Phoenix Racing Manifold to the Tank: If you are running the Phoenix Racing Manifold port injection kit, this upgrade replaces the stock fuel lines from the tank to the engine bay and then utilizes a Y adapter to supply the HPFP and PI with fuel. Our custom fittings remove those tees and extra fittings for a cleaner high flow setup Phoenix Racing Manifold to the Tank with Ethanol Sensor: For those that want to run ethanol, we also offer this upgrade with an integrated ethanol sensor *Note: An ethanol analyzer must be used in conjunction with the ethanol sensor to read your ethanol content. Bluetooth and JB4 integrated (0-5 Volt) Bluetooth (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this feature) If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here *For the BMW E-series JB4 platform connect the white wire to position #15 on the JB4 25 pin harness. Select WMI page option 15/16 input to enable. *These kits are available for off-road use only PLEASE CONTACT US IF YOU DON'T SEE THE OPTION YOU NEED OR WITH ANY QUESTIONS YOU HAVE! Videos

title: BMS Cold Air Intake for 2021+ Ford Bronco 2.3L / 2.7L
descriptionEn: More Air = More Power + Dramatic Sound Improvement! Our Ford Bronco cold air intake offers 15whp+ power gains and intoxicating sound while retaining the superior air filtration and intake temperature reduction of a fully closed intake system! It starts with our oversized inverted cone filter available either oiled or dry. Featuring 50% more airflow potential than the factory filter and a built in velocity stack. Either filter is capable of supporting maximum power. In addition we've completely redesigned the intake lid to accommodate our larger filter and remove the numerous choke points in the factory lid. Together, our filter and lid provide huge power gains and reduce turbo lag while retaining factory-like heat isolation and filtration performance. The BMS intake installs in minutes and includes a clear window for easy filter inspection. We offer two high quality filter options. Our oiled cotton cleanable filter can be cleaned using an S&B cleaning kit every 15-20k miles and should last the life of your Bronco. We suggest oiled filters for most applications. For those who are frequently off-roading in very sandy/dusty environments, we suggest our dry extendable filter option, which offers superior filtration for extreme conditions. Our dry filter can be cleaned by blowing out with compressed air. Introducing the Burger Motorsports Competition Cold Air Intake for the G chassis B46/B48 powered BMW 220i/230i/320i/330i and 420i/430i including Gran Coupe and xDrive models. Designed from the ground up to be the best in every aspect with over a year invested in street and track testing. This is the first intake for the B46/B48 G chassis 2, 3, and 4 Series that follows a clean OEM+ look and materials but has the intoxicating sound and performance of an open intake. Inside, you'll find our proprietary renewable inverted cone performance filter; outside, you'll find unsurpassed OEM fitment, materials, and quality. The BMS competition intake has a clear window on top for quick filter inspection, uses the OEM cold air inlet, and has a huge inlet hole on the cold side of the airbox for more air and even more fantastic sound! The rubber accordion hose and factory resonator are replaced with a smooth pipe to deliver less turbulent air to the turbo. This intake takes everything good about the factory intake and squeezes more sound and performance out of it while maximizing airflow to your B48 engine! Velocity stacks allow even more air to be smoothly sucked into your intake system and are used in most racing applications. Designed to work with our upgraded B48 BMW Aluminum Short Turbo Inlet Upgrade and OEM or BMS Billet Strut Braces.
