title: JB4 Universal Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Kit
descriptionEn: Make tremendous amounts of power on pump gas! Water/Methanol/Alcohol injection commonly referred to as WMI allows you to make tremendous amounts of power on pump gas. The effect is similar to running 100 octane race gas or E85 fuel all the time with the additional cooling benefits allowing for more power than you can make on race gas or E85 alone. FSB JB4 Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) controller The BMS JB4 FSB Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) controller allows the JB4 to control your WMI pump and solenoid for dynamic progressive flow mapping. It also allows the JB4 to monitor pump current to overlay it with CANbus feedback for tuning parameters such as fuel trims and fuel pressure to provide a comprehensive flow-based safety system. The key to a safe and effective Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) setup is tuning integration. All BMS kits integrate to the JB4 tuning system allowing for precise mapping based on boost, throttle position, engine speed, intake temperature, advance, gear, and other data elements available to the JB4 through its CANbus system. In addition, a pump flow signal is fed back to the JB4 allowing for a safe and smooth progressive boost mapping. If the tank runs empty or flow drops for any reason the JB4 will safely back down performance to avoid knock. In addition, WMI can be activated or disabled from the driver’s seat, will automatically disengage during traction control or safety map situations, and WMI flow data can be displayed in dash and/or via your JB4 Mobile logging device. BMS kits include a high quality 220psi Aquatec WMI pump (the industry standard), methanol compatible solenoid with filter, compression fittings reducing the risk of dangerous leaks, and all required wiring and mounting hardware. The base kit includes a WMI pump, solenoid, FSB for JB4 integration, WMI solenoid, filter, 20' of WMI line, and required fittings. Using the options when adding to cart you can add on a WMI nozzle (BM10 suggested for most applications), tank, and optional check valve tank tap to keep vapors inside the tank. Optional check valve billet tank cap to keep vapors inside the tank is available at the bottom of the page Injection Nozzle Options: (Single or Dual Nozzles) The nozzles are determined by the intended power and how many bungs your charge pipe has. The nozzles are 1/8” NPT and screw into bungs included on most aftermarket charge pipes. Our "super atomizing" nozzles are well known for their great atomization and flow characteristics. The nozzle number represents the approximate gallons per hour of fluid when at full flow. Generally speaking, running two smaller nozzles is preferred to one larger nozzle for an equal flow to improve fluid atomization and distribution. Feel free to email us for nozzle advice if your situation is unique. What's inside our methanol injection nozzles? Water Methanol Injection Nozzle guide 4 cylinder: BM7 6 cylinder: BM10 or Dual BM58 cylinder: Dual BM5 or BM10 if larger turbos Optional BMS Elite Steel Braided Hardline UpgradeThis kit includes 18 feet of upgraded stainless steel braided lines. They feature an inner teflon seal for leak free operation, stainless steel braid, and a black outer nylon mesh for abrasion resistance and a stealthy look. These lines not only look great they are also equipped with BMS Elite AN fittings and can withstand extreme pressure and temperature conditions. Includes all required AN fittings. 1.25 GALLON HEAVY-DUTY UNIVERSAL TANKThe Burger Motorsports 1.25 gallon heavy-duty tank is compact and flexible allowing for a wide range of mounting on any flat vertical surface in the trunk. This tank is thicker and stronger than our basic 1-gallon WMI tank. This tank features an easy fill filler nozzle, an anti-starvation reservoir with a pre-threaded bung for the included 90º compression pump feed fitting, a spill-catcher reservoir around the filler cap, a 2-way vented black plastic cap, and is translucent to allow visually checking the fluid level.Comes with a standard 2 way vented black plastic cap/lid. Upgraded billet cap/lid with 1-way check valve available in the drop-down menu when ordering. Tank dimensions: L 11" x W 4.5 x H 9" ApplicationsUniversal trunk mount 2 gallon universal low profile tank The Burger Motorsports 2 gal. universal tank allows the methanol pump to mount to the bottom of the tank making for a clean and fast installation. It’s universal in nature and will fit a wide variety of trunk applications. The larger capacity means more time between WMI fill ups. Offered in black and in clear to allow visually checking the fluid level. Includes a 2-way vented black plastic cap and a compression pump feed fitting. Upgraded billet lid with a 1-way check valve available. Comes pre-tapped for the pickup fitting. W orks with all DDP 5800 pumps. Made in USA.Tank dimensions: L 15.5" x W 8" x H 8.25" ApplicationsUniversal trunk mount BMS 3 gal. STEALTH TANK BMS Stealth TankWith our 3 gallon stealth tank the WMI pump mounts directly to the tank and the entire assembly fits cleanly within the existing trunk cavity in your F3X or F8X vehicle below the trunk floor. Works with all DDP 5800 pumps. Made in the USA.Comes with a standard 2 way vented black plastic cap.Upgraded billet lid with 1-way check valve available below.Tank dimensions: L 26.75" x W 9.75" X H 7.5" Vehicle Fitment BMW• 2012-2018 BMW 3 Series F30 sedan • 2015-2020 BMW F80 M3• 2014-2020 BMW 4 Series F32 coupe• 2015-2020 BMW F82 M4 (does not fit convertible) BMS 2 Gallon Stealth Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) for F10 5 Series BMW hides under the trunk deck This completely custom design fits cleanly within the existing trunk cavity in your F10 BMW for the ultimate easy to install no compromise kit. title: Front Active Spoiler Delete JB4 add-on for 2022+ Toyota Tundra
descriptionEn: For those running a Tundra JB4 this simple plug and play add-on allows for complete removal of the Gen 3 Tundra Front Active Spoiler module without those annoying in-dash error codes. Essential when installing aftermarket front bumpers and some lift kits. Also eliminates the need for the in cabin JB4 OBDII cable allowing full CANbus function from the Active Spoiler CANbus connection point. Installation is simple. Attach one end to the JB4 harness, the other end to your factory active spoiler harness, ensure your JB4 has the latest firmware enabling the feature, and turn on option 3 in the JB4 user adjustment page.How to identify your JB4 connector: 4 Position (most common) has 4 square plugs. 2 Position has 2 metal pins. FEATURES AND BENEFITS • Removes annoying active spoiler error codes• Simple plug & play install for JB4 users• Completely eliminates JB4 OBDII cable• Made in the USA Vehicle Fitment Toyota • 2022+ Toyota Tundra with active spoilerWhat's included: (1) Active spoiler delete wiring harness

title: Improved Racing BMW Oil Cooler Thermostat (180F)
descriptionEn: Precise Oil Temperature Control for Your BMW Upgrade your BMW N20, N26, N51, N52, N53, N54, N55, and S55 engine's oil temperature control with Improved Racing's high-performance oil cooler adapter. Designed to address flaws in the factory's restrictive oil cooler adapter and faulty internal flow control valve, this upgrade ensures precise oil temperature control. Improved Racing's thermostat provides quick engine warmup, prevents overcooling, and delivers full oil cooling capacity on demand. Trusted by professional race teams around the globe, Improved Racing's thermostats have proven highly reliable, are backed by a lifetime manufacturers warranty, and are made in the USA. Option to Use the Factory Oil Cooler and Lines The optional factory oil line adapter allows you to use the factory oil cooler lines for a simple, plug-and-play installation. For maximum performance, the factory oil cooler and lines may be replaced with an aftermarket cooler and AN lines using the AN adapter fittings (-10AN line size is recommended). Please note that some applications, such as most BMW SUV's, use a water-to-oil heat exchangers. These applications require plugging the coolant supply and return ports, as well as adding an external air-to-oil cooler and lines (factory or aftermarket). Please note the EBW-100 adapter cannot be used without an oil cooler. Vehicle Fitment Designed for a direct fit to any BMW engine equipped with oil filter housing part number 11428683206 or 11428642289 (circled in blue in the diagram below). The application is extremely large and covers most BMW cars and SUV's across all series! You may view our complete application list, including chassis and engine code, in the EBW-100 Complete Application Reference file found in the documentation section at the bottom of this page. Compatible with all applications equipped with the following BMW engines: BMW N20 engines BMW N26 engines BMW N51 engines BMW N52 engines BMW N53 engines BMW N54 engines BMW N55 engines BMW S55 engines Determining Your Application Some applications require adding an external oil cooler. To determine your specific application, refer to the diagram below. Direct-fit applications (green circle): If your vehicle is equipped with the oil cooler manifold circled in green, you can replace it with the EBW-100 and sometimes use the optional factory line adapter to retain the factory oil cooler (see additional notes on variants below). You may also replace your oil cooler and/or lines with aftermarket AN lines to improve performance with any of the three variants below. Variants: There are three variants of the factory thermostat housing: The first variant has factory lines exiting the bottom of the factory housing, and uses an M8 screw inserted from the bottom. The EBW-100 is a direct bolt on for this application using the factory lines with the optional factory oil line adapter (EBW-100-98). The second common variant has factory lines exiting the bottom, but uses an M6 screw that is inserted from the top to retain the factory lines. To use the factory lines on this variant, the M6 hole in the center of the factory line flange must be drilled out to clear the provided M8 screw. If using aftermaket lines, the EBW-100 will work without any modifications. The third common variant has factory lines exiting the top of the factory housing. The EBW-100 cannot be used with factory lines in this case. You must use aftermarket AN lines. Improved Racing is developing a new adapter for this application, which will be available soon. Applications requiring the addition of an oil cooler (red circle): If your vehicle is equipped with the water-to-oil cool circled in red, you will need to perform these additional modifications: Cap off the coolant feed and return ports at the source. Install an OEM BMW air-to-oil cooler and lines, or install an aftermarket air-to-oil cooler and aftermarket AN lines.Warning: A cooler must always be equipped. Do not cap off the inlet and outlet ports of the EBW-100. This will result in the complete blockage of oil flow to your engine! Temperature Rating Specifications Part Number Typ. Stabilization Temp Activation Temp Full Flow Temp EBW-100-T4 180°F (82.2°C) 180°F (82.2°C) 203ºF (95ºC) Specifications Port Size 10AN O-ring boss inlet and outlet ports. Construction CNC-machined from 6061-T6 aluminum and MilSpec Type II anodized. Parts Included EBW-100 thermostatic oil cooler adapter Replacement OEM-style rubber gasket Mounting Hardware Country of Manufacture United States of America Warranty Lifetime warranty

title: JB4 Tuner for 2024+ Mazda CX-90, CX-60 & 2025+ CX-70 3.3L Turbo
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 70whp and 60wtq This plug and play tuner attaches to two easy-to-access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. It features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 800 times per second using dedicated 10-bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance. Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in!Installation is very discrete and unlike flash remaps it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes.JB4 adds functionality with a plug and play OBDII CANbus connection allowing the JB4 to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU. Including pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, and much more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data, no less incorporate it real-time into their tuning algorithms. The result is huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery.The JB4 also features multiple maps based on this expanded engine criteria, smoother partial throttle performance, additional engine safety systems such as lean run or over boost, more advanced logging for those wanting to experiment with different fuels and E85 mixtures, boost by gear to improve traction, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more to come via free firmware updates. Made in the USA. 5 Year Warranty. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 70whp and 60wtq on a factory vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Mazda Vehicle Fitment • 2024+ Mazda CX-90 SKYACTIV® 3.3L Turbo• 2024+ Mazda CX-60 SKYACTIV® 3.3L Turbo • 2025+ Mazda CX-70 SKYACTIV® 3.3L Turbo including Turbo S What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. title: Subaru - Magnetic Spark Plug Socket
descriptionEn: Change Your Subaru Spark Plugs Like a Pro! Everyone knows spark plug changes are suggested every 20k miles or so for tuned vehicles. Everyone also knows Subaru engines require a special thin-walled socket to remove/reinstall the spark plugs. But what you might not know is the BMS socket fits like a glove and is only one third the price of an OEM socket! It also includes a strong integrated rare earth magnet to secure the plugs while raising and lowering them in the long bores. Ours will never wear out like spark plug sockets with rubber or metal tensioners to hold the spark plug in. The RIGHT tool for the job makes BMW spark plug replacement a snap! Beware of cheap replica magnetic spark plugs sockets with weak magnets that will not easily recover the plug from the long bore. The plug falls out of them before you can get it out. Vehicle Fitment • Subaru Vehicles with 14mm spark plugs BMS Spark Plug Socket Features OEM quality perfect fit thin wall socket A strong magnetic hold never deteriorates or weakens Fits a standard 3/8 drive socket wrench High quality at a super low price Designed and manufactured for your Subaru Excellent addition to your toolbox Spark Plug Socket Specs 12 point, 14mm Thin walled deep specialty socket Strong magnetic hold 3/8" drive Recommended spark plug torque 17 lb-ft or 23nm.

The JB4 is the most advanced and highly featured tuning system for your 2022+ Lexus NX, RX, TX 350 2.4L 4 CYL Turbo. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. DYNO Results Jeep Wagoneer 3.0t, 93 octane, transmission downshift during dyno would not allow us to capture valid data below 4000rpm.

descriptionEn: BMS Elite B58TU Charge Pipe Blow-Off Valve (BOV) Kit Finally, that blow-off valve sound you've been waiting for on your B58TU powered BMW or Supra. Designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports in the USA. The BMS Elite is the highest quality B58TU charge pipe upgrade on the market. Our charge pipe is constructed from high-gauge aluminum featuring a CNC throttle body and turbo flange for a snug, OEM-style fit. It is completed with a matte black powder coat to coordinate with the engine bay and boasts three 1/8" NPT bungs ideal for an external boost gauge or methanol nozzles. Its double o-ring seal design on the chargepipe flange that attaches to the turbo is designed to withstand up to 40+psi of high boost. This version features the Turbosmart® Raceport® valve blow-off valve to release excess pressure in the charge pipes when letting off the gas. title: JB4 Tuner for 2016-2022 G12 N74 V12 BMW M760Li xDrive (BETA) + PRO Bluetooth Adapter
descriptionEn: Gains are 104whp on pump gas and up to 198whp on higher octane or E85 mixtures. The ultimate tune for your 2016-2022 G12 BMW M760Li xDrive V12. The JB4 allows you to go from factory stock to full race and everywhere in between. The JB4 includes many unique features not found in any other tune, including user-adjustable 1st and 2nd gear boost limiting, smartphone integration, electronic wastegate control, ethanol fuel support, and built-in advanced CANbus-based diagnostic tools. Installation is easy and completely removable with no splicing or cutting of factory wires making the JB4 an excellent choice for your V12 engine. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included and wirelessly connects the JB4 BMW tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more info on how to use the JB4PRO free app click here. JB4 FEATURES & BENEFITS • Gains are 104whp on pump gas and up to 198whp on higher octane or E85 mixtures.• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment BMW X7 Series • 2016-2022 G12 N74 V12 BMW M760Li xDrive What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated, the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade. Is the JB4 a real tune?Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. If your looking for N74 tuning for your 2016-2022 G12 BMW M760Li xDrive V12 the JB4 is a perfect BMW V12 engine tune. JB4 Tuned 2018 G12 BMW M760Li xDrive V12 (baseline) vs JB4

title: JB4 Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Kit for Gen 2 G20 G22 B48 B58 BMW
descriptionEn: Make tremendous amounts of power on pump gas! Water/Methanol/Alcohol injection commonly referred to as WMI allows you to make tremendous amounts of power on pump gas. The effect is similar to running 100 octane race gas or E85 fuel all the time with the additional cooling benefits allowing for more power than you can make on race gas or E85 alone. For those that don't have easy E85 access WMI adds a ton of power over pump gas, and for those running E85 WMI can still be very useful for its charge air cooling and fuel volume benefits. The key to a safe and effective WMI setup is tuning integration. The B48/B58 BMS WMI kit integrates to the JB4 tuning system allowing for precise mapping based on boost, throttle position, engine speed, intake temperature, advance, gear, and other data elements available to the JB4 through its CANbus system. In addition, a pump flow signal is fed back to the JB4 allowing for a safe and smooth progressive boost mapping. If the tank runs empty or flow drops for any reason the JB4 will safely back down performance to avoid detonation. Boost is held low until WMI is properly flowing to avoid tip in knock common with non-integrated WMI setups. In addition WMI can be activated or disabled right from the JB4 Mobile app , will automatically disengage during traction control or safety map situations, and WMI flow data can be displayed via your JB4 Mobile logging device. The BMS WMI kit includes our new 3.5 gallon integrated stealth tank, FSB JB4 Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Controller, a high quality Aquatec water/methanol Injection (WMI) pump made to our specifications, BMS BM10 super atomizing water/methanol injection nozzle, high speed solenoid with leak-free compression fittings, 18' of steel braided line, 24" steel braided lines with AN fittings, an AN 90º pump fitting, inline filter, and all required wiring, brackets, and mounting hardware. This water/methanol injection (WMI) tank is a completely custom design that neatly hides away in the left side trunk cavity found in most G20 G22 & G80 M3 & G82 M4 BMW vehicles. The pump mounts directly to the back of the tank allowing for a quick, clean, and completely stealth installation. The bottom of the tank includes a rear sump allowing for consistent performance even as the tank drains. Includes 2-way vented black plastic cap, a compression pump feed fitting, and 12" of vinyl WMI line for the non-pressure side of the WMI pump. Our unique tank can also be purchased separately here. We also offer an optional upgraded blue billet tank cap with 1-way check valve available here. This kit includes a BM10 (10 GPH or approx 750 ml/min) injection nozzle suitable for most B58 applications. Mounting requires an 1/8" NPT port or our throttle plate adapter. Optional plug and play Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) adapter for Gen 2 B58 BMW motors We've designed this plug and play adapter for quick installation and removal of BMS dual nozzle water/meth kits without having to replace the factory charge pipe. Simply unscrew three bolts, insert the CNC machined adapter with integrated o-ring in place between the throttle body and intake manifold, and tighten the included longer length bolts, to allow mounting of two meth nozzles with a perfect seal. Vehicle Fitment BMW 3 Series• 2020-2023 B58 G20 BMW M340i including xDrive • 2019+ B48 G20 BMW 330i, 330e including xDrive BMW 4 Series• 2021+ B58 G22 BMW M440i including xDrive (requires modification to fit) • 2021+ B48 G22 BMW 430i including xDrive What's included • (1) G20 Stealth Tank and Mounting Hardware • (1) FSB JB4 Water/Methanol Injection Controller • (1) BMS water/methanol Injection pump• (1) BM10 Water/Methanol Nozzle • (1) 12.5' of steel braided hose (straight and 90º fitting) • (1) 2' of steel braided hose (straight and 90º fitting)• (1) 18" of PTFE line (tank to pump) • (1) Billet 1/4 push male to -4AN male 90º (pump out)• (1) 1/4 push male to female 90º (pump in) • (1) Solenoid • (1) Gen 2 B58 billet throttle body adapter (optional) • (1) 15' (-) Negative black wire• (1) 15' (+) Positive red wire• (7) wire wire nuts • (1) inline fuse holder Optional: Gen 2 B58 Throttle body adapter JB4, BMS intake, BMS charge pipe, BMS WMI, ~93 octane, factory flash Optional upgraded blue billet water/methanol injection (WMI) with 1-way check valve available here.

title: BMS 3.5 Gallon Stealth Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Tank for G20 G22 & G80 M3 & G82 M4 BMW
descriptionEn: Stealth Tank for G20 G22 & G80 M3 & G82 M4 BMW tucks neatly in the side pocket of your trunk! This water/methanol injection (WMI) tank is a completely custom design that neatly hides away in the left side trunk cavity found in most G20 G22 & G80 M3 & G82 M4 BMW vehicles. The pump mounts directly to the back of the tank allowing for a quick, clean, and completely stealth installation. The bottom of the tank includes a rear sump allowing for consistent performance even as the tank drains. Includes 2-way vented black plastic cap and a compression pump feed fitting. Optional upgraded blue billet water/methanol injection (WMI) with 1-way check valve available here. Burger Motorsports DDP 5800 water methanol alcohol Injection pump available here. The nozzles are determined by the intended power and how many bungs your charge pipe has. The nozzles are 1/8” NPT and screw into bungs included on most aftermarket charge pipes. Our BMS "super atomizing" nozzles are well known for their great atomization and flow characteristics. The nozzle number represents the approximate gallons per hour of fluid when at full flow. Generally speaking, running two smaller nozzles is preferred to one larger nozzle for an equal flow to improve fluid atomization and distribution. Below are some general nozzle suggestions but feel free to email us for nozzle advice if your situation is unique. title: BMW XM (G09) - Burger Motorsports Wheel Spacers w/10 Bolts
descriptionEn: Simple, bolt-on handling and looks for your BMW XMWider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks BMW XM wheel spacers by Burger Motorsports are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your BMW. Our wheel spacers push your rims and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability, and handling. Spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset, or just making your BMW XM look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your BMW ensuring a perfect vibration-free fit. Comes with a packet of anti-seize grease to place on the factory hub to aid in later removal. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports BMW XM wheel spacer is CNC machined from high grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our BMW XM Wheel Spacers are sold in pairs (2 pcs) with 10 12.9 grade extended lug bolts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. All Burger Motorsports wheel spacers are hub-centric. They tested and are safe to use on the BMW XM's xDrive (all-wheel drive) system and are compatible with the 4 wheel steering. Hub-Centric: This means our spacer's center bore matches your factory BMW XM hub and the factory-like hub on the Burger Motorsports spacers match the center bore in your wheel for a vibration-free fit. What width wheel spacer should I get?The BMW XM with factory wheels and tire sizes take 15mm in the front and 20mm in the rear. Concentric Floating Seat Lug Bolts: Each bolt is made from 12.9 Motorsport Grade steel for strength and safety and zinc plated for corrosion resistance. They contain a concentric floating seat washer to give the bolt a secure mating surface to torque to stay torqued and to reduce wheel seat chafing during installation and removal. What about the perfect length extended lug bolts?We got you. We include 10 of them with each pair spacers. The XM is a heavy beast so we provide upgraded 12.9 grade bolts. Factory uses 8.8 grade. The photos and guidelines on this website are for reference only. Your XM might have different results with the same size spacers due to different wheels, tire sizes, packages, and offsets. Installation: Simply remove the wheel, place the spacer on the hub and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download the install guide. FREE Wheel Pin tool with purchase of 2 pairs of wheel spacers on the same receipt.To get the free wheel pin with a 2 pair wheel spacer purchase, add 2 pairs of wheel spacers to your cart, go to the link below and add the free wheel pin to the cart. When you hit the checkout button the items will be discounted to FREE!Click Here for the BMW Wheel Pin Tool ($10.00 Value) Vehicle Fitment BMW XM• 2023+ S68 G09 BMW XM 4.4L • 2024+ S68 G09 BMW XM Label 4.4L G09 XM BMW Wheel Spacer Specifications Bolt Thread Size: M14 x 1.25Bolt Seat: Cone Seat / Concentric Wheel Fasteners: Extended 12.9 grade zinc coated lug boltsSpacer Material: Lightweight Anodized Black 7075-T6 Aluminum Torque Specifications 105 ft-lbs (142 nm) please re-torque after the first 50 miles or soWhat's included(2) Wheel Spacers(10) Extended 12.9 grade Concentric Swivel Washer Lug Bolts(1) Packet of anti-seize ⚠️ Read instructions before installing. DO NOT mix up the included bolts. The bolts are the spacer width longer than the factory bolts. They are different lengths depending on spacer width. Do not use extended spacer bolts without spacers.

title: S68 JB4 Tuner for 2023+ BMW XM & 2024+ BMW X5M / X6M
descriptionEn: Gains are 125whp on pump gas and up to 260whp on higher octane or E85 mixtures. The ultimate tune for your 4.4L S68 powered BMW XM, X5M, & X6M. The JB4 allows you to go from factory stock to full race and everywhere in between. The JB4 installs and removes easily and includes many unique features not found in any other tune, including user-adjustable 1st and 2nd gear boost limiting, smartphone integration, electronic wastegate control, ethanol fuel support, and built-in advanced CANbus-based diagnostic tools. Installation is easy and completely removable with no splicing or cutting of factory wires making the JB4 an excellent choice for your S68 engine.No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUsFor the latest S68 performance results, updates, firmware, and map guide, be sure to visit JB4tech.com Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. S68 ///M JB4 FEATURES & BENEFITS • Gains are 125whp on pump gas and up to 260whp on higher octane or E85 mixtures.• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment BMW X5M • 2024+ S68 F95 BMW X5M LCI 4.4L BMW X6M • 2024+ S68 F96 BMW X6M LCI 4.4L BMW XM• 2023+ S68 G09 BMW XM 4.4L• 2024+ S68 G09 BMW XM LABEL 4.4L What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated, the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. JB4 Tuned 2023 BMW XM DYNO - STOCK (baseline) vs JB4 2023 BMW XM Dragy 0-60 MPH & 1/4 Mile times - JB4 MAP 5 + MS109. If your looking for S68 tuning for your BMW XM or X5,X7 M60i, or 7 Series M60e the JB4 is a perfect S68 engine tune.

title: BMW Bluetooth/CANflex Flex Fuel Kits for the G-Chassis Gen3 B58 & B48
descriptionEn: Know your exact ethanol content in real-time with our new LED display or by using the BMS CANflex, Fuel-It! or JB4 mobile app on your smartphone or tablet. If you're running E85 or ethanol mixes in your Gen 3 B58 or B48 equipped BMW, you need this kit! As many of you know the BMW motors can be very picky about how much ethanol you run to achieve peak performance but not run lean. Consequently, we have put together a kit enabling you to easily install an ethanol sensor with no permanent modifications needed. You will simply remove your low pressure fuel line in the engine bay and plug in our kit. It's a complete plug and play solution that utilizes our Bluetooth app to monitor your ethanol content. When you are ready to return to stock, you will simply remove the kit and re-install the stock fuel line. All of our complete kits include the following: Genuine Continental® ethanol sensor One stainless steel braided fuel line with black nylon sheathing to protect your other engine bay components Proprietary custom billet fitting for plug and play OEM integration One custom wiring harness One tube of Super Lube® for hose adapter install Complete Kit with BMS CANbus ECA includes: Our new CANflex LED ECA to display current ethanol content Legacy 5V output for JB4 integration Universal CANbus harness for use with future flash tuning integration Download the free BMS CANflex apps here: If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here. title: JB4 for BMW GEN3 B48/B58
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 130WHP on a stock vehicle without the risks of flashing! The JB4 is the most advanced and highly featured tuning system available for your B48/B58 GEN3 powered vehicle. Power gains are up to 100whp to the wheels (125hp crank) on a completely stock car on 93 octane, and even higher with ethanol fuel mixed in!This new JB4 BMW tuner is specifically designed for the latest Gen 3 B48/B58 variant and is capable of processing the new ultra fast SENT digital sensor signals in real time with zero latency. The JB4 features a simple plug & play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other tune. Including on the fly in-app map switching between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, progressive water/methanol support, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, and much more. Other more expensive tuners may claim to equal the JB4's technology but upon closer examination lack most if not all of the JB4's features.Remember the JB4 does not require any additional modifications or previous stages. Simply install the JB4 as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new fast and smooth racing experience. The JB4 also does not require any user setup or customization, but for those who are interested in logging, adding new features as we post them, etc, we suggest the Bluetooth mobile phone adapter. title: Kia Stinger / Genesis G70 EK1
descriptionEn: Flash your Kia ECU/TCU at home with EK1 tools! We now stock two great flashing tools from EK1. The all new EK1V3 and the EK1 Mini2+. Both tools load the same maps with key differences being the EK1 Android app support and VIN locking of the flashing tool. Experience the future of automotive tuning with EK1V3, the latest innovation by TuningCloud. Built with cutting-edge CAN FD support, EK1V3 works seamlessly with the EK1 Android App to deliver a complete solution for professionals and enthusiasts. The key differences from the previous EK1 models are as follows:• No screen, requires Android app to connect (no iOS support yet)• Does not VIN lock, can be used to flash multiple vehicles. From ECU Flashing and Diagnostics to Data Logging and DTC management, EK1V3 provides all the tools you need in one powerful device. Take your tuning job to the next level with the most advanced and reliable platform in the tuning. EK1 Mini2+ The EK1 Mini2+ allows you to load flash maps to your Kia Stinger/G70 at home! No more mailing around the ECU every time you want change or update your flash tuning. Using the EK1 Mini2+ flashing tool you're able to load JB4 back end flash maps allowing for various tuning changes not possible JB4 only including more timing advance, higher ethanol mixtures, improvements to the transmission shifting, VANOS changes, and much more. The EK1 Mini2+ also allows you to load TCU (transmission) flash maps at home available for purchase from tuners worldwide. Note: BMS does not provide EK1 or flash related technical support. For any questions or assistance with loading flash maps please contact EK1 directly at www.ek1tuning.com Note: Inquire with EK1 directly for 2024+ model support Note: Flashing tools once used are generally not eligible for return under BMS' return policy. Details on the JB4 back end flash maps for Ek1 including a video showing how to read your ECU and TCU calibration IDs posted here: https://www.jb4tech.com/forum/model-specific-engine-tuning-modification-discussion/kia-hyundai-turbo/818290-jb4-back-end-flash-maps-for-3-3l-via-ek1lite-update

title: Subaru WRX Fuel Pump Upgrade for the 2022+
descriptionEn: Subaru 2022+ Subaru WRX fuel pump upgrades! Running E85 or making a lot more power than stock and your factory Subaru LPFP is struggling to keep up? Our Fuel-It! Stage 2 LPFP upgrade is a plug and play swap for your existing stock pump, is E85 compatible, and flows 30% more fuel than the stock pump. This is a complete plug and play pump swap that requires no modifications to your stock bucket assembly and we provide a new plug and play harness so you don't have to modify your stock harness. It doesn't get any better than this. title: JB4 Performance Tuner for 2022+ Nissan Rogue 1.5T
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 30whp and 40wtq to the wheels on a stock Nissan Rouge The JB4 performance tuner for the new 2022+ Nissan Rogue 1.5T is plug and play and attaches to two easy-to-access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory DME tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. The JB4 manipulates the ECU boost control signals allowing it to modify boost levels but does not manipulate the ECU manifold boost reference, allowing your ECU to properly map timing and fueling for the higher boost levels. The end result is something that runs as smoothly as stock only with higher boost targets under heavy throttle. JB4 features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 1000 times per second using dedicated 10 bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance.The JB4 adds OBDII CANbus for increased performance mapping, a variety of useful features such as data logging, boost by gear, optional fuel control wires for AFR adjustment, and on-the-fly map changes. JB4 is simply the most capable tuning system available for the Nissan Rouge.The higher the octane the higher you can safely raise the boost pressure over stock and the larger the power gain. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Grab our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more info on how to use the JB4PRO free app click here. JB4 Power Gains, Features, & Benefits • Power gains of up to 30whp and 40wtq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 times and 1/4 mile times• Preloaded with custom JB4 Nissan Rouge tuning software and up to 8 maps for various fuel and modification levels• Ethanol (E85) compatible tuning maps• Able to read/delete fault codes• View and record up to 40 different gauges/engine parameters in real-time with the JB4PRO app.• Boost by gear in 1st, 2nd, and 3rd can be controlled via the JB4PRO app for a perfect launch• Exhaust flap operation can be controlled in most JB4 applications• Compatible with the FREE JB4PRO app for smartphone logging, tuning changes, and adjustment• The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip• Quick Plug & Play Installation• CANbus OBDII integration offering unrivaled tuning features and performance• Improved performance over non-integrated chip tunes• Runs as smoothly as stock, this is how your vehicle should have come from the factory• Compatible with all driving modes• Fuel economy unchanged during normal driving• 91 octane fuel or better required for performance gains• Not VIN locked and can be removed without a trace and resold down the road• Includes the rugged JB4 billet aluminum enclosure for protection• Designed and assembled in the USA• 5 year warranty JB4 Vehicle Fitment • 2022+ Nissan Rogue 1.5T BETA What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. DYNO RESULTS JB4 dyno results with the new 2022+ Nissan Rogue 1.5T. Power gains of up to 30whp and 40wtq to the wheels on a stock vehicle. Pretty solid gains for a quick install/remove tuner without having to reflash the ECU!

descriptionEn: BMW F Chassis F30 Hybrid 3 Stage 2 upgrade! This is a complete Low Pressure Fuel Pump (LPFP) upgrade that replaces your stock LPFP assembly with an E85 certified one. This includes the following: A complete plug and play solution by simply replacing your stock bucket A new E85 compatible Walbro 450 pump (F90000274) that flows 50% more fuel than stock. An optional upgrade to the new Walbro 525 pump (F90000285) for an additional 10% flow over the Walbro 450 pump. As long as the car is running fine and does not exhibit any other symptoms, there is not an issue with the pump and this can be ignored. title: Infiniti Q50/Q60 650HP LPFP Fuel Pump Upgrade Kit
descriptionEn: If your power goal for your Q50 or Q60 exceeds your stock Low Pressure Fuel Pump’s (LPFP) capacity and you need to upgrade your fuel system, you've come to the right place! As these cars get older and less expensive we're seeing more issues with the stock components and more demand for cost conscious fueling solutions. The new Fuel-It! 650HP line of fuel system upgrades are designed with those needs in mind while maintaining a budget. They make the most of the stock components to maintain stock reliability and drive-ability but when the boost gets cranked up, the Fuel-It! 650HP components kick in to support the additional fueling needs of your high horsepower car.Vehicle Fitment 2016+ Infiniti Q50/Q60 3.0L Turbo Luxe, Sport, Silver Sport, Red Sport What is the Fuel-It! Infiniti Q50/Q60 LPFP Upgrade? No iDrive warnings, no EKP issues, and no sending your fuel pumps in for repair or upgrade. This new line of Low Pressure Fuel Pump (LPFP) upgrades utilizes the stock pump assembly to meet everyday driving needs but when the boost kicks in, the Fuel-It! 650HP secondary pump kicks on to support those high boost fueling needs. This system requires no modifications to your stock system, including the bucket, wiring, or stock plumbing so that it is reliable and easily reversible. There is no tearing down your bucket or sending it in to be upgraded. Install only requires adding the additional pump assembly to your fuel tank where it sits side by side with your stock pump assembly and then installing the additional wiring harness. The secondary pump then runs in parallel with the stock pump making use of the stock capacity while adding up to 200% more capacity to your existing system. Doing it this way eliminates any additional strain on your stock wiring and the EKP that runs your stock LPFP. VR30 LPFP Upgrade Options: These kits are only available as an add-on assembly and you will retain your stock pump. The secondary pump requires the additional wiring harness and will require that you add two 9/64" power terminals to your tophat. Upgrade to a Walbro 525 fuel pump? (Add $75.00) Our kit comes standard with the Walbro 450 pump but for those looking for even more flow, we offer the Walbro 525 upgrade. Select it if you want the most out of your new fuel pump. Included with all Q50/Q60 LPFP upgrades: • Walbro 450 pump (F90000274)• Optional Walbro 525 pump (F90000285)• Black Anodized Custom fitting• Pump brackets• 9/64" terminals and associated hardware• Fuel line• Replacement PITA clip• Wiring harness
selectedVariant: Do NOT upgrade to Walbro 525 pump / Do NOT add a Hobb's switch / Do NOT add a crimp tool

title: B58 BMW & Supra Phenolic Thermal Intake Manifold Spacer
descriptionEn: The Burger Motorsports B58 Phenolic Thermal Intake Manifold Spacer is constructed from fiber-imbedded phenolic material and helps to prevent heat transfer from the cylinder head to the intake manifold, thereby increasing engine efficiency and decreasing heat soak. This advanced technology will lower intake air temperature, allowing denser air to enter the cylinders, thus reducing detonation and promoting more efficient combustion. Strongly suggested for upgraded aluminum intake manifolds such as the BMS B58 aluminum intake manifold. ⚠️ Not compatible with Wagner Tuning intake manifolds. Features & Benefits • Increases engine efficiency• Reduces heat transfer from engine to intake manifold thus reducing heat soak• Helps reduce intake manifold temperature• Direct bolt-on• Includes heavy duty o-rings • 6mm thick Vehicle Fitment Note: If your BMW has a B58 engine and you don't see your exact model on the list below please email us. title: BMW F Chassis Rear Mount CANbus Flex Fuel & Low Fuel Pressure Sensor Kit for N20, N55, & S55
descriptionEn: Know your exact ethanol content in real-time with our new LED display or by using the BMS CANflex, Fuel-It! or JB4 mobile app on your smartphone or tablet. This new rear mount ethanol sensor kit conveniently installs above the fuel pump, under the rear seat, providing ethanol mixture and low fuel pressure readings via CANbus to your ECU. It's compatible with both flash only tunes and JB4 tuning systems. Includes our new CANflex ethanol content analyzer (ECA) using the standard 0xEC CANbus ethanol format. Low fuel pressure is transmitted in the 3rd byte. For those running a JB4, the new low fuel pressure signal provides an additional safety map trigger. If running port injection, low fuel pressure can also be incorporated into your port injection mapping ensuring consistent performance even in situations where low fuel pressure is dropping. For flash only cars your tuner will finally be able to monitor your low fuel pressure to determine if there is sufficient pressure for your tuning needs. Compatible with JB4, MHD, BM3, and all tuning systems that use the standardized 0xEC CANbus ethanol format. We can also customize the CANbus commands if needed, just email us the details. The kit features heavy-duty stainless braided fuel line, Burger Motorsports CNC machined fittings, and unlike other similar looking kits was designed to minimize restrictive bends and maximize fuel flow. Download the free BMS CANflex apps here: If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here. If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here. Vehicle Fitment BMW 1 Series • 2012-2014 N55 BMW F20 F21 M135 BMW 2 Series• 2016-2022 F87 N55 M2 and S55 M2 Competition• 2014+ N55 BMW F22 F23 M235i BMW 3 Series • 2012-2013 N55 BMW F30 F31 335i/ix/Active Hybrid/xDrive • 2015-2020 F80 S55 M3 BMW 4 Series• 2014-2015 F32 F33 F36 435i / 435ix including Gran Coupe• 2015-2020 F82 F83 S55 M4, M4 GTSBMW X Series• 2012-2014 N55 X1 *Free shipping in USA on complete kits only. PRODUCT PICTURES: INSTALL VIDEOS: PRODUCT VIDEOS: Note: If your EKP doesn't have the CANbus wires going to it, you will need to find the twisted pair of wires in the wire bundle next to the EKP as show below. The twisted pair of wires will be a red wire and a blue wire with a red stripe. Once you make your connections and power on the car, open the enclosure to verify the green light is blinking and communicating. If the light is solid green, that means you have power but do not have communications and have a bad connection or the wrong set of wires.

title: 2022+ Toyota Tundra & 2023+ Toyota Sequoia Wheel Spacers
descriptionEn: Wider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks Burger Motorsports wheel spacers for the 2022+ Toyota Tundra & 2023+ Toyota Sequoia are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your truck. Our wheel spacers push your wheels and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability and handling. Spacers are also great for gaining clearance for bigger tires, aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, or just making your truck look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your Toyota ensuring a perfect vibration free fit. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports wheel spacer is CNC machined from high-grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our wheel spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 12 pre-installed 10.9 grade studs and 12 lug nuts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole truck you will need 2 spacer kits. They are hub-centric and have the factory hub on them.Width: Available in 1" and 1.5" widths. Measure in the front and rear with a ruler and see what width is right for you. Either way your truck will look better! 🔧 Installation: Simply remove wheel, place spacer on the hub, add some blue thread-locker to the factory studs, bolt the spacer to the hub with the supplied wheel bolts, and bolt the wheel back up with the existing lug nuts. title: Universal BMS CANflex CANbus E85 Analyzer (ECA)
descriptionEn: Know your exact ethanol content in real-time with our new LED display or by using the BMS CANflex or JB4 mobile app on your smartphone or tablet. This universal E85 analyzer plugs directly into your Flex Fuel sensor (sensor kit sold separately) and outputs your ethanol reading on CANbus allowing your flash only DME and/or JB4 to read the ethanol signal. In addition it includes a harness plug for an optional low fuel pressure sensor (available from Fuel-It!) adding this critical tuning information to platforms like the B58 that don't include a factory low fuel pressure sensor. CANflex now includes a LED readout! Route the new display box inside the cabin or glove box for a quick glance of your ethanol mixture or leave it in the engine bay under a plastic cover as a backup plan. Note the LED display is not water-proof and care should be taken to ensure it doesn't get soaked! CANflex also includes a 5V output for legacy integration to JB4 or flash maps that don't yet accommodate CANbus ethanol input. Low fuel pressure monitoring is critical for any vehicle running higher power levels and especially those with port injection. Our optional 10 bar low fuel pressure sensor kit includes a sensor and 1/8" NPT angle tee for easy fitment. Can be used with both rear mount and front mount sensor kits. Universal CANbus connections are attached using removable posi-taps based on mounting location. See wiring guide below. Wiring Guide for universal harnessRed (originally Red/Green): 12v switched power via fuse tap or posi-tapBlack: GroundBrown (originally Orange): CAN- (For front mount usually the factory yellow CANbus wire)Green (originally Red/Blue): CAN+ (For front mount usually the factory red CANbus wire)Blue: 5V legacy output for input into JB4 Harness types: Universal harness, this is a universal harness for use with JB4, BM3, MHD, ECUtek, etc. Installs in front or rear of car using included removable posi-taps. PnP harness, this harness is a plug and play option with the following requirements. It is only compatible with the BMW GEN2 B58 and S58 X3M and X4M platforms with automatic transmissions. Flex fuel kit must be mounted in the engine bay near the ECU, rear mounted flex fuel kits must use the universal harness Note BM3 is not compatible with the PnP harness and requires our universal harness! LED:Current ethanol mixture will be shown with 01 indicating an error reading the sensor. The ending decimal will light up if the unit has CANbus access. Download the free BMS CANflex apps here: If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here. If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here. CANflex variants and how to use the new app!
selectedVariant: CANflex LED w/PnP harness for BMW GEN2 B58/S58 motors / Yes add LFP Sensor kit

title: JB4 Tuner for 2023+ Toyota Highlander, Crown, & Vellfire 2.4L
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 55hp on a stock vehicle without the risks of flashing! The JB4 is the most advanced and highly featured tuning system for your 2023+ Toyota Highlander, Crown, & Vellfire 2.4L. Power gains are up to 40hp to the wheels (55hp crank) on a completely stock vehicle on premium pump gas. Both versions include the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in!The JB4 features a simple plug and play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other tune. Including on-the-fly map switching between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, progressive water/methanol support, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, and much more. Other more expensive tuners may claim to equal the JB4's technology but, upon closer examination, lack most if not all of the JB4's features.Remember the JB4 does not require any additional modifications or previous stages. Simply install it as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new, fast, and smooth racing experience. The JB4 also does not require any user setup or customization, but for those who are interested in changing maps, logging, customization, and loading, adding new features as we post them, etc, we suggest the Bluetooth mobile phone adapter. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 40hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Toyota • 2023+ Toyota Highlander 2.4L 4-cyl. Turbo LE, XLE, & XSE• 2023+ Toyota Crown 2.4L 4-cyl. Turbo XLE, Limited, & Platinum• 2023+ Toyota Vellfire 2.4L 4-cyl. Turbo What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. 2023 Toyota Highlander Dyno Results

Installs easily into your factory air boxes and are a direct OE replacement. Features & Benefits Sold as a pair Mild Sound improvement Improves horsepower and torque Better fuel economy More airflow than the stock paper filter Easy installation/removal Fits in perfectly in the factory air box Can be cleaned over and over Emission legal in all 50 states Vehicle Fitment Toyota• 2023+ Toyota Sequoia 3.4L, Limited, Platinum, Capstone, and TRD Pro Filters are a direct replacement for OEM Toyota Part #17801-F4010 Performance air filter cleaning & oil kit available here. title: JB4 Tuner for 2023+ GMC Canyon 2.7L Turbo
sku: CT4V Harness with WHITE MAF  + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 85whp and 120wtq to the wheels on a stock truck without the risks of flashing! This plug and play tuner attaches to two easy to access sensors in your GMC Canyon engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag.Installation is very discrete and unlike flash remaps which are quick to install but can never be fully removed with a JB4 the vehicle is never aware it's making more than the factory boost or power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged and it's compatible with all driving modes including towing.Unlike other less advanced systems, the JB4 includes CANbus functionality allowing it to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU for real-time tuning. The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and much more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data no less incorporate it real-time into their tuning algorithms. CANbus allows the JB4 to provide huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery.The JB4 includes multiple maps including those for 91 octane, 93 octane, factory tuning, VALET mode, E85 mixtures, and unleaded race gas. In addition, it offers boost by gear settings to improve launches, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more. The JB4 is made in the USA and includes a 5-year warranty. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Grab our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection to wirelessly connect the JB4 BMW tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more info on how to use the JB4PRO free app click here. descriptionEn: Gain up to 50whp along with terrific sound! Finally, an intake system worthy of your 2020+ S58 BMW F97 X3M & F98 X4M! The BMS Elite X3M/X4M Performance Intake upgrades the restrictive factory airbox/engine cover with dual 3.5" high flow BMS inverted cone performance filters! The factory airbox is retained for cold air ducting and to keep the engine bay looking factory. With the dramatic airflow improvement your turbos are finally able to properly breath improving power levels and spool up speed. Power gains will depend on boost levels being run but when doing peak boost tuning we were able to gain around 50whp vs. the factory restrictive intake in our development testing. In addition to freeing up power, turbo spool speed was improved and there's an incredible sound improvement. You'll finally be able to hear your turbos spooling!Installation is easy and fully reversible. Our Burger Motorsports inverted cone filters not only outflow your stock paper filter and last the life of your vehicle they also include built-in velocity stacks. Velocity stacks allow even more air to be smoothly sucked into your intake system. We offer two high quality filter options. Our oiled cotton renewable performance filter can be cleaned using an S&B cleaning kit every 15-20k miles and should last the life of your BMW. We also offer a dry extendable, low maintenance filter option, which offers superior filtration for extreme conditions. Our dry filter can be cleaned by blowing out with compressed air from the inside out. title: JB4 for 2023+ Toyota Sequoia 3.4L Twin Turbo
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 75hp on a stock Sequoia without the risks of flashing! Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! The JB4 is the most advanced and highly featured tuning system available for your 2022+ Toyota Sequoia 3.4L. Power gains are up to 60hp to the wheels (75hp crank) on a completely stock car on pump gas, gains with bolt-on parts, higher octane, E85 mixtures, and larger turbos are even higher.The JB4 features a simple plug and play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other Sequoia tune. Including on the fly in dash map switching between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, and much more. Remember the JB4 Sequoia tune does not require any additional modifications or previous stages. Simply install the JB4 as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new fast and smooth racing experience. The JB4 also does not require any user setup or customization but for those who are interested in logging, adding new features as we post them, changing maps, etc, we suggest the BMS DATA cable or the bluetooth mobile phone adapter. Optional JB4 MAP Sensor Bypass Extensions available here.These plug and play connectors simplify the installation and removal of JB4 and other piggyback systems by allowing you to bypass the difficult to reach upper rear MAP sensor by attaching the connections to each other. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 60hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle (75hp crank)• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Toyota • 2023+ Toyota Sequoia 3.4L V6 Twin Turbo i-FORCE MAX Hybrid What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated, the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. 2023+ Toyota Sequoia JB4 Tune Install Guide 2022+ Toyota Tundra JB4 Tune Testing + Install Guide JB4 Video

title: BMS Oil Catch Can for 2022+ Toyota Tundra 3.4L Twin Turbo
descriptionEn: Keep oil out of your Gen 3 Toyota Tundra air intake system! These new turbocharged Toyota motors are amazing, however it's no secret that they suffer from oil control problems causing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The BMS compact Tundra double baffle oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor into the atmosphere. To solve these problems we designed our oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbo Toyota Tundra 3.4L application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding and built in barbed fittings for a precision leak free fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses are Gates® brand and are the exact factory PCV piping diameter maintaining the flow rate throughout the entire oil catch can system ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory's fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking into the atmosphere. The low mounting location is selected to allow more efficient operation and retain a stealth look. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. Made in the USA. Features and Benefits • Increases air intake efficiency • Promotes engine longevity • Non-clogging, No service air/oil separation double baffle• Free flow solid no restriction design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large intake/outlet. No tapering down.• Stealth mounting on the side of the Motor• Anodized black billet aluminum• Made in the USA & guaranteed for Life• Simply unscrew base every 2500 miles to empty• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs • Large inlet and outlet • Precision CNC Machined Vehicle Fitment Toyota• 2022-2026 Toyota Tundra 3.4L V6 Twin Turbo 1794 Edition, Capstone, Limited, Platinum, SR, SR5, TRD Pro What's Included (1) BMS billet aluminum compact double baffle oil catch can with 3/8" billet hose barbs(1) BMS custom black metal bracket(2) 90º 1/2" barbed fittings(2) Heavy-duty Gates® 21" length of 1/2" hose(1) Heavy-duty Gates® 2.5" length of 1/2" hose(4) stainless steel button head 10-32 x 3/8" bracket mounting screws(1) Hose clamp

title: BMW E-Chassis Stage 3 Bucketless LPFP Upgrades for the N54 & N55 Motors
descriptionEn: Fuel-It! Stage 3 Bucketless upgrade options for the E-chassis 135 and 335 N54 and N55 Platforms! For those already running our Stage 2 Bucketless LPFP upgrade and looking to upgrade it to a stage 3, this product listing is for you. If you don't have our Stage 2 bucketless kit, you can purchase that here. You must have our Stage 2 bucketless kit to upgrade to our Stage 3 bucketless kit. The Stage 3 upgrade kit includes: A complete plug and play solution by simply adding the secondary module to your existing Stage 2 bucketless kit found here Our custom billet aluminum fitting to run both pumps in parallel Wiring harness for the secondary pump Spare vent tube clip A new Walbro filter A new E85 compatible Walbro 450 pump (F90000274) Optional upgrade to Walbro 525 pump (F90000285) Recommended accessories: Lock Ring Removal Tool Hobb's switch Compatible with the following vehicles: 1' E88 (11/2006 — 10/2013) 1' E82 (11/2006 — 10/2013) 3' E90 (02/2004 — 09/2008) 3' E90 LCI (07/2007 — 12/2011) 3' E91 (02/2004 — 08/2008) 3' E91 LCI (07/2007 — 05/2012) 3' E92 (05/2005 — 02/2010) 3' E92 LCI (11/2008 — 06/2013) 3' E93 (09/2005 — 02/2010) 3' E93 LCI (11/2008 — 10/2013) X1 E84 (04/2009 — 06/2015) NOTE: These kits include a basic filter assembly. Running the vehicle under low fuel conditions can cause fuel starvation issues. If you do hard straight line accelerations when you have less than 1/8 tank of fuel, we would recommend running our standard Stage 2, 3, or Stage 4 pump. In addition, if you intend to use this for road course applications, you may see starvation issues when running less than a half tank and doing long high G right turns. Again for those applications, we'd recommend one of our standard pump applications as well.
