title: Fuel-It! Charge Pipe Injectors (CPI)
descriptionEn: Introducing our new Charge Pipe Injectors (CPI) to add additional injectors to your intake system. Available Options: -550cc Replacement Injector (CPI specific Injector Only) -950cc Replacement Injector (CPI specific Injector Only) -1500cc Replacement Injector (CPI specific Injector Only) -550cc Injector with Single Feed Adapter -950cc Injector with Single Feed Adapter -1500cc Injector with Single Feed Adapter -550cc Injector with Dual Feed Adapter -950cc Injector with Dual Feed Adapter -1500cc Injector with Dual Feed Adapter -Single Feed Adapter only -Dual Feed Adapter only -Installation tool only *Note: CPI adapters utilize special injectors that are not compatible with our port injection kits and standard injectors are NOT compatible with CPI adapters. Other available CPI accessories: -Fuel lines -Adapters -Wiring harnesses -Fittings CLICK HERE FOR ACCESSORIES CLICK HERE FOR STARTER KIT Q: What is CPI? A: Charge Pipe Injection (CPI) is our new proprietary system that allows you to add additional injectors to your boosted application with any standard 1/8" NPT female connection in your charge pipe or intake system. Q: Is it expandable? A: Yes, we have two types of injector bodies. The first has one input that can be run by itself or we have an injector body with two connections so you can daisy chain in additional injector fed from the same fuel source. Q: What is required to run one of these injectors? A: These kits are for boosted applications and you must have enough clearance to install the injector and fuel lines. We have provided measurements to assist you with this. Q: How is it controlled? A: You must use a port injection controller, You can run a stand alone controller or if running a JB4, you can use the BMS port injector controller or FSB. Q: Can I add an injector to my current port injection kit? A: Yes, you can connect the injector to the fuel rail if it has an available port such as the Fuel-It! port injection kits do. Q: Can I use this without a secondary injector controller? A: No, this is a PWM controlled injector that must be programmed. Q: What kind of fuel can I run? A: These kits are compatible with methanol, ethanol, E85, race gas, and pump gas. Q: Where do I connect to the fuel source? A: That will vary by application. If running E85, most will tee into their low-pressure fuel line and if compatible use one of our fuel line adapters. Q: Can these be used pre-intercooler? A: Yes but we recommend using the 550cc injector and in an application where air temperatures are above 300 degrees Fahrenheit we recommend running methanol or high concentrations of ethanol in your fuel. Q: Are there different sizes of injectors available? A: Yes, we currently offer 550cc and 950cc injectors. Q: Is everything included to run the injector in this listing? A: No, this listing is only for the injectors and optional ring tool. For additional accessories click here. If you need a starter kit, click here.

title: JB4 Performance Tuner for 2023+ Nissan Z 3.0T
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 100hp and 120tq to the wheels on a stock Nissan Z Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! The JB4 performance tuner for the new 2023+ Nissan Z is plug and play and attaches to two easy-to-access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory DME tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. The JB4 manipulates the ECU boost control signals allowing it to modify boost levels but does not manipulate the ECU manifold boost reference, allowing your ECU to properly map timing and fueling for the higher boost levels. The end result is something that runs as smoothly as stock only with higher boost targets under heavy throttle. JB4 features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 1000 times per second using dedicated 10 bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance.The JB4 adds OBDII CANbus for increased performance mapping, a variety of useful features such as data logging, boost by gear, optional fuel control wires for AFR adjustment, and on-the-fly map changes. JB4 is simply the most capable tuning system available for the Nissan Z.The higher the octane the higher you can safely raise the boost pressure over stock and the larger the power gain. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Power Gains, Features, & Benefits • Power gains of up to 100hp and 120tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. JB4 Vehicle Fitment • 2023+ Nissan Z 3.0L turbo including Nismo What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. DYNO RESULTS 2024 Nissan Z Herritage Edition

title: BMS F Chassis Gen 1 B58 BMW Transmission Oil Cooler
descriptionEn: Keep your transmission temps low for better performance and longevity Everyone knows that high heat is the enemy of your automatic transmission and that higher power levels generate more transmission fluid heat which will cause trans slip. Now you can extend the life of your automatic transmission by installing the new Burger Motorsports High Capacity B58 Gen1 Trans Cooler kit. This unique plug and play kit replaces your factory coolant to trans fluid heat exchanger with a high-capacity front-mounted air to trans fluid radiator. Includes all mounting hardware, lines, and coolant caps required for installation. Installs within the front bumper behind the driver side kidney grills providing ample airflow over the large cooling core via existing openings. The result is dramatically reduced transmission temperature and extended transmission life. This kit is strongly suggested for any BMW B58 Gen1 F chassis automatic car running larger than factory turbos.165ºF (74ºC) transmission oil cooler Improved Racing thermostat includedThe thermostat maintains the oil exiting the transmission at the rated minimum temperature in most conditions. Without a thermostat, the transmission fluid coolers are likely to over-cool the fluid, delaying transmission warm-up and performing the critical function of bypassing the cooler until the oil has reached its minimum operating temperature.Features & Benefits • Dissipates excess transmission fluid heat• Reduces transmission fluid temperature• Increases transmission life when racing• Increases transmission oil capacity Gen 1 B58 Vehicle Fitment Compatible with both RHD and LHD, RWD and AWD, ZF8HP50 and ZF8HP70 Transmissions. ⚠️ Not compatible with manual transmissions. BMW 1 Series• 2015+ F20 F21 B58 M140i BMW 2 Series• 2016-2021 F22 F23 B58 M240i/iX BMW 3 Series• 2016-2019 F30 F31 F34 B58 340i/340iXBMW 4 Series• 2016-2020 F32 F33 F36 B58 440i/440iX/Gran Coupe What's included (1) High capacity transmission oil cooler (2) Brackets (1) Billet adapter (2) Coolant plugs (1) Improved Racing 165F Thermostat + fittings (4)-10 AN crimped PTFE/SS/Nylon covered lines (6) M6x1.0x12mm bolts, washers and nuts(1) M6x1.0x20mm bolt

title: BMW F-Chassis F1X 5-series, F0X 6-series, F10 Hybrid Stage 2 LPFP Upgrade for the N55 Motor
descriptionEn: BMW F Chassis F1X 5-series, F0X 6-series, and F10 Hybrid Stage 2 Walbro LPFP upgrade for the N20 and N55 motors! This is a complete Low Pressure Fuel Pump (LPFP) upgrade that replaces your stock LPFP assembly with a new E85 certified one. This is a complete plug and play solution by simply replacing your stock bucket. The new pump assembly includes the following... New BMW LPFP bucket assembly A new E85 compatible Walbro 450 pump A new filter Compatible with the following vehicles: The following require the F1x style pump 5' F07 GT (09/2008 — 06/2013) 5' F07 GT LCI (08/2012 — 02/2017) 5' F10 (01/2009 — 06/2013) 5' F10 LCI (08/2012 — 10/2016) 6' F06 Gran Coupé (05/2011 — 02/2015) 6' F06 Gran Coupé LCI (06/2014 — 09/2017) 6' F12 (10/2009 — 02/2015) 6' F12 LCI (07/2014 — 09/2017) 6' F13 (12/2010 — 02/2015) 6' F13 LCI (02/2015 — 02/2017) NOTE: Owners with I-Drive may get a Fuel pump warning on the screen that says "Continued driving is possible. Have the system checked by your BMW center as soon as possible." As long as the car is running fine and does not exhibit any other symptoms, there is not an issue with the pump and this can be ignored. If you have any questions about this please feel free to contact us. Upgraded pumps pull more current, so if your EKP (LPFP control module) is weak, it may overheat causing it to shut down and need to be replaced.

descriptionEn: Know your exact ethanol content in real-time with our new LED display or by using the BMS CANflex, Fuel-It! or JB4 mobile app on your smartphone or tablet. This is a complete plug & play kit to install a flex fuel kit in your B58 equipped BMW X3 or X4 in about 30 minutes. (Check compatibility for your platform below) Our CANbus ECA is compatible with JB4 as well as flash only applications like MHD, BM3, and EcuTek that read the standard 0xEC flex fuel CANbus address format . We now offer 3 types of kits: Complete Kit with CANbus ECA and PnP Harness = Includes a plug and play harness compatible with stock ECU flashes, JB4, ECUteck, and MHD. *If you have a manual transmission or a BM3 tune, you must purchase the universal harness. Complete Kit with CANbus ECA and Universal Harness = Includes universal harness that works for all applications including manual cars and those running a BM3 flex fuel tune. Complete Kit with Fuel-It! Bluetooth ECA = Includes a bluetooth ECA for use with JB4 and the Fuel-It! app. *Does not include CANbus integration The complete kit with the BMS CANbus ECA includes the following: Genuine Continental® ethanol sensor BMS CANflex LED ECA for use with JB4, MHD, & BM3 Stainless steel braided fuel lines with black nylon sheathing to protect your other engine bay components Plug and play harness (optional) BMW/Supra Accessory Harness for S58/B58 motors Download the free BMS CANflex apps here: If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here. If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here. The complete kit with Fuel-It! Bluetooth ECA includes the following: Genuine Continental® ethanol sensor Stainless steel braided fuel lines with black nylon sheathing to protect your other engine bay components Our new custom fitting now makes adding port injection easier than ever. Simply remove the 1/8" NPT fitting and add one of our optional port injection lines. Fuel-It! Bluetooth analyzer (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this kit) Includes both Bluetooth App & 5v analog output for JB4 or flash tuning Bluetooth (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this feature) If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here! If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here! Replacement fuel lines are also available separately. Vehicle Fitment • 2018+ G01 BMW X3 B46 / B48 / B58• 2019+ G02 BMW X4 B46 / B48 / B58 *For the BMW G-series JB4 platform connect the white or blue wire to position #4 on the JB4 25 pin harness. Select WMI Ethanol Setup option 0 to enable pin location 2/3/4 flex fuel input. *We have also made it optional to purchase all the items ala-cart should you choose but for the kit to work, it must include the Fuel Lines, Ethanol Sensor, and Analyzer. *For CANflex adapter JB4 & MHD use engine bay CANbus connections in our guide. BM3 requires connection to CANbus wires on BCM module under passenger side dash. *Free shipping in USA on complete kits only. *If you aren't sure whether this kit fits your car, send us a picture of your engine bay with the engine cover removed to info@fuel-it.com *Ethanol Sensors don't actually read the ethanol content, the readings are based on the absence of gasoline, so if your fuel is contaminated your ethanol readings may be artificially elevated. title: BMS Oil Catch Can Kit for 2021+ Mazda 3 & 2019+ CX-30 SKYACTIV® 2.5L Turbo
sku: VW/S63tu Shorty Can, Mazda "J" bracket, 2x M6x12 allen bolts.
descriptionEn: Keep oil out of your Mazda 3 & CX-30 air intake system! It's no secret that the Mazda SKYACTIV® turbo motors suffer from oil control problems causing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves and manifold, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. There are plenty of articles online regarding the oil blow-by issues this engine has. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The BMS oil catch can for the 2021+ Mazda 3 & 2019+ CX-30 SKYACTIV® 2.5L Turbo. While other catch cans are on the market, they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system, while others have internal baffle systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor into the atmosphere. To solve these problems, BMS designed this oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbo Mazda 3/CX-30 turbo application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and the flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can, ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory's fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking into the atmosphere. The bracket is CNC machined billet aluminum. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Install takes around 20 minutes, includes all required hardware, and is 100% reversible. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. title: JB4 Tuner for Porsche 992 Turbo & Turbo S
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 120hp and 140tq to the wheels on a stock Porsche 992 The JB4 is an easy to install plug and play tuner that attaches to sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. Includes full SENT sensor technology required for properly tuning the latest Porsche platforms. Includes full CANbus allowing the JB4 to access and incorporate all engine data in its tuning strategies, incorporate unique safety features such as keeping boost pressure low until oil and water are up to temperature to provide proper engine and turbo lubrication and drop to a low boost map if the engine starts to overheat, run lean, excessively knock, or over boost. Includes fuel control for ethanol mixture mapping. Fully compatible with JB4 mobile for on the fly map changes, data logging, firmware updates, and much more. Installation is very discrete and it is quickly removed without a trace when needed. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes. Made in the USA. 5-year warranty.No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUs Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 BMW tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more info on how to use the JB4PRO free app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 120hp and 140tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 times and 1/4 mile times• Preloaded with custom Porsche 992 JB4 tuning software and up to 8 maps for various fuel and modification levels• Ethanol (E85) compatible tuning maps• Able to read/delete fault codes• View and record up to 40 gauges/engine parameters in real-time with the JB4PRO app.• Boost by gear in 1st, 2nd, and 3rd can be controlled via the JB4PRO app for a perfect launch• Compatible with the FREE JB4PRO app for smartphone logging, tuning changes, and adjustment• The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip• Quick Plug & Play Installation• CANbus OBDII integration offering unrivaled tuning features and performance• Improved performance over non-integrated chip tunes• Runs as smoothly as stock. This is how your vehicle should have come from the factory• Compatible with all driving modes• Fuel economy unchanged during normal driving• 91 octane fuel or better is required for performance gains• Not VIN locked and can be removed without a trace and resold down the road• Includes the rugged JB4 billet aluminum enclosure for protection• Designed and assembled in the USA• 5 year warranty Vehicle Fitment Porsche• 2020-2024 Porsche 992 Turbo & Turbo S(2025+ models are in development) What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. 2023 Porsche 911 Turbo S dyno results Stock vs JB4 Maps 1, 2, and 3 with 93 octane Porsche 992 Turbo S - 10.2 is Stock - 9.8 is JB4 Map 2

In addition to the extra power and throttle response, the turbo spool and sound are dramatically improved, finally allowing you to hear your turbo spool up under heavy acceleration. No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUs Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. Range Rover JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 100hp and 140tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Range Rover• 2022+ Range Rover 4.4L V8 Twin Turbo SE, SV, Autobiography, First Edition What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. DYNO RESULTS

title: HKS M45IL/M45XL High Performance Spark Plugs for Kia/Hyundai
descriptionEn: HKS M-Series Super Fire Racing spark plugs are high performance Iridium plugs designed to handle advanced levels of tuning and provide Improved ignition performance, durability, and anti-carbon build-up. M45IL are for the 3.3t platforms (Stinger, G70) while M45XL are for the 2.0t, 2.5t, and 1.6t platforms. These plugs come pre-gapped to 0.028" from HKS which is suitable for use but we suggest closing the gap down to 0.022" for maximum performance applications.We are frequently asked which plugs are better for the Kia/Hyandai platform, HKS, or Denso. We've used both brands on our development cars and have found both to be good quality. Generally speaking HKS plugs tend to offer a longer life of 20-35k miles before they need to be replaced, while Denso plugs tend to only last 15-25k miles before needing replacement. For that longer life you do pay a price premium. We've found timing corrections and overall engine performance between them to be otherwise equivalent. Gapping tool sold hereHKS 45XL uses 12mm gapping tool. HKS 45iL uses 14mm gapping tool. HKS® M-Series Super Fire Spark Plugs Feature 0.6mm Iridium Alloy Center ElectrodeIridium Alloy Center Electrode reduces voltage requirement as well as improves ignition performance and durability.Outer Electrode with Platinum ChipThe Outer Electrode incorporates a square platinum chip which improves durability, and when combined with the iridium center electrode boosts ignition performance.Short Type Outer Electrode (Anti-Vibration)The outer electrode has been shortened and engineered with the ideal shape to decrease weight for resistance against vibration. This anti-vibration design improves the longevity of the outer electrode.Thermal EdgeAfter long idling or various combustion conditions, carbon buildup can occur causing misfires. The Thermal Edge of the ceramic insulator will discharge to help decrease carbon deposits.Spark Support GapDischarges will occur in the Spark Support Gap (space between the tip of the insulator and the base of the outer electrode) to help prevent carbon buildup.

title: JB4 Tuner for Subaru WRX, Ascent, Legacy, & Outback
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 50hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle The JB4 is the most advanced and highly featured tuning system for your Subaru 2.4L 4 cylinder turbo. Power gains are up to 50hp to the wheels (70hp crank) on a completely stock car on pump gas, and gains with ethanol mixtures and bolt-on parts are even higher. Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in!The JB4 features a simple plug & play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other tune. Including on the fly map switching from your phone/tablet instead between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, progressive water/methanol support, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, and much more. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. Subaru JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 50hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty.Vehicle Fitment • 2022+ Subaru WRX 2.4L 4 cyl. Turbo• 2019+ Subaru Ascent 2.4L 4 cyl. Turbo• 2020+ Subaru Legacy XT 2.4L 4 cyl. Turbo• 2020+ Subaru Outback XT 2.4L 4 cyl. Turbo What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and the DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. WRX DYNO RESULTS

The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and much more. descriptionEn: More Air = More Power + Dramatic Sound Improvement! Introducing the Burger Motorsports Competition Cold Air Intake for the Gen 2 B58 powered 2019-2024 BMW M340i, 2022-2024 M440i, and 2022+ M240i, including xDrive models. Designed from the ground up to be the best in every aspect with over a year invested in street and track testing. This intake follows a clean OEM+ look and materials while delivering the intoxicating sound and performance of an open intake. It features our proprietary renewable inverted cone performance filter, unsurpassed OEM fitment, and a clear window on top for quick filter inspection. The intake uses the OEM cold air inlet and a large opening on the cold side of the airbox for more airflow and enhanced sound. The factory heat shield is reused to keep intake temperatures low, and the factory resonator is replaced with a smooth pipe to deliver less turbulent air to the turbo. This intake maximizes airflow while retaining everything good about the factory design. Our Burger Motorsports renewable inverted cone filters not only outflow your stock paper filter and last the life of your vehicle, they also include a built-in velocity stack to smoothly channel more air into the intake system for maximum performance. Designed to work with OEM or BMS Billet Strut Braces and the BMS B58 Oil Catch Can. Features & Benefits Adds up to 18+ horsepower 50% more air than stock Dramatic sound improvement Improves throttle response Retains OEM heat shield for low IATs Retains OEM cold air ducting Looks great under the hood Highest flowing inverted cone air filter Gen 2 & 3 B58 Vehicle Fitment BMW 2 Series• 2022+ G42 Gen 2 B58 BMW M240i and M240i xDrive BMW 3 Series• 2020-2024 G20 G21 Gen 2 B58 BMW M340i and M340i xDrive• 2025+ G20 G21 Gen 3 B58 BMW M340i and M340i xDrive BMW 4 Series• 2021-2024 G22 G23 G26 Gen 2 B58 BMW M440i and M440i xDrive including Gran Coupe• 2025+ G22 G23 G26 Gen 3 B58 BMW M440i and M440i xDrive including Gran Coupe What's Included (1) Airbox lid with clear window (5) Stainless steel M6 x 1mm, 10mm long hex drive airbox lid screws (4) Stainless steel M6 x 1mm, 10mm long hex drive heat shield screws (2) Stainless steel M4 x 0.7mm, 8mm long MAF sensor screws (1) High flow airbox bottom (1) 1123 inverted cone BMS renewable performance filter (red or blue) (1) High flow intake tube (1) 4" silicone coupler (Gen 2) or 3.5" silicone coupler (Gen 3) (2) 4" heavy-duty 90-110 hose clamps (1) 11.75" piece of rubber weather stripping 1123 intake Blue Oil filters available here.1123 intake Red Oil filters available here.1123 intake DRY filters available here.Performance air filter cleaning & oil kit available here. Burger Motorsports B58 BMW Competition Intake Install Video Cold air is drawn in from the factory inlet and a large opening on the cold side of the engine compartment.
selectedVariant: Blue Oiled Renewable Performance Filter / Gen 2 B58 Engine

title: JB4 Tuner for 2021+ Ford Bronco Sport
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 60hp and 80tq to the wheels on a stock truck without the risks of flashing! This plug and play tuner attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag.Installation is very discrete and unlike flash remaps which are quick to install but can never be fully removed with a JB4 the vehicle is never aware it's making more than the factory boost or power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged and it's compatible with all driving modes including towing. The JB4 is able to auto-detect engine size and adjust tuning accordingly making it compatible with both 2.0t and 1.5t models.Unlike other less advanced systems, the JB4 includes CANbus functionality allowing it to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU for real-time tuning. The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and much more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data no less incorporate it real-time into their tuning algorithms. CANbus allows the JB4 to provide huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery.The JB4 includes multiple maps including those for 91 octane, 93 octane, factory tuning, E85 mixtures, and unleaded race gas. In addition, it offers boost by gear settings to improve launches, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more. The JB4 is made in the USA and includes a 5-year warranty.JB4 Map Guide:Map0: Fully disable JB4Map1: +3.5psi peak over stock, default map, 91+ octaneMap2: +3.5psi peak, less top end taper, more aggressive version of map1.Map3: +4psi peak, suggested for 93+ octane and/or modified trucksMap4: +6psi peak, suggested for 30% E85 mixturesMap5: +7psi peak, suggested for 30% E85 mixtures and/or unleaded race fuelMap6: Custom tuning map user adjustable Map7: WMI (water/meth injection) progressive tuning Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Grab our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection to wirelessly connect the JB4 BMW tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more info on how to use the JB4PRO free app click here. JB4 Power Gains, Features, & Benefits • Power gains of up to 60hp and 80wtq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty.Vehicle Fitment • 2021+ Ford Bronco Sport 1.5L / 2.0L Turbo What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and the DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. Bronco Sport 2.0t Dyno

title: Mazda 3 Bluetooth Flex Fuel Kit for the 2021+ 2.5L Turbo
descriptionEn: Know your exact ethanol content in real-time via the Fuel-It! or JB4 app on your smartphone or tablet. If you're running E85 or ethanol mixes in your Mazda 3, you need this kit! This is a complete plug and play kit to install a Bluetooth ethanol sensor in your 2021+ Mazda 3 2.5L Turbo (Check compatibility for your platform below). The kit includes the following: Genuine Continental® ethanol sensor Two stainless steel braided fuel lines with black nylon sheathing to protect your other engine bay components Proprietary custom billet fittings for plug and play OEM integration Fuel-It! Bluetooth analyzer (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this kit) Plug and play harness Includes both Bluetooth App & 5v analog output for JB4 or flash tuning Bluetooth (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this feature) If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here Replacement fuel lines are also available ala cart. Vehicle Fitment 2021+ Mazda 3 SKYACTIV® 2.5L Turbo *For the Mazda JB4 platform connect the white wire to position #4 on the JB4 25 pin harness. Select WMI Ethanol Setup option 0 to enable pin location 2/3/4 flex fuel input. *We have also made it optional to purchase all the items ala-cart should you choose but for the kit to work it must include the Fuel Lines, Ethanol Sensor, and Analyzer. *If you aren't sure whether this kit fits your car, send us a picture of your engine bay with the engine cover removed to info@fuel-it.com *Free shipping in USA on complete kits only. title: BMS Differential Stabilizer Brace for 2016+ Infiniti Q50/Q60 3.0L
descriptionEn: Bolt on improved traction The Problem Hard launches, aggressive shifts, and high torque loads all expose a weakness in the factory rear differential mounting. Excessive differential movement leads to wheel hop, inconsistent launches, added stress on differential bearings, and a vague or unstable feeling from the rear of the car. Over time, that movement does more than hurt performance. It accelerates wear and compromises drivetrain reliability. Especially at higher power levels. The Solution - The BMS Differential Brace This bolt-in differential stabilizer brace improves traction by reducing the movement and slop in your rear differential bushings. Our unique one-piece, no welding design allows for a quick installation with no drilling required. Does not increase vibration noise. All hardware included. Fits RWD and AWD vehicles. No logos or markings are visible for a stealth appearance. The BMS diff brace is made in the USA. Features & Benefits Tightens chassis Reduces wheel hop Dual Mounting Points Reduces differential bearing Load Stainless steel mounting hardware included Precision made one-piece design for a perfect fit Heavy-gauge steel construction for maximum strength and durability Easy install Made in USA 🇺🇸 Vehicle Fitment Infiniti• 2016+ Infiniti Q50 VR30 3.0L twin-turbo V6 Turbo Luxe, Sport, Silver Sport, Sensory, Red Sport 400• 2016-2022 Infiniti Q60 VR30 3.0L twin-turbo V6 Turbo Luxe, Sport, Silver Sport, Sensory, Red Sport 400

The Burger Motorsports intake replaces the entire factory intake system with a higher-flowing design engineered specifically for performance. The core of the system is our BMS renewable inverted cone air filter capable of supporting 500+ wheel horsepower. The restrictive factory turbo inlet tube is replaced with a high-flow aluminum pipe, and a CNC-machined billet MAF housing ensures precise airflow calculations. An integrated heat shield and mounting bracket secure everything in place for OEM-level fitment and durability. Finished in powder-coated black, this intake is built to last the life of your vehicle. The BMS intake is offered in two stages: Stage 1 – Top Mount: Installs in the factory airbox location for the simplest installation and maximum induction sound. Stage 2 – Fender Mount: Extends the filter into the fender area for true cold air intake performance and lower intake temperatures. No bumper removal is required for installation. Power gains are up to 15whp peak on factory tuning, with over 30whp gained under the curve in upper RPM ranges. In addition to improved power, turbo response and intake sound are dramatically enhanced. This is how your Mazda should have come from the factory. We recommend cleaning the filter every 15–20k miles using an S&B cleaning kit. title: JB4 for 2022+ Toyota Land Cruiser 3.4L Twin Turbo
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 75hp on a stock vehicle without the risks of flashing! The JB4 is the most advanced and highly featured tuning system available for your 2022+ Toyota Land Cruiser. Power gains are up to 60hp to the wheels (75hp crank) on a completely stock car on pump gas, gains with bolt-on parts, higher octane, E85 mixtures, and larger turbos are even higher.The JB4 features a simple plug and play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other tune. Including on the fly in dash map switching between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, and much more. Remember the JB4 does not require any additional modifications or previous stages. Simply install the JB4 as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new fast and smooth racing experience. The JB4 also does not require any user setup or customization but for those who are interested in logging, adding new features as we post them, changing maps, etc, we suggest the wireless JB4PRO bluetooth adapter. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 75hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Toyota • 2022+ Toyota Land Cruiser 3.4L Twin Turbo• 2022+ Toyota Land Cruiser LC300 GR 3.4L Twin Turbo What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and it's DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. title: BMW E-Chassis 650HP Fuel Pump Upgrade Kits for the N54 & N55 Motors
descriptionEn: Fuel-It! 650HP fuel pump upgrades! If your power goal is 650whp or less and you need to upgrade your LPFP, you've come to the right place! As these cars get older and less expensive we're seeing more issues with the stock components and more demand for cost-conscious fueling solutions. Our new Fuel-It! 650HP line of fuel system upgrades is designed with those needs in mind while maintaining a budget. They make the most of the stock components to maintain stock reliability and drive-ability but when the boost gets cranked up, the Fuel-It! 650HP LPFP upgrade kicks in to support the additional fueling needs of your high horsepower car. With the Fuel-It! 650HP line up you can upgrade your components all at one time or upgrade them as time and budget allow. If upgrading one component at a time, we'd recommend starting with the LPFP first as that is the heart of your fuel system, without a good LPFP you can't supply the fuel needed to any of your other components. What is the Fuel-It! 650HP LPFP Upgrade No more iDrive warnings, no more overheated EKP's, and no sending your fuel pumps in for repair or upgrade. This new line of Low-Pressure Fuel Pump (LPFP) upgrades utilizes the stock pump assembly to meet everyday driving needs but when the boost kicks in, the Fuel-It! 650HP secondary pump kicks on to support those high boost fueling needs. This system requires no modifications to your stock system, including the bucket, wiring, or stock plumbing so that it is reliable and easily reversible. There is no tearing down your bucket or sending it in to be upgraded. Install only requires adding the additional pump assembly to your fuel tank where it sits side by side with your stock pump assembly and then installing the additional wiring harness. The secondary pump then runs in parallel with the stock pump making use of the stock capacity while adding up to 200% more capacity to your existing system. Doing it this way eliminates any additional strain on your stock wiring and the EKP that runs your stock LPFP. How do I order? Choose your LPFP Upgrade: We have a few options for you to choose from to meet your needs. If you need assistance, email us at info@fuel-it.com. These kits are available with or without a new stock LPFP. If you feel your stock LPFP is worn out and want to make the most of your new fuel system, we'd suggest replacing your stock LPFP as well. Installing the LPFP upgrade will require that you add two 9/64" power terminals that are included to your tophat. If you are unsure about this or want it done for you, choose an option that includes the new tophat or a complete new stock LPFP assembly. The secondary pump requires an additional wiring harness. If you already have a harness from a previous system or wish to make your own harness, you can choose a system that does not include the wiring harness but you MUST have a secondary wiring harness of some kind installed. Currently, have our Stage 2 upgrade and want to upgrade to Stage 3? This kit can also be added to your current Fuel-It! Stage 2 kit! Add a Hobb's Switch? Your secondary pump can NOT run full time, it must only be run under high boost only. Running it full time will place additional strain on the stock system, will lead to high fuel temps, and pump or component failure. To turn the secondary pump on under high boost we recommend running a Hobb's switch or if you are running one of the newer BMS port injection controllers, you can use the thick yellow or orange wire to do this for you. Do I need a 4psi or 15psi Hobb's switch? You can run either one. We typically recommend the 15psi but if you're making good power/torque at low boost and exceeding the capacity of your stock pump, you'll want to choose the 4psi. Included with all LPFP upgrades • Walbro 450 pump (F90000274)• Optional Walbro 525 pump (F90000285)• Black Anodized Custom fitting• Pump brackets• 9/64" terminals and associated hardware• Fuel line• Replacement PITA clip• Wiring harness (optional)• New tophat (optional)• New stock pump assembly (optional) Recommend Accessories: E-Chassis Lockring Removal ToolCompatible with the following vehicle build dates: 1' E88 (11/2006 — 10/2013)1' E82 (11/2006 — 10/2013) 3' E90 (02/2004 — 09/2008)3' E90 LCI (07/2007 — 12/2011)3' E91 (02/2004 — 08/2008)3' E91 LCI (07/2007 — 05/2012)3' E92 (05/2005 — 02/2010)3' E92 LCI (11/2008 — 06/2013)3' E93 (09/2005 — 02/2010)3' E93 LCI (11/2008 — 10/2013) X1 E84 (04/2009 — 06/2015)

title: JB4 Tuner for 2022+ Ford Maverick & Mondeo 2.0L EcoBoost
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 50whp and 70wtq on a factory vehicle without the risks of flashing! Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! The JB4 is a plug and play tuner that attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. Installation is very discrete, and unlike flash remaps, which are quick to install but can never be fully removed with a JB4, the vehicle is never aware it's making more than the factory boost or power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged and compatible with all driving modes, including towing. Unlike other less advanced systems, the JB4 includes CANbus functionality allowing it to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU for real-time tuning. The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data, no less incorporate it in real-time into their tuning algorithms. The JB4 provides huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery. The JB4 includes multiple maps for 91 octane, 93 octane, factory tuning, VALET mode, E85 mixtures, and unleaded race gas. In addition, it offers boost by gear settings to improve launches, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more. The JB4 is made in the USA and includes a 5 year warranty. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. During our dyno testing, the BMS Elite B58 BMW Intake performed the same or better than other B58 BMW intakes tested posting gains of up to 10+ horsepower to the wheels at 25psi+ boost levels. In addition to freeing up some power turbo spool speed was improved, and there is an incredible sound improvement. You'll finally be able to hear your turbo spooling! Installation is easy and fully reversible. Our proprietary high flow filter can be cleaned every 15-20k miles using an S&B cleaning kit and will last the life of the car. Our intake temperature testing found no significant difference from the factory intake during both sustained cruise and full-throttle operation. title: BMW S55 (CPI) Charge Pipe Injection Kit
descriptionEn: Fuel-It! S55 BMW (CPI) Charge Pipe Injection Kit Advancements of S55 flash tuning and JB4 back-end flash maps have removed the software fuel limits but created a new limiting factor, high fuel pressure pump volume. With higher boost targets and E85 fuel mixtures, the high-pressure pump is not able to keep up with demand resulting in fuel pressure drops that trigger engine misfires, stuttering, and limit your overall performance. The Fuel-IT S55 CPI kit addresses this limitation by adding extra fuel injectors in the charge pipe to supplement fuel volume and take stress off the high fuel pressure system. Connected to the low fuel pressure system using high-quality plug and play AN lines and included fittings it allows fuel to be injected into the engine directly raising the overall fueling limit. Includes CNC machined couplers that screw into charge pipes with a 1/8" NPT bung. For those equipped with a JB4, the FSB controller is used giving the JB4 full dynamic mapping control and safety. S55 CPI ApplicationsBMW M2 • 2018 2019 2020 M2 Competition (S55 Engine)BMW M3 • 2015 2016 2017 2018 2019 F80 M3BMW M4• 2015 2016 2017 2018 2019 F82 F83 M4, M4 GTS, M4 CS

title: BMS Billet Oil Filter Cap for B58 BMW & Toyota Engines
descriptionEn: Upgrade your weak stock plastic B58 oil filter housing cap SALE!! SAVE $20.00 Clearing out V1 B58 caps to make room for the V2 magnetic caps! While Supplies Last. The Burger Motorsports billet aluminum B58 oil filter cover directly replaces your weak OE plastic cap for greater protection, ease of removal/install, and great looks under the hood. You can use a 3/8" inch drive ratchet or torque wrench to install and remove. The built-in 32mm hex head does not require a special removal/install tool like the factory cap. Uses the OE oil filter, filter housing o-ring, and filter insert. Anodized for protection. This quality part is a must for any serious BMW owner. Optional Magnetic Version: Equipped with an integrated Samarium Cobalt magnet to capture dangerous metal shavings and particles that would otherwise circulate through your engine oil and bearings. Unlike other oil filter caps that press fit smaller magnets leaving them vulnerable to damage and displacement during engine heat cycles, our magnets are secured in their precisely machined pockets to safely withstand extreme temperatures and pressure.🔧 Install: After removing the OEM oil filter cap, remove the filter and be sure to remove the plastic oil filter bypass valve and transfer it to the new BMS billet oil filter cap (see below install video). Be sure to replace the exterior o-ring gasket also when installing. Vehicle Fitment (most gen1 and Gen2 B58 Motors) BMW 1 Series• 2015+ F20/F21 B58 M140i 3.0L BMW 2 Series• 2022+ G42 B58 M240i xDrive• 2016-2021 F22 F23 B58 M240i/iX 3.0L BMW 3 Series• 2020+ G20 B58 M340i/M340iX 3.0L• 2016-2019 F30 B58 340i/340iX 3.0L BMW 4 Series• 2021+ G22 G23 G26 B58 M440i/M440iX/Gran Coupe• 2016-2020 F32 F33 F36 B58 440i/440iX 3.0L BMW 5 Series• 2017+ G30 B58 540i/540iX 3.0L BMW 6 Series• 2017+ G32 B58 640i/640iX 3.0L BMW 7 Series2016+ G11/G12 B58 740i/740iX 3.0L BMW 8 Series2020+ G15/G14/G16 B58 840i/840iX/Gran Coupe 3.0L BMW X Series• 2019+ G05 B58 X5 40i/40iX 3.0L• 2019+ G06 B58 X6 40i 3.0L• 2019+ G07 B58 X7 40i 3.0L BMW Z4• 2019+ BMW G29 B58 Z4 M40i Toyota• 2020+ GR Supra Mk5 3.0L 6 cyl. Features and Benefits • Solid aluminum design is much stronger than brittle plastic• Integrated heat sinks for better oil cooling• Special tools are not required for removal/install like the factory cap• Strong design won't fail under pressure• Reuses OE filter insert and o-ring• Anodized for protection• Looks great under the hood• Available in black, red, silver, and blue• Made in the USA What is billet? In this case, A billet is a solid block of aluminum (lightweight metal) with a size larger than the part. Excess material from the billet is removed by precision CNC machining, essentially carving the part out of solid aluminum. CNC machined parts are consistently stronger, better looking, and last longer than cheaper cast and plastic versions. Please note some engine degreasers and harsh cleaners may fade or damage the anodized finish. B58 Oil Filter Cap Install The BMS Billet Oil Filter Cap for B58 BMW & Toyota Engines replaces your weak stock plastic oil filter housing cap. Made in the USA

title: Group 16: JB4 Tuner for Audi EA888 Gen4 2.0 TFSI 261hp & 265hp
descriptionEn: JB4 Group 16: JB4 Tuner for Audi EA888 Gen4 2.0 TFSI 261hp & 265hp The JB4 is a true user adjustable plug and play performance tuner for all EA888 Gen4 based models in the Audi Group range with electric assist. Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in!The JB4 features CANbus connectivity for more advanced tuning, direct AFR control, advanced safety systems for boost, air/fuel ratio, fuel trims, and engine knock, boost mapping by gear for improved traction, integrated water/meth control, and much more.The unit can be used with our JB4 Bluetooth Connect kit providing for full in-car engine parameter display, map switching, and adjustment. The JB4 is a true user adjustable plug and play performance tuner for all 261hp 4 cylinders from the VAG group. Power Gains: Starting at 50bhp and 70ft-lb with 91 octane/95Ron with + 4.0psi boost over stock on the default setting with no further mapping. Up to 75bhp and 90ft-lb with bolt-on modifications, higher octane, and boost adjustment with the optional wireless JB4PRO Bluetooth adapter. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment • 2021+ Audi B9.5 A4/5 40TFSI• 2021+ Audi B9.5 Q5 40TFSI• 2021+ Audi B9.5 A4/5 45TFSI• 2021+ Audi B9.5 Q5 45TFSI• 2021+ Audi C8 A6 261hp• 2021+ Audi C8 A7 261hpPorsche• 2021+ Porsche Macan base What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and the DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. DYNO Results DYNO VIDEO Audi JB4 Mobile demo video

This is a complete plug and play kit to install a Bluetooth ethanol sensor in your Mustang in about 15 minutes. (Check compatibility for your platform below) The kit includes the following: New 3/8" E85 compatible fuel lines for your engine bay Genuine Continental ethanol sensor Fuel-It! Bluetooth analyzer Oetiker crimp clamp to secure your new fuel lines Includes both Bluetooth App & 5v analog output for JB4 or flash tuning Bluetooth (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this feature) If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here The following options are available: Basic kit with nylon fittings includes everything you need for a plug and play installation but uses nylon fittings to make your connections (only available on 2015 to 2017). Premium kit with billet fittings also includes everything you need for a plug and play installation but uses the our custom billet fittings and a billet elbow to make the connections. title: BMW 135i, 235i, 335i, 435i, & 535i Bluetooth Flex Fuel Kits for F Chassis N55
descriptionEn: If you're running E85 or ethanol mixes in your BMW, you need this kit! Know your exact ethanol content in real-time via the Fuel-it! or JB4 app on your smartphone or tablet. This is a complete plug and play kit to install a Bluetooth ethanol sensor in your F-Series BMW. (Check compatibility for your platform below) This kit replaces the stock fuel lines from the fuel tank to the engine bay with an upgrade -6an E85 compatible fuel line and adds an ethanol sensor and Bluetooth analyzer to monitor your ethanol content. Includes both Bluetooth App & 5v analog output for JB4 or flash tuning Bluetooth (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this feature) If you are using an Apple® product the app can be found by clicking here If you are using an Android® product the app can be found by clicking here For your fuel line upgrade, choose the option that supports your current configuration. HPFP to the fuel tank: (Stock) This upgrade replaces both stock fuel lines with one upgraded continuous fuel line from the fuel tank to the HPFP and adds the ethanol sensor. Port Injection to the fuel tank: If you are running our port injection kit, this upgrade replaces the stock fuel lines from the tank to the engine bay, integrates the ethanol sensor and then utilizes a Y adapter to supply the HPFP and PI with fuel. Our custom fittings remove those tee's and extra fittings for a cleaner high flow setup. Phoenix Racing Manifold to the fuel tank: If you are running the Phoenix Racing Manifold port injection kit, this upgrade replaces the stock fuel lines from the tank to the engine bay, integrates the ethanol sensor and then utilizes a Y adapter to supply the HPFP and PI with fuel. Our custom fittings remove those tee's and extra fittings for a cleaner high flow setup. Non-Fuel-It! port injection to fuel tank: Choose this option if you are running a port injection kit that we did not manufacture. This kit includes a longer 18" feedline from the Y to the port injection rail. You then cut the feed line to the length you need and install the included -6an female fitting or -6an female elbow to make the connection to your port injection rail. All of our kits utilize our custom billet aluminum fittings to integrate with the stock fittings so no modifications are needed. *For the BMW F-series PWG JB4 platform connect the white wire to position #16 on the JB4 25 pin harness. Select WMI Ethanol Setup option 1 to enable pin location 15/16 flex fuel input. *For the BMW F-series EWG JB4 platform connect the white wire to position #14 on the JB4 25 pin harness. Select WMI page option 15/16 input to enable. *These kits are available for off-road use only
selectedVariant: M135i/M235i / Non-fuel-it port injection to fuel tank

title: Group 15: JB4 for Audi EA825 4.0TT C8 RS6/7, RS Q8, SQ7/8, & Urus
descriptionEn: Power gains from 70hp and 100tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle without the risks of flashing! Power gains of up to 120whp and 160wtq bring the car to life allowing 1/4 mile potential deep into the 10s. Unlike other generic tuning devices, the JB4 includes full CANbus integration via the OBDII port for advanced tuning, safety features, and diagnostics, as well as electronic wastegate control for superior boost targeting. This is simply the best tuning box available for your Audi. Installation is fully reversible, attaching to the TMAP sensors and OBDII port. Firmware updates loaded via JB4 Mobile or a BMS Data Cable will be provided for free as we expand the JB4's performance, maps, and features with future development. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 120hp and 130tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Audi• 2024+ Audi C8 RS6 Performance• 2024+ Audi C8 RS7 Performance• 2020+ Audi C8 RS6• 2019+ Audi C8 RS7• 2020+ Audi SQ7• 2020+ Audi SQ8• 2019+ Audi RS Q8• 2019+ Audi S8Lamborghini• 2018+ Lamborghini Urus What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and the DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. RS6/7 SQ7/SQ8/RS Q8/S8 JB4 Dyno Video and results Audi JB4 Mobile demo video

descriptionEn: Replace your weak leaky plastic N54 vacuum tanks with upgraded metal cans! N54 powered BMW vehicles have two of these tanks, one for each turbo. They accumulate and hold vacuum/air to be used on both turbos. The factory plastic N54 boost vacuum tanks tend to leak and cause problems. If vacuum can't be stored the wastegates will not function, leading to common low boost or overboost faults.New for version 2 we've changed to a cleaner CNC-machined design! We have the solution, the all-new heavy-duty BMS tanks. Specifically made for stock to high-boost N54 engines. Each tank is made from 100% CNC machined aluminum and are anodized black to complement your engine compartment. Featuring metal barbed vacuum fittings and integrated brackets for solid mounting in the factory location. Not only do these look awesome under the hood, but they will also last forever. Tanks are available in pairs by themselves or available with an optional 15ft of our heavy-duty replacement vacuum line. We recommend replacing the old deteriorated vacuum line to ensure trouble-free operation. title: 2006-2013 BMW E90 E91 323 325 328 330 Slip-On N51/N52 Exhaust Tips - Burned Blue (Pair)
descriptionEn: The BMS E chassis slip-on exhaust tips are the perfect choice for dressing up your factory exhaust outlets. Made from stainless steel these tips are sure to turn heads. Specially equipped with factory-like pressure clips making them go on easily and stay in place just like the factory tips. No ugly screws or clamps for a factory appearance. Sold in Pairs. Not for use with M-Performance exhaust systems. Does not fit any F chassis vehicles or other E chassis vehicles other than those listed above. To install without factory tips: (Just metal pipe) Slide the BMS slip-on exhaust tip straight on over the factory exhaust pipe. Carefully push the tip straight on until it stops. That's it. To install with factory tips: (Car has factory tips) first remove your factory tips by pounding outward on the lower rear part of the tip with either a rubber mallet or a hammer. A small piece of wood can be used between the hammer and the exhaust tip edge. This is done from under the rear of the car. Small-medium taps will start the factory tip sliding off the actual exhaust pipe. Secure the tip before it comes off the end of the pipe with your hand. Make sure to keep it straight to not damage the innerspring clips. Slide the BMS slip-on exhaust tip straight on over the factory exhaust pipe. Carefully push the tip straight on until it stops. That's it.
