title: BMW E-Chassis Walbro Stage 2 LPFP Upgrade for the N54 & N55 Motors
descriptionEn: If your current Low Pressure Fuel Pump (LPFP) is struggling to keep up, is old and tired, or you need an E85 compatible solution in an OEM pump assembly, this is the upgrade for you! What’s included with my new plug & play upgraded pump assembly? • New OEM bucket• New OEM tophat• New OEM float• New OEM O-ring• New Walbro filter• Spare vent tube clip• A new E85 compatible Walbro pump• Custom fitting to optimize the venturi and pump output• Choice of Walbro 450 (F90000274) or Walbro 525 (F90000285) pump (Unlike other similar looking kits we use high quality OEM buckets and float assemblies for assembly ensuring trouble free operation long term). Common Questions Q: How much fuel does a stage 2 flow? A: Our stage 2 pump flows approximately 100% more than stock Q: How much more does the Walbro 525 flow than the Walbro 450? A: Approximately 10% Q: What kinds of fuels can I run with the upgraded pump? A: Our upgrade is compatible with pump gas, race gas, and E85. Q: Does the upgraded pump pull more current than stock? A: Yes, upgraded pumps pull more current, so if your EKP (LPFP control module) is weak, it may overheat causing it to shut down and need to be replaced. If this is a concern for you checkout our FI-650HP fuel pump upgrade kits that retain the stock LPFP and add a secondary pump. https://www.fuel-it.com/bmw-e-series-fi-650hp-lpfp-upgrade/Q: Are there any recommended accessories? A: Yes, the lock ring for the pump assembly can be difficult to remove so we recommend adding our lock ring removal tool Q: How much power will the 450 pump support? A: That varies based on a variety of things such as actual power, fuel type, AFR’s, etc. Generally speaking, the 450 will support approximately 500whp on E85 or 550-600whp on pump or race gas. The 525 pump upgrade will support approximately 10% more than the 450 pump will. Q: My car is a European spec vehicle, will this work? A: Yes, however, due to different emissions requirements, the top portion of your fuel bucket assembly (top hat) is different and doesn't have a large vent tube connection. For this reason, we do not send the top hat to international customers as this often causes confusion. Those customers will simply re-use their current top hat when installing their Stage 2 pump assembly. Q: How can I tell if my car is North American Spec or European Spec A: Generally all cars from the US, Canada, and Mexico are North American Spec. All others are European Spec but to verify you can simply look at the top hat (no need to open the tank). If there are two electrical and two plumbing connections, it's North American spec. European spec cars will have two electrical connections and one plumbing connection. Q: What vehicles are compatible with this upgrade?ApplicationsBMW 1 Series1' E88 (11/2006 — 10/2013)1' E82 (11/2006 — 10/2013)BMW 3 Series 3' E90 (02/2004 — 09/2008)3' E90 LCI (07/2007 — 12/2011)3' E91 (02/2004 — 08/2008)3' E91 LCI (07/2007 — 05/2012)3' E92 (05/2005 — 02/2010)3' E92 LCI (11/2008 — 06/2013)3' E93 (09/2005 — 02/2010)3' E93 LCI (11/2008 — 10/2013) BMW X SeriesX1 E84 (04/2009 — 06/2015) Q: My vehicle isn’t listed, can you do a custom upgrade for me? A: Check our other listings, your vehicle may be listed in one of those.Videos

descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 100hp and 100tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle The JB4 is a plug-and-play Hyundai / Genesis performance tuner that connects to easy-to-access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU to optimize boost, timing, and fueling for stronger performance and reduced turbo lag. Unlike basic tuning boxes, the JB4 includes a fully programmable CANbus system, upgradable firmware, and data logging. CANbus integration allows the JB4 to factor in pedal input, throttle position, gear, RPM, AFR, fuel trims, ignition advance, knock feedback, and more when controlling performance. It can also read and delete fault codes and includes safety strategies such as keeping boost lower until oil and coolant temperatures are up, and switching to a low-boost map if overheating, lean conditions, excessive knock, or overboost are detected. The JB4 offers significantly more performance, functionality, and safety than an average performance chip. The default Map 1 runs about 4psi over stock peak, and maps (including stock and valet) can be selected on the fly using a BMS diagnostics cable or JB4 mobile adapter. Installation is discreet and fully removable with no trace when needed. Includes maps for 91 octane, 93 octane, and E85 (ethanol) mixtures. Fuel economy during normal driving is typically unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. title: Standard Hobbs Switch
descriptionEn: This simple to install Hobbs switch can be used to run a secondary fuel pump or provide an additional level of WMI protection. Available in both 1/8" NPT and vacuum nipple, it's normally off (open) and will trigger at the preset of 5psi or 15psi. The switch is rated for up to 6amps. If used as a WMI flood safety we suggest 5psi and running the solenoid ground through it so the solenoid can only open if the WMI system requests flow AND you're making at least 5psi. For those using it to trigger a secondary fuel pump we suggest 15psi and using it to trigger a 30amp automotive relay for the pump. What is a Hobbs switch? Hobbs switch is just a simple on-off switch that is normally off and used to trigger an accessory at a set boost point. How do I install a Hobbs switch? The Hobbs switch has two contacts that need to be connected. Connect one contact to chassis ground Connect the other contact to your ground trigger wire for the accessory.

descriptionEn: Plug in up to 40 extra wheel horsepower in seconds! Our popular and well-proven JB Plus quick install tuner is available for 2020-2024 B48/B58 Mk5 Toyota Supra applications! Boost is user adjustable up to 4.5psi over stock providing gains up to 40 wheel horsepower and 50 wheel torque on the B58 Supra motor. Something that anyone can buy, install in under a minute, and really feel from the driver's seat. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Automatically detects the engine type upon installation allowing the same unit to be used for any B48 B58 F series application! For those who want to start with the JB Plus and upgrade to the higher power more advanced JB4 tune, we offer a 100% trade-up credit. To qualify simply purchase the JB4 system from our website directly and then after receipt mail back the JB Plus along with its purchase receipt from BMS or any authorized reseller and we'll issue a $239.00 refund against your JB4 purchase. The offer is valid for up to one year after purchasing the JB Plus. Made in the USA. 5 Year Warranty. Vehicle Fitment Toyota Supra• 2020-2026 GR Supra Mk5 B58 3.0L 6 cyl Gen2• 2020-2026 GR Supra Mk5 B48 2.0L 4 cyl Gen2

title: JB4 for 2019+ Ford Edge ST & 2022+ Ford Edge 2.0T
descriptionEn: JB4 = Instant Power gains! This plug and play tuner attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag.Installation is very discrete and unlike flash remaps, which are quick to install but can never be fully removed with a JB4 the vehicle is never aware it's making more than the factory boost or power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged and it's compatible with all driving modes including towing.Unlike other less advanced systems, the JB4 includes CANbus functionality allowing it to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU for real-time tuning. The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and much more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data no less incorporate it real-time into their tuning algorithms. CANbus allows the JB4 to provide huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery.The JB4 includes multiple maps including those for 91 octane, 93 octane, factory tuning, VALET mode, E85 mixtures, and unleaded race gas. In addition, it offers boost by gear settings to improve launches, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more. The JB4 is made in the USA and includes a 5-year warranty.JB4 Map Guide:Map0: Fully disable JB4Map1: +3.5psi peak over stock, default map, 91+ octaneMap2: +3.5psi peak, less top end taper, more aggressive version of map1.Map3: +4psi peak, suggested for 93+ octane and/or modified trucksMap4: Low boost VALET mapMap5: +6psi peak, suggested for 30% E85 mixtures and/or unleaded race fuelMap6: Custom tuning map user adjustable Map7: +7psi peak racing map for unleaded race fuel Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. Power Gains, Features, & Benefits • More Horsepower and Torque• Improves 0-60 times and 1/4 mile times• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment • 2022+ Ford Edge 2.0L Turbo• 2019+ Ford Edge ST Check your sensors to confirm the required harness before ordering! JB4 systems use one of two different wiring harnesses. You'll need to locate and identify both the charge pipe and intake manifold MAP sensors, generally on the charge pipe leading into the throttle body, and under or behind the plastic engine cover on the manifold directly, to determine which JB4 harness your vehicle requires.1) V2 Harness: Two V2 sensors, generally found on 2017-2020 models2) V3 Harness: One V3 sensor, one V2 sensor, generally found on 2021+ modelsSensor arrangements are vehicle specific so while our model year guide gives common applications please check your vehicle prior to ordering. What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU.

descriptionEn: BMS Elite M3/M4/M2C S55 BOV Kit Finally, that blow-off valve sound you've been waiting for on your S55 powered BMW. Our BMS Elite S55 replacement charge pipe is made from heavy-duty aluminum and is designed with CNC flanges and a protruding lip for a secure OEM-like fit. It's finished in a gloss black powder coat to match the engine bay and includes two 1/8" NPT bungs perfect for an external boost gauge or WMI nozzle. Also includes a heavy-duty replacement coupler, O ring, C clip, and all required installation hardware. This version features a Turbosmart Raceport valve blow-off valve to release excess pressure in the charge pipes when letting off the gas. In addition to intoxicating sound, it reduces compressor surge and improves overall reliability at higher boost levels. Includes an electronic BOV controller, MAC solenoid, and all required fittings for easy installation. Compatible with factory tuning, JB4, and flash tuning. title: McLaren JB4 Performance Tuner for M838T Engines (BETA)
descriptionEn: Instant Horsepower and Torque Gains The JB4 is a plug and play McLaren tuner that plugs into easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. It features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 800 times per second using dedicated 10-bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance. No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUs Unlike other tuning systems, the JB4 includes a fully programmable CANbus system, upgradable firmware, and data logging capability. CANbus allows the JB4 to take into account pedal input, throttle position, gear, engine speed, air/fuel ratio, fuel trims, ignition advance, knock, and many other factors and incorporate those into the performance mapping. It can also read/delete fault codes, includes unique safety features such as keeping boost pressure low until oil and water is up to temperature to provide proper engine and turbo lucubration and drop to a low boost map if the engine starts to overheat, run lean, excessively knock, or over boost. The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip.The default JB4 map1 runs 4psi over stock peak and tuned maps including stock and valet mode can be selected on the fly using a BMS diagnostics cable or JB4 mobile smartphone adapter. Installation is very discrete, and it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Includes maps for 91 octane, 93 octane, and E85 (ethanol fuel) mixtures. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes. Made in USA. 5 year warranty. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. title: BMS Billet Intake for BMW F48 X1 M35i, F39 X2 M35i, F44 M235i, F40 M135i (Transverse Engines)
descriptionEn: More Power, Better Throttle Response, and Better Sound The Burger Motorsports plug and play air intake system unlocks up to 8hp to the wheels from your B48E powered BMW engine. In addition to the extra power throttle response, turbo spool, and sound are dramatically improved, finally allowing you to hear your turbo spool up under heavy acceleration. Our intake retains everything that is good about the OEM intake system including the cold air ducting and light weight heat shielding airbox bottom; but, completely replaces the restrictive top end of the OEM intake with new high flow ducting and an inverted cone performance air filter to match. The system is CNC machined from billet aluminum, anodized black for a clean look, and includes a reusable inverted cone high flow performance air filter. Install takes only minutes and is fully reversible. Made in the USA.Our Burger Motorsports oversized inverted cone filters not only outflow your stock paper filter and last the life of your vehicle, they also include a built-in velocity stack. Velocity stacks allow even more air to be smoothly sucked into your intake system and are used in most racing applications. Please check specific years below for fitment. Transverse Engines Only. Bracket is not used with 2023+ X1 or 2024+ X2. Features & Benefits • Faster throttle response • Faster turbo spool• Improved intake sound• CNC machined from billet aluminum• Looks great under the hood• Reusable/washable inverted cone air filter • Fully Reversible • Made in the USA Vehicle Fitment (Rectangle MAF Sensors Only) BMW 35i Models (Option 1) Transverse Engines Only. • 2019+ 1 Series B48E (F40) M135i including xDrive (Euro Model) • 2019+ 2 Series Gran Coupe B48E (F44) M235i including xDrive (Euro & USA Model)• 2024+ X1 B48E (F48) M35i including xDrive (Euro & USA Model) • 2018+ X2 B48E (F39) M35i including xDrive (Euro & USA Model) ⚠️ Be advised this intake only fits the exact years and models listed above. MAF sensor holes are different in different years and intake diameters are different. Please see our other listings for other fitments. title: BMS 1.25 Gallon Heavy-Duty Universal Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Tank
descriptionEn: 1.25 Gallon Heavy-Duty Universal Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Tank The Burger Motorsports 1.25 gallon heavy-duty tank is compact and flexible allowing for a wide range of mounting on any flat vertical surface in the trunk. This tank is thicker and stronger than our basic 1-gallon WMI tank. This tank features an easy fill filler nozzle, an anti-starvation reservoir with a pre-threaded bung for the included 90º compression pump feed fitting, a spill-catcher reservoir around the filler cap, a 2-way vented black plastic cap, and is translucent to allow visually checking the fluid level. Optional upgraded blue billet water/methanol injection (WMI) cap with a 1-way check valve available here. The injection nozzles are determined by the intended power and how many bungs your charge pipe has. The injection nozzles are 1/8” NPT and screw into bungs included on most aftermarket charge pipes. Our BMS "super atomizing" nozzles are well known for their great atomization and flow characteristics. The nozzle number represents the approximate gallons per hour of fluid when at full flow. Generally speaking, running two smaller nozzles is preferred to one larger nozzle for an equal flow to improve fluid atomization and distribution. Below are some general nozzle suggestions but feel free to email us for nozzle advice if your situation is unique. Features & Benefits • 1.25 Gallon Tank (4.73 Liters)• Anti-Starvation Reservoir • Easy Fill filler Nozzle• Spill-Catcher Reservoir around the filler cap• Available in clear for visually checking fluid levels• 8 mounting holes on the side rails• Includes 2-way vented black plastic cap• Optional upgraded blue billet lid with 1-way check valve available here.• Includes a 90º compression pump feed fitting Tank dimensions: L 11" x W 4.5 x H 9" Vehicle FitmentUniversal Mount Optional Upgraded Billet Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) tank cap w/safety check valve This high-quality custom billet Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) cap includes an integrated check valve to let air in and prevent dangerous WMI vapor/fumes from getting out! Made in the USA. Available here.

The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip.The default JB4 map 1 runs 4psi over stock peak, and tuned maps, including stock and valet mode, can be selected on the fly using a BMS diagnostics cable or JB4 mobile smartphone adapter. Installation is very discrete, and it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Includes maps for 91 octane, 93 octane, and E85 (ethanol fuel) mixtures. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes. Made in USA. 5 year warranty. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. Ford Focus RS JB4 Features and Benefits • Power gains of up to 50whp and 60wtq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment • 2016+ Ford Focus RS • 2016+ Ford Focus ST What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. 2018 Ford Focus RS Dyno Results Stock vs. JB4 Tuned

title: Velossa Tech Dual BIG MOUTH Ram Air Intake Snorkels for Kia Stinger 3.3T
descriptionEn: Looking to increase the performance of your Kia Stinger 3.3T? You're in the right place. The Velossa Tech BIG MOUTH is the go-to mod for any induction setup (works with your stock or aftermarket cold air intake). Our NEW Generation 4 BIG MOUTH ram air intake snorkels feature removable flare/inlets and allow you to remove your flare with ease - by unscrewing 4 set screws, you can change the color of your BIG MOUTH to get the look that fits your self-expression. Generation 4 is a patent-pending feature that will change the way we present our cars to the world, Velossa Tech is proud to offer this new innovative feature. Being able to replace a flare that has gotten damaged or want to change up the color, it's now easier than ever! NOTE: Generation 4 flares are not backward compatible with Generation 3 bodies. The BIG MOUTH was developed for better overall mass airflow for stock, tuned cars or highly modified engines, you also have the ability to customize the color of the inlet flare and body. This is truly a unique piece in that it allows you to get the performance benefits of a properly engineered ram duct and have the aesthetic appeal of your liking!! It will bolt right directly onto the inlet cowl and feed your aftermarket or stock airbox on your Kia Stinger 3.3T. In fact, it will greatly improve the performance of your stock or aftermarket intake setup. Designed in-house right here in the USA with the latest aerospace CFD fluid flow simulation techniques and methods, backed by hours and hours of R&D, fitment testing, and real-world driving, we are sure you will fall in love with American-made quality and engineering. Features & Benefits • Maximum performance design, optimized inlet flare, and convergent duct• Finished smooth for maximum airflow• 6 color options to choose from• OEM fit and finish• Two-layer UV protective coating for sun protection against color fade• No permanent modification is necessary• No tune necessary (although beneficial if you tune with the BIG MOUTH)• All hardware included• Made in the USA Vehicle Fitment • 2018-2023 KIA Stinger GT, GT1, GT2 Does not fit Genesis G70 3.3L HOW IT WORKS As a car moves through the air, the air pressure directly in front of the bumper increases with the square of speed. The BIG MOUTH is strategically designed and positioned for maximum air pressure recovery. Basically, it feeds your current intake with higher pressure air. It is the same concept as driving below sea level where the air pressure is higher, except you can generate higher inlet pressures with a properly design ram duct such as the BIG MOUTH. Increasing the inlet absolute pressure to your engine has profound effects on performance. Increases in air mass flow, reduction in wastegate duty cycle (for turbo vehicles), and reduced inlet and charge temps are some of the benefits of running a properly designed ram inlet. On top of all that awesome performance comes the BIG MOUTH growl, sinister stare, and it sounds and looks great! CUSTOMIZATION Want your Kia Stinger 3.3T to stand out? The BIG MOUTH is the only ram air system for the Kia Stinger 3.3T that allows you to choose from over 28 colors for either the body or the flare, giving you the added edge of customization, with hundreds of different variations possible. INSTALLATION Installation can be done with basic hand tools. We supply all straight forward color instructions (downloadable below), backed with our Customer Support phone number to help guide if any questions arise. All hardware is always included (if necessary) in our BIG MOUTH Ram Air kits. NOTE: Rain or snow do not adversely affect the engine once a BIG MOUTH is installed. When people see that massive inlet flare through the grille, they'll know it's Velossa Tech!

title: BMS Oil Catch Can for 2020-2026 B58 Toyota Supra GR MK5
sku: G20 B58 OCC w/Cut Hoses (3.5") + Muffler Delete
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your B58 Toyota Supra Air Intake System! It's no secret that the B58 turbo Supra motors can suffer from oil control problems causing the oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves and the VANOS system, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The BMS oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor to the atmosphere. To solve these problems BMS designed their oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbo B58 application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking to the atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Install takes around 20 minutes, includes all required hardware, and is 100% reversible. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. Made in the USA. New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here. Requires either the BMS Supra Intake to fit or if you would like to keep the factory intake you can use the BMS B58 intake muffler delete to make room needed for the can. Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency • Promotes Engine Longevity • Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large Intake/Outlet No Tapering Down• Anodized Black Aluminum• Made in the USA & Guaranteed for Life• Simply unscrew base every 3-6 months to empty or use the 1/8th NPT drain plug.• Non-Clogging, No Service Needed Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs • Large 16mm+ inlet and outlet exceeds OEM PCV sizing• Precision CNC Machined from Solid Blocks of High-Grade Aluminum Vehicle Fitment Toyota Supra• 2020-2026 Toyota Supra GR MK5 (B58 engine only)Catch can dimensions and specs Can dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) TallCan diameter: 2.5" (63.7mm)Lid length: Back to nozzle end: 4" (101mm)Nozzle outer diameter: .75" (19.2mm) Nozzle inner diameter: 0.669" (17mm) Can Fluid Capacity: Up to 5.5 fl oz (162.6 mL) What's Included (1) BMS Oil Catch Can (N54)(1) Billet B58 bracket(1) 90º billet fitting/nipple(1) Custom silicone inlet hose(1) 3.5" straight silicone hose(2) Stainless steel bracket screws #10-32 x 1/2" internal hex socket head Kit for factory intake includes the BMS B58 intake muffler delete Supra Oil Catch Can Install Video Optional: B58 BMW/Supra BMS Oil Catch Can Oil Filler Cap Connection Kit Take your B58 BMW or Supra’s crankcase ventilation performance to the next level with the BMS Oil Filler Cap Connection Kit = the missing link for ultimate catch can efficiency. This precision-machined billet cap replaces the factory oil filler cap and creates a second dedicated exit point for dirty PCV gases. That means both the crankcase vent and the valve cover breather can now be routed into your oil catch can. Twice the inputs into your catch can means twice the oil vapor capture, keeping harmful oil mist out of your intake tract. Cleaner air, cleaner intake valves, and a more efficient PCV system, it’s a simple upgrade with major payoffs. OPTIONAL: New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here.The main advantage of a transparent can is that you can easily see the contents inside. This allows for quick checks on oil levels, contamination, and sludge buildup without needing to open the can. ⚠️ ATTENTION: The optional transparent can base is not suitable for use in regions where temperatures frequently drop to 32°F (0°C) or below.

title: Group 14: JB4 for Audi and others B8/8.5 EA888 Gen2
descriptionEn: JB4 Group 14: EA888 Gen2 The JB4 is a true user adjustable plug and play solution. Power Gains: Starting at peak Gains 28whp 50ft-lb. Peak gains 40whp in certain rpm ranges.The JB4 features CANbus connectivity for more advanced tuning, direct AFR control, advanced safety systems for boost, air/fuel ratio, fuel trims, and engine knock, boost mapping by gear for improved traction, integrated water/meth control, and much more. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Up to 40whp on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Audi• 2008-2015 Audi B8/8.5 A4/5 EA888 Gen2 2.0T • 2008-2015 Audi B8/8.5 Q3 EA888 Gen2 2.0T • 2008-2015 Audi B8/8.5 Q5 EA888 Gen2 2.0T For any VW/Audi sales, support, and technical questions, please contact George at george@burgertuning.com George is the only BMS representative familiar with the VW/Audi platform. What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. Audi JB4 Mobile demo video

title: BMW B58 G05 X5 & G07 X7 40i Bluetooth Flex Fuel Kit
sku: G05 B58 X5 Flex Fuel Kit ***BT AND 0-5v***
descriptionEn: Stop Guessing. Start Knowing Your Exact Ethanol Content. Running E85 on your B58 Powered X5 or X7 BMW? Ethanol content at the E85 pump can vary from E50 to E85 or higher depending on season and station. Regular premium gas can have up to 10% ethanol at some stations. No more calculating gallons at the pump and guessing ethanol percentage. Just open the app and know. Key Features • Real-time ethanol content monitoring via Bluetooth• Displays exact ethanol percentage (E-content) in the Fuel-It! or JB4 app• 0–5V analog output for JB4 or flash tuning integration• Genuine Continental ethanol sensor for OEM-grade accuracy• Plug and play fuel line integration• Ethanol safe PTFE fuel lines and fittings• Installs in approximately 30 minutes• No cutting or permanent modification required Why You Need an Ethanol Sensor on Your B58 E85 pumps rarely dispense true E85. Seasonal blends can drop into the E50 range without notice. If you’re tuning for ethanol, this matters. With this kit you can • Dial in your exact E85 blend every fill-up• Avoid running too much ethanol on a pump gas map• Maximize timing and boost safely on ethanol maps• Maintain consistent performance at the track• Protect your engine from unknown fuel mixtures The Bottom Line If you’re running E85 on your B58 BMW X5, a flex fuel sensor isn’t optional, it’s essential. Power, consistency, and safety all start with knowing exactly what’s in your tank. Vehicle Fitment 2019+ G05 B58 BMW X5 40i including xDrive 2019+ G07 B58 BMW X7 40i xDrive Download the Fuel-It! ECA app here: Android Fuel-It! ECA app Apple (iOS) Fuel-It! ECA app What's Included Heavy duty 5/16" E85 compatible fuel lines for your engine bay Genuine Continental® ethanol sensor Fuel-It! Bluetooth analyzer (iPhone® or Android® app must be purchased to use this kit) Plug and play harness Includes both Bluetooth App & 5v analog output for JB4 or flash tuning *For the BMW G Chassis JB4 platform connect the white wire to position #4 on the JB4 25 pin harness. Select WMI Ethanol Setup option 0 to enable pin location 2/3/4 flex fuel input.

title: Kia/Hyundai JB4 Water Methanol Injection (WMI) Kit
sku: pump, FSB, solenoid, filter, 21'+3' WMI line, fittings, and wiring
descriptionEn: Make tremendous amounts of power on pump gas! Water/Methanol/Alcohol injection commonly referred to as WMI allows you to make tremendous amounts of power on pump gas. The effect is similar to running 100 octane race gas or E85 fuel all the time with the additional cooling benefits allowing for more power than you can make on race gas or E85 alone.The key to a safe and effective WMI setup is tuning integration. The JB4 WMI kit integrates with the JB4 tuning system allowing for precise mapping based on boost, throttle position, engine speed, intake temperature, advance, gear, and other data elements available to the JB4 through its CANbus system. In addition, a pump flow signal is fed back to the JB4 allowing for a safe and smooth progressive boost mapping. If the tank runs empty or the flow drops for any reason the JB4 will safely back down performance to avoid detonation. Boost is held low until WMI is properly flowing to avoid tip in knock common with non-integrated WMI setups. In addition, WMI can be activated or disabled right from the JB4 Mobile app, will automatically disengage during traction control or safety map situations, and WMI flow data can be displayed via your JB4 Mobile logging device.The BMS WMI kit includes a high quality Aquatec WMI pump made to our specifications, high speed solenoid with leak-free compression fittings, a WMI filter, and all required wiring and mounting hardware. We offer a unique direct fit nozzle mount adapter for the platform eliminating the need to drill/tap a nozzle or tig weld to your factory charge pipe. Note: If using the optional Stinger stealth bracket the spare tire needs to be deflated or removed. The base kit includes our WMI pump, FSB controller for the JB4, solenoid, filter, 20' of WMI line, compression fittings, and wiring. In addition, you'll need to add on your nozzle (we suggest single BM10 for 3.3L, BM7 for 1.6-2L), tank, and optional items such as our quick install nozzle adapter or stealth bracket if you selected the 1-gallon tank. BMS Kia Stinger 2.0L and 3.3L / Hyundai G70 / Veloster N Plug and Play WMI Nozzle Adapter Recommended Kia Stinger / Genesis G70 / Veloster N nozzle: Single BM10 1.25 GALLON HEAVY-DUTY UNIVERSAL TANKThe Burger Motorsports 1.25 gallon heavy-duty tank is compact and flexible allowing for a wide range of mounting on any flat vertical surface in the trunk. This tank is thicker and stronger than our basic 1-gallon WMI tank. This tank features an easy fill filler nozzle, an anti-starvation reservoir with a pre-threaded bung for the included 90º compression pump feed fitting, a spill-catcher reservoir around the filler cap, a 2-way vented black plastic cap, and is translucent to allow visually checking the fluid level.Comes with a standard 2 way vented black plastic cap/lid. Upgraded billet cap/lid with 1-way check valve available in the drop-down menu when ordering. Tank dimensions: L 11" x W 4.5 x H 9" ApplicationsUniversal trunk mount WMI 1 Gallon Tank & BMS Stealth Water Injection Bracket for 2018+ KIA Stinger 1 gallon universal tank: The least expensive option this tank is compact and flexible allowing for a wide range of mounting on any flat vertical surface in the trunk. The tank is clear to allow visually checking the fluid level.Comes with standard 2 way vented black plastic cap/lid. Upgraded billet cap/lid with 1-way check valve available in the drop-down menu when ordering.Tank dimensions: L 11" x W 9" x H 4.5"For trunk mount applications. BMS Stealth Water Injection Bracket for 2018+ KIA Stinger Our newest offering, this completely custom design fits in the hidden trunk cavity found in 2018+ KIA Stinger vehicles. The WMI pump mounts directly to the bracket alongside the 1 gallon tank allowing for a quick and clean installation. Very easy to fill. Stows hidden away under the deck lid allowing full use of the trunk. 2 gal. UNIVERSAL LOW PRO TANK With our 2 gallon universal tank, the WMI pump mounts directly to the tank for the ultimate easy to install tank. This tank is compact allowing for a wide range of mounting on any horizontal surface in the trunk. Offered in black and in clear to allow visually checking the fluid level. Works with all DDP 5800 pumps. Made in USA.Comes with standard 2 way vented black plastic cap. Upgraded billet lid with 1-way check valve available below.Tank dimensions: L 15.5" x W 8" x H 8.25" ApplicationsUniversal trunk mount Optional Upgraded Billet Tank Cap/Lid Upgraded Billet WMI tank cap w/safety check valveThis high quality custom billet WMI cap includes an integrated check valve to let air in and prevent dangerous WMI vapor/fumes from getting out! Made in USA.Applications• 1 gallon tank• 2 gallon universal tank• 2 & 3 gallon BMW stealth tank

title: Charge Pipe Injection (CPI) Starter Kit
descriptionEn: Introducing our new Charge Pipe Injector (CPI) kit! This kit adds additional injector(s) to your intake system. The basic starter kit includes: • One 550cc injector with 1/8" NPT (meth bung) mount• Our exclusive Cam-Loc 5/16" fuel line adapter• One 12" -4AN (1/4") fuel line• Basic injector harness• Installation Tool Q: What is CPI?A: Charge Pipe Injection (CPI) is our new proprietary system that allows you to add additional injectors to your boosted application with any standard 1/8" NPT female connection in your charge pipe or intake system. Q: Is it expandable?A: Yes, we have two types of injector bodies. The first has one input that can be run by itself or we have an injector body with two connections so you can daisy chain in additional injector fed from the same fuel source. Q: What is required to run one of these injectors?A: These kits are for boosted applications and you must have enough clearance to install the injector and fuel lines. We have provided measurements to assist you with this. Q: How is it controlled?A: The injector can be controlled with the FSB via a JB4, or any any stand alone fuel injector controller if not running a JB4. Q: Can I add an injector to my current port injection kit?A: Yes, you can connect the injector to the fuel rail if it has an available port such as the Fuel-It! port injection kits do. Q: Can I use this without a secondary injector controller?A: No, this is a PWM controlled injector that must be programmed. Q: What kind of fuel can I run?A: These kits are compatible with methanol, ethanol, E85, race gas, and pump gas. Q: Where do I connect to the fuel source?A: That will vary by application. If running E85, most will tee into their low-pressure fuel line and if compatible use one of our fuel line adapters. Q: Can these be used pre-intercooler?A: Yes but we recommend using the 550cc injector and in an application where air temperatures may are above 300 degrees Fahrenheit we recommend running methanol or high concentrations of ethanol in your fuel. Q: Are there different sizes of injectors available?A: Yes, we currently offer 550cc and 950cc injectors. Q: How do I add additional injectors and accessories?A: Additional injector assemblies can be purchased by clicking here. Additional accessories can be purchased by clicking here.
selectedVariant: 5/16" adapter / Yes upgrade me to the 950cc injector! / Include FSB for JB4 control

title: F, J, U, Chassis MINI Cooper Wheel Spacers by Burger Motorsports w/10 Bolts
descriptionEn: Simple, bolt-on handling and looks for your F, J, & U chassis MINIWider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks Mini Cooper wheel spacers by Burger Motorsports are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your MINI. Our wheel spacers push your wheels and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability, and handling. Spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset, or just making your MINI look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your MINI ensuring a perfect vibration free fit. Comes with a packet of anti-seize grease to place on the factory hub to aid in later removal. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports wheel spacer is CNC machined from high grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our MINI Cooper Wheel Spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 10 extended lug bolts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. All Burger Motorsports wheel spacers are hub-centric and are safe to use on (ALL4) all-wheel vehicles. Hub-Centric: This means our spacers center bore matches your factory MINI Cooper hub and the factory-like hub on the Burger Motorsports spacers match the center bore in your wheel for a vibration-free fit. What width wheel spacer should I get?Most F, J, & U Chassis MINI vehicles with factory wheels and tire sizes take 10mm to 13mm in the front and 13mm to 15mm in the rear. The photos and guidelines on this website are for reference only. Your MIIN might have different results with the same size spacers due to different wheels, tire sizes, packages, and offsets. Installation: Simply remove the wheel, place the spacer on the hub, and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download the install guide. Free Wheel Pin tool with purchase of 2 pairs of BMW spacers on the same receipt.To get the free wheel pin with a 2 pair BMW wheel spacer purchase, add 2 pairs of wheel spacers to your cart, go to the link below and add the free wheel pin to the cart. When you hit the checkout button the items will be discounted to FREE! title: JB4 Tuner for Porsche 992 & 992.2 Carrera, S, T, & GTS
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 60hp and 80tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! The JB4 is an easy to install plug and play tuner that attaches to sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. Includes full SENT sensor technology required for properly tuning the latest Porsche platforms. Includes full CANbus allowing the JB4 to access and incorporate all engine data in its tuning strategies, incorporate unique safety features such as keeping boost pressure low until oil and water are up to temperature to provide proper engine and turbo lubrication and drop to a low boost map if the engine starts to overheat, run lean, excessively knock, or over boost. Includes fuel control for ethanol mixture mapping. Fully compatible with JB4 mobile for on the fly map changes, data logging, firmware updates, and much more. Installation is very discrete and it is quickly removed without a trace when needed. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes. Made in the USA. 5 year warranty. For map details, updates, and to join the discussion: jb4tech.com Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 60hp and 80tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Porsche• 2020+ 992 \ 992.2 Carrera• 2020+ 992 \ 992.2 Carrera S• 2023+ 992 \ 992.2 Carrera T• 2022+ 992 \ 992.2 Carrera GTS What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. 992.1 3.0L Flat 6 Twin turbo Install Guide Dyno Video: 2020 992 Porsche Carrera Dyno Results: 2020 992 Porsche Carrera

title: Dual BMS Oil Catch Can Kit for N54 BMW (Vacuum & Boost)
descriptionEn: Dual BMS Oil Catch Can Kit for N54 BMW (Vacuum & Boost) Keep Oil Out of your N54 BMW Air Intake System! It's no secret that the N54 BMW turbo motors suffer from oil control problems causing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves and the VANOS system, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The BMS N54 oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor / ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor to the atmosphere. Most are simply repackaged oil catch cans from smaller / lower power motors shoe-horned into place in the turbo BMW engine bay. To solve these problems BMS designed their oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbo BMW application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking to atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Install takes around 20 minutes, includes all required hardware, and is 100% reversible. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. Vacuum Side The BMS vacuum side N54 OCC works in conjunction with our world-famous boost side N54 oil catch can to prevent engine oil and PCV gunk from coating your intake valves and hurting engine efficiency under engine vacuum operation. Our boost side OCC separates oil traveling through the PCV while the engine is operating under boost pressure (e.g. heavy throttle) and our vacuum side OCC separates oil traveling through the PCV while the engine is operating under vacuum (idle and low throttle). When used together they provide the ultimate protection keeping oil from coating your intake ports and valves during all phases of engine operation!Our unique PCV adapter design does not require you to permanently cap/plug your PCV holes! Includes a high performance check valve that attaches directly to the vacuum source eliminating boost leaks within the system and also includes quick connect fittings and 3/8” hose for quick, easy, and clean installation. The full vacuum side kit includes a BMS double baffle OCC which mounts on the strut brace right next to your BMS boost side OCC for a clean look and easy service. The full kit also includes our BOV adapter providing an extra 1/8" NPT vacuum port source. Note a BOV is not required to run this kit. This kit eliminates the need for a separate RB PCV or BMS PCV.New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here. These can be purchased separately below:N54 Boost Side oil Catch CanN54 Vacuum Side Oil Catch Can Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency • Promotes Engine Longevity • Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Double Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large Intake/Outlet No Tapering Down• Stealth Mounting on Cool Side of the Motor• Anodized Black Aluminum• N54 Model Mounts Out of Sight Under the Cowl • Made in USA & Guaranteed for Life• Simply unscrew base every 3-6 months to empty or use the 1/8th NPT drain plug.• Non-Clogging, No Service Needed Air/Oil Separation Double Baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs • Large 16mm+ inlet and outlet exceeds OEM PCV sizing• Precision CNC Machined from Solid Blocks of High Grade Aluminum Vehicle Fitment BMW 1 Series • 2008-2013 E82 Coupe E88 Convertible 135i/1M (N54 Engine)BMW 3 Series • 2006-2011 E90 Sedan 335i / 335ix (N54 Engine/E chassis only)• 2006-2011 E91 Touring 335i / 335ix (N54 Engine/E chassis only)• 2006-2013 E92 Coupe 335i / 335ix / 335is (N54 Engine/E chassis only)• 2007-2013 E93 Convertible 335i / 335ix (N54 Engine/E chassis only) BMW 5 Series• 2008-2010 E60 Sedan and E61 Touring 535i and 535iX Catch can dimensions and specs Can dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) TallCan diameter: 2.5" (63.7mm)Lid length: Back to nozzle end: 4" (101mm)Nozzle outer diameter: .75" (19.2mm) Nozzle inner diameter: 0.669" (17mm) Can Fluid Capacity: Up to 5.5 fl oz (162.6 mL) INSTALLATION GUIDE BMW Oil Catch Can N54 Engine (V2) BMW Vacuum Side Oil Catch Can N54 Engine New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here.The main advantage of a transparent can is that you can easily see the contents inside. This allows for quick checks on oil levels, contamination, and sludge buildup without needing to open the can. ⚠️ ATTENTION: The optional transparent can base is not suitable for use in regions where temperatures frequently drop to 32°F (0°C) or below.

title: Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Solenoid to Nozzle Braided Steel Hardline kit
descriptionEn: Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Solenoid to Nozzle Braided Steel Hardline kit Upgrades the nylon Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) line from your solenoid to your nozzle with braided steel Teflon inner lining line to guarantee leak-free operation with all fluids under extreme engine heat. title: N54 MSD80 ECU IRF644 MOSFET
descriptionEn: N54 BMW engines with the MSD80 DME software can suffer fuel injector MOSFET driver failure, leading to one of the injectors ceasing to deliver fuel, resulting in engine misfire and rough operation. This part comprises of 6 MOSFET transistors, with one for each injector to activate fuel injection. Its replacement can consequently fix the faults associated with 30BA, 30BB codes etc. Utilizing this part and a DIY video, ECU/DME repair is achievable. Diagnostic fault codes (error messages): 30BA - DME Digital Motor Electronics, Internal Failure 30BB - DME Digital Motor Electronics, Internal Failure 29D9 - Misfire with low fuel level 29CC - Misfire Multiple Cylinders 29CD - Cylinder 1 Misfire 29CE - Cylinder 2 Misfire 29CF - Cylinder 3 Misfire 29D0 - Cylinder 4 Misfire 29D1 - Cylinder 5 Misfire 29D2 - Cylinder 6 Misfire Affected N54 Powered BMW models: BMW E82 135i 2007-2013 BMW E90 E91 335i 335xi 2007-2008 BMW E92 E93 335i 2007-2010 BMW E60 535i 535xi 2009-2010 BMW E89 Z4 35i 2009-2016 These only in N54 and N54T 6 cylinder turbo engines and BMW Siemens DME MSD80 Please note, the MSD80 module shown in the photo for illustration purposes and is not included.

title: X5/X6 Burger Motorsports BMW Wheel Spacers w/10 Bolts (E & F Chassis)
descriptionEn: Wider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks Available in 15mm/16mm widths only. For G chassis X3/X5/X6 use the G Chassis spacers. Does not fit the E53 X5. Burger Motorsports BMW wheel spacers are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your X5 or X6 BMW. Our wheel spacers push your wheels and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability, and handling. BMW Spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset or just making your BMW look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your BMW ensuring a perfect vibration free fit. Comes with a packet of anti-seize grease to place on the factory hub to aid in later removal. Guaranteed for the life of your vehicle. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports BMW wheel spacer is CNC machined from high-grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our BMW Wheel Spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 10 extended lug bolts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. They are hub-centric and all sizes have the factory hub on them. What width wheel spacer should I get? Spacer sizes are a matter of personal taste so only you will know what size you will like. Use a ruler to measure out from the top of the wheel/rim arch and see exactly where you want the wheel/rim to stick out to and order the appropriate size. What you see on the ruler, 15mm out, etc. will be exactly where the rim/tire will sit with the spacer size you choose. Installation: Simply remove wheel, place spacer on the hub and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download the install guide. Free Wheel Pin tool with purchase of 2 pairs of wheel spacers on the same receipt.To get the free wheel pin with a 2 pair wheel spacer purchase, add 2 pairs of wheel spacers to your cart, go to the link below and add the free wheel pin to the cart. When you hit the checkout button the items will be discounted to FREE! The photos and guidelines on this website are for reference only. Your BMW might have different results with the same size spacers due to different wheels, tire sizes, packages, and offsets. BMS X5/X6 Wheel Spacers Features and Benefits Provide Better Handling by Widening the Wheelbase Provide A Wider More Aggressive Look and Stance 100% Hub-centric and specifically designed for your BMW Guaranteed for the life of your Vehicle 10 Super Strong 10.9 Grade Extended Wheel Bolts Included Lightweight Anodized Black 7075-T6 Aluminum Special Pry Tabs on the Back for Easy Removal 1-Piece Spacer with Hub-centric Factory Lip Strong Solid Design & Appearance Available in 15mm widths Vehicle Fitment X5/X6 spacers are only available in 15mm/16mm width Attention: 16mm width must be used on xDrive and M vehicles due to a tall factory hub. • 2007-2013 E70 BMW X5 3.0si X5 4.8i X5 xDrive30i X5 xDrive35d X5 xDrive35i X5 xDrive48i (Non-M models only)• 2008-2014 E71 BMW X6 3.0si X6 4.8i X6 xDrive30i X6 xDrive35d X6 xDrive35i X6 xDrive48i (Non-M models only)• 2014-2018 F15 BMW X5 sDrive35i, X5 xDrive35d, X5 xDrive35i, X5 xDrive50i• 2015-2020 F16 BMW X6 sDrive35i, X6 xDrive35i, X6 xDrive50i• 2014-2018 F85 BMW X5M • 2016-2019 F86 BMW X6M X5/X6 E & F Chassis BMW Wheel Spacer SpecificationsCenter Bore: 74.1 mm front and rear Bolt Thread Size: M14 x 1.25Bolt Seat: Cone Seat / Concentric Bolt pattern: 5x120 Thread Pitch: 12mm x 1.5 or 12x1.5 or M12x1.5Wheel Fasteners: Extended 10.9 grade zinc coated lug boltsSpacer Material: Lightweight Anodized Black 7075-T6 Aluminum What's included:(2) Wheel spacers(10) Extended 10.9 grade lug bolts(1) Packet of anti-seize

title: JB4 Tuner for 2010-2019 Ford Taurus SHO
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 100hp and 120wtq to the wheels on a stock truck without the risks of flashing! This plug and play tuner attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag.Installation is very discrete and unlike flash remaps which are quick to install but can never be fully removed with a JB4 the vehicle is never aware it's making more than the factory boost or power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged and it's compatible with all driving modes including towing.Unlike other less advanced systems, the JB4 includes CANbus functionality allowing it to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU for real-time tuning. The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and much more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data no less incorporate it real time into their tuning algorithms. CANbus allows the JB4 to provide huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery.The JB4 includes multiple maps, including those for 91 octane, 93 octane, factory tuning, VALET mode, E85 mixtures, and unleaded race gas. In addition, it offers boost by gear settings to improve launches, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more. The JB4 is made in the USA and includes a 5-year warranty. For more information, join the discussion here: Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 100hp and 120wtq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment • 2010-2019 Ford Taurus SHO What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU.

title: BMS Oil Catch Can for G Chassis Gen 2 B58 BMW M240 M340 M440
sku: G20 B58 OCC w/B58 Intake Muffler Delete
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your Gen 2 B58 BMW Air Intake System! It's no secret that B58 BMW turbo motors can suffer from oil control problems, causing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves and the VANOS system, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels, the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived: the Burger Motorsports oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market, they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor, preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small or runs that are too long, preventing proper PCV ventilation and causing internal motor and ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or overly restrictive internal baffle systems. Others bypass the PCV system altogether, venting crankcase gas and odor to the atmosphere. Most are simply repackaged oil catch cans from smaller, lower power motors shoehorned into the turbo BMW engine bay. To solve these problems, Burger Motorsports designed this oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the Gen 2 B58 turbo BMW application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses exceed OEM PCV piping diameter, and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can, ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory fully closed-loop PCV operation, preventing any PCV vapor from leaking to atmosphere. Mounting locations are selected to minimize line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Installation takes around 20 minutes, includes all required hardware, and is 100% reversible. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil during oil changes. New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or sold separately as an upgrade here. Requires either the BMS B58 G20 Billet Intake or the BMS B58 BMW M240i M340i Competition Cold Air Intake to fit. If you would like to retain the factory intake, you can use the BMS G20 B58 intake muffler delete to create the space needed for the can. Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency• Promotes Engine Longevity• Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• Free Flow Solid No-Restriction Design• Retains Factory Fully Closed-Loop PCV Operation• Large Intake/Outlet with No Tapering Down• Anodized Black Aluminum Construction• Made in the USA & Guaranteed for Life• Simply unscrew the base every 3–6 months to empty or use the 1/8" NPT drain plug• High flow design eliminates crankcase pressure caused by restrictive systems• Large 16mm+ inlet and outlet exceed OEM PCV sizing• Precision CNC machined from solid blocks of high-grade aluminum Vehicle Fitment (Gen 2 B58) BMW 2 Series• 2022+ G42 M240i and M240i xDrive BMW 3 Series• 2019–2024 G20/G21 M340i and M340i xDrive BMW 4 Series• 2021–2024 G22/G23/G26 M440i and M440i xDrive (including Gran Coupé) Catch Can Dimensions & Specs Can dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) tallCan diameter: 2.5" (63.7mm)Lid length (back to nozzle end): 4" (101mm)Nozzle outer diameter: 0.75" (19.2mm)Nozzle inner diameter: 0.669" (17mm)Fluid capacity: Up to 5.5 fl oz (162.6 mL) What's Included • (1) BMS G Chassis B58 BMW Oil Catch Can• (1) Billet B58 bracket• (1) Billet B58 90º 19mm nipple to PCV bracket adapter• (1) Heavy-duty formed silicone inlet hose• (1) Heavy-duty straight 3" silicone outlet hose• (2) Bracket-to-can screws (M5 x 0.8 x 12mm internal hex)Cars with factory intake:• (1) BMS B58 intake muffler delete B58 Oil Catch Can for G Chassis M240 M340 M440 Install Video 2022 G22 BMW M440i shown with our B58 Competition Intake and B58 Billet Strut Braces. Optional: B58 BMW/Supra BMS Oil Catch Can Oil Filler Cap Connection Kit Take your B58 BMW or Supra’s crankcase ventilation performance to the next level with the BMS Oil Filler Cap Connection Kit, the missing link for ultimate catch can efficiency. This precision-machined billet cap replaces the factory oil filler cap and creates a second dedicated exit point for dirty PCV gases. That means both the crankcase vent and the valve cover breather can now be routed into your oil catch can. Twice the inputs means twice the oil vapor capture, keeping harmful oil mist out of your intake tract. Cleaner air, cleaner intake valves, and a more efficient PCV system with a simple upgrade that delivers major payoffs. New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or sold separately as an upgrade here. The main advantage of a transparent can is that you can easily see the contents inside. This allows for quick checks on oil levels, contamination, and sludge buildup without needing to open the can. ⚠️ ATTENTION: The optional transparent can base is not suitable for use in regions where temperatures frequently drop to 32°F (0°C) or below.

The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains starting at 45hp and 65tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Audi• 2012-2016 Audi B8 & 8.5 S4/5 and SQ5 • 2012-2015 Audi Q5 3.0TFSI 272hp • 2012-2015 Audi A6 C6/7 3.0TFSI 2012 - 2015• 2016-2018/9 Audi A6• 2016-2018/9 Audi A7 2016-2018/9• 2016-2018/9 Audi A8/A8L 2016-2019• 2016-2018/9 Audi Q7Porsche • 2012-2015 Porsche 970 Panamera S E Hybrid For any VW/Audi sales, support, and technical questions please contact George at george@burgertuning.com George is the only BMS representative familiar with the VW/Audi platform. What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. Audi JB4 Mobile demo video
