title: JB4 Tuner for 2019+ Ford Ranger
sku: Ford V3 system + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 50whp and 70wtq on a factory vehicle without the risks of flashing! The JB4 is a plug and play tuner that attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag.Installation is very discrete and unlike flash remaps which are quick to install but can never be fully removed with a JB4 the vehicle is never aware it's making more than the factory boost or power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged and it's compatible with all driving modes including towing.Unlike other less advanced systems the JB4 includes CANbus functionality allowing it to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU for real-time tuning. The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and much more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data no less incorporate it real-time into their tuning algorithms. The JB4 provides huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery. The JB4 includes multiple maps including those for 91 octane, 93 octane, factory tuning, E85 mixtures, and unleaded race gas. In addition, it offers boost by gear settings to improve launches, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more. The JB4 is made in the USA and includes a 5 year warranty.JB4 Map Guide:Map0: Fully disable JB4Map1: +3.5psi peak over stock, default map, 91+ octaneMap2: +3.5psi peak, less top end taper, more aggressive version of map1.Map3: +4psi peak, suggested for 93+ octane and/or modified trucksMap4: +6psi peak, suggested for 30% E85 mixturesMap5: +7psi peak, suggested for 30% E85 mixtures and/or unleaded race fuelMap6: Custom tuning map user adjustable Map7: WMI (water/meth injection) progressive tuning Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. title: Fuel-It! Charge Pipe Injector (CPI) Installation Accessories
descriptionEn: Additional accessories for your CPI (Charge Pipe Injection) kit. With our universal design, the possible applications are limitless! As such if you need additional accessories this is the place to find them. Fuel injectors click here. Complete starter kit click here. Most of these options will be self-explanatory. All of our injector connections and fuel lines are -4an flare fittings so we have a variety of accessories to meet your needs. Custom injector harnesses are available to meet your needs. If you select one, we will contact you for your specifications. Please allow 1 week for custom harnesses to ship. Q: What is CPI? A: Charge Pipe Injection (CPI) is our new proprietary system that allows you to add additional injectors to your boosted application with any standard 1/8" NPT female connection in your charge pipe or intake system. It's commonly referred to as "the 5th, 7th, or 9th injector". Q: I have your port injection kit and would like to run a 7th injector in the charge pipe, what fittings do I need? A: You can use the -6an to -4an flare adapter to connect the fuel line to our rail and then run it straight to the injector. Q: I'm already running a port injection controller, how do I connect the new injector to run off that? A: The easiest way is to get the wiring harness with the PosiTaps and connect it to your existing harness, otherwise you'll need to splice it in. Q: I don't have currently have an injector controller, can I get one with a harness for my application? A: Yes, you can use one of the off the shelf controllers and harnesses if it meets your needs or order a custom harness from us. Please allow 1 week for custom harnesses to ship. Q: What fuel sources can I use? A: You have multiple options for that. You can connect to your stock fuel with our adapter if it's a 5/16" quick connect. You can connect to the fuel rail, the 1/8" gauge port on your fuel regulator, your meth pump, etc. BMS/Fuel-It! Port injection and Flex Fuel wiring guide

title: Adjustable Hobbs Switch with Wiring Harness
descriptionEn: Choose a 4psi or 15psi Hobbs switch Includes 12" wire for chassis ground and 60" trigger ground wire. What is a Hobbs switch? Hobbs switch is just a simple on-off switch that is normally off and used to trigger an accessory at a set boost point. Which one do I choose? For installing a secondary low pressure pump, if you are running a stock primary pump, we recommend choosing the 4psi. If your primary pump is upgraded, then we'd recommend the 15psi. If you're using a Hobb's switch to trigger a meth pump, we'd recommend getting the 4psi. How do I install a Hobbs switch? The Hobbs switch has two contacts that need to be connected. Connect one contact to chassis ground Connect the other contact to your ground trigger wire for the accessory. Are these adjustable? Yes, you can remove the black rubber plug at the top of the Hobbs switch and use an Allen wrench to adjust the Hobbs switch +/- approximately 3-4psi. They are very sensitive so make small adjustments or you may lock it out. Rotating the Allen screw clockwise will increase the needed boost pressure to activate it.

title: BMW E-Chassis Walbro Stage 2 Bucketless LPFP Upgrade for the N54 & N55 Motors
descriptionEn: This is a complete plug and play solution to replace your stock Low Pressure Fuel Pump (LPFP) with a new E85 certified bucketless assembly. This solution provides up to 25% more flow than our standard Stage 2 LPFP upgrade and up to 150% more flow than the stock pump. This pump will support up to 550whp running 85% ethanol and 600whp running 50% ethanol. The Stage 2 bucketless kit includes the following: A custom anodized billet fitting for the pump output and stock fuel line connection. Our custom billet aluminum anodized bracket for the pump and float assembly Two cotter pins to secure your float assembly Spare vent tube clip A new Walbro filter A new E85 compatible Walbro 450 pump (F90000274) Optional upgrade to Walbro 525 pump (F90000285) Recommended for up to 550whp on E85 and 625whp on race gas. If you still need more flow, the Stage 3 upgrades are also available and can be added to your Stage 2 bucketless pump. Recommended accessories: Lock Ring Removal Tool Compatible with the following vehicles: 1' E88 (11/2006 — 10/2013) 1' E82 (11/2006 — 10/2013) 3' E90 (02/2004 — 09/2008) 3' E90 LCI (07/2007 — 12/2011) 3' E91 (02/2004 — 08/2008) 3' E91 LCI (07/2007 — 05/2012) 3' E92 (05/2005 — 02/2010) 3' E92 LCI (11/2008 — 06/2013) 3' E93 (09/2005 — 02/2010) 3' E93 LCI (11/2008 — 10/2013) X1 E84 (04/2009 — 06/2015) NOTE: These kits include a basic filter assembly. When using this filter, running the vehicle under low fuel conditions can cause fuel starvation issues. If you do hard straight line accelerations when you have less than 1/8 tank of fuel, we would recommend running our standard Stage 2, 3, or Stage 4 pump. In addition, if you intend to use this for road course applications, you may see starvation issues when running less than a half tank and doing long high G right turns. Again for those applications, we'd recommend one of our standard pump applications.
selectedVariant: Upgrade pump to Walbro 525 (Add $75) / Add a lock ring tool

(Unlike other similar looking kits we use high quality OEM buckets and float assemblies for assembly ensuring trouble free operation long term). Fuel-It! title: BMW E-Chassis DW400 Stage 2+ Bucketless LPFP Upgrades for the N54 & N55 Motors
descriptionEn: This is a complete plug and play solution to replace your stock Low Pressure Fuel Pump (LPFP) with a new E85 certified bucketless assembly. This solution provides up to 50% more flow than our standard Stage 2 LPFP upgrade and up to 200% more flow than the stock pump. Our DW400 pumps are covered by a 3 year limited warranty! The DW400 Stage 2+ bucketless kit includes the following: A custom anodized billet fitting for the pump output and stock fuel line connection. Our custom billet aluminum anodized bracket for the pump and float assembly Two cotter pins to secure your float assembly A new E85 compatible DW400 pump Spare vent tube clip A new Bosch filter Plug and play wire harness Recommended accessories: Lock Ring Removal Tool Ethanol sensor Compatible with the following vehicles: 1' E88 (11/2006 — 10/2013) 1' E82 (11/2006 — 10/2013) 3' E90 (02/2004 — 09/2008) 3' E90 LCI (07/2007 — 12/2011) 3' E91 (02/2004 — 08/2008) 3' E91 LCI (07/2007 — 05/2012) 3' E92 (05/2005 — 02/2010) 3' E92 LCI (11/2008 — 06/2013) 3' E93 (09/2005 — 02/2010) 3' E93 LCI (11/2008 — 10/2013) X1 E84 (04/2009 — 06/2015) NOTE: These kits include a basic filter assembly. When using this filter, running the vehicle under low fuel conditions can cause fuel starvation issues. If you do hard straight line accelerations when you have less than 1/8 tank of fuel, we would recommend running our standard Stage 2, 3, or Stage 4 pump. In addition, if you intend to use this for road course applications, you may see starvation issues when running less than a half tank and doing long high G right turns. Again for those applications we'd recommend one of our standard pump applications. Upgraded pumps pull more current, so if your EKP (LPFP control module) is weak, it may overheat causing it to shut down and need to be replaced. If this is a concern for you checkout our FI-650HP fuel pump upgrade kits that retain the stock LPFP and add a secondary pump.

title: JB4 Tuner for Ford Fiesta ST 2013-2023 4 cyl Turbo
sku: Ford Fiesta JB4 (Mustang) + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 40hp and 70tq to the wheels on a stock Fiesta ST! This plug and play Ford Fiesta ST tuner plugs into easy access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. It features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 800 times per second using dedicated 10 bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance. Unlike other tuning systems the JB4 includes a fully programmable CANbus system, upgradable firmware, and data logging capability. CANbus allows the JB4 to take in to account pedal input, throttle position, gear, engine speed, air/fuel ratio, fuel trims, ignition advance, knock, and many other factors and incorporate those into the performance mapping. It can also read/delete fault codes, includes unique safety features such as keeping boost pressure low until oil and water is up to temperature to provide proper engine and turbo lucubration and drop to a low boost map if the engine starts to overheat, run lean, excessively knock, or over boost.The default JB4 map1 runs 4psi over stock peak and tuned maps including stock and valet mode can be selected on the fly using a BMS diagnostics cable or JB4 mobile smartphone adapter. Installation is very discrete and it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Includes maps for 91 octane, 93 octane, and E85 (ethanol fuel) mixtures. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes. Made in the USA. 5 year warranty. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features and Benefits • Power gains of up to 40hp and 70tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment • 2013-2017 Ford Fiesta ST 1.6 L EcoBoost l4 Turbo (Mk2)• 2018-2023 Ford Fiesta ST 1.5 L EcoBoost l3 Turbo (Mk3) What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. VIDEO

title: Toyota Supra Flex Fuel Kits for the MKV B48/B58
descriptionEn: Know your exact ethanol content in real-time with our new LED display or by using the BMS CANflex, Fuel-It! or JB4 mobile app on your smartphone or tablet. If you're running E85 or ethanol mixes in your Toyota Supra, you need this kit! This is a complete plug & play kit to install a flex fuel kit in your 2020+ Toyota Supra in about 30 minutes. (Check compatibility for your platform below) Our CANbus ECA is compatible with JB4 as well as flash only applications like MHD, BM3, and EcuTek that read the standard 0xEC flex fuel CANbus address format . We now offer 3 types of kits: Complete Kit with CANbus ECA and PnP Harness = Includes a plug and play harness compatible with stock ECU flashes, JB4, ECUteck, and MHD. *If you have a manual transmission or a BM3 tune, you must purchase the universal harness. Complete Kit with CANbus ECA and Universal Harness = Includes universal harness that works for all applications including manual cars and those running a BM3 flex fuel tune. Complete Kit with Fuel-It! Bluetooth ECA = Includes a bluetooth ECA for use with JB4 and the Fuel-It! app. *Does not include CANbus integration The complete kit with the BMS CANbus ECA includes the following: Genuine Continental® ethanol sensor BMS CANflex LED ECA for use with JB4, MHD, & BM3 Two stainless steel braided fuel lines with black nylon sheathing to protect your other engine bay components LPFP pressure sensor Plug and play harness (optional) BMW/Supra Accessory Harness for S58/B58 motors Download the free BMS CANflex app here: Download the Android CANFlex app Download the iOS CANflex app The complete kit with Fuel-It! Bluetooth ECA includes the following: Genuine Continental® ethanol sensor Two stainless steel braided fuel lines with black nylon sheathing to protect your other engine bay components Fuel-It! Bluetooth analyzer (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this kit) Plug and play harness Includes both Bluetooth App & 5v analog output for JB4 or flash tuning Download the free BMS CANflex app here: Download the Android CANFlex app Download the iOS CANflex app Features and Benefits• Monitor ethanol content live through the FREE JB4PRO or CANFlex app• Seamless JB4 integration with real-time ethanol content monitoring• Plug-and-play CAN integration with no guesswork or manual tuning• Designed for Supra owners who want more power without compromises• The cleanest way to add flex fuel capability to your B48/B58 Supra engine *Replacement fuel lines are also available separately. Wiring Guide for Universal harness Red: (originally Red/Green): 12v switched power via fuse tap or posi-tapGround: Chassis ground Brown: (originally Orange): CAN- (For front mount usually the factory yellow CANbus wire) Green: (originally Red/Blue): CAN+ (For front mount usually the factory red CANbus wire) Blue: 5V legacy output for input for input into JB4 Vehicle Fitment Toyota • 2020+ GR Supra Mk5 B58 3.0L 6 cyl.• 2020+ GR Supra Mk5 B48 2.0L 4 cyl. *Manual transmission or BM3 require universal harness. All otherscan use PNP harness. *We have also made it optional to purchase all the items ala-cart should you choose but for the kit to work, it must include the Fuel Lines, Ethanol Sensor, and Analyzer. *For the Supra JB4 platform connect the white wire to position #4 on the JB4 25 pin harness. Select the WMI setup page and enable bit 0. *Free shipping in USA on complete kits only. *If you aren't sure whether this kit fits your car, send us a picture of your engine bay with the engine cover removed to info@fuel-it.com Install Videos

title: BMS Compact Oil Catch Can Kit for 2016+ Infiniti Q50/Q60 3.0T
sku: ***FULL KIT*** Compact OCC 3/8" Hose barbs, hose, clamps, screws
descriptionEn: Keep oil out of your Infiniti Q50/Q60 3.0T air intake system! It's no secret that Infiniti Q50 and Q60 turbo motors suffer from oil control problems causing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The BMS compact Q50/Q60 oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor into the atmosphere. To solve these problems BMS designed their oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbo Infiniti Q50/Q60 3.0 application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses match the OEM PCV piping in diameter to ensure flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can system ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory's fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking into the atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. Features & Benefits • Increases air intake efficiency • Promotes engine longevity • Non-clogging air/oil separation double baffle• Free flow solid no restriction design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large intake/outlet. No tapering down.• Stealth mounting on the side of the Motor• Anodized black billet aluminum• Made in the USA & guaranteed for Life• Simply unscrew base every 2500 miles to empty• No service needed air/oil separation double baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs • Large inlet and outlet • Precision CNC Machined Vehicle Fitment • 2016+ Infiniti Q50/Q60 3.0L Turbo Luxe, Sport, Silver Sport, Red Sport What's Included (1) BMS billet aluminum compact double baffle oil catch can with 3/8" billet hose barbs(1) BMS black metal bracket(1) Heavy-duty 36" length of 3/8" hose(1) Heavy-duty 42" length of 3/8" hose(2) 12-20mm hose clamps (engine connections)(3) Stainless steel socket head 10-32 x 3/8" mounting screws Oil caught by the BMS oil catch can in just 2500 miles.

title: BMS Dual Oil Catch Can System for Ford F150/Raptor
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your Ford F150/Raptor Air Intake System! It's no secret that Ford F150/Raptor turbo motors suffer from oil control problems causing the oil to blow through and coat the intake manifold and gunking up the throttle body and intake valves, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The BMS dual oil catch cans. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor to the atmosphere. To solve these problems BMS designed our oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbocharged Ford application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The cans themselves are guaranteed for the life of the vehicle and contain a triple b. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking to atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, make checking and emptying the cans easy, and look good at the same time. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. Made in the USA. New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here. Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency• Promotes Engine Longevity• Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation• Large Intake/Outlet No Tapering Down• Anodized Black Aluminum• Mounts to the firewall above the engine• Made in the USA & Guaranteed for Life • Simply unscrew the base every 3-6 months to empty or use the 1/8th NPT drain plug.• Non-Clogging, No Service Needed Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs • Large 16mm+ inlet and outlet exceeds OEM PCV sizing• Precision CNC Machined from Solid Blocks of High-Grade Aluminum Vehicle Fitment Ford F150 2015+ Ford F150, 3.5L V6 EcoBoost 2015+ Ford F150, 2.7L V6 EcoBoost Ford Raptor 2017-2020 Gen 2 Ford Raptor 3.5L V6 EcoBoost Catch can dimensions and specs Can dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) TallCan diameter: 2.5" (63.7mm)Lid length: Back to nozzle end: 4" (101mm)Nozzle outer diameter: .75" (19.2mm) Nozzle inner diameter: 0.669" (17mm) What's Included in the full kit. (Both cans)(2) Burger Motorsports Triple Baffle Oil Catch Cans(2) Left and Right Billet Brackets, (2) lock bolts, and (8) hex screws(3) 90º billet fittings with circlips(1) Straight fitting with circlip(3) Heavy-duty 21" hoses (1) Heavy-duty 23" hose(8) Hose clamps

title: Kia/Hyundai/Genesis JB4 PNP Fuel Wire Adapter
descriptionEn: Kia/Hyundai/Genesis JB4 PNP Fuel Wire Adapter This optional plug and play quick install adapter allows you to install a posi-tap for fuel control tuning without piercing the factory o2 sensor wiring providing a completely reversible connection. For 3.3L models the signal wire is red for easy identification. For 2L models the signal wire is the black wire on position #2. To find position #2 just look at the small numbers on the adapter itself. For 1.6L models it can be either depending on the model year and ECU software. *** NOTE FITS JB4 Kia/Hyundai V1 applications only -- V2-V4 do not use an o2 sensor connection *** Vehicle Fitment • Kia Stinger, Genesis G70, and many other Kia/Hyundai ModelsNotes6 cylinder models require two adapters.4 cylinder models require a single adapter.For 3.3T and 1.6T models tap the red signal wire. For 2.0T models tap the black wire in position #2 on the adapter.

title: BMS 2 Gallon Stealth Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Tank for F10 5 Series BMW
descriptionEn: BMS 2 Gallon Stealth Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) for F10 5 Series BMW hides under the trunk deck This completely custom design fits cleanly within the existing trunk cavity in your F10 BMW for the ultimate easy to install no compromise kit. The Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) pump mounts directly to the bottom of the tank allowing for a quick and clean installation. The bottom of the tank includes a sump and baffle allowing for consistent performance even as the tank drains. Includes 2-way vented black plastic cap and a compression pump feed fitting. Optional upgraded blue billet water/methanol injection (WMI) cap with 1-way check valve available here. The nozzles are determined by the intended power and how many bungs your charge pipe has. The nozzles are 1/8” NPT and screw in to bungs included on most aftermarket chargepipes. Our BMS "super atomizing" nozzles are well known for their great atomization and flow characteristics. The nozzle number represents the approximate gallons per hour of fluid when at full flow. Generally speaking running two smaller nozzles is preferred to one larger nozzle for an equal flow to improve fluid atomization and distribution. Below are some general nozzle suggestions but feel free to email us for nozzle advice if your situation is unique. Features & Benefits • Pump mounts directly to the tank• Works with all DDP 5800 pumps• Super low profile design• Available in clear for visually checking fluid levels• Bolts to an existing point in the vehicle• Includes 2-way vented black plastic cap• Optional upgraded blue billet cap with 1-way check valve available here.• Includes a compression pump feed fitting• Made in USATank dimensions: L 16.5" x W 6.5" x H 8.25" Vehicle Fitment• 2011-2016 F10 BMW 5 Series sedan all models including M5 This high quality custom billet water/methanol injection (WMI) cap includes an integrated check valve to let air in and prevent dangerous WMI vapor/fumes from getting out! Made in USA. Available here.

title: MHD Wireless OBDII Wifi Flash Adapter
descriptionEn: Load flash maps to your BMW/Supra or code your car with hidden features wirelessly MHD Tuning is introducing the latest and greatest MHD WIFI adapter: The MHD UNI WIFI. It’s the ultimate wireless connection method for tuning and coding your BMW & Supra MK5 with the market-leading mobile apps! The MHD UNI WiFi Adapter is the only adapter that supports both the protocols needed for modern BMWs and Supra MK5s: ENET for F/G series BMW and Supra. CAN for E series and required for xHP flashing on G-Series/Supra ZF 8HP transmissions. Highest Quality and Flashing Speed: Our MHD UNI WIFI adapter is fully designed in-house by our engineers, built with the highest quality parts and a modern chipset. It achieves perfect reliability and is the quickest adapter currently offered on the market - faster than previous generation adapters (black, orange, blue, pink). Flash times improved by 5% compared to the black MHD WIFI adapter on ENET cars (F/G Series) and 30% on KDCAN cars (E-Series). The connection stability was also improved, leading to even quicker flash times. App Support: Our new MHD UNI WIFI adapter is supported by the leading BMW apps such as: • MHD (all versions)• Bootmod3• BimmerCode / BimmerLink• xHP and xDelete• MG-Flasher• BimmerCode• BimmerLink• Bimmerlight• BimmerGeeks Pro-tooland other tuning apps This new generation MHD WIFI adapter also offers upgradable firmware, so more features, functions, and support for other platforms can be added later. This listing is for the MHD wireless adapter only. No MHD Flash License and/or Map Pack are provided when purchasing this. You must separately purchase the xHP license and/or Map-Pack here: MHDtuning.comMHD App is available on Apple iOS & Android App Store. Vehicle Fitment BMW • E Chassis BMW• F Chassis BMW• G Chassis BMW Toyota • 2020-2026 GR Supra Mk5 3.0L 6 cyl. This flash adapter is supported for use with the BimmerCode phone app for BMW, MINI, and 2020+ Toyota GR Supra. BimmerCode allows you to code your car yourself and customize it and unlock hidden features. See BimmerCode in the mobile app store for more info and features. title: 2020-2026 Toyota GR Supra Mk5 Magnetic Spark Plug Socket
descriptionEn: Change Your 2020+ Supra Spark Plugs Like a Pro! Everyone knows spark plug changes are suggested every 20k miles or so for tuned vehicles. Everyone also knows turbo 2020+ GR Supra engines require a special thin-walled socket to remove/reinstall the spark plugs. But what you might not know is the BMS socket fits like a glove and is only one third the price of an OEM socket! It also includes an integrated rare earth magnet to secure the plugs while raising and lowering them in the long bores. Ours will never wear out like spark plug sockets with rubber or metal tensioners to hold the spark plug in place. The RIGHT tool for the job makes spark plug replacement a snap! Beware of cheap replica magnetic spark plugs sockets with weak magnets that will not easily recover the plug from the long bore. The plug falls out of them before you can get it out. Vehicle Fitment • 2020-2026 Mk5 Toyota GR Supra BMS Spark Plug Socket Features & Benefits OEM quality perfect fit thin wall socket Strong magnetic hold never deteriorates or weakens Fits a standard 3/8" drive socket wrench High quality at a super low price Designed and manufactured for your 2020+ Toyota Supra Excellent addition to your toolbox Spark Plug Socket Specs 12 point, 14mm Thin walled deep specialty socket Strong magnetic hold 3/8" drive Recommended spark plug torque 17 lb-ft or 23nm.

title: JB4 Tuner for 2018+ Jeep Wrangler & Cherokee 2.0L Turbo
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 40hp to the wheels on a stock Jeep! The JB4 is the most advanced and highly featured tuning system for your 2018+ Jeep Wrangler/ Cherokee 2.0L 4-cylinder Turbo. Power gains are up to 40hp to the wheels (55hp crank) on a completely stock car on pump gas. Gains with bolt-on parts, higher octane, and larger turbos are even higher. Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in!The JB4 features a simple plug and play installation harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other tune. Including on-the-fly in dash map switching between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, progressive water/methanol support, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, and much more. The latest JB4 firmware, map guide, support, and discussion are here. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 40hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle • Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Jeep• 2018+ Jeep Wrangler 2.0L• 2018+ Jeep Cherokee 2.0L What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and it's DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. title: 2020-2026 Toyota GR Supra Mk5 Wheel Spacers w/10 Bolts
descriptionEn: Click Here to check out our new Lightweight Racing Wheel Spacers for Supra! Simple, bolt-on handling and looks for your GR Supra Wider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks Burger Motorsports wheel spacers are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your 2020-2026 Toyota GR Supra. Our wheel spacers push your rims and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability, and handling. Spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset, or just making your 2020+ Toyota Supra look awesome. Our spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your Supra ensuring a perfect vibration-free fit. Comes with a packet of anti-seize grease to place on the factory hub to aid in later removal. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports wheel spacer is CNC machined from high-grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our 2020+ Toyota Supra Wheel Spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 10 extended lug bolts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. They are hub-centric and all sizes have the factory hub on them. Hub-Centric: This means our spacers center bore matches your factory MK5 Toyota Supra hub and the factory-like hub on the Burger Motorsports spacers match the center bore in your wheel for a vibration-free fit. What width wheel spacer should I get?Most 2020-2026 Toyota Supra vehicles with factory wheels and tire sizes take 10mm to 13mm in the front and 13mm or 15mm spacers in the rear. The Supra shown below has 13mm front and 15mm rear. Free Wheel Pin tool with purchase of 2 pairs of wheel spacers on the same receipt.To get the FREE wheel pin with a 2 pair wheel spacer purchase, add 2 pairs of wheel spacers to your cart, go to the link below and add the FREE wheel pin to the cart. When you hit the checkout button the items will be discounted to FREE! Click Here for the BMW Wheel Pin Tool ($10.00 Value)The photos and guidelines on this website are for reference only. Your 2020-2026 Toyota Supra might have different results with the same size spacers due to different wheels, winter and summer tires, tire sizes, packages, and offsets. Installation: Simply remove the wheel, rub a little of the supplied anti-seize grease on the factory hub, place the spacer on the hub, and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download the install guide. descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 100HP to the wheel on a stock Supra without the risks of flashing! The JB4 tuner for the Toyota GR Supra Mk5 is the most advanced plug and play tuning system available for the turbocharged Supra platform. Power gains of up to 80 horsepower to the wheels (100hp crank) are possible on a completely stock vehicle running pump gas with the B58 engine. Vehicles equipped with bolt-on upgrades, higher octane fuel, E85 mixtures, or upgraded turbochargers can achieve even greater gains. Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! No ECU flash required and fully compatible with locked 🔒 ECUs. The JB4 features a simple plug and play installation harness allowing fast installation and removal while delivering advanced tuning capabilities unavailable with other tuning systems. Features include map switching between stock and performance maps, optional boost gauge displays, boost-by-gear control for improved traction, progressive water/methanol integration, built-in data logging, fault code reading and clearing, optional electronic wastegate control, exhaust flapper control, and many additional advanced tuning features. Unlike ECU flash tunes, the JB4 requires no staged upgrades or supporting modifications. Install it as your first upgrade and immediately experience stronger acceleration, faster turbo response, and smoother power delivery. Note: In-dash commands have not yet been developed for the Supra JB4. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features and Benefits • Power gains of up to 100 horsepower to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Toyota GR Supra Mk5 2020-2026 Toyota GR Supra Mk5 B58 3.0L inline-6 2020-2026 Toyota GR Supra Mk5 B48 2.0L turbo 4-cylinder What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug and play performance tuner designed for turbocharged vehicles. It installs between the engine sensors and the factory ECU allowing it to safely manipulate boost pressure, ignition timing, and fueling to deliver substantial horsepower gains while retaining factory safety systems. The JB4 separates itself from other tuning systems with advanced CANbus integration, smartphone connectivity, ethanol compatibility, and continuous firmware updates that expand features and performance over time. The JB4 system is not VIN locked and can easily be transferred to another vehicle or resold later. The JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged tuning for over a decade and is used in more than 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes. The JB4 actively adjusts boost pressure, ignition timing, air-fuel ratios, and fuel trims using real-time engine data through its CANbus connection. This allows the JB4 to deliver performance gains similar to ECU flash tuning without permanently modifying the ECU. 2022 Toyota Supra shown with BMS Billet Strut Braces, BMS Intake, and BMS B58 Billet Oil Filter Cap. Dyno Results 2020+ Toyota Supra Mk5 Dyno Results Supra JB4 Installation Video The JB4 is simply the best plug and play tuner for your Toyota GR Supra Mk5.

title: JB4 Performance Tuner for Infiniti Q50, Q60, & QX30 2.0T
sku: Q50 JB4 Inline 4 2.0L Turbo  + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 40hp and 40tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle. This plug and play tuner attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory DME tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. The Stage 1 manipulates the ECU boost control signals allowing it to modify boost levels but does not manipulate the ECU manifold boost reference, allowing your ECU to properly map timing and fueling for the higher boost levels. The end result is something that runs as smoothly as stock only with higher boost targets under heavy throttle. Stage1 features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 800 times per second using dedicated 10 bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance.Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in!Boost added is user adjustable with the optional BMS data cable with the default boost gain set to 3.0 psi over stock. The Stage1 can be used by itself or in conjunction with a flash tuning map for adding extra boost where desired. Installation takes under a minute and it removes just as quickly without a trace when needed. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Power gains with the Red Sport model which runs more boost from the factory are in the 30-50hp range depending on fuel quality, while the Silver Sport which is heavily detuned from the factory can gain up to 60hp-100hp depending on the fuel quality. The higher the octane the higher you can raise the boost pressure over stock and the larger the power gain. For Red Sport we suggest a maximum of 3psi over stock on pump fuels and 4psi over stock on E85 mixtures or unleaded race gas, while Silver Sport can run up to 5psi over stock on good 93 octane fuel, and up to 7psi over stock on E85 mixtures or unleaded race gas. For those using the Stage1 in conjunction with an aftermarket flash map normally you'll want to run 1-2psi over the flashed boost target depending on your fuel quality. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 40hp and 40tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. JB4 Vehicle Fitment • 2016+ Infiniti Q50 2.0L Turbo Pure• 2016-2022 Infiniti Q60 2.0L Turbo Pure• 2016-2019 Infiniti QX30 2.0L Turbo JB4 Map Guide Map 0: Disables tunerMap 1: Up to 4psi over stock peak, suitable for all 91 octane+ fuelsMap 2: Up to 5psi over stock peak, suggested for 93octane+Map 3: User definable fixed boost profile map (boost safety used to determine fixed boost over stock)Map 4: Stock performance with CANbus active for loggingMap 5: 6.5psi over stock peak, holding more power to redline, suggested for E30+ or unleaded race gas mixturesMap 6: User definable map, boost over stock entered on user adjustment pageMap 7: 7psi over stock peak, suitable for unleaded race gasMap 8: Coming soon - Water/Meth integration progressive map What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug and play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN locked to your vehicle and can quickly removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. DYNOS LOGS Map 0 logJB4 log

title: BMS Stage 1 Performance Tuner for Infiniti Q50/Q60 3.0T VR30 V6
descriptionEn: This plug and play tuner attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory DME tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. The Stage 1 manipulates the ECU boost control signals allowing it to modify boost levels but does not manipulate the ECU manifold boost reference, allowing your ECU to properly map timing and fueling for the higher boost levels. The end result is something that runs as smoothly as stock only with higher boost targets under heavy throttle. Stage1 features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 800 times per second using dedicated 10 bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance. Boost added is user adjustable with the optional BMS data cable with the default boost gain set to 3.0 psi over stock. The Stage1 can be used by itself or in conjunction with a flash tuning map for adding extra boost where desired. Installation takes under a minute and it removes just as quickly without a trace when needed. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Power gains with the Red Sport model which runs more boost from the factory are in the 30-50hp range depending on fuel quality, while the Silver Sport which is heavily detuned from the factory can gain up to 60hp-100hp depending on the fuel quality. The higher the octane the higher you can raise the boost pressure over stock and the larger the power gain. For Red Sport we suggest a maximum of 3psi over stock on pump fuels and 4psi over stock on E85 mixtures or unleaded race gas, while Silver Sport can run up to 5psi over stock on good 93 octane fuel, and up to 7psi over stock on E85 mixtures or unleaded race gas. For those using the Stage1 in conjunction with an aftermarket flash map normally, you'll want to run 1-2psi over the flashed boost target depending on your fuel quality. JB4 is CARB Approved Under Executive Order (EO) No.D-744-6 for all 2016+ Infiniti Q50/Q60 3.0L Turbo Luxe, Sport, Silver Sport, Red Sport Join the discussion here: http://www.jb4tech.com/forums/showthread.php?t=46774 FEATURES & BENEFITS • Power gains of up to 60hp and 100tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Quick Plug & Play Installation• CANbus integration offering unrivaled tuning features and performance • Runs as smoothly as stock, this is how your engine should have come from the factory • Compatible with all driving modes • Fuel economy unchanged during normal driving• Compatible with JB4 Mobile for smartphone logging, tuning changes, and adjustment • Ethanol (E85) compatible tuning maps• Able to read/delete fault codes • Not VIN locked, can be removed without a trace and resold down the road • Made in the USA • 5 year warranty STAGE 1 Vehicle Fitment • 2016+ Q50 3.0L VR30 V6 twin-turbo Luxe, Sport, Silver Sport, Red Sport• 2016-2022 Q60 3.0L VR30 V6 twin-turbo Luxe, Sport, Silver Sport, Red Sport 400, Sensory DYNO RESULTS Silver Sport, 93 octane Red Sport, 93 octane Red Sport, 30% E85 Mixture Silver Sport, 30% E85 Mixture

title: BMW CHARGE PIPE INJECTION (CPI) KIT for the Gen 1 B58 Motor
descriptionEn: Introducing our new BMW B58 Gen 1 specific charge pipe injector (CPI) kit Advancements of B58 flash tuning and JB4 back-end flash maps have removed the software fuel limits but created a new limiting factor, high fuel pressure pump volume. With higher boost targets and E85 fuel mixtures, the high-pressure pump is not able to keep up with demand resulting in fuel pressure drops that trigger engine misfires, stuttering, and limit your overall performance. The Fuel-It! B58 CPI kit addresses this limitation by adding an extra 7th fuel injector in the charge pipe to supplement fuel volume. Connected to the low fuel pressure system using high-quality plug and play AN lines and included fittings it allows fuel to be injected into the engine directly raising the overall fueling limit. Includes a CNC machined coupler for an easy install that is compatible with the factory charge pipe. For those equipped with a JB4 the FSB WMI controller is used and for those running flash only the stand alone port injection controller is needed. Both are fully plug and play solutions. The basic kit includes • One 950cc injector with 1/8" NPT (meth bung) mount • Our exclusive Cam-Loc 5/16" fuel line adapter • Billet adapter with 1/8" NPT Bungs • One -4AN (1/4") fuel line -Injector harness • Installation Tool • Accessories • Hose Clamps • Couplers Questions and Answers Q: Does this kit fit other applications? A: This kit is specifically designed for those cars equipped with the B58 motor, if you have a different application, check out our basic starter kit that can be configured for your specific application. https://www.fuel-it.com/charge-pipe-injection-cpi-starter-kit/ Q: What is CPI? A: Charge Pipe Injection (CPI) is our new proprietary system that allows you to add an additional to your boosted application with any standard 1/8" NPT female connection in your charge pipe or intake system. Q: Is it expandable? A: Yes, we have two types of injector bodies. The first has one input that can be run by itself or we have an injector body with two connections so you can daisy chain in additional injector fed from the same fuel source. For those looking to run more than one injector, we recommend staggering the injectors and not running them directly as opposed to this application. Q: How is it controlled? A: You must use a port injection controller such as the BMS port injection controller, BMS FSB, or a stand alone (flash only) port injection controller. Q: Can I use this without a secondary injector controller? A: No, this is a PWM controlled injector that must be programmed. Q: What kind of fuel can I run? A: These kits are compatible with methanol, ethanol, E85, race gas, and pump gas. Q: Where do I connect to the fuel source? A: This kit includes our stock fuel line adapter for the fuel source.

title: N54 Vacuum Side Oil Catch Can Kit
sku: Vacuum Kit W/ OCC and BOV Adapter w/335 bracket
descriptionEn: The BMS vacuum side N54 OCC works in conjunction with our world-famous boost side N54 oil catch can to prevent engine oil and PCV gunk from coating your intake valves and hurting engine efficiency under engine vacuum operation. Our boost side OCC separates oil traveling through the PCV while the engine is operating under boost pressure (e.g. heavy throttle) and our vacuum side OCC separates oil traveling through the PCV while the engine is operating under vacuum (idle and low throttle). When used together they provide the ultimate protection keeping oil from coating your intake ports and valves during all phases of engine operation!Our unique PCV adapter design does not require you to permanently cap/plug your PCV holes! Includes a high-performance check valve that attaches directly to the vacuum source eliminating boost leaks within the system and also includes quick connect fittings and 3/8” hose for quick, easy, and clean installation. The full kit includes a BMS double baffle OCC which mounts on the strut brace right next to your BMS boost side OCC for a clean look and easy service. The full kit also includes our BOV adapter providing an extra 1/8" NPT vacuum port source. Note a BOV is not required to run this kit. This kit eliminates the need for a separate RB PCV or BMS PCV. Vehicle Fitment BMW 1 Series 2008-2010 E82 Coupe 135i 2008-2010 E88 Convertible 135i 2011 E82 1M BMW 3 Series 2006-2010 E90 Sedan 335i/335ix 2006-2010 E91 Touring 335i/335ix 2006-2010 E92 Coupe 335i/335ix 2007-2010 E93 Convertible 335i/335ix 2011-2013 E92 335is equipped with N54 motor. For 2011+ 335i with N55 motor use our BMW N55 E chassis OCC. BMW 5 Series 2008-2010 E60 Sedan 535i/535ix 2008-2010 E61 Touring 535i/535ix Full kit is shown above. New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here.The main advantage of a transparent can is that you can easily see the contents inside. This allows for quick checks on oil levels, contamination, and sludge buildup without needing to open the can. ⚠️ ATTENTION: This product may not be suitable for use in regions where temperatures frequently drop to 32°F (0°C) or below.

title: BMS Kia Stinger/Genesis G70 3.3L Zero Maintenance Oil Catch Can
descriptionEn: Keep oil out of your 3.3L intake manifold!1, The BMS Kia Stinger/Genesis G70 Zero Maintenance Oil Catch Can (OCC) keeps oil where it belongs preventing it from being sucked through the PCV system and coating your intake manifold, cylinder head, and valves. In addition to the long term damage and maintenance headaches crankcase oil can cause over time it also reduces engine efficiency and lowers effective octane sapping performance. This unique easy to install solution combines the effectiveness of an OCC (oil catch can) with the convenience of an air/oil separator. Oil is separated from engine vapor within the OCC where it gravity drains right back into the crankcase providing a truly install and forget it oil catch can solution. Never needs to be emptied or serviced! The system is CNC machined for precision performance and fully sealed to retain full factory emissions performance. Installation takes only minutes, is fully reversible, and includes all required hardware. Made in the USA. Note the Stinger/Genesis 3.3L has two separate PCV paths, a vacuum side, and a boost side. The BMS Kia Stinger OCC is for the vacuum side which we've found contributes ~95% of the manifold PCV oil contamination. With the Stinger, we have not found any significant benefit to adding a separator to the boost side (driver side) system and suggest leaving it factory. Vehicle Fitment • 2018-2023 KIA Stinger GT, GT1, GT2 3.3L V6• 2018+ Genesis G70 3.3L V6Does not fit 2.0L 4 cylinder models. Features & Benefits • Increases Engine Efficiency • Improves Engine Longevity • Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Double Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large Intake/Outlet No Tapering Down• Anodized Black Aluminum• Made in USA & Guaranteed for Life• No Service Needed • High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs • Precision CNC Machined

title: JB4 Tuner for Acura
descriptionEn: Gain up to 80whp / 100wtq on 3.0L and 50whp / 60wtq on 2.0L Turbo Acura Engines The JB4 Acura tuner is a powerful plug & play performance tuning system designed for modern turbocharged Acura engines including the Integra Type S, TLX Type S, TLX 2.0T, MDX Type S, and RDX 2.0T. The JB4 connects to two easy-to-access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU to safely remap boost, timing, and fueling for significant horsepower gains and reduced turbo lag. No ECU flash required and fully compatible with locked 🔒 ECUs. Installation is extremely discrete and unlike traditional ECU flash tuning the JB4 can be removed quickly without leaving a trace. Your vehicle’s factory ECU never detects the additional boost or power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving remains unchanged and the JB4 is compatible with all factory driving modes. The JB4 includes a plug & play OBDII CANbus connection allowing it to read critical engine data directly from the ECU in real time including pedal position, throttle position, ignition timing, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, and more. Other tuners without CANbus integration cannot monitor or adjust tuning based on this critical engine data. Using this advanced data input the JB4 Acura performance tuner delivers huge power gains with smooth and reliable power delivery. The JB4 also includes multiple performance maps, smoother partial throttle tuning, additional engine safety systems such as lean protection and overboost protection, advanced logging capability, boost by gear control for improved traction, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and ongoing improvements through free firmware updates. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4 Add the optional JB4 PRO Bluetooth adapter to connect the JB4 tuner to your iOS or Android smartphone. The JB4PRO mobile app allows you to monitor engine data, change performance maps, record data logs, and update firmware as new features and more powerful maps are released. The JB4PRO app provides a clean user interface with built-in help menus and advanced data logging tools that can estimate performance and help identify tuning issues. For more information about the JB4PRO smartphone tuning app click here. The JB4 is a plug & play performance tuner for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 connects between engine sensors and the vehicle’s ECU allowing it to safely manipulate boost, fuel delivery, and ignition timing for significant power gains. Unlike basic tuning devices, the JB4 integrates with CANbus, supports advanced engine safety monitoring, smartphone connectivity, ethanol tuning, and continuous firmware updates that add features and performance improvements over time. The JB4 system is not VIN locked and can be removed and transferred to another vehicle or resold later. The JB4 has been the industry leader in plug & play turbocharged tuning for more than a decade and is used by enthusiasts in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes. The JB4 actively adjusts boost, ignition timing, air fuel ratios, and fuel trims using real-time engine data through its CANbus connection. This allows the JB4 to deliver performance gains similar to ECU flash tuning while maintaining factory safety systems and without permanently modifying the ECU. Acura 1.5L and 2.0L Install Guide Acura 3.0L Install Guide 2021 Acura TLX Type S – ~93 octane – JB4 Map2 Dyno Results

descriptionEn: If you're running E85 or ethanol mixes in your S55 BMW, you need this kit! Know your exact ethanol content in real-time via the Fuel-It! or JB4 app on your smartphone or tablet. This is a complete plug and play kit to install a Bluetooth ethanol sensor in your S55 F Chassis BMW. (Check compatibility for your platform below) This kit replaces the stock fuel lines from the fuel tank to the engine bay with an upgrade -6an E85 compatible fuel line and adds an ethanol sensor and Bluetooth analyzer to monitor your ethanol content. S55 BMW ApplicationsBMW M2 • 2018+ M2 Competition (S55 Engine)BMW M3 • 2015-2019 F80 M3BMW M4• 2015+ F82 F83 M4, M4 GTS Includes both Bluetooth App & 5v analog output for JB4 or flash tuning Bluetooth (iPhone or Android app must be downloaded to use this feature) If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here For your fuel line upgrade, choose the option that supports your current configuration. HPFP to the fuel tank: (Stock) This upgrade replaces both stock fuel lines with one upgraded continuous fuel line from the fuel tank to the HPFP and adds the ethanol sensor. Port Injection to the fuel tank: If you are running our port injection kit, this upgrade replaces the stock fuel lines from the tank to the engine bay, integrates the ethanol sensor and then utilizes a Y adapter to supply the HPFP and PI with fuel. Our custom fittings remove those tee's and extra fittings for a cleaner high flow setup. Non-Fuel-It! port injection to fuel tank: Choose this option if you are running a port injection kit that we did not manufacture. This kit includes a longer 18" feedline from the Y to the port injection rail. You then cut the feed line to the length you need and install the included -6an female fitting or -6an female elbow to make the connection to your port injection rail. All of our kits utilize our custom billet aluminum fittings to integrate with the stock fittings so no modifications are needed. *For the BMW F-series JB4 platform connect the white wire to position #16 on the JB4 25 pin harness. title: BMW Bluetooth/CANflex Flex Fuel Kits for the F-Chassis B58, B48, B46 & B38
descriptionEn: Know your exact ethanol content in real-time with our new LED display or by using the BMS CANflex, Fuel-It! or JB4 mobile app on your smartphone or tablet. If you're running E85 or ethanol mixes in your B58, B48, B46, or B38 equipped BMW, you need this kit! As many of you know the BMW motors can be very picky about how much ethanol you run to achieve peak performance but not run lean. Consequently, we have put together a kit enabling you to easily install an ethanol sensor with no permanent modifications needed. You will simply remove your low pressure fuel line in the engine bay and plug in our kit. It's a complete plug-in solution that utilizes our Bluetooth app to monitor your ethanol content. When you are ready to return to stock, you will simply remove the kit and re-install the stock fuel line. All of our complete kits include the following: Genuine Continental® ethanol sensor One stainless steel braided fuel line with black nylon sheathing to protect your other engine bay components Proprietary custom billet fitting for plug and play OEM integration One custom wiring harness One tube of SuperLube® for hose adapter install Complete Kit with BMS CANbus ECA includes: Our new CANflex LED ECA to display current ethanol content Legacy 5V output for JB4 integration Universal CANbus harness for use with future flash tuning integration Download the free BMS CANflex apps here: If you are using an Android product the app can be found by clicking here. If you are using an Apple product the app can be found by clicking here. Complete Kit with Fuel-It! Bluetooth ECA includes: Bluetooth ECA PnP harness Download the free Fuel-It! descriptionEn: The Burger Motorsports Blow Off Valve (BOV) mounts between the OE bypass solenoid and the vehicle, causing the unused charge air to vent to the atmosphere giving off the desired "Pshhhh" blow-off sound all turbo owners love.Easy install. CNC machined out of lightweight billet aluminum and anodized black so they last the life of your vehicle. All required hardware included. title: JB4 Tuner for 2014+ Porsche 911 Turbo & Turbo S
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 140hp and 176tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! The JB4 is a plug and play tuner that attaches to easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag, all without the risks and expenses commonly associated with flash tuning.No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUs Includes several performance maps that can be changed using the optional JB4 Mobile adapter/smartphone app, including JB4 maps for 91 octane, 93 octane, E85 mixtures, and VALET/low boost mode. Installation is very discrete and it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes. Made in the USA. 5 year warranty. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features and Benefits • Power gains of up to 140hp and 176tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Porsche• 2014-2016 Porsche 991.1 Turbo and Turbo S • 2017+ Porsche 991.2 Turbo and Turbo S What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and it's DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. Porsche 991.1 Turbo S JB4 Dyno 91 Porsche 991.1 Turbo S JB4 Dyno E40 DYNO VIDEO

title: BMS Compact Universal Oil Catch Can (CAN ONLY)
sku: Compact OCC w/ built in 3/8" fittings
descriptionEn: Keep oil out of your air intake system! It's no secret that most turbo motors suffer from oil control problems causing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The BMS compact oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor / ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor to atmosphere. To solve these problems BMS designed their oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the the turbo BMW application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking to atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. Made in USA. Available with built in billet aluminum 3/8" OD hose fittings or with 1/2" OD hose fittings. Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency • Promotes Engine Longevity • Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Double Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large Intake/Outlet No Tapering Down• Stealth Mounting on Cool Side of the Motor• Anodized Black Aluminum• N54 Model Mounts Out of Sight Under the Cowl • Made in USA & Guaranteed for Life• Simply unscrew base every 3-6 months to empty• Non-Clogging, No Service Needed Air/Oil Separation Double Baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs • Large inlet and outlet • Precision CNC Machined Vehicle Fitment Universal DIY install. No Hoses, brackets, or Hardware included.

descriptionEn: MORE AIR = MORE POWER! Featuring high-quality inverted cone filters, the BMS Elite Performance Intake for the F90 BMW M5 and F91 F92 F93 M8 offers the highest possible airflow in an attractive and easy-to-install package. Not to mention the intoxicating sound. The BMS Elite Performance Intake retains everything good about the OEM intake system including cold air ducting and lightweight heat shielding airbox bottom, while completely replacing the restrictive top end with new high-flow ducting and two inverted cone performance filters to match. Includes all required hardware. No cutting, drilling, or permanent modifications required. The BMS Elite Intake provides up to 10whp gains at 25psi+ boost levels. Sound and turbo spool-up speed are also improved.We offer two premium filter choices—both excellent for your M5. Our oiled cotton, renewable performance filter delivers strong airflow and can be renewed with an S&B cleaning kit every 15–20k miles, so it’s built to last the life of the vehicle. Prefer a no-oil setup? Our dry, extendable performance filter provides superior filtration in harsh, dusty conditions, cleans quickly with compressed air from the inside out, and keeps maintenance simple. Just replace it when it eventually reaches the end of its service life.Our Burger Motorsports renewable inverted cone filter not only outflows your stock paper filter and last the life of your vehicle, they also include a built-in velocity stack. Velocity stacks allow even more air to be smoothly sucked into your intake system and are used in most racing applications. title: INFINITI - Magnetic Spark Plug Socket by BMS
descriptionEn: Change Your Plugs Like a Pro! Everyone knows spark plug changes are suggested every 20k miles or so for tuned vehicles. Everyone also knows turbo Infiniti engines require a special thin walled socket to remove/reinstall the spark plugs. But what you might not know is the BMS socket fits like a glove. It also includes an integrated rare earth magnet to secure the plugs while raising and lowering them in the long bores. Ours will never wear out like spark plug sockets with rubber or metal tensioners to hold the spark plug in. The RIGHT tool for the job makes spark plug replacement a snap! Beware of cheap replica magnetic spark plugs sockets with weak magnets that will not easily recover the plug from the long bore. The plug falls out of them before you can get it out. What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system.
