title: BMS Oil Catch Can N54 535i BMW E60/E61
sku: N54 535 OCC, 13" of heater hose, Gray plastic coupler + 6" piece of heater hose.
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your N54 E60/E61 535 BMW Air Intake System! It's no secret that the N54 535 BMW turbo motors can suffer from oil control problems causing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves and the VANOS system, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The BMS oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle systems while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system altogether venting crankcase gas and odor to the atmosphere. Most are simply repackaged oil catch cans from smaller / lower power motors shoehorned into place in the turbo BMW engine bay. To solve these problems BMS designed their oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbo BMW application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory's fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking into the atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Install takes around 20 minutes, includes all required hardware, and is 100% reversible. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. Made in the USA. New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here. Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency • Promotes Engine Longevity • Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Tripple Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large Intake / Exhaust No Tapering Down• Anodized Black Lightweight Aluminum• Simply unscrew base every 3-6 months to empty • Non-Clogging, No Service Needed Air/Oil Separation Double Baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs• Precision Machined from Solid Blocks of High Grade Aluminum• Comes with brackets and hoses needed for the install• Large 16mm+ inlet and outlet exceeds OEM PCV sizing• Made in USA & Guaranteed for Life Vehicle Fitment BMW 5 Series • 2008-2010 E60 Sedan E61 Touring 535 including ix Catch can dimensions and specs Can dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) TallCan diameter: 2.5" (63.7mm)Lid length: Back to nozzle end: 4" (101mm)Nozzle outer diameter: .75" (19.2mm) Nozzle inner diameter: 0.669" (17mm)Can Fluid Capacity: Up to 5.5 fl oz (162.6 mL) New transparent oil catch can base now available as an option or is sold separately as an upgrade here.The main advantage of a transparent can is that you can easily see the contents inside. This allows for quick checks on oil levels, contamination, and sludge buildup without needing to open the can. ⚠️ ATTENTION: This product may not be suitable for use in regions where temperatures frequently drop to 32°F (0°C) or below.

title: BMS E Chassis N54/N55 BMW Transmission Oil Cooler
descriptionEn: Instantly Improve Transmission Performance and Cooling Everyone knows that heat is the enemy of your automatic transmission. And everyone knows that higher power levels generate more transmission fluid heat. Now you can extend the life of your automatic transmission by installing the new Burger Motorsports High Capacity Trans Cooler kit. This unique plug and play kit replaces your factory coolant to trans fluid heat exchanger with a high-capacity fender-mounted air to trans fluid radiator. Includes all mounting hardware, lines, and coolant caps required for installation. Installs inside the driverside fender providing ample airflow over the large cooling core via existing openings. The result is dramatically reduced transmission temperature and extended transmission life. This kit is strongly suggested for any BMW E chassis automatic running larger than factory turbos. Optional Transmission 165ºF (74ºC) Oil Cooler Thermostat (Recommended)The thermostat maintains the oil exiting the transmission at the rated minimum temperature in most conditions. Without a thermostat, the transmission fluid coolers are likely to over-cool the fluid, delaying transmission warm-up and performing the critical function of bypassing the cooler until the oil has reached its minimum operating temperature. title: BMW / MINI Floor Jack Pad Adapter
descriptionEn: Jack up your car like the pros do. This tool is a must for any Enthusiast. Safely jack up your BMW / MINI at any of the 4 factory jack points the way it was meant to be lifted. We designed this convenient metal jack pad adapter to mimic the factory scissor jack to fit perfectly in the jack points. No more worries or broken jack points, damage to your rocker panel or vehicle undercarriage. Simple to use. Just place the BMS jack pad adapter on your floor jack, align with the factory jack pad under the car and lift the car correctly, securely and perfectly every time. Our jack pad also comes down when the jack is lowered so you don't have to worry about forgetting it on the car. Made in the USA from a solid block of billet aluminum (metal) with the Burger Motorsports logo engraved on top and a honeycomb grip pattern on the bottom. Will work on most floor jacks by creating a flat jack point. It does not touch or harm any painted surface of your car. Not for use on jack stands or bottle jacks. Dimensions: The top insertable part is 1.1" wide X 2.1" long x .6" tall. The disk on the bottom is .3" thick x 2.8" wide Vehicle Fitment BMW Jack Pad Applications• Fits all 2001-present BMW vehicles and SAVs. title: BMS Oil Catch Can (CAN ONLY)
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your Air Intake System! It's no secret that turbocharged motors suffer from oil control problems causing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The BMS oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor/ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor into the atmosphere. To solve these problems BMS designed their oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the turbo BMW application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory's fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking into the atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. Made in the USA. Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency • Promotes Engine Longevity • Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large Intake/Outlet No Tapering Down• Stealth Mounting on Cool Side of the Motor• Anodized Black Aluminum• N54 Model Mounts Out of Sight Under the Cowl • Made in USA & Guaranteed for Life• Simply unscrew base every 3-6 months to empty or use the 1/8th NPT drain plug.• Non-Clogging, No Service Needed Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs • Large 16mm+ inlet and outlet exceeds OEM PCV sizing• Precision CNC Machined from Solid Blocks of High-Grade Aluminum Vehicle Fitment Universal DIY install. No Hardware included. Hoses and parts sold here. Catch can dimensions and specs Can dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) TallCan diameter: 2.5" (63.7mm)Lid length: Back to nozzle end: 4" (101mm)Nozzle outer diameter: .75" (19.2mm) Nozzle inner diameter: 0.669" (17mm) Can Fluid Capacity: Up to 5.5 fl oz (162.6 mL)

title: BMS Oil Catch Can for N54 BMW 135 335 1M
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of Your N54 BMW Air Intake System It’s no secret that N54 BMW turbo motors suffer from oil control issues. Excess oil can blow through the system, coating the intercooler and charge piping, fouling intake valves and the VANOS system, lowering effective octane, and degrading overall performance. The higher the boost level, the more pronounced these problems become. The solution is the BMS N54 Oil Catch Can. Many competing catch cans fall short due to poor mounting locations, restrictive internal designs, undersized hoses, or vented PCV systems that release crankcase vapors into the atmosphere. Others are simply repurposed designs intended for lower-output engines. To solve these issues, BMS designed this oil catch can system from the ground up specifically for turbocharged BMW applications. It features 100% CNC-machined construction with zero welding for a precise fit and long service life. Oversized hoses maintain factory-plus flow throughout the entire system to prevent crankcase pressure buildup, while retaining full closed-loop OEM PCV operation. The mounting location minimizes hose length, improves condensation efficiency, and maintains a clean, stealth appearance. Installation takes approximately 20 minutes, includes all required hardware, and is fully reversible. Oil can be drained via the threaded base or optional drain plug during routine oil changes. Made in the USA and guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. A transparent oil catch can base is available as an option or sold separately as an upgrade here. Features & Benefits Increases air intake efficiency Promotes engine longevity Non-clogging triple-baffle air/oil separation Free-flow, zero-restriction design Retains factory fully closed-loop PCV operation Large-diameter inlet and outlet with no tapering High-flow design prevents crankcase pressure buildup Precision CNC-machined from high-grade aluminum Anodized black finish Stealth mounting on the cool side of the engine N54 models mount out of sight under the cowl Made in the USA and guaranteed for life Service is simple. Unscrew the base every 3–6 months to empty, or use the optional 1/8" NPT drain plug. title: BMS Cowl Filters for BMW E9x E8x & X1
descriptionEn: Better engine sound, engine cooling, and a weight savings of 10lbs. E chassis BMW owners have known for some time that removing their cowl and HVAC filter system not only reduces vehicle weight but also improves overall engine bay cooling, facilitates engine & DME box access for service, and lets the driver better hear how the engine is running. But there was always a catch. How to stop dirt and debris from falling into the interior ventilation system? Well BMS has finally come up with a solution. These cleanable lightweight dry filters look great while blocking dirt & debris from the cabin. Also known as the cowl delete. Water won't run into the HVAC system with or without the cowl filters as they are raised openings. Suddenly removing your cowl is not only for race cars. Non-oiled dry filters. To clean rinse with water, let dry and reinstall. Do not oil. Installation Note: There are different left and right cowl filters. Installing them on opposite/incorrect sides will visually deform the filter element. Please refer to the install guide for the correct install procedure. NEW Optional Cowl Filter Weather Guards: (RECOMMENDED) Discover the ultimate enhancement for your cowl filter with the new Burger Motorsports Cowl Filter Guards. Engineered specifically for BMW enthusiasts, these guards offer seamless protection for your cowl filters, keeping dirt, debris, and water out without restricting airflow. Easily installed with existing factory bolts, they integrate flawlessly with your current setup, enhancing both function and style effortlessly. Features & Benefits Saves 10 lbs of weight from your BMW Better engine sound without the cowl Better engine bay cooling Heat resistant material won't deteriorate over time Keeps dirt & debris out of the interior ventilation system Easier access to DME box and spark plugs Easy installation and removal Available with black or blue filter elements New Cowl Filter Weather Guards now available. title: BMS Downshift Blocker for BMW
descriptionEn: Exclusively for automatic BMW vehicles with the gas pedals pictured below This nifty device clips on to your gas pedal allowing you to fully depress it without triggering a transmission downshift. Extremely handy for racing situations where you need to control gear shifts manually. When drag racing launching in 2nd gear and avoiding the kick down in to 1st will dramatically improve your 60' time on street tires. For automatic and DCT vehicles only. Does not work on manual transmissions. Please double check your gas pedal type BEFORE ordering. Type C and D look similar. To install the Type A downshift blocker you must keep it straight when pushing it on around the post. The pyramid shape must stay upright and the base aligned parallel with the bottom of the pedal. It will take some force but it will click around it if you keep the blocker flat when installing. To install the Type B downshift blocker Place the flat part of the blocker facing downward around the factory stop behind the pedal. The rounded part should be facing up. Make sure it is straight when clicking it down. You may or may not hear a "click" sound when the blocker is secured. You can press on the pedal lightly with your foot to click the blocker into place. You will know it is in position because it will lay flat like in the above photo. Remember, rounded side facing up. Flat part down. To install the Type D downshift blocker Please see click here. title: BMS N54 Drop-In Air Filter
descriptionEn: Give your BMW increased power, acceleration and better fuel economy with a drop-in performance filter.You've seen the dyno charts showing how much more power the BMS open air filters make. You've watched the videos showing how much better they sound. You've read the hundreds of favorable customer reviews. And, after all that, you still prefer a high flow drop in filter? Worry not, BMS has got you covered! Introducing the drop in filter, offering quick installation and the best flow of any available drop in filter. We can't promise the same power gains or sound you'll get from our open-element intakes, but we can promise this will significantly outflow your paper filter and is extremely easy to install and remove. Plus it can be cleaned and reused for up to 1,000,000 miles. The BMS N54 high flow air filter is designed to increase horsepower and acceleration while providing excellent filtration. These filters are washable and reusable and are custom designed to fit into your existing factory air box. Their drop-in design means adding performance is simple. To install simply remove the disposable air filter and replace it with our filter. Four to six sheets of pleated and oiled cotton-gauze are layered between two sheets of aluminum wire mesh. This proven design stops dirt, dust and other harmful particles like no other filter, all while clean, power-enhancing air flows freely to your engine. Just give it a simple cleaning every 30,000 - 50,000 miles and your filter will last for the life of your vehicle. With no costly replacing filters or services, your BMS filter will save you money. And, you'll be helping the environment by reducing the number of disposable air filters that end up in landfills. FEATURES AND BENEFITS • Improves horsepower and torque• Better fuel economy• More airflow than the stock paper filter• Easy installation/removal• Fits in the factory air box• Made in the USA to exact OEM standards• Emission legal in all 50 states • Can be cleaned over and over• No cleaning needed for up to 50,000 miles Vehicle Fitment • 2006-2010 BMW E90 E91 335 N54 3.0L • 2006-2010 BMW E82 E88 135 N54 3.0L• 2007-2010 BMW E92 E93 335 N54 3.0L• 2010-2013 BMW E92 E93 335is N54 3.0L• 2008-2009 BMW E60 E61 535 N54 3.0L• 2009+ BMW Z4 sDrive35i N54 3.0L

title: N54 JB4 BMW Performance Tuner
sku: N54 JB4 + JB4 Bluetooth Wireless (Separate Power Wire)
descriptionEn: N54 JB4 BMW Performance Tuner How about up to 80hp to the wheels (100hp crank) on a completely stock car, up to 160hp to the wheels on factory turbos, or up to 350hp to the wheels on a fully modified car with larger turbo(s)? The JB4 includes a simple plug and play installation harness and is compatible with all ECU versions and transmission types. It's everything you need to take your N54 powered vehicle from mild to wild. In addition to several performance maps which can be selected "on the fly" right from the driver's seat the JB4 includes a 100% stock bypass map, a valet mode, ethanol fuel (E85) support, progressive water/methanol injection support, racing fuel map, an auto-tuning map that adjusts the JB4 mapping to your current climate, octane, vehicle condition, and modifications continuously, and for those interested in an rpm by rpm user adjustable map. Other features include optional in-dash gauges for boost and other engine parameters, a programmable shift light, on the fly adjustable torque limiting to aid with launches at the track, an optional 2STEP rev limiter & no lift shifting for manual transmission cars, an optional speed delimiter, and much more. Remember the JB4 does not require any additional modifications or previous stages. Simply install the JB4 as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new fast and smooth racing experience. As you decide to modify your car further the JB4 is set up to grow with your vehicle. Whether you're racing a 100% OEM car on pump gas or a 700whp single turbo drag queen, the JB4 has the perfect mix of performance, features, flexibility, and support to ensure your car performs to the best of its potential! Wirelessly connect the JB4 to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS and Android device via the JB4 Mobile connect kit, or to your Windows laptop with the BMS data cable. Both options allow you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. A separate JB4 Mobile app purchase is also required. Note: This item is not CARB (California Air Resource Board) exempt and is not legal for sale or use in the state of California. Click here for the latest N54 JB4 firmware, map guide, and details. N54 JB4 Features & Benefits N54 Power gains of up to 100hp and 100tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times. Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types. Quick plug and play installation. Supports E85 ethanol blends. Reads and deletes fault codes. Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters. Boost by gear control for improved traction. Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles. Compatible with the JB4 Mobile app. Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes. Full CANbus integration. Runs as smoothly as stock. Compatible with all driving modes. No impact on fuel economy during normal driving. Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains. Not VIN locked and fully removable. Includes billet aluminum enclosure. Designed and assembled in the USA. 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment BMW 1 Series 2008-2010 E82 BMW 135i Coupe 2008-2010 E88 BMW 135i Convertible 2011 E82 BMW 1M BMW 3 Series 2006-2010 E90 BMW 335i Sedan including xDrive 2006-2010 E91 BMW 335i Touring including xDrive 2006-2010 E92 BMW 335i Coupe including xDrive 2007-2010 E93 BMW 335i Convertible 2011-2013 E92 BMW 335is BMW 5 Series 2008-2010 E60 BMW 535i Sedan including xDrive 2008-2010 E61 BMW 535i Touring including xDrive BMW X Series 2008-2010 E71 BMW X6 xDrive35i BMW Z Series 2009-2016 E89 BMW Z4 sDrive35i and Z4 sDrive35is What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug and play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can be quickly removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated, the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. title: JB4 Performance Tuner for Mercedes-Benz C63, E63, GT, GLC, Including S models
sku: MB C63 JB4 + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to +100whp and +100wtq to your AMG The JB4 is simply the most powerful and feature-rich tuning system available for your AMG. Using the same technology as our advanced tuning systems for the BMW M3 and M5 models, our new AMG C63 system delivers factory smooth performance increases in a package that can be installed or removed in under an hour.Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! The JB4 includes many features not found on other competitive AMG tuning products including: Fuel control to ensure safe operation at higher power levels. CANbus allowing the JB4 to monitor and integrated advanced engine data for unparalleled perforation and safety. Performance maps for pump fuels, E85 mixtures, race fuels, WMI, and even a lower than stock performance VALET map, all selectable on the fly via the optional JB4 mobile phone app. With JB4 Mobile you can also datalog to your phone, enter setting or custom map changes, update the firmware to unlock new features and maps as we add them, read or delete fault codes, measure your 0-60 time, and much more. In addition, the JB4 includes many useful racing features not found on any other system including user-adjustable boost by gear to improve traction off the line. The JB4 is compatible with both C63 and C63S models and is not VIN locked so it can be moved to your next vehicle or resold, and is made in the USA. Optional BCM (Boost Control Module) The JB4 attaches to the manifold TMAP, charge pipe MAP, and fuel pressure connections on each side of the engine, for six total connection points plus OBDII for CANbus. These fundamental attachments provide the JB4 with a wide range of tuning adjustments. For vehicles targeting very high boost levels using heavy bolt modifications, WMI, larger turbos, and/or very high octane, additional wastegate dutycycle may be beneficial in driving boost up to the higher target. To increase wastegate dutycycle the BCM add on harness is required. Although not currently available it will be $199 and plugs into the JB4 harness and the boost control solenoid under the vehicle for direct wastegate control. For a full map listing, firmware details, and more, join the discussion here: https://www.jb4tech.com/forums/showthread.php?t=55094 Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Grab our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection to wirelessly connect the JB4 BMW tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more info on how to use the JB4PRO free app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 100hp and 100tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 times and 1/4 mile times• Preloaded with custom JB4 Mercedes tuning software and up to 8 maps for various fuel and modification levels• Ethanol (E85) compatible tuning maps• Able to read/delete fault codes• View and record up to 40 different gauges/engine parameters in real-time with the JB4PRO app• Boost by gear in 1st, 2nd, and 3rd can be controlled via the JB4PRO app for a perfect launch• Exhaust flap operation can be controlled in most JB4 applications• Compatible with the FREE JB4PRO app for logging, tuning changes, and adjustment• The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip• Quick Plug & Play Installation• CANbus OBDII integration offering unrivaled tuning features and performance• Improved performance over non-integrated chip tunes• Runs as smoothly as stock. This is how your vehicle should have come from the factory• Compatible with all driving modes• Fuel economy unchanged during normal driving• 91 octane fuel or better required for performance gains• Not VIN locked and can be removed without a trace and resold down the road• Includes the rugged JB4 billet aluminum enclosure for protection• Designed and assembled in the USA• 5-year warranty Vehicle Fitment (M178) C-Class• 2015+ Mercedes-Benz C63 & C63S AMG E-Class• 2017+ Mercedes-Benz E63 & E63S AMG GT• 2015+ Mercedes-Benz AMG GT, AMG GT S, & AMG GT R GLC• 2015+ Mercedes-Benz GLC 63 & 63S AMG AMG GT• 2018-2021 Mercedes-Benz AMG GT 63 & 63S What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. sku: MB C JB4 + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: This quick install plug and play tuner connects to easy to reach plugs on top of the engine and safely increases turbocharger output by 3-6psi producing significant power and torque increases. Timing and fueling are appropriately rescaled for the increased boost and the installation is completely reversible in seconds. Compatible with all wheel drive and rear wheel drive models. The JB4 is the only tuning system that includes CANbus and optional BCM connections providing dramatically improved performance and smoothness over other 2-channel tuning systems. Power gains are up to 50whp for the C300, up to 60whp for the C400/C450, and up to 70whp for the C43. On racing fuel or E85 mixtures even higher gains are possible. Note 2019+ C300 models have changed to new SENT pressure sensors and require a unique JB4 system. Right now we believe all other 2019+ systems, C400, C450, C43, etc, continue to use the older pressure sensors but expect they will also migrate over at some point in the future. We'll update the model year compatibility details as we receive them. sku: M3/M4 S55 JB4, OBDII + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Gains are up to 80whp/100tq on pump gas and up to 120whp/140wtq on higher octane or E85 mixtures without the risks of flashing! The ultimate tuner for your S55 powered vehicle, the JB4 allows you to go from factory stock to full race, and everywhere in between with the push of a button on your steering wheel or phone. The JB4 installs and removes easily and includes many unique features not found in any other tune, including user adjustable 1st and 2nd gear boost limiting, map switching in dash, electronic wastegate control, ethanol fuel support, and built-in advanced CANbus based diagnostic tools. In addition, installation is completely removable with no splicing or cutting of factory wires. Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in!No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUs The JB4 is compatible with the factory flash map, competition package flash map, all off-the-shelf flash maps, custom tuned flash maps, or any flash map you choose to load! For those who don't mind flashing BMS provides free back end flash maps designed to optimize performance for specific builds and fuels saving you hundreds of dollars and many hours of time on custom flash tuning. For the latest performance results, updates, firmware, and map guide click here.For those running aftermarket turbocharger systems with aftermarket Tial wastegate(s) we have a special version of the S55 JB4 specifically to control them. Please email us so we can manually invoice you for the JB4_S55_TIAL version. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. S55 BMW M3/M4 JB4 Map GuideMap 0: Disable JB4 / Full Pass Through Mode Map 1: Stage1 map adding approximately 40whp and 40wtq across the power band on pump gas. Suitable for all stages and fuel mixtures. Map 2: Slightly more aggressive version of map 1 intended for vehicles with exhaust modifications and 93+ octane fuel. Can also be used with E85 and racing fuel mixtures. Map 3: Slightly less aggressive version of map 1 intended for vehicles running on lower grade fuels such as 91 octane. Map 4: OEM performance but with JB4 active for diagnostics only. Map 5: //M low torque / linear throttle map. Map 6: Custom tuning map. Map 7: Race gas map. Requires 100 octane unleaded fuel and for the fuel mass connector to be installed. This map can also be used with up to 35% E85. Map 8: Methanol injection map. title: BMS 2 Gallon Universal Low Profile Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Tank
descriptionEn: 2 Gallon Universal Low Profile Water/Methanol Injection (WMI)Tank This tank allows the pump (sold separately) to mount to the bottom of the tank making for a clean and fast installation. It’s universal and will fit a wide variety of trunk applications. The larger capacity means more time between fill ups. Offered in black for a stealth appearance and in clear to allow visually checking the fluid level. Includes a 2-way vented black plastic cap and a compression pump feed fitting. Optional upgraded blue billet water/methanol injection (WMI) cap with 1-way check valve available here. The nozzles are determined by the intended power and how many bungs your charge pipe has. The nozzles are 1/8” NPT and screw into bungs included on most aftermarket charge pipes. Our BMS "super atomizing" nozzles are well known for their great atomization and flow characteristics. The nozzle number represents the approximate gallons per hour of fluid when at full flow. Generally speaking, running two smaller nozzles is preferred to one larger nozzle for an equal flow to improve fluid atomization and distribution. Below are some general nozzle suggestions but feel free to email us for nozzle advice if your situation is unique. Features & Benefits • Pump mounts directly to the tank (pump not included)• Works with all DDP 5800 pumps• Super low profile design• Available in clear for visually checking fluid levels• Available in black for a stealth appearance• Includes 2-way vented black plastic cap• 4 mounting holes in the feet of the tank• Optional upgraded blue billet lid with 1-way check valve available here.• Includes a compression pump feed fitting• Made in the USATank dimensions: L 15.5" x W 8" x H 8.25" Vehicle FitmentUniversal mount Optional Upgraded Billet Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) tank cap w/safety check valve This high quality custom billet WMI cap includes an integrated check valve to let air in and prevent dangerous WMI vapor/fumes from getting out! Made in USA. Available here in Blue or Red

title: BMS Wheel Hanger Pin Tool
descriptionEn: Install your wheels and spacers the easy way! If you're tired of struggling with installing your wheels or wheel spacers, we have the perfect solution for you. The BMS Wheel Hanger Pin Tool helps you easily install your wheels by keeping the wheel and spacer centered on the hub and keeps the bolt holes aligned while you screw in your lug nuts. Whether you’re a seasoned mechanic or a DIY enthusiast, the BMS Wheel Hanger Pin Tool is designed to make your life easier. Vehicle Fitment BMW - 14mm x 1.25 (Most F and G Chassis) BMW - 12mm x 1.5 (Most E Chassis) 2020+ Toyota GR Supra - 14mm x 1.25 MINI - R60 Countryman and R61 Paceman - 14mm x 1.25 MINI - 2002-June 2006 production date - 12mm x 1.5 MINI - June 2006 - Present production date - 14mm x 1.25 Volkswagen, Mercedes-Benz - 14mm x 1.5 Here’s how it works: simply screw the wheel pin into the top bolt hole, then slide your spacer and/or wheel over the pin onto the hub. This ensures that your wheel is perfectly aligned with the hub and bolt holes every time. Screw in the lug bolts.

title: BMS Silicone Single Turbo Filter for 4" Turbo Inlet
descriptionEn: BMS Silicone Single Turbo Filter Tired of trying to power 600-700whp through a tiny K&N filter? Tired of typical urethane filter flanges melting to your turbo and falling apart after a couple of months? Introducing the BMS heavy-duty single turbo filter for 4" Turbo inlets. This all high-temperature silicon filter is designed to stand up to the heat and rigors of being installed directly to a turbo flange and offers 60% more surface area than the typical undersized K&N RU-2510 filter. The standard filter has a 4.5" height and for those with a little less room, we also offer a "shorty" 3.75" version. We've found the 4.5" height fits the FFTEC top mount single turbos while the VM top mount single requires the "shorty" version. For bottom mount and other kits measure ahead of time. Features & Benefits• High-Temperature automotive silicone won't degrade with heat• Special design reduces air turbulence• Great for use with BMW N54, N55, & B58 single turbo applications• Universal application for 4" Turbo inlets or intake pipes• Cleanable and Reusable• Available in Blue or Red• Made in the USA 🇺🇸 Performance air filter cleaning & oil kit available here.

title: Paddle Shift Retrofit Harness for BMW
descriptionEn: The Original Paddle Shift Retrofit Kit Since we created this conversion kit in early 2008, it's allowed enthusiasts to easily add OEM BMW paddle shifters to their E9x E8x BMW that did not come with paddles from the factory. This kit includes a custom time saving plug and play harness that enables factory paddle shift without cutting, splicing, programming, or timely dealership visits. Separately purchase a paddle shift steering wheel, paddle shifters, and the necessary steering wheel controls (MF buttons) and plug in our harness. It's that simple. The retrofit can be performed with common tools in about 2 hours at home by following our step-by-step printed install guide. The necessary OEM part numbers for this upgrade are included in the guide. Made with OEM BMW connectors. We're here to help however a verified BMS order number is required for all tech support. This listing is for the harness only. Does not include paddle shifters, Steering wheel, or steering wheel controls) Those must be purchased elsewhere. (Links and part numbers are listed below) Paddle shifters will add more fun, value, and performance to your BMW. Paddles shifters will enhance your driving experience and allow you to safely change gears without your hands ever leaving the steering wheel. Paddles are activated by hitting a paddle in 2007 and newer vehicles. Some pre-2007 models will need to switch the gear shifter into "S" mode to use paddles. The gear you are in is displayed in the instrument cluster. Read our FAQ and install the guide below. This listing is for the plug & play paddle shift retrofit harness only. In addition to the harness, install guide, and tech support we provide you with the OEM BMW part numbers required to complete the retrofit. You will also need to separately purchase a paddle shift steering wheel (one with cutouts for paddles), the paddle shifters, and the exact steering wheel control module (buttons on the wheel) we list below. (1 QTY.) Steering Wheel Controls/Switch BMW part # 61319123287 If you use LCI paddles and modify them you may not need part # 61319123287. This only pertains to LCI modified paddles. SSG and E chassis DCT paddles (shown below) will require part # 61319123287.The cost of the retrofit/upgrade is around $250-$400 USD total if you get everything besides the harness used. eBay has many pre-owned steering wheels with paddles already in them. This listing is for the plug & play harness only. SSG and E chassis DCT paddles (shown below) will require steering wheel controls part # 61319123287 to work. title: N54 Upgraded Replacement PCV Valve for BMW
descriptionEn: Strongly recommended for your high-performance (or higher mileage) N54. The OEM BMW plastic PCV valve does not hold pressure well even when brand new. What the leaky PCV valve means is that when you are in boosted conditions, the highly pressurized PCV valve leaks turbocharged pressures into the crankcase. Depending on the condition of your PCV valve it could leak worse than others. Also if for some reason your valve cover is cracked, loose, or has a bad gasket; you also could develop a pressure leak either external to the engine or internal into the crankcase causing further pressurization of the crankcase or other oil loss issues. Vehicle Fitment BMW 1 Series• 2008-2010 E82 Coupe 135i• 2008-2010 E88 Convertible 135i• 2011 E82 1MBMW 3 Series• 2006-2010 E90 Sedan 335i/335ix• 2006-2010 E91 Touring 335i/335ix• 2006-2010 E92 Coupe 335i/335ix• 2006-2010 E93 Convertible 335i/335ix• 2011-2013 E92 Coupe 335isBMW 5 Series• 2008-2010 E60 Sedan 535i/535ix• 2008-2010 E61 Touring 535i/535ix BMW 7 Series• 2008-2012 F01/F02/F03/F04 740i/740ilBMW X Series• 2008-2018 BMW E71 X6 xDrive35iBMW Z Series• 2009-2016 BMW Z4 sDrive35i, 35is Notes: • The solution will only fix the OEM PCV valve itself and not a leaky valve cover gasket, which is also a very common problem on the N54 Engine. We do recommend if EVER pulling off the valve cover to always replace the OEM gasket with a new one and use a light amount of high-quality sealant around these pressurization ports that are fed through each intake port. • The upgraded PCV Valve solution will not negate the pro's of Oil Catch Cans but could reduce what they otherwise collect. It also could be reasoned that those who catch a TON of oil have a less "healthy" internal valve cover PCV valve or PCV systems, or alternatively, engines that produce excess blow-by.• The BMS PCV valve can be disassembled for cleaning and like the Rob Beck PCV features a durable high quality valve meant to withstand whatever you can throw at it!

title: E Chassis N55 BMW JB4 Tuner
sku: N55 E A w/RHD Extension Harness + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: N55 Power gains of up to 60hp and 60tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle How about up to 60hp to the wheels (80hp crank) on a completely stock car or up to 100hp to the wheels (120hp crank) on a fully modified car? The JB4 features a simple plug & play installation harness for easy installation and includes many features not found on any other tune. Including on the fly in dash map switching between factory and various performance maps, optional in-dash gauge displays for boost and other critical engine parameters, progressive water/methanol support, ethanol fuels support, built-in code reading, and much more.Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! Remember the JB4 tuner for N55 engines does not require any additional modifications or previous stages. Simply install the JB4 as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new fast and smooth racing experience. The JB4 also does not require any user setup or customization but for those who are interested in logging, adding new features as we post them, changing maps, etc, we suggest the JB4PRO adapter and free app! Click here for the latest JB4 firmware, map guide, and details How to tell if you need harness A or B Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. N55 JB4 Features & Benefits • N55 Power gains of up to 60hp and 60tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. N55 JB4 Vehicle Fitment BMW 1 Series• 2011-2013 N55 BMW E82 E88 135i LHDBMW 3 Series• 2011 N55 BMW E90 E91 335i including xDrive• 2011-2013 N55 BMW E92 E93 335i including xDriveBMW X Series• 2013-2015 N55 BMW E84 X1 35i xDrive• 2011-2013 N55 BMW E70 X5 35i including xDrive• 2011-2013 N55 BMW E71 X6 35i including xDrive Click here for the latest JB4 firmware, map guide, and details How to tell if you need harness A or B What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and the DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 80HP on a stock vehicle without the risks of flashing! Ready to take your F chassis N55 BMW to the next level? How about up to 60hp to the wheels (80hp crank) on a completely stock car or up to 100hp to the wheels (120hp crank) on a fully modified car? The JB4 features a simple plug and play installation harness for easy installation and includes many features not found on any other tune. Including the ability to enable/disable the tuning from the driver's seat, gear dependent boost control to help with traction, autotuning for E85 mixtures, built-in diagnostic code reading/deleting, expanded engine safety systems, free firmware updates, in-dash boost gauge, the ability to control the exhaust flapper using your BC button, and much more.Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! The JB4 Tuner does not require any additional modifications or previous stages. Simply install the JB4 as your first and only modification and enjoy an entirely new fast and smooth racing experience. For more advanced enthusiasts, the BMS DATA or JB4 Mobile cable allows you to connect a laptop or smartphone for additional gauges, data logging, and free firmware updates as we add new features and maps.The JB4 is a full plug and play device that installs and removes in minutes at home without special tools and unlike flash maps that permanently write over your DME with the JB4, your DME is never aware it's running more than the factory power levels. And when you're ready to change things up the JB4 is not VIN locked and can be moved to your next vehicle or resold. Made in the USA. 5 Year Warranty.Note for electronic wastegate models, the EWG add-on connector remains optional and can be purchased separately from our upgrades for higher HP applications where direct EWG control is beneficial, such as those using an integrated WMI kit or larger turbo.NOTE: Some F10 and X chassis models require a JB4PRO bluetooth adapter to select options bit#1 in the FREE JB4PRO app to enable the in-dash controls for those models. Click here for the latest JB4 firmware, map guide, and details Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. N55 JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 60hp and 60tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle (80 crank hp)• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment F Chassis N55 JB4 ApplicationsBMW 1 Series• 2012-2013 N55 BMW F20 F21 M135 (JB4_PWG)• 2014-2015 N55 BMW F20 F21 M135 (JB4_EWG)BMW 2 Series • 2014-2015 N55 BMW F22 F23 M235i (JB4_EWG)• 2016-2017 N55 BMW F87 M2 (JB4_EWG)BMW 3 Series• 2012-2013 N55 BMW F30 F31 335i including xDrive, Active Hybrid, xDrive GT (JB4_PWG)• 2014-2015 N55 BMW F30 F31 335i including xDrive, Active Hybrid, xDrive GT (JB4_EWG)BMW 4 Series• 2014-2016 F32 F33 F36 BMW 435i including xDrive and Gran Coupe (JB4_EWG)BMW 5 Series• 2011 N55 BMW F10 F11 F07 535i including xDrive, ActiveHybrid 5, xDrive GT (JB4_F10_A)• 2012-2013 N55 BMW F10 F11 F07 535i/ix, ActiveHybrid 5, and 535i/ix GT (Either JB4_F10_A or JB4_PWG, check sensor using reference photo prior to ordering)• 2014-2016 N55 BMW F10 F11 F07 535i/ix, ActiveHybrid 5, and 535i/ix GT (JB4_EWG)BMW 6 Series• 2011 N55 BMW F06 F12 F13 640i including xDrive and Gran Coupe (JB4_F10_A)• 2012-2013 N55 BMW F06 F12 F13 640i including xDrive and Gran Coupe (Either JB4_PWG for Type B or JB4_F10_A for Type A, check sensor using reference photo prior to ordering)• 2014-2016 N55 BMW F06 F12 F13 640i including xDrive and Gran Coupe (JB4_EWG)BMW 7 Series• 2013-2018 N55 BMW F01 F02 740i including xDrive (JB4_EWG)BMW X Series• 2011-2013 N55 BMW F25 X3 including xDrive (JB4_PWG)• 2014-2017 N55 BMW F25 X3 including xDrive (JB4_EWG)• 2014-2018 N55 BMW F15 X5 F16 X6 including xDrive (JB4_EWG)• 2014-2018 N55 BMW F26 X4 M40i including xDrive (JB4_EWG) Wastegate Identification Chart. Pneumatic (PWG) or Electronic (EWG)?E Chassis N55 JB4 - Click Here What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. DYNO RESULTS F32 435i with BMS intake and exhaust F22 M235i with intake, exhaust F30 335i with BMS intake, exhaust Videos Change maps on the fly Control your roar! Open and close your exhaust flapper valves. INSTALL VIDEOS JB4 N55 435i EWG install video JB4 N55 335i/335iX PWG install video JB4 N55 BMW F10 535i/535iX install video

title: JB4 BMW EWG Add On Connector
descriptionEn: For 2014+ BMW motors that have an (EWG) electronic wastegate. This add-on patch allows your JB4 to directly control your electronic wastegate raising the boost ceiling and tuning flexibility.Additional information and directions are posted here: http://www.jb4tech.comN55/B58/N20 BMW JB4 (EWG) Electronic Wastegate Add-on Connector install instructions The new EWG harness has two long wires coming from it. Purple and blue. Each will have a gold DSUB pin which is to be inserted in the JB4 harness similar to how the FlexFuel connector is added. Put these wires inside the rubber wire grommet going to the large DB25 connector on the JB4.3) The purple wire (going to the male pin on the wastegate harness) connects to position #9 on the DB25 connector. Carefully push in until it clicks.4) The blue wire (going to the female pin on the wastegate harness) connects to position #16 on the DB25 connector. Carefully push in until it clicks.

title: BMS Replacement Downpipe Gaskets/Hardware
descriptionEn: Fits All BMW E chassis N54 and N55 motors These high-quality replacement downpipe gaskets are designed specifically for the high temperatures and rigors an N54/N55 turbo motor produces. While conventional metal-clad (foil) gaskets are rated up to 500c these turbo-specific composite gaskets are rated for much higher temperatures exceeding 600c. And at 60 mils they are extra thick for a perfect seal every time. Fits OEM and high-flow downpipes. Also includes a quality set of mounting hardware to make your replacement a snap. Fits All BMW E chassis N54 and N55 motors. Not for use on F chassis vehicles.

title: JB4 N54 2 STEP / NLS Relay
descriptionEn: JB4 N54 2 STEP / NLS Relay This add-on kit for BMW N54 engines allows your JB4 to "2step" the engine (cycle power to the coils) to build boost when not under load. Useful as both a noisemaker for both manual and automatic transmissions, and for launching with manual transmissions. It also allows No Lift Shifting (NLS) for manual transmission cars.The relay kit requires a JB4, back-end flash map, and BMS data cable or JB4 mobile connect kit. Note that we've modified the JB4 firmware recently so that the clutch wire is no longer required simplifying the installation. Update your JB4 firmware before or after installation to v32_15 for twin turbo or v13_7 for single turbo to enable.

title: MAC Single Turbo Solenoid
descriptionEn: Single turbo boost solenoid Use this plug and play low frequency MAC solenoid if retrofitting a single turbo kit that runs an external wastegate. Includes plug and play harness connector for no splicing! The 3 Port solenoid controls boost up to 2.5x spring pressure while the 4 Port solenoid controls boost up to 6x spring pressure. With the 4 Port you can run a lighter wastegate spring, for example, 6psi, and provide a much wider range of control which is often useful for improved traction in lower gears.

title: BMW / MINI - Magnetic Spark Plug Socket
descriptionEn: Change Your Plugs Like a Pro! Everyone knows spark plug changes are suggested every 20k miles or so for tuned vehicles. Everyone also knows turbo BMW / MINI engines require a special thin-walled socket to remove/reinstall the spark plugs. But what you might not know is the BMS socket fits like a glove and is only one third the price of an OEM socket! It also includes a strong integrated rare earth magnet to secure the plugs while raising and lowering them in the long bores. Ours will never wear out like spark plug sockets with rubber or metal tensioners to hold the spark plug in. The RIGHT tool for the job makes BMW spark plug replacement a snap! Beware of cheap replica magnetic spark plugs sockets with weak magnets that will not easily recover the plug from the long bore. The plug falls out of them before you can get it out. Vehicle Fitment • 2007+ Turbo MINI Vehicles• 2006+ Turbo BMW Vehicles BMS Spark Plug Socket Features OEM quality perfect fit thin wall socket A strong magnetic hold never deteriorates or weakens Fits standard 3/8 drive socket wrench High quality at a super low price Designed and manufactured for your BMW / MINI Excellent addition to your toolbox Spark Plug Socket Specs 12 point, 14mm Thin walled deep specialty socket Strong magnetic hold 3/8" drive Recommended spark plug torque 17 lb-ft or 23nm.

descriptionEn: Tired of your factory plastic charge pipe blowing off or ripping apart under boost? Upgrade your flimsy OEM unit to our heavy-duty aluminum replacement for 1/3 of the price of the factory unit. Designed by Burger Motorsports and manufactured overseas our replacement charge pipe features all-aluminum construction, high-quality matte black finish, CNC machined flanges, OEM style mounting hardware for a direct fit, and a lifetime warranty. Because we use the OEM mounting system, unlike other charge pipe solutions, this charge pipe installs easily, retains all emissions fittings, and is 100% reversible. Includes two 1/8" NPT bungs with optimal 180 degree placement. Lifetime warranty. Installation requires charge pipe gaskets and charge pipe clips to be transferred over from the removed factory charge pipe. title: Cooper S N18 JB Plus
descriptionEn: Plug in up to 20whp and 30wtq Featuring quick plug and play installation the N18 JB Plus adds up to 20whp and 30wtq to your N18 equipped MINI. Fuel economy is unchanged during normal driving, and the tuning works in conjunction with the DME rather than against it ensuring optimal but more aggressive boost levels with air/fuel ratios and timing to match. Boost is increased by 2-4psi on average depending on the climate and conditions. Unlike other N18 piggyback tuners, this one actually works and completely transforms the driving experience. This is how your MINI should have come tuned from the factory. Installs and removes in less than 30 seconds.CARB Approved Under Executive Order (EO) No. D-744 for all 2011-2015 MINI Cooper S and MINI John Cooper Works models equipped with a 1.6L N18 turbocharged engine. title: Mini Cooper R60 Countryman & R61 Paceman Wheel Spacers by BMS w/10 Black Extended Wheel Bolts (Pair, 2 Wheels)
descriptionEn: Simple, Bolt On Handling And Looks For Your Mini Cooper Burger Motorsports wheel spacers are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your MINI R60 Countryman or R61 Paceman. Our wheel spacers push your rims and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability and handling. Spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset or just making your MINI look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your Mini Cooper ensuring a perfect vibration-free fit. What width wheel spacer should I get? We recommend 18mm to 20mm all the way around. Spacer sizes are a matter of personal taste so only you will know what size you will like. Use a ruler to measure out from the top of the wheel/rim arch and see exactly where you want the wheel/rim to stick out to and order the appropriate size. What you see on the ruler, 5mm, 10mm, 12mm out, etc. will be exactly where the rim will sit with the spacer size you choose. Burger Motorsports wheel spacers are only available in 5mm, 10mm, 12mm, 15mm, 18mm, 20mm thickness. You can go 10mm to 20mm all the way around on your stock height MINI R60 Countryman or R61 Paceman. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports wheel spacer is CNC machined from high grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our Wheel Spacers for Mini Cooper are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 10 extended lug bolts which exceed OEM standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. They are hub-centric and all sizes including 10mm have the factory hub on them. Installation: Simply remove wheel, place the spacer on the hub, and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download wheel spacer install instructions here.Please note: No need for wheel/tire re-balancing or wheel alignments when adding spacers. FREE Wheel Pin tool with purchase of 2 pairs of wheel spacers on the same receipt.To get the free wheel pin with a 2 pair wheel spacer purchase, add 2 pairs of wheel spacers to your cart, go to the link below and add the free wheel pin to the cart. When you hit the checkout button the items will be discounted to FREE!Click Here for the BMW Wheel Pin Tool ($10.00 Value) Features & Benefits Provide Better Handling by Widening the Wheelbase Provide A Wider More Aggressive Look and Stance Specifically Designed for your Mini Cooper Guaranteed for the Life of your Vehicle 10 Super Strong Extended Wheel Bolts Included Lightweight Anodized Black Aluminum Special Pry Tabs on the Back for Easy Removal 1-Piece Spacer with Hub-centric Factory Lip Strong Solid Design & Appearance Available in 5mm, 10mm, 12mm, 15mm, 18mm, 20mm R60/R61 MINI Wheel Spacer Specifications (Blue Box)Center Bore: 72.6 mmBolt Thread Size: M14 x 1.25Bolt Seat: Cone Seat / Concentric Bolt pattern: 5x120 Wheel Spacers Wheel Fasteners: Extended 10.9 grade zinc coated lug boltsSpacer Material: Lightweight Anodized Black 7075-T6 Aluminum Torque Specifications 105 ft-lbs What's included(2) Wheel spacers(10) Extended 10.9 grade lug bolts(1) Packet of anti-seize ⚠️ Read instructions before installing. DO NOT mix up the included bolts. The bolts are the spacer width longer than the factory bolts. They are different lengths depending on spacer width. title: N54 JB Plus Quick Install BMW Tuner
descriptionEn: Instant 25-40 Horsepower gains at the wheels! Experience immediate gains with the JB Plus BMW tuner, designed to deliver impressive performance increases at the default setting of +3 psi—adding an average of 30 horsepower and 40 lb-ft of torque to the wheels. For those who crave maximum power, boost can be quickly adjusted up to +4 psi for even greater performance. This BMW tuner installs without entering the ECU area, ensuring no risk of triggering codes. It’s compatible with all ECU versions and transmissions for 2006-2010 BMW models including the 335i, 335xi, 135i, 535i, Z4, and Z6 with the N54 Twin Turbo engine, as well as 2011-2013 N54 335is models. Installation is tool-free and takes just minutes, making it the perfect solution for BMW enthusiasts seeking a hassle-free power upgrade. Quick and Easy Installation: No tools required—install and remove in minutes. Full N54 Compatibility: Works with all ECU versions and transmissions for specified N54 models. Reliability You Can Trust: Made in the USA with a 5-year warranty for peace of mind. Upgrade your BMW with a proven tuner trusted by enthusiasts worldwide. Choose JB Plus for unmatched performance and convenience from the leading BMW tuner specialists.50 State Emissions Legal: CARB Approved Under Executive Order (EO) No. D-744-3 for all 2007-2014 BMW Models Equipped with the N54 3.0L twin-turbocharged 6-cylinder engine. title: BMS E Chassis BMW N55 Performance Intake
descriptionEn: Gain up to 10+whp along with terrific sound! Finally, an intake system worthy of your N55 TwinPower motor! The BMS N55 Performance Intake retains everything that is good about the OEM N55 intake system including the cold air ducting and light weight heat shielding airbox bottom; but, completely replaces the restrictive top end of the OEM intake with new high flow ducting and a performance filter to match. Works great alone or with other aftermarket upgrades for even more performance. Unlike some manufacturers that advertise huge gains for their N55 intake systems, we're not going to tell you replacing the N55 intake will add 25hp+ because we've dyno tested them all and know they won't. But during our extensive dyno testing the BMS N55 Intake outperformed all other available N55 intake systems posting gains of up to 10+ horsepower to the wheels. In addition to freeing up some power, turbo spool speed is improved. Not to mention incredible sound improvement. You'll finally be able to hear your turbo spooling! Installation is very easy taking the average enthusiast only five minutes to install or remove right in their driveway. Our proprietary high flow filter can be cleaned every 15-20k miles with the oil cleaning kit and will last the life of the car. Optional: Our optional 5-layer silicon upgraded coupler replaces your thin factory accordion coupler and won't collapse under higher boost pressures. Perfect for upgraded turbos or cars running port injection systems. Order here. title: F Chassis - Burger Motorsports BMW Wheel Spacers w/10 Bolts
descriptionEn: CLICK HERE to check out or new LIGHTWEIGHT racing F chassis wheel spacers and floating lug bolts.Wider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks Available in 10mm**, 12mm, 15mm, 18mm, 20mm widthsDoes not fit E or F chassis X5 and X6 vehicles. X5/X6 SpacersSome F chassis vehicles take G chassis spacers. Check the below list. 2018+ F90 BMW M5 only takes G chassis spacers. 2020+ F91 F92 F93 BMW M8 only takes G chassis spacers. 2016+ F48 F49 BMW X1 only takes G chassis spacers.2019+ F97 BMW X3M only takes G chassis spacers. 2019+ F98 BMW X4M only takes G chassis spacers. Burger Motorsports BMW wheel spacers are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your BMW. Our wheel spacers push your rims and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability, and handling. Spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset or just making your BMW look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your BMW ensuring a perfect vibration free fit. A packet of anti-seize grease is included to place on the factory hub to aid in later removal. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports BMW wheel spacer is CNC machined from high-grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our BMW Wheel Spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 10 extended lug bolts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. They are hub-centric and all sizes have the factory hub on them. They are safe to use on iX (all-wheel drive) BMW vehicles. What width wheel spacer should I get? Spacer sizes are a matter of personal taste so only you will know what size you will like. Use a ruler to measure out from the top of the wheel/rim arch and see exactly where you want the wheel/rim to stick out to and order the appropriate size. What you see on the ruler, 10mm, 12mm out, etc. will be exactly where the rim/tire will sit with the spacer size you choose. Installation: Simply remove wheel, place spacer on the hub and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download the install guide. Free Wheel Pin tool with purchase of 2 pairs of wheel spacers on the same receipt.To get the free wheel pin with a 2 pair wheel spacer purchase, add 2 pairs of wheel spacers to your cart, go to the link below and add the free wheel pin to the cart. When you hit the checkout button the items will be discounted to FREE! The photos and guidelines on this website are for reference only. Your BMW might have different results with the same size spacers due to different wheels, tire sizes, packages, and offsets. Please measure before ordering. descriptionEn: Simple, Bolt-On Handling And Looks For Your BMW Wider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks Available in 10mm, 12mm, 15mm, 18mm, 20mm widthsDoes not fit X5 or X6. See other listings.(Not available for E39 BMW models) Burger Motorsports BMW wheel spacers are an excellent, cost effective way to improve handling and stability while dramatically enhancing the look of your BMW. Our BMW wheel spacers push your wheels and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability, and handling. Wheel spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, eliminating wheel/tire rubbing, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset or just making your BMW look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your BMW ensuring a perfect vibration free fit. Each set includes a packet of anti-seize grease to place on the factory hub to aid in later removal. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports wheel spacer is CNC machined from high-grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our BMW Wheel Spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 10 extended lug bolts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. They are hub-centric and all sizes have the factory hub on them. They are safe to use on iX (all-wheel drive) BMW vehicles. Hub-Centric: This means our spacers center bore matches your factory BMW hub and the factory-like hub on the Burger Motorsports spacers matches the center bore in your wheel for a vibration-free fit. What width wheel spacer should I get?Spacer sizes are a matter of personal taste so only you will know what size you will like. Use a ruler to measure out from the top of the wheel/rim arch and see exactly where you want the wheel/rim to stick out to and order the appropriate size. What you see on the ruler, 10mm, 12mm out, etc. will be exactly where the rim will sit with the spacer size you choose. Burger Motorsports E chassis BMW wheel spacers are only available in 10mm, 12mm, 15mm, 18mm, 20mm thickness. Installation: Simply remove wheel, place spacer on the hub and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download the install guide. For Most E Chassis BMW vehicles BMS Recommends 12-15mm rear and 10mm - 12mm front. 15MM, 18MM and 20mm spacers might require slight inner fender rolling on the rear of some BMW E chassis vehicles. If you want that "flush look" you will probably need your rear fenders rolled or the tires might occasionally rub inside the rear fender wells. This only pertains to E chassis BMW vehicles. These are just general guidelines for vehicles with stock tire sizes and wheels. If you would like to order a different size than mentioned please feel free to. The photos and guidelines on this website are for reference only. Your BMW might have different results with the same size spacers due to different wheels, tire sizes, packages, and offsets. title: BMS Elite M3/M4 S55 Replacement Upgraded Charge pipes
sku: BMS Elite M3/M4 S55 CP/cold pipe Combo
descriptionEn: The S55 BMW engine is a modern marvel but one weakness we've identified is the boost tubes or charge pipes that connect the turbochargers to the intercooler. Not only are they restrictive, but they are also made of thin plastic these factory parts are prone to snapping apart where the flange meets the tube, splitting along the length, and/or slipping out of their intercooler couplers. Our BMS Elite S55 replacement charge pipes are made from heavy-duty aluminum and are designed with CNC flanges and a protruding lip for a secure OEM-like fit. They are finished in a gloss black powder coat to match the engine bay and we've also incorporated a pre-capped 1/8" NPT bung in to each pipe. Includes replacement heavy-duty couplers, hose clamps, and all hardware required for the installation.For higher horsepower applications we also offer a heavy-duty replacement cold side pipe complete with its own 1/8" NPT bung, o-ring, throttle body clip, and coupler, for a full plug and play upgrade. title: BMS Stage 1 BMW Performance Tuner
descriptionEn: BMS Stage 1 BMW Performance Tuner This plug and play BMW tuner attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory DME tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. It features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 800 times per second using dedicated 10 bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance. The same box automatically detects whether you have an N20, N55, or S55 motor based on the TMAP sensor voltage and adjusts the tuning accordingly. Power gains on the N20 motor are up to 45 horsepower and 60 torque (35hp and 50tq at the wheels), on the N55 motor are up to 50 horsepower and 65 torque (40hp and 55tq to the wheels), and on the S55 motor up to 60 horsepower and 75 torque (50hp and 60tq to the wheels). Installation is very discrete and it is quickly removed without a trace when needed. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes.Part F30-N55-STG1 is CARB Approved Under Executive Order (EO) No. D-744-1 for 2013 BMW 335i models only. All other applications are competition race use only and not legal for use within California.Click Here for the BMW TMAP Sensor Location N55 Stage 1 BMW Tuner Features & Benefits • Power gains of up title: BMS BMW F10 M5 & F12 F13 F06 M6 Intake
descriptionEn: More Horsepower, More Air flow, and Better Sound Featuring dual high-quality BMS inverted cone filters the BMW M5/M6 Performance Intake offers the highest possible flow in an attractive and easy to install/remove package. Not to mention the intoxicating sound. The BMS Performance Intake retains everything that is good about the OEM intake system including the cold air ducting and lightweight heat shielding airbox bottom; but, completely replaces the restrictive top end of the OEM intake with new high flow pipes and two performance filters to match. While the factory S63TU M5/M6 intake is very high flowing the BMS intake provides power gains of up to 10whp range at 25psi+ boost levels. Turbo spool-up speed is also improved. Includes all required hardware. Installation does NOT require any cutting or drilling. Fully reversible. Our replacement charge pipes are functionally identical to stock only with a 1/8" NPT bung & cap included in each pipe. Our Burger Motorsports inverted cone filters not only outflow your stock paper filter and last the life of your vehicle they also include built-in velocity stacks. Velocity stacks allow even more air to be smoothly sucked into your intake system. We offer two high quality filter options. Our oiled cotton renewable performance filter can be cleaned using an S&B cleaning kit every 15-20k miles and should last the life of your BMW. We also offer a dry extendable, low maintenance filter option, which offers superior filtration for extreme conditions. Our dry filter can be cleaned by blowing out with compressed air from the inside out.
