title: s63tu JB4 Tuner for BMW M5/M6/X5M/X6M w/ OBDII & Integrated BCM
sku: s63tu JB4 & Integrated BCM  + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Ready to take your S63TU powered BMW to the next level? Our latest kit for the S63TU M5/M6/X5M/X6M, the new JB4 includes functions never before available to the platform, including on-the-fly map switching, boost limiting in lower gears for improved traction, an in-dash boost gauge, full CANbus data logging, code read/delete, integrated water/methanol tuning with progressive safety systems, and the ability to tune for as much boost as your octane and/or fuel system will allow. For most running pump fuels, expect power gains of around 100whp over stock. For those who want to push the factory turbos with a water/methanol injection kit and higher octane, fuel power gains of up to 240whp over stock are possible. The JB4 also supports larger S63TU turbos. We've had customers report as much as 900hp to the wheels using simple Stage1 turbos! The JB4 is absolutely the most flexible and easy to use tuning solution for the s63tu platform and is even compatible with cars already running flash maps who want to add more power, WMI control, or extra features to their tuning.Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in!No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUsInstallation is fully reversible, attaching to the TMAP sensors and OBDII port. The included BCM wires are optional and allow the JB4 to take direct control of the wastegates for more precise boost targeting for higher boost maps.The JB4 is a full plug and play device that installs and removes in minutes at home without special tools and unlike flash maps that permanently write over your DME with the JB4 your DME is never aware it's running more than the factory power levels. And when you're ready to change things up the JB4 is not VIN locked and can be moved to your next vehicle or resold. For those running a DCT transmission, we've found the factory clutch packs are only good for around 640whp before they start slipping. If you are planning for more power than this, plan to upgrade to Dodson or SSP clutch packs sooner or later. For those running aftermarket turbocharger systems with dual aftermarket Tial wastegates, we have a special version of the S63TU JB4 specifically to control Tial wastegates. Email us so we can manually invoice you for the JB4_S63TU_TIAL version. For the current map guide, firmware, and notes, refer to this thread. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 60hp and 60tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment BMW M5• 2012-2017 BMW F10 M5BMW M6• 2012-2017 BMW F12 13 M6BMW X5M/X6M• 2015-2019 BMW F85 F86 X5M and X6M What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. INSTALL VIDEO DYNO RESULTS JB4, pump gas JB4, BMS intake, BMS charge pipes, methanol injection, Dodson clutch packs, 95 octane VIDEO

title: JB4 for BMW GEN1 & GEN2 B58
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 120HP & 120TQ to the wheel on a stock B58 without the risks of flashing! The JB4 B58 tuner from Burger Motorsports is the most advanced plug & play tuning system available for BMW B58 turbocharged engines. Power gains of up to 120 horsepower and 120 lb-ft torque at the wheels are possible on a completely stock B58 engine running pump gas. Vehicles equipped with bolt-on upgrades, higher octane fuel, E85 mixtures, or larger turbochargers can see even greater gains.Also available with our new JB4PRO board which includes built in Bluetooth, fuel pressure control for more advanced tuning with ethanol mixtures, built in flex fuel/port injection/WMI control using our PNP add on harness, onboard data-logging memory, and many additional features to be unlocked in the future via free firmware updates. Perfect for those planning higher power builds including larger turbos and/or port injection/WMI. Both versions include the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in! No ECU flash required and fully compatible with locked 🔒 ECUs. The JB4 includes a simple plug & play wiring harness allowing quick installation and removal while delivering advanced tuning capabilities unavailable in other tuning systems. Features include on-the-fly map switching between stock and performance maps, boost-by-gear control for improved traction, progressive water/methanol integration, built-in data logging, fault code reading and clearing, direct electronic wastegate control to prevent throttle closure with exhaust upgrades, exhaust flapper control on most models, and much more. Unlike traditional ECU flash tuning, the JB4 does not require staged upgrades or additional modifications. Install it as your first upgrade and immediately experience stronger turbo response, smoother power delivery, and significantly improved acceleration. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Map Guide for B58 Map0: Stock tuning – JB4 disabled Map1: +3psi over stock (91 octane) Map2: +4psi over stock (91-93 octane) Map3: +6psi over stock (93+ octane) Map4: Absolute target map with peak target of 20psi (93+ octane and/or E30) Map5: Absolute target map with peak target of 22psi (E30+ recommended) Map6: Custom user tuning map Map7: Progressive water/methanol tuning map Map8: Valet / Low boost map This B58 JB4 tuner is compatible with GEN1 and GEN2 B58 engines. For the newest B58TU2 GEN3 motor please refer to the B58 GEN3 JB4 product page. JB4_B58 is CARB approved under Executive Order D-744-4 for many 2016-2018 BMW applications including the 230i, 330i, 430i, 530i, 340i, 440i, 740i, M240i, and X1. JB4 Power Gains, Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 120hp and 120tq to the wheels.• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment (GEN1 & GEN2 B58) BMW 1 Series 2016-2019 F20 / F21 BMW M140i BMW 2 Series 2022+ G42 BMW M240i including xDrive 2016-2021 F22 / F23 BMW M240i including xDrive BMW 3 Series 2020-2024 G20 / G21 BMW M340i including xDrive 2016-2018 F30 BMW 340i including xDrive BMW 4 Series 2021-2024 G22 / G23 / G26 BMW M440i including Gran Coupe and xDrive 2016-2020 F32 / F33 / F36 BMW 440i including Gran Coupe and xDrive BMW 5 Series 2017-2023 G30 / G31 BMW 540i including xDrive BMW 6 Series 2018-2023 G32 BMW 640i including xDrive BMW 7 Series 2016-2022 G11 / G12 BMW 740i including xDrive BMW 8 Series 2018+ G14 / G15 / G16 BMW 840i including Gran Coupe and xDrive BMW X Series 2018-2024 G01 BMW X3 M40i 2019-2024 G02 BMW X4 M40i 2019-2022 G05 BMW X5 40i 2020-2023 G06 BMW X6 40i 2019-2022 G07 BMW X7 40i BMW Z4 2019+ G29 BMW Z4 M40i What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play performance tuner for turbocharged vehicles. It connects between engine sensors and the factory ECU allowing it to safely adjust boost pressure, ignition timing, and fueling to produce significant horsepower gains while retaining factory safety systems. The JB4 stands apart from other tuning systems through advanced CANbus integration, smartphone connectivity, ethanol compatibility, and continuous firmware updates that expand functionality and performance over time. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes. The JB4 actively adjusts boost, timing, air-fuel ratios, and fuel trims using real-time engine data through its CANbus connection. This allows it to produce performance gains similar to ECU flash tuning without permanently modifying the ECU. title: Tial Flange BOV adapter for Kia Stinger / Genesis G70 3.3L
descriptionEn: This bolt-on adapter allows you to easily replace both your flimsy diverter valves with a single Tial flange blow-off valve. Benefits include better sound, a unique look under the hood, and the potential to hold more boost between shifts. Unused charge air vents to the atmosphere giving off the desired "Pssshhhh" blow-off sound. Includes block-off caps for the intake hoses. Reuses factory o-rings for a leak-free factory-like installation.The adapter can be purchased ala-cart or with an authentic Tial blow-off valve. We suggest using the Tial BLACK (6psi) spring based on our testing. Running a too heavy spring may prevent the BOV from opening properly. title: B58 BMW Billet Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Spacer
descriptionEn: Plug and play Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) adapter for all B58 BMW motors Normally you'd replace the factory charge pipe to install a water/methanol kit but in the case of the B58 engine, the factory charge pipe is very sturdy and difficult to remove. So we've designed this plug and play adapter for quick installation and removal of BMS dual nozzle water/meth kits without having to replace the factory charge pipe. Simply unscrew three bolts, insert the CNC machined adapter with integrated o-ring in place, and tighten the included longer length bolts, to allow mounting of two meth nozzles with a perfect seal. Includes dual 1/8" NPT methanol bungs appropriately machined for a clean spray pattern which is critical for proper atomization with the B58 motor. For most B58 water/methanol applications we suggest dual CM5 nozzles. F / G chassis BMW Vehicle Fitment(Gen 1 B58 Engines) Your B58 powered vehicle not listed? Email us a picture of your throttle body. title: Fuel-It! Glass Ethanol Content Tester
descriptionEn: Know the ethanol content of your fuel! As auto enthusiasts ourselves, we wanted to know the quality of fuel we were running and wanted be able to test it accurately. We were frustrated because current ethanol testers aren't full scale, they’re hard to read, and if you get fuel on them, the graphics come off. So we set out to design a tester to meet our needs. Introducing the Fuel-It! Ethanol Content Tester. Test in just 3 easy steps Step 1: Add waterStep 2: Add fuelStep 3: Shake Features and Benefits• Freestanding with a flat bottom• Unique design is easy to use and read• Measurements that are taken in 2.5% increments• Graphics that are guaranteed not to come off with normal use• Full scale so if your fuel is E0, E10, E50, E90…no more guesstimating Thin Vial only includes• One glass reusable laser engraved 12ml ethanol tester with a screw-on cap • Compact at approx. 4" x 2/3" or 100mm x 16mm and easy to store Large vial only Includes• One glass reusable laser engraved ethanol tester with screw-on cap • Compact and easy to storeComplete kit includes• One reusable glass 12ml ethanol tester with a screw-on cap• Two pipette samplers• One towel• Two disposable gloves• Reusable telescopic case• Set of directions Pro kit includes• Two glass reusable 25ml ethanol testers with a screw-on cap• Two pipette samplers• One microfiber towel• Two disposable gloves• Reusable telescopic case• Set of directions

title: Group 1: JB4 for VW EA888 MQB Gen3 2.0T for 280hp, 293hp and 300hp
descriptionEn: JB4 Group 1: VW EA888 MQB Gen3 2.0T The JB4 is a true user adjustable plug and play solution for all MQB based models in the VW Audi Group range. Power Gains: Starting at 45bhp and 45ft-lb with 91 octane/95Ron with + 4.50psi boost over stock on the default setting. Up to 100bhp and 70ft-lb with bolt-on modifications, higher octane, and boost adjustment with the optional wireless JB4PRO Bluetooth connection. The JB4 features CANbus connectivity for more advanced tuning, direct AFR control, advanced safety systems for boost, air/fuel ratio, fuel trims, engine knock, boost mapping by gear for improved traction, integrated water/meth control, and much more.The unit can be used with our wireless JB4PRO Bluetooth connection providing for full in-car engine parameter display, map switching, and adjustment The JB4 can also be stacked over a flash tuning allowing for fine-tuning as well as meth control with safety measures in place and full logging. Resources: General user discussion forum with a detailed description of the JB4: http://forums.vwvortex.com/showthread.php?8367026-Burger-Motorsport-JB4-Information-thread-for-R-and-S3https://www.jb4tech.com/forum/model-specific-engine-tuning-modification-discussion/vw-audi-group/19262- https://www.jb4tech.com/forum/model-specific-engine-tuning-modification-discussion/vw-audi-group/6628- Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features and Benefits • Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. For any VW/Audi sales, support, and technical questions please contact George at george@burgertuning.com George is the only BMS representative familiar with the VW/Audi platform. What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. title: JB4 Replacement and Upgrade Chips
descriptionEn: JB4 Replacement and Upgrade Chips The replaceable 2580 master chip controls the communications between the JB4 and your BMS data cable or JB4 Smart Phone Wireless Connect Kit as well as the model specific firmware. If you are unable to connect to the JB4 try replacing this first as often it's the culprit. Specify which firmware you need in the drop down so the chip works out of the box with your model. To install it just open the hood, lock the doors, hide the key, and wait 5 minutes for the vehicle/ECU to power down. Then open the JB4 enclosure and using a small screwdriver pry out the old chip from its socket and plug the new chip in its place. Note the notch on the chip needs to be facing forward towards the JB4 harness.We also have 2431 and 24K22 port injection integration and anti-lag firmware update chips in the drop down.

media.alt: JB4 Replacement and Upgrade Chips

title: JB Plus N20/N55 Quick Install Tuner
descriptionEn: Plug in up to 35 extra wheel horsepower in seconds! Finally, our popular and well-proven JB Plus quick install tuner is available for N20, N26, and N55 applications! Boost is user adjustable up to 4psi over stock providing gains up to 25 wheel horsepower and 35 wheel torque on the N20/N26 motor and up to 35 wheel horsepower and 45 wheel torque on the N55 motor. Timing and fueling remain managed seamlessly by the DME, preserving all factory safety systems. While the JB4 is the ultimate tuner, the JB Plus is a quick and simple way to add a few HP with minimal cost and minimal installation effort. Something that anyone can buy, install in under a minute, and feel from the driver's seat. Compared to our Stage 1 tune, it offers a lower cost and easier installation but lacks the additional benefits of MAP sensor control and data logging. Depending on the settings and conditions, expect a little less horsepower than Stage 1, all else being equal. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with both pneumatic and electronic wastegate vehicles and all driving modes. Automatically detects the engine type upon installation, allowing the same unit to be used for any F series N20, N26, or N55 application! Not available for sale/use within California.For those who want to start with the JB Plus and upgrade to the higher power, more advanced JB4 tune, we offer a 100% trade-up credit. To qualify, simply purchase the JB4 system from our website directly, and then, after receipt, mail back the JB Plus along with its purchase receipt from BMS or any authorized reseller, and we'll issue a $239.00 refund against your JB4 purchase. The offer is valid up to one year after purchasing the JB Plus. title: VW & Audi EA888 Gen 3 Turbo Muffler Delete
descriptionEn: The factory baffled "turbo muffler" was designed to reduce compressor noise and acoustics at the expense of response and airflow. Our replacement eliminates the baffle not only improving flow but also increasing that intoxicating turbo compressor sound under heavy throttle. Great care was taken in the design to provide the maximum possible internal diameter for flow improvement while retaining an OEM like fit and seal. We kept the design one piece despite the higher machining cost to minimize boost leak points. Comes preassembled with a new o-ring already installed for a simple remove and replace swap. title: BMS Billet Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) Tank Cap with Safety Check Valve
descriptionEn: Upgraded Billet Water/Methanol WMI tank cap with integrated safety check valve The Burger Motorsports custom billet Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) cap includes an integrated heavy-duty check valve to let much-needed air in and prevent dangerous WMI vapor/fumes and liquid from getting out! Each cap is CNC machined in the USA from a solid block of billet aluminum, engraved with the BMS logo, and anodized blue or red for protection. ⚠️ ATTENTION: Check valve piston must be lightly lubricated if tank shows signs of vacuum. One drop of penetrating oil or motor oil in the top will keep the check valve operational. Remove dirt with compressed air before oiling. Features & Benefits • Integrated heavy-duty check valve lets air in but not out• Specifically designed to prevent evaporation• Keeps vapors inside the tank• Made from a solid block of billet aluminum• Blue anodizing for corrosion protection• Exaggerated grips for easy removal• Integrated heavy-duty o-ring • Made in the USA Tank fitment• BMS 1 and 1.25 gallon tank• BMS 2 gallon universal tank• BMS 2 & 3 gallon stealth tank

Timing and fueling remain seamlessly managed by the DME, preserving all factory safety systems. Why Choose the JB Plus Tuner? Quick and Easy Installation: Add horsepower with minimal effort. Install in under a minute and feel the difference from the driver’s seat. Reliable Performance: Enjoy unchanged fuel economy during normal driving and automatic engine detection upon installation for use with any B38/B46/B48/B58 powered BMW or MINI. Simply purchase the JB4 from our website, return the JB Plus with your receipt, and receive a $239.00 credit. Offer valid for up to one year. Made in the USA: Built to last with a 5-year warranty. The JB Plus tuner is not just a tune, it's your ticket to a thrilling driving experience. Explore effortless power upgrades with the JB Plus and join countless BMW & MINI enthusiasts who trust Burger Motorsports for their tuning needs. title: BMS F Chassis 3.5" Billet N55 & B58 Exhaust Tips (Pair)
descriptionEn: Upgrade to Larger 3.5" Angle Cut Billet Exhaust Tips The most noticeable part of your exhaust system is the tips. Now you can get that custom look with these 3.5" billet exhaust tips on your N55/B58 BMW. No welding or cutting is needed. These are a direct bolt-on to your factory muffler. Machined from a solid block of billet aluminum and equipped with dual set screws so they go on easily and stay in place. No clamps for a clean appearance. Available in Matte Black Ceramic and Polished Silver. Made in USA. 🇺🇸Not for use with M-Performance exhaust systems.To install remove your factory BMW exhaust tips by pounding outward on the lower part of the tip with either a rubber mallet or a hammer. You can spray some lubricant inside the tip to make it a little easier. A small piece of wood can also be used between the hammer and the exhaust tip edge. This is done from under the rear of the car. Small medium taps will start the factory tip sliding off the actual exhaust pipe. Secure the tip before it comes off the end of the pipe with your hand. Make sure to keep it straight to not damage the inner spring clips. The cutouts in the rear must be facing straight up. Slide the BMS slip-on exhaust tip straight over the factory exhaust pipe. Carefully push the tip straight on until it stops. Then tighten the supplied set screws with an allen hex wrench. A liquid thread locker is recommended. What's included:(2) Billet aluminum exhaust tips(4) M8 x 1.25 x 12L internal hex set screws Install Videos:

descriptionEn: Prevent cracked rocker panels and damaged undercarriage when lifting with a floor jack or lift Safely lift your Corvette C5, C6, C7, C8 at the factory jack points like professionals do using these convenient BMS jack pad adapters. The hard urethane honeycomb design prevents scratching of your frame and ads clearance while positively using most floor jacks or lifts. Includes a CNC machined locking tab designed specifically for the factory jack receptacle. Sold as single units. And unlike cheaper generic jack pads ours won't rattle around or fall out as you are positioning your floor jack or lift arms, they're odor-free, and won't deteriorate. title: BMS Drop-In Performance Dry Filter for Corvette C7 Grand Sport, Stingray, Z06, & ZR1
descriptionEn: Add up to 30+ wheel horsepower to your C7 Corvette with this replacement drop-in air filter! After racking up thousands of miles on an ill-fitting and visually unappealing aftermarket C7 intake we decided there had to be a better way. A careful review showed the factory air intake piping and MAF housing outflow aftermarket piping, but the factory filter and how it mates to the factory MAF housing creates a significant restriction.To address this problem with the factory filter we designed a replacement filter that has a thinner and less restrictive base to better mate up to the factory MAF housing, kept the filter DRY to avoid possible MAF oil contamination, and using a flow bench optimized the filter material, pleats, and other dimensions for maximum performance and filtration. See our dry filter material ISO 5011 testing here. The net result was a drop-in filter that offers 15% less restriction than factory and 10% less restriction than the "leading" aftermarket drop-in filter when flow tested through the factory intake piping. Back-to-back dyno testing against the stock filter and an aftermarket intake verified the same or improved performance levels when keeping all other variables (air/fuel, timing, starting temps) consistent.Note the factory airbox with the BMS drop-in filter outperforms the GM performance intake with the clear window (part #84689752), see dyno comparison below, so if you are running the BMS drop in we don't suggest upgrading to the GM performance intake unless you just prefer the look under the hood. If you do upgrade we now offer a matching BMS drop-in specifically designed to optimize power for the clear window airbox The BMS air intake filter is a drop-in upgrade that works with all years of C7 Corvettes 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2018, and 2019 with no modification. (Option 1) Factory airbox ***WITHOUT*** clear window. Factory part #84152141 (Option 2) GM Performance Corvette Racing "Jake" Airbox with Clear Window 84689752: The BMS intake only filter fits in one way. The Burger Motorsports logo must be upright and the metal strip on the filter element facing down. There is a rectangle shape that fits the GM Performance "Jake" airbox with clear window on the bottom of the filter opening. The BMS filter for the GM Performance "Jake" Airbox with Clear Window is not interchangeable with the factory airbox. See the difference in size below! The Burger Motorsports upgraded filter goes much further into the fender for maximum airflow and is not encased in restrictive red metal mesh. Scroll down for dyno results! The Burger Motorsports (Option 2) filter replaces filter 84689751. (The red one is shown below) GM Part 84689752 airbox shown above not included. Sold separately. Features & Benefits • Dyno proven to add horsepower and torque• Seamless integration with factory mass airflow sensor• High-flow dry media filter for long-term efficiency and durability• 50 State Legal• Fits LT1 / LT4 / LT5 Engines• Made in the USA Vehicle Fitment Chevrolet Corvette C7• 2015-2019 C7 Grand Sport LT1• 2014-2019 C7 Stingray LT1• 2015-2019 C7 Z06 LT4• 2019 C7 ZR1 LT5 DYNO RESULTS 2016 C7 Z06 A8, 30% E85, Tuned, 2.3"upper, Stock vs. BMS Drop In vs. AFE Intake 2015 C7 Z06 A8 91 octane, Stock vs. BMS Drop-In performance filter BMS Drop-in for Corvette C7 GM Performance Cold Air Intake Dyno TestingRead more here 2019 Corvette ZR1, 93 octane, no modifications other than intake/filter changes

title: Super Atomizing Water/Methanol Injection Nozzle
descriptionEn: Water/Methanol Injection (WMI) nozzles are determined by the intended power and how many bungs your charge pipe has. The nozzles are 1/8” NPT and screw in to bungs included on most aftermarket charge pipes. Our "super atomizing" nozzles are designed and manufactured by us and are known for their great atomization and flow characteristics. The number on the methanol injection nozzle represents the approximate gallons per hour of fluid when at full flow. Generally speaking running two smaller nozzles is preferred to one larger nozzle for an equal flow to improve fluid atomization and distribution. Below are some general nozzle suggestions but feel free to email us for nozzle advice if your situation is unique. What's inside our water methanol injection nozzles? Water Methanol Injection Nozzle Flow Rates: Methanol Injection Nozzles are rated in ( GPH) gallons per hour using a BMS WMI pump @ 200psi BM5: 5 GPH = 315 ml/minBM7: 7 GPH = 440 ml/minBM10: 10 GPH = 630 ml/minBM12: 12 GPH = 750 ml/minBM14: 14 GPH = 880 ml/min Water Methanol Injection Nozzle guide 4 cylinder: BM7 6 cylinder: BM10 or Dual BM58 cylinder: Dual BM5 or BM10 if larger turbos

title: BMS Oil Catch Can Kit for Volkswagen MK7
descriptionEn: Keep Oil Out of your VW Air Intake System It's no secret that the Mk7 turbo motors can suffer from oil control problems causing oil to blow through and coat the intercooler and charge piping, gunking up intake valves and the VANOS system, lowering the effective octane, and generally degrading engine performance. The higher your boost levels the more apparent these problems become. The solution to this problem has finally arrived. The BMS oil catch can. While there are other catch cans on the market they all fall short in various areas. Some are mounted on the hot/turbo side of the motor preventing proper vapor condensation. Others utilize hoses that are too small and runs that are too long to allow proper PCV ventilation causing internal motor / ring sealing issues. Some have insufficient or no internal baffle system while others have internal baffles systems that are too restrictive. Some even bypass the PCV system all together venting crankcase gas and odor to atmosphere. Most are simply repackaged oil catch cans from smaller / lower power motors shoe horned in to place in the engine bay. To solve these problems BMS designed their oil catch can kit from the ground up specifically for the the turbo VW application. It features 100% CNC machining with zero welding for a precision fit and long life. The can itself is guaranteed for the life of the vehicle. The hoses exceed the OEM PCV piping in diameter and that flow rate is maintained throughout the entire oil catch can ensuring no excessive crankcase pressure buildup. The BMS OCC retains the factory fully closed loop PCV operation preventing any PCV vapor from leaking to atmosphere. The mounting locations are selected to minimize the line length, allow more efficient operation, and retain a stealth look. Install takes around 20 minutes, includes all required hardware, and is 100% reversible. Simply unscrew the base of the can or use the drain plug to safely dispose of captured oil with the rest of your used motor oil during oil changes. BMS Oil Catch Can = The Best Protection with No RestrictionLeft Untreated, Condition Only Gets Worse Features & Benefits • Increases Air Intake Efficiency • Promotes Engine Longevity • Non-Clogging Air/Oil Separation Triple Baffle• Free Flow Solid No Restriction Design• Retains factory fully closed loop PCV operation • Large Intake / Exhaust No Tapering Down• Anodized Black Lightweight Aluminum• Simply unscrew base every 3-6 months to empty • Non-Clogging, No Service Needed Air/Oil Separation Double Baffle• High flow to eliminate crankcase pressure caused by more restrictive designs• Precision Machined from Solid Blocks of High Grade Aluminum• Comes with brackets and hoses needed for the install• Large 16mm+ inlet and outlet exceeds OEM PCV sizing• Made in USA & Guaranteed for Life Vehicle Fitment • Audi A3 1.8TFSI and 2.0TFSI 8V, S3 8V, TT and TTS 8S • VW MK7 Golf, GTI and Golf Alltrack• Skoda Superb, Octavia • Seat Leon Cupra MQB, Ibiza Cupra Catch can dimensions and specs Can dimensions with lid: 4.4" (111mm) TallCan diameter: 2.5" (63.7mm)Lid length: Back to nozzle end: 4" (101mm)Nozzle outer diameter: .75" (19.2mm) Nozzle inner diameter: 0.669" (17mm) Can Fluid Capacity: Up to 5.5 fl oz (162.6 mL)

title: JB4 Performance Tuner for 2016+ Infiniti Q50/Q60 VR30 3.0L Twin Turbo
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 100hp and 120tq to the wheels on a stock Infiniti Q50/Q60 3.0T This plug and play tuner attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in!Installation is very discrete and unlike flash remaps which are quick to install but can never be fully removed with a JB4 the vehicle is never aware it's making more than the factory boost or power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged and it's compatible with all driving modes. Unlike other less advanced systems, the JB4 includes CANbus functionality allowing it to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU for real-time tuning. The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and much more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data no less incorporate it real-time into their tuning algorithms. CANbus allows the JB4 to provide huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery.The JB4 includes multiple maps including those for 91 octane, 93 octane, factory tuning, E85 mixtures, and unleaded race gas. In addition, it offers boost by gear settings to improve launches, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more. The JB4 is made in the USA and includes a 5-year warranty. No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUsJB4 is CARB Approved Under Executive Order (EO) No.D-744-6 for all 2016+ Infiniti Q50/Q60 3.0L Turbo Luxe, Sport, Silver Sport, Red Sport Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Power Gains, Features, & Benefits • Power gains of up to 100hp and 120tq to the wheels.• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. JB4 Vehicle Fitment Infiniti• 2016+ Infiniti Q50 VR30 3.0L twin-turbo V6 Turbo Luxe, Sport, Silver Sport, Sensory, Red Sport 400• 2016-2022 Infiniti Q60 VR30 3.0L twin-turbo V6 Turbo Luxe, Sport, Silver Sport, Sensory, Red Sport 400 What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. Download Infiniti Q50/Q60 JB4 Install Guide CARB APPROVED (.PDF) DYNO RESULTS Infiniti Q50 Silver Sport, JB4 Tuned + 93 octane Infiniti Red Sport, JB4 Tuned + 93 octane Infiniti Q50 Red Sport, JB4 Tuned + 30% E85 Mixture Silver Sport, 30% E85 Mixture 2019 Infiniti Q50 Silver Sport, JB4 Tuned + 30% E85

title: Magnetic 16mm Spark Plug Swivel Socket (VW, Kia, and other models)
descriptionEn: Change Your Plugs Like a Pro! It's recommended to change your plugs every 20,000 miles on a tuned car. This special thin walled socket is needed to remove/reinstall the spark plugs. It also includes a strong integrated rare earth magnet to secure the plugs while raising and lowering them in the long bores. Ours will never wear out like spark plug sockets with rubber or metal tensioners to hold the spark plug in. The RIGHT tool for the job makes spark plug replacement a snap!Recommended spark plug torque 17 lb-ft (23nm) Beware of cheap replica magnetic spark plugs sockets with weak magnets that will not easily recover the plug from the long bore. The plug falls out of them before you can get it out. Features & Benefits Fits most 16mm Spark Plugs Fits standard 3/8" drive socket wrench 360° swivel drive top OEM quality perfect fit thin wall socket Strong magnetic hold never deteriorates or weakens Excellent addition to your toolbox Vehicle Fitment Fits most VW, Audi, Porsche, Mercedes-Benz, Honda, Acura, Toyota, Skoda, Seat, Kia Stinger, Hyundai G70, and other vehicles with 16mm plugs

title: Phoenix Racing No Drill Tow Hook Front License Plate Holder
descriptionEn: Need a front plate but don't want to drill your bumper? Did you know that in the United States 29 of the 50 states REQUIRE a front license plate? If you live in one of those 29 states and don't run a front plate, you may be subject to tickets, fines, and harassment from law enforcement. It's just another great justification for the police to pull you over. The problem is that running a front plate typically requires permanent modification to the front bumper, looks out of place, and also blocks airflow to the front mounted intercooler. Great for getting your no front plate fix it ticket signed off with no modification or drilling.Phoenix Racing tow hook license plate kit solves all of these problems.The Phoenix Racing tow hook front license plate holder was designed to mount the license plate off center, and away from the intercooler. This allows the intercooler to work at full capacity, which ultimately helps performance. The off-center placement is also congruent with the natural lines of the car, which looks trick without being ostentatious. ⚠️ NOTE: May interfere with front parking sensor on some equipped models.Features & Benefits • No drilling• Mounts damage free in your front tow hook mounting area• Includes all tools, fasteners, and bolts needed for a complete install • 8 mounting choices to ensure that the plate will not block intercooler or intake vents• Angle adjustments for desired look• High quality T6061 anodized black aluminum• 5 to 10 minute easy install Vehicle Fitment BMWMost E and F chassis BMW vehicles.MINI Select E chassis BMW when ordering1st and 2nd gen MINI 2011-2017 MINI R60 Countryman 2013-2017 MINI R61 Paceman All R50/R52/R53/R55/R56/R57/R58/R59 MINI Select F chassis BMW when ordering2014-Present MINI F55 F56 Infiniti - Select Infiniti when ordering• 2016+ Q50 3.0t Luxe / Silver Sport / Red Sport• 2018+ Q50 3.0t Luxe / Sport / Red Sport• 2016+ Q60 3.0t Luxe / Silver Sport / Red Sport• 2018+ Q60 3.0t Luxe / Sport / Red SportKIA• 2018+ KIA Stinger - All Models Subaru• 2022+ Subaru WRX 2.4L 4 cyl. title: Dragy
descriptionEn: Monitor your 0-60mph, 1/4 mile, 60-130mph, 100-200kmh, 1/2 mile performance, & more! The Dragy App works as Drag Meter, tracking your 0-60mph, 60-130mph, 0-130mph, 100-150mph, 100-200mph, 1/8 mile, 1/4 mile, 1/2 mile, 1 mile performance. Dragy automatically captures all the metrics and generates professional performance reports (with charts, stats, speed metrics markers, and history runs). Record videos with real-time speedometer, post to forums and social media, share with friends, or even upload to the dragy leaderboard. Dragy uses multiple high speed GPS satellites to accurately measure the performance of your vehicle within 1/100th of a second, producing identical results to the much more expensive and cumbersome Racelogic Vbox system, in a less expensive and easier to use package. The Dragy software automatically charts slope on all time slips. Dragy is extremely compact at 1" x 3" (25.4mm x 76.2mm) with a magnetic base and can be set on the dash when testing and stored in the glove box or center console when not in use. In addition, there are many advanced features under development including virtual races with friends, an internal feed for photos and performance discussion, and more to come. Runs are saved in both metric and SAE formats, allowing comparisons of 100-200kmh and all metric equivalents. You can also define your own performance windows for measuring both trap speeds and/or elapsed times, time to brake performance such as 100-0, and much more.The dragy Lap app is new generation lap timer. Go to the track and enjoy real-time predictive lap-timing with dual camera recording (dual camera requires iPhone with A12+ processor). Discover revolutionary 3D map replay and 3D map video overlay. Instantly share every lap moment to the social media. Check out all your performance getting improved with our professional lap analysis tool. The dragy system can be run simultaneously with JB4 Mobile and other Bluetooth apps. Requires the FREE dragy phone/tablet app which is available for both Apple® iOS and Android® devices. The dragy reviews don't lie. This is a great product!Dragy has built a million users' community for all performance car enthusiasts. Join us now and get your drag/lap time verified on the dragy leaderboard!Four models available:dragy Refurbished (DRG70) Certified Factory Refurbished. Refurbished systems operate as new and include a 90 day warranty. dragy (DRG70-C) dragy version includes a new 10thgeneration GPS module for improved accuracy, positioning, and lower powerconsumption for up to a 20 hour life. Features a USB-C charging port. dragy PRO Refurbished Certified Factory Refurbished. Refurbished systems operate as new and include a 90 day warranty.dragy PRO Dragy Pro is the most advanced dragy device to test your racing performance. It integrates powerful tracking capabilities, a 10th GEN UBLOX chip, 6-Axis IMU, 128MB built in storage, extra low-power consumption with a larger battery for up to a 20 hour life. The built-in high-precision 6-axis IMU (Inertial Measurement Unit) motion sensor delivers enhanced accuracy in acceleration measurements, ensuring that every detail of your performance data is captured with precision. Features a USB-C charging port. Special: Buy dragy and our suction cup windshield mount together and get the mount for 1/2 off. Originally $14.99. $7.49 with dragy purchase on the same receipt. What do the lights mean on my Dragy?Blue Light • Blue for 2 sec - Dragy online• Blue breathes - Satellites offline• Blue pulses - Satellites online Red Light• Red breathes - low battery or charging, satellites offline • Red pulses - low battery or charging, satellites online Box contents: (1) dragy GPS Based Performance Meter & Lap Timer (1) USB Charging Cable (2) Metal Plates & 3M Adhesive Strip (1) Manual Technical data: iOS (8.0) or Android (4.4) or greater device required Connection type: Bluetooth 4.0 Supports up to 4 Global Satellites Network (GNSS) GPS, GLONASS, GALILEO, & BEIDOU Battery life: up to 20 hours Charging port: Micro USB for (DRG70) or USB-C for Dragy Pro Dimensions: 30 x 80 x 15mm dragy Pro Dragy Pro is our most advanced device to test your racing performance. It integrates powerful tracking capabilities, a 10th GEN UBLOX chip, 6-Axis IMU, 128MB storage, and professional accessories, bringing even more to racing pros. 2020 F92 BMW M8 with JB4, MAP 5, BMS Intake and MS109 Race Gas dragy results Optional suction cup window/windshield mount for dragyEasily mount and store your dragy on any window of your vehicle for improved satellite reception. The dragy is magnetically held to the mount and can be easily charged, stored out of the way, or removed. Sold separately here. See dragy reviews below.

title: Lexus JB4 Tuner
sku: Lexus JB4 Tuner + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: JB4 True Plug & Play Power This plug and play tuner attaches to easy to access sensors in your Lexus engine bay and works with your factory DME tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. It features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 800 times per second using dedicated 10 bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance.No ECU flash needed and compatible with locked 🔒 ECUsPower gains are up to 45 crank horsepower and up to 45 crank torque over stock, at the default map1 setting. With race gas or E85 mixtures, higher power gains are possible. Boost is adjustable using a BMS Data Cable or Bluetooth adapter. Includes fully OBDII based CANbus operation for unrivaled tuning performance, features, and functionality.Installation is very discrete and it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Increases horsepower/torque making your Lexus faster• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Lexus• 2016+ Lexus RC 200t• 2016+ Lexus IS 200t• 2016+ Lexus GS 200t• 2016+ Lexus IS 300t• 2016+ Lexus NS 200t• 2015+ Lexus NX 200t• 2018+ NX 300 What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. DYNO RESULTS 2016 Lexus IS 200t stock vs. BMS JB4 tune, default settings JB4 Install Video

title: JB4 N54 Wiring Extras
descriptionEn: JB4 Anti Lag KitIncludes a programmed chip and wiring harness to allow on the fly anti-lag. Select a gear, hold down the volume button, floor the car, and once boost has built up release the volume button to instantly take off under full boost. Absolute must have for rolling races of any transmission type and works well for automatics off the line too. Requires a BMS back end flash map and ethanol fuel is strongly suggested. Installation directions and additional details are posted here.G5 2 STEP Relay for manual transmissionsEnables G5 2 STEP rev limiter for more consistent manual transmission launches and no-lift / flat foot shifting. 2 Step requires BMS DATA cable. JB3->JB4 power wire This power wire is required if updating from a JB3 harness or repairing a broken JB4 harness.Replacement POSI TAPS (2)For tapping wires. Electrical connectors require no crimping and simply hand tighten.

title: JB4 for Ford Mustang 2.3L EcoBoost
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 60whp and 100wtq on a factory 2.3L Mustang without the risks of flashing! The JB4 is a plug and play tuner that attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in!Installation is very discrete and unlike flash remaps, which are quick to install but can never be fully removed with a JB4 the vehicle is never aware it's making more than the factory boost or power levels. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged and it's compatible with all driving modes, including towing.Unlike other less advanced systems, the JB4 includes CANbus functionality allowing it to take in critical engine data directly from the ECU for real-time tuning. The data includes pedal position, throttle position, timing advance, fuel trims, air/fuel ratio, engine knock, fuel trims, gear, and more. Other tuners without CANbus are not able to even monitor this critical engine data, no less incorporate it real-time into their tuning algorithms. CANbus allows the JB4 to provide huge power increases with unparalleled power delivery.The JB4 includes multiple maps for 91 octane, 93 octane, factory tuning, VALET mode, E85 mixtures, and unleaded race gas. In addition, it offers boost by gear settings to improve launches, the ability to read and delete fault codes, and much more. The JB4 is made in the USA and includes a 5 year warranty. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. Vehicle Fitment • 2011+ Ford F150 2.7L & 3.5L Turbo EcoBoost & Powerboost• 2017+ Gen 2/Gen 3 Ford F150 Raptor 3.5L Turbo • 2018+ Lincoln Navigator EcoBoost 3.5L Turbo• 2015+ Expedition EcoBoost 3.5L Turbo Check your sensors to confirm the required harness before ordering! JB4 systems use one of four different wiring harnesses. You'll need to locate and identify both the charge pipe and intake manifold MAP sensors, generally on the charge pipe leading into the throttle body, and under or behind the plastic engine cover on the manifold directly, to determine which JB4 harness your vehicle requires.1) V1 Harness: Two V1 sensors, generally found on 2014 and earlier models2) V1.5 Harness: One V1 sensor, one V2 sensor, generally found on 2015-2016 models3) V2 Harness: Two V2 sensors, generally found on 2017-2020 models4) V3 Harness: One V3 sensor, one V2 sensor, generally found on 2021+ modelsSensor arrangements are vehicle specific, so while our model year guide gives common applications, there are some 2017-2020 vehicles that use V1.5 harnesses, some 2021+ models that use V2 harnesses, etc. Check your vehicle prior to ordering. title: BMS Kia Stinger / Genesis G70 3.3L V6 Performance Dual Intake
descriptionEn: Bolt on More Horsepower, Torque, and Better Sound Featuring high-quality BMS dual inverted cone filters, the BMS KIA Stinger intake offers maximum airflow in an attractive and easy-to-install package. The BMS intake for the KIA Stinger removes factory restrictions while retaining the factory cold air ducting, heat-isolating airbox bottom, and high-flow turbo inlet fittings. A stylish top-half shroud protects the intake from radiant engine heat, leading to dramatically improved performance, throttle response, and amazing sound. More boost equals higher performance gains! Our Burger Motorsports renewable inverted cone filters not only outflow your stock paper filter but also last the vehicle's lifetime. They include a built-in velocity stack for smoother air intake, a feature used in most racing applications. This intake has been extensively tested on the BMS development KIA Stinger, running 11.9@120mph in the 1/4 mile and 148mph half-mile traps. Installation is quick and easy, taking only a few minutes. The high-flow BMS dual inverted cone filters can be cleaned and renewed every 15-20k miles for optimal performance. Available in Three Finishes Matte Black Glossy Black Matte Red Replacement inverted cone filters are available in Blue or Red and can be purchased here. Optional BMS High Flow Silicone Turbo Inlets SAVE $80.00 when purchased with intake (Limited Time) Our new silicone high-flow turbo inlets replace factory accordion inlets with better-flowing silicone inlets. Expect improved boost response, more turbo sound, and a cleaner engine bay! Power gains of up to 10whp have been observed with aggressive tuning. Features and Benefits Adds horsepower and torque Improved throttle response Enhanced engine sound Includes black heat shields Dual inverted cone filters for maximum airflow Cleanable, renewable inverted cone filters Easy installation and removal Vehicle Fitment 2018-2023 KIA Stinger GT, GT1, GT2 3.3L V6 2018+ Genesis G70 3.3L V6 Does not fit 2.0L 4-cylinder models. What's Included (2) 3.5" Powder-coated aluminum intake pipes (2) Renewable inverted cone filters w/clamps (2) Aluminum heat shields (2) M6x1.0x16mm bolts (2) M6 nuts (4) M6 washers KIA intake Blue Oil filters are available here.KIA intake Red Oil filters are available here.Performance air filter cleaning & oil kit available here. title: G Chassis BMW - Burger Motorsports Wheel Spacers w/10 Bolts
descriptionEn: CLICK HERE to check out or new lightweight racing G chassis wheel spacers and lug bolts. Simple, bolt-on handling and looks for your BMWWider Stance = Better Handling & More Aggressive Looks BMW wheel spacers by Burger Motorsports are an excellent, cost-effective way to improve handling while dramatically enhancing the look of your BMW. Our wheel spacers push your rims and tires outward for an instant "fat" aggressive look, better lateral stability, and handling. Spacers are also great for filling in the wheel well, creating clearance for aftermarket suspension, different wheel offsets, big brakes, making your winter tires not look so inset, or just making your BMW look awesome. BMS spacers are specifically designed and manufactured by Burger Motorsports for your BMW ensuring a perfect vibration-free fit. Comes with a packet of anti-seize grease to place on the factory hub to aid in later removal. Build & Quality: Each Burger Motorsports wheel spacer is CNC machined from high grade 7075-T6 aluminum alloy and anodized black for protection. Our BMW Wheel Spacers are sold in pairs (2pcs) with 10 extended lug bolts that exceed OE standards. To do the whole car you will need 2 spacer kits. All Burger Motorsports wheel spacers are hub-centric and are safe to use on xDrive (all-wheel drive) BMW vehicles. Hub-Centric: This means our spacer's center bore matches your factory BMW hub and the factory-like hub on the Burger Motorsports spacers match the center bore in your wheel for a vibration-free fit. What width wheel spacer should I get?Most G Chassis BMW vehicles with factory wheels and tire sizes take 10mm to 13mm in the front and 13mm to 15mm in the rear. The photos and guidelines on this website are for reference only. Your BMW might have different results with the same size spacers due to different wheels, tire sizes, packages, and offsets. Installation: Simply remove the wheel, place the spacer on the hub and bolt the wheel back up with the supplied longer lug bolts. Download the install guide. FREE Wheel Pin tool with purchase of 2 pairs of wheel spacers on the same receipt.To get the free wheel pin with a 2 pair wheel spacer purchase, add 2 pairs of wheel spacers to your cart, go to the link below and add the free wheel pin to the cart. title: JB4 Tuner for Honda 1.5 / 2.0L Turbo
sku: HONDA 1.5L TURBO JB4 + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 40hp and 50tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle without the risks associated with flashing! JB4 is a plug and play Honda tuner that attaches to two easy to access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory DME tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. It features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 1000 times per second using dedicated 10 bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance. Power gains on the 1.5L Honda Civic Turbo motor are up to 50 horsepower and 60 torque (40hp and 50tq at the wheels).Our JB4 Honda tuner installs discreetly and it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Fuel economy is unchanged during normal driving. Compatible with all driving modes. Does NOT require flashing the ECU! Compatible with both manual and CVT transmissions. The The JB4 Honda tuner system is fully CANbus equipped allowing the tuning to take in advanced engine data for mapping, logging, and diagnostics. Data channels include boost, timing, air/fuel, fuel trims, throttle, knock control, and much more! Made in USA. 5 Year Warranty. JB4 Honda Tuner Map Guide Map 0: Disables JB4 all togetherMap 1: +3.5 psi, default map. Suggested for 91+ octane.Map 2: +4.0 psi, 91-93 octane Map 3: +4.5 psi, 93+ octane Map 4: +5.0 psi, 30% E85 Map 5: +6.0 psi, 30% E85 or race gasMap 6: User Adjustable Custom Tuning MapMap 7: +9.0 psi, 30% E85 or race gas, full send mode!Map 8: VALET/Low Boost Map Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 FEATURES & BENEFITS • Power gains of up to 40hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 times and 1/4 mile times• Preloaded with custom JB4 Honda tuning software and up to 8 maps for various fuel and modification levels• Ethanol (E85) compatible tuning maps• Able to read/delete fault codes• View and record up to 40 different gauges/engine parameters in real-time with the JB4PRO app.• Boost by gear in 1st, 2nd, and 3rd can be controlled via the JB4PRO app for a perfect launch• Compatible with the FREE JB4PRO app for logging, tuning changes, and adjustment• The JB4 offers a lot more performance, functionality, and safety than your average performance chip• Quick Plug & Play Installation• CANbus OBDII integration offering unrivaled tuning features and performance• Improved performance over non-integrated chip tunes• Runs as smoothly as stock, this is how your vehicle should have come from the factory• Compatible with all driving modes• Fuel economy unchanged during normal driving• 91 octane fuel or better required for performance gains• Not VIN locked and can be removed without a trace and resold down the road• Includes the rugged JB4 billet aluminum enclosure for protection• Designed and assembled in the USA• 5 year warranty Vehicle Fitment Honda• 2016-Present 1.5L/2.0L turbo Honda Civic, Civic Si• 2017-Present 2.0L turbo Honda Civic Type-R • 2018-Present 1.5L/2.0L turbo Honda Accord• 2017-Present 1.5L turbo Honda CR-V• 2016-Present 1.5L turbo Honda HR-V What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. title: BMS E Chassis 7.5" High Density RACE Replacement Intercooler Upgrade
descriptionEn: Deliver consistent, reliable power run after run The last intercooler you'll ever buy for your car. Good for over 1000whp the BMS 7.5" High-Density RACE intercooler delivers better cooling, more power to the wheels, and allows you to hold that power longer during extended runs. With a larger core and more surface area than stock, your intercooler pressure drop is reduced and cooling dramatically improved. Resulting in peak power gains of 10whp+ and during longer pulls and back to back runs as much as 30whp+ over the heat soak prone factory intercooler. BMS replacement intercoolers are a direct replacement for your factory intercooler and fully reversible. All required hardware is included. Compatible with both N54 and N55 applications. The new E chassis RACE core is intended for serious performance applications such as upgraded turbos or single turbo kits, providing absolutely the best cooling capacity available in a high quality and high-value package. Includes an internal hot side flow diverter to ensure consistent flow and cooling throughout even at lower boost pressures. RACE requires minor trimming of the plastic shrouding during installation.E chassis race FMIC dimensions 7.5" deep x 5.5" x 3" Overall height is 11" Features and Benefits High-flow oversized design Larger end tanks Larger core size Prevents heat soak Direct bolt-on factory replacement E Chassis Intercooler Vehicle Fitment2010+ models, please see the bottom of the page for the "J-pipe"BMW 1 Series• 2007-2010 N54 BMW E82 E87 E88 135i• 2011 N54 BMW E82 1M• 2011+ N55 BMW E82 E87 E88 135iBMW 3 Series• 2007-2010 N54 BMW E90 E91 335i/335ix• 2011-2013 N54 E92 335is• 2011 N55 BMW E90 335i/335ix• 2011-2013 N55 BMW E92 E93 335i/iX BMW 5 SeriesRequires adapter brackets (Sold Separately) https://burgertuning.com/products/535-e-chassis-n54-bmw-intercooler-adapter-brackets• 2008-2010 E60 Sedan 535i/535ix• 2008-2010 E61 Touring 535i/535ix INSTALL VIDEO DYNO RESULTS OTHER PHOTOS RACE Intercooler hot side flow diverter valve to ensure equal distribution through the large core at lower engine speeds BMS High-Density Core Close Up Optional E Chassis RACE Intercooler J Pipe (Sold Separately) The factory J pipe is ~2.4" and in some 2010+ models a one-piece design. The 2.5" J pipe is suggested for models that have the one-piece design while the 3" J pipe allows you to stay 3" all the way from the intercooler to your throttle body when equipped with a 3" BMS charge pipe for the highest flow potential. We suggest the 3" J pipe for vehicles with aftermarket turbos.Click here to purchase: https://www.burgertuning.com/products/race-intercooler-j-pipe

title: BMS Pedal Tuner - Adjustable throttle response
descriptionEn: Don't let weak and unresponsive factory gas pedal mapping ruin your driving experience! Fall in love with your car all over again. The BMS Pedal Tuner is plug and play controller that attaches to your gas pedal allowing you to instantly remap and improve throttle response. Toggle between stock, stage 1, stage 2, and stage 3 curves on the fly and even fine-tune each mode using simple up or down adjustment buttons on the device. The BMS Pedal Tuner installs and removes in minutes and is fully independent from and is compatible with other modifications including the JB4. Calibration Process: After installation, start the vehicle calibration process by holding + and - simultaneously until all lights flash. Then press the gas pedal fully to the floor a couple of times. The status lights should move to the right as you press it down. Finally, press and hold the stage selector button until all lights turn off to save the calibration. Now you're ready to go! Features & Benefits • Greatly Improve throttle response and sensitivity• Improved performance and drivability• Improves gas milage in eco modes• Removes the dead space in the pedal for faster acceleration• Compatible with JB4 and all other modifications. • Compatible with all driving modes• Quick Plug & Play Installation Vehicle Fitment BMW• 2006+ BMWMINI• 2006+ MINI VW/Audi• 2008+ VW/Audi except for B9 A4/A5/S4/5, S All, SQ All, RS All, C7 All, C8 All, Q7 All and 2025 Golf R. title: BMS Billet Aluminum BMW (DCT) Dual Clutch Transmission Oil Pan
descriptionEn: Stop The Silent Killer Inside Your BMW Transmission It's common knowledge that excessive heat can be extremely detrimental to your BMW transmission, and it's also well-known that higher power levels can lead to increased transmission fluid temperatures. Now, you have the opportunity to enhance the durability and performance of your automatic transmission with the Burger Motorsports standard-capacity or high-capacity billet Dual Clutch racing transmission pan. This upgrade replaces the weak factory-installed, plastic DCT pan, offering superior transmission cooling, heightened performance, and extended worry-free longevity. CNC machined from a solid block of lightweight billet aluminum, our Dual Clutch Transmission pans boast cooling fins and the high-capacity version increased oil capacity. These features work in harmony to ensure that your transmission operates at optimal temperatures, thereby enhancing its overall lifespan. Please note that for certain vehicle models, the installation of the high-capacity pan may necessitate the removal or modification of the transmission under tray.Standard Capacity: Holds OEM capacity of the factory pan, mirrors the factory baffles, and provides exceptional cooling with 40 integrated heat sinks. Low Baffle High Capacity: Lower baffles for slightly more fluid capacity, holds double the capacity of the factory pan, approx. 1.5 additional quarts and 18 heavy-duty heat sinks for even further improved transmission cooling. High Baffle High Capacity: Mirrors the factory baffles with added height for extra pan depth, holds double the capacity of the factory pan, approx. 1.4 additional quarts and 18 heavy-duty heat sinks for even further improved transmission cooling. New rubber pan gasket and suction filter included with all models. Features & Benefits CNC machined from high quality 6061 billet aluminum in the USA Large heat sink fins keep the DCT trans fluid cooler and dissipate heat faster for better clutch performance & longer transmission life Retains trans fluid filter and magnet Retains trans pan gasket and fittings for a leak and trouble-free installation Includes enhancements and O-rings and/or gaskets that are required for filter installation New rubber pan gasket and suction filter included Meets or exceeds OEM specifications For racing and street applications Vehicle Fitment DCT E82 E88 BMW 135i DCT E90 E91 E92 E93 BMW 335i, 335is, M3 DCT F80 F82 F83 BMW M2 M3 M4 M4 GTS DCT F10 BMW M5 DCT F06 BMW F12 F13 M6 DCT E89 BMW Z4 Replaces OE part numbers 28108070791 and 28107842385 Replacement OE pan bolts part number (Qty.14) 28107842386 (sold separately) DCT pan and filter install video Standard Capacity: High Capacity:

title: BMS M2C/M3/M4 S55 BMW Performance Intake
descriptionEn: Gain up to 10+whp along with terrific sound Finally, an affordable intake system worthy of your S55 BMW M2C, M3, and M4! The Burger Motorsports S55 BMW Performance Intake retains everything that's good about the OEM intake including the cold air ducting and lightweight heat shielding airbox bottom but replaces the top end of the intake with higher flow ducting and quality inverted cone air filters to match.During our dyno testing the BMS S55 BMW Performance Intake performed the same or better than other S55 intakes tested posting gains of up to 10+ horsepower to the wheels at 25psi+ boost levels. Note the OEM S55 air intake flows very well from the factory so gains are mostly present at higher boost levels and higher RPM where airflow requirements are highest. In addition to freeing up some power turbo spool speed was improved, and there is an incredible sound improvement. You'll finally be able to hear your turbo spooling!Our intake temperature testing found no significant difference from the factory intake during both sustained cruise and full-throttle operation.Installation is easy and fully reversible. Includes BMS proprietary high flow inverted cone filters that can be cleaned every 15-20k miles using an S&B cleaning kit and will last the life of the car. Our Burger Motorsports inverted cone filters not only outflow your stock paper filter and last the life of your vehicle, they also include a built-in velocity stack. Velocity stacks allow even more air to be smoothly sucked into your intake system and are used in most racing applications.Available in two finishes • Matte Black• Gloss Black Powder Coat (Elite) Features & Benefits • Adds up to 10+ Horsepower• Dramatic sound improvement• Super fast install and removal• Improves throttle response• Retains OEM airbox base as a heat shield• Retains OEM cold air ducting• Now available with red or blue filters• Looks great under the hood• Cleanable and reusable filters Vehicle Fitment BMW M2• 2018-2021 F87 M2 Competition (S55 engine)BMW M3• 2015-2020 F80 M3BMW M4• 2015-2020 F82, F83 M4, GTS What's Included(2) BMS 3" aluminum intake tubes(2) Renewable BMS inverted cone performance filters(1) 3" coupler(2) 3" clamps(4) M4x0.7x14mm MAF screws Install Video BMS Elite M3/M4 S55 Performance Intake ((Sound Clip)) on a 2015 M4 DYNO RESULTS

title: BMS Honda Turbo Intake
descriptionEn: More Air = More Power & Better Sound! The BMS Honda Turbo Intake unlocks horsepower from your 2016+ Turbo Civic and Cr-V 1.5t by removing the restrictions in your factory intake while retaining as much of the well designed and high quality factory system as possible.Our analysis revealed the restriction in the factory intake is actually the airbox top and small panel air filter. To eliminate these the BMS Honda Turbo Intake replaces the factory top and panel filter with a new CNC machined MAF housing and high flow inverted cone filter. Precise CNC machining allows the BMS MAF housing to provide level fuel trims without check engine lights, rough idle, and other problems commonly associated with other intakes. And ensures the BMS intake does not require tuning.The BMS inverted cone filter sits partially inside the factory airbox bottom providing fresh ducted air as well as radiant heat protection. The factory inlet piping is actually very high flow so we retain that for a stock like look and ease of intake install/removal. The result of all this is dramatically improved intake flow without an increase in charge air temperatures.In addition to the extra power provided your throttle response, turbo spool, and sound are dramatically improved, finally allowing you to hear your turbo spool up under heavy acceleration. This is really how your Civic should have come from the factory. Install takes only minutes and is fully reversible. Made in the USA. We offer both factory calibrated units that provide perfect 0% fuel trims and RACE calibrated units that provide the highest level of airflow possible without triggering fault codes. Features and Benefits• Faster throttle response• Faster turbo spool• Improved intake sound• CNC machined from billet aluminum• Looks great under the hood• Reusable/washable high flow filter• Installs in minutes and is fully reversible • Retains factory cold air ducting / airbox bottom• Made in the USA Vehicle Fitment Honda 2016-2021 Honda Civic 1.5T Si & non-Si 2017-2021 Honda CR-V 1.5T What's included• (1) Billet MAF Housing• (1) Renewable 1123 inverted cone filter w/clamp • (1) Billet "J" bracket• (2) MAF screws M4-.07x10 socket head cap screw stainlessReplacement 1123 intake Blue Oil filters are available here.Performance air filter cleaning & oil kit available here.
