title: Group 8: JB4 Tuner Gen3B
sku: VW JB4 GEN3B + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: JB4 Group 8: Gen3B The JB4 is a plug and play Audi tuner that plugs into easy access sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap your boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. It features a 64mhz processor allowing sensors to be sampled 800 times per second using dedicated 10 bit digital to analog converters, ensuring smooth and powerful performance. Minimum power gains of 30whp and 45ft lb on 91AKI/95Ron Now includes the JB4PRO adapter and free app built in!Unlike other tuning systems, the JB4 includes a fully programmable CANbus system, at-home upgradable firmware, and data logging capability. CANbus allows the JB4 to access engine data to take into account pedal input, throttle position, gear, engine speed, air/fuel ratio, fuel trims, ignition advance, knock, and many other factors and incorporate those into the performance mapping. It can also read/delete fault codes, incorporate unique safety features such as keeping boost pressure low until oil and water is up to temperature to provide proper engine and turbo lucubration and drop to a low boost map if the engine starts to overheat, run lean, excessively knock, or over boost.The default JB4 map1 runs 3psi over stock peak and tuned maps, including stock and valet mode, can be selected on the fly using the optional wireless JB4PRO bluetooth adapter. Installation is very discrete, and it quickly removes without a trace when needed. Fuel economy during normal driving is unchanged. Compatible with all driving modes. 5-year warranty.Visit JB4tech.com for the JB4 Map Guide. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Minimum power gains of up to 30hp and 45tq to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. For any VW/Audi sales, support, and technical questions, please contact George at george@burgertuning.com George is the only BMS representative familiar with the VW/Audi platform. Vehicle Fitment Audi• 2017-2021 Audi 8V A3 FWD 2.0T 184hp• 2017+ Audi B9 A4 2.0T 190hp• 2017+ Audi B9 A5 2.0T 190hpSkoda• 2017+ Skoda Kodiaq 2.0T 180hp Seat• 2017+ Seat Ateca 20T 190hpVolkswagen• 2017+ VW Aerton 2.0T 190hp• 2017+ VW Tiguan 2.0T North American• 2017+ VW Tiguan 2.0T 140kw/184hp• 2017+ VW T-Roc N1 2.0T 184hp• 2018+ VW Passat 2.0T North American 174hp• 2018+ VW Polo GTI AW 2.0T 200hp Audi JB4 Mobile demo video

title: JB4 Bluetooth Wireless Phone/Tablet Connect Kit Rev 3.7 (Separate Power Wire, N54 & pre-2017 JB4 systems only)
descriptionEn: Wirelessly connect and control your JB4 with your phone! This separate power wire is for BMW N54 systems and any JB4 system manufactured prior to 2017. All other systems use pinned power wire. Check board type below before ordering as most don't use this adapter. The JB4 Connect Kit (Rev 3.7) allows your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS and Android devices to connect wirelessly to your JB4. View critical engine data in real-time, datalog, read codes, change maps, update settings, update firmware, and more, all from the palm of your hand! The REV3 mounts next to the JB4 in the engine bay eliminating the need to run a BMS DATA cable inside the cabin. It's compatible with all JB4 products. Just plug it in to the JB4 where your BMS DATA cable connects, attach the power and ground wire to the JB4 harness using the included connectors, purchase the JB4 Mobile app, and you're off and running. Please note the JB4 Mobile app is available for iPhone®, iOS, or Android® and sold separately via the Apple® or Android® app store on your phone. This adapter is not compatible with the JB4 windows interface. Features & Benefits • Connect and control your JB4 tuner wirelessly • iPhone and Android compatible • Monitor your vehicle with a variety of live gauges• Take logs to tune your vehicle to perfection• Graph/email your logs to review performance• Read/Delete error codes• Change maps• Change user adjustment/methanol settings• Update JB4 firmware• Custom gauge colors/themes• Charge your phone while using JB4 software • Made in the USA JB4 app sold separately in the app store. descriptionEn: JB4 Group 7: JB4 SENT Tuner The JB4 is an easy to install plug and play tuner that attaches to sensors in the engine bay and works with your factory ECU tuning to remap boost, timing, and fueling for optimal performance and reduced turbo lag. Includes full SENT sensor technology required for properly tuning the latest Audi platforms. Includes full CANbus allowing the JB4 to access and incorporate all engine data in it's tuning strategies, incorporate unique safety features such as keeping boost pressure low until oil and water is up to temperature to provide proper engine and turbo lubrication and drop to a low boost map if the engine starts to overheat, run lean, excessively knock, or over boost. Includes fuel control for ethanol mixture mapping. Fully compatible with FREE JB4PRO app for on the fly map changes, data logging, firmware updates, and much more. Revision 2 now includes an integrated boost control connection which can be optionally connected for higher power applications. You no longer need to purchase a separate BCM module for this! For map details, updates, and to join the discussion: https://www.jb4tech.com/forum/model-specific-engine-tuning-modification-discussion/vw-audi-group/18503- Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Audi 2017+ Audi B9/9.5 S4 3.0TFSI 2017+ Audi B9/9.5 S5 3.0TFSI 2017+ Audi B9/9.5 MK2 SQ5 3.0TFSI 2017+ Audi B9/9.5 RS4 2017+ Audi B9/9.5 RS5 2018+ Audi C8 A6/7 3.0TFSI/55 2017+ Audi Q7 3.0TFSI/55 2017+ Audi Q8 3.0TFSI/55 Porsche 2019+ Porsche Macan S Facelift 2012+ Porsche E3 Cayenne For any VW/Audi sales, support, and technical questions please contact George at george@burgertuning.com George is the only BMS representative familiar with the VW/Audi platform. What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and its DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way, the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing, including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. Dragy testing on a 100% factory S4 with JB4 and 30% E85 fuel. Customer dragy testing with JB4, 93 octane, and a few bolt-on mods VIDEO Customer provided Audi B9 S4 race video showing JB4 in action

title: BMS Magnetic Billet BMW Oil Filter Cap for N54/N55/S55/N52/N20/N26 Engines
descriptionEn: Upgrades your weak plastic BMW oil filter cap The Burger Motorsports V2 billet aluminum oil filter cover is a metal upgrade that directly replaces your weak OE plastic cap for greater protection, better cooling, ease of removal/install, and looks great under the hood. The built-in 19mm hex and a 3/8" drive socket wrench fitting that does not require a special removal/install tool like the factory cap. Uses the OE oil filter, filter housing o-ring, and filter cage. Anodized for protection. This quality part is a must for any serious BMW owner. Equipped with huge ~1.2" (30mm) integrated Samarium Cobalt magnet to capture dangerous metal shavings and particles that would otherwise circulate through your engine oil and bearings. Unlike other oil filter caps that press fit smaller magnets leaving them vulnerable to damage and displacement during engine heat cycles, our magnets are secured in their precisely machined pockets to safely withstand extreme temperatures and pressure.Replaces OEM part number 11427525334 - BMW Oil filter cover. Features and Benefits • Solid aluminum design is much stronger than brittle plastic• 21mm hex head + 3/8" drive socket wrench fitting• Integrated heat sinks for better oil cooling• Integrated magnet to keep dangerous metal shavings out of your engine• Optional integrated magnet to capture dangerous metal shavings• Special tools are not required for removal/install like the factory cap• Strong design won't fail under pressure• Reuses OE filter cage and o-ring• Anodized for protection• Looks great under the hood• Available in black, red, silver, and blue• Made in the USA 🇺🇸 Vehicle Fitment• N54 BMW engines• N55 BMW engines• S55 BMW ///M engines• N51 and N52 non-turbo BMW engines• N20 and N26 BMW EnginesSee our billet BMW oil filter removal/install tool for removing the factory oil cap. 🔧 After removing the OEM oil filter cap, remove the filter, and be sure to remove the plastic oil filter cage and transfer it to the new BMS billet oil filter cap. Be sure to replace the exterior o-ring gasket also when installing. What is billet? In this case, A billet is a solid block of aluminum (lightweight metal) with a size larger than the part. Excess material from the billet is removed by precision CNC machining, essentially carving the part out of solid aluminum. CNC machined parts are consistently stronger, better looking, and last longer than cheaper cast and plastic versions. ⚠️ Please note some engine degreasers and engine cleaners may fade or damage the anodized finish. INSTALL VIDEOS The Burger Motorsports (BMS) Magnetic Billet BMW Oil Filter Cap is the best oil filter upgrade available.

title: Alfa Romeo 2.0L JB4 Tuner
sku: Alfa Romeo JB4 + PRO BT Adapter
descriptionEn: Power gains of up to 40hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle The JB4 is the most advanced and highly featured tuning system available for your 2017+ Alfa Romeo Giulia or Stelvio 2.0L 4-cylinder turbo. Power gains are up to 40hp to the wheels (55hp crank) on a completely stock car on pump gas, gains with bolt-on parts, higher octane, and larger turbos are even higher.The JB4 features a simple plug & play harness for easy installation & removal and includes many features not found with any other tune. Including on the fly map switching from your phone/tablet instead between factory and various performance maps, boost limiting by gear for improved traction in lower gears, progressive water/methanol support, built-in data logging, built-in code reading, and much more. The JB4 also does not require any user setup or customization but for those who are interested in logging, adding new features as we post them, etc., we suggest the BMS DATA cable or REV3 mobile phone adapter. Wirelessly Connect to your JB4: Our all-new JB4 PRO smartphone connection is included to wirelessly connect the JB4 tuner to your Bluetooth 4.0 compatible iOS or Android device. This option allows you to record and analyze vehicle and tuning data, change JB4 performance maps, and update JB4 firmware as we release free newer versions with updates, more powerful maps, and new features under development. Our new adapter fits fully inside the JB4 enclosure for enhanced weather protection and a more streamlined look. The JB4PRO Free app features an intuitive easy-to-use interface, help buttons, and advanced log analysis tools that can estimate the performance of your car and help identify any tuning concerns. For more information about the JB4PRO mobile app click here. JB4 Features & Benefits • Power gains of up to 40hp to the wheels on a stock vehicle• Improves 0-60 and quarter mile times.• Includes multiple tuning maps for different fuel types.• Quick plug and play installation.• Supports E85 ethanol blends.• Reads and deletes fault codes.• Displays and logs up to 40 engine parameters.• Boost by gear control for improved traction.• Controls exhaust flap operation on supported vehicles.• Compatible with the free JB4PRO app.• Offers better performance and safety than basic chip tunes.• Full CANbus integration.• Runs as smoothly as stock.• Compatible with all driving modes.• No impact on fuel economy during normal driving.• Requires 91 octane or better for performance gains.• Not VIN locked and fully removable.• Includes billet aluminum enclosure.• Designed and assembled in the USA.• 5-year warranty. Vehicle Fitment Alfa Romeo• 2017+ Alfa Romeo Giulia 2.0L 4 cylinder Turbo • 2017+ Alfa Romeo Stelvio 2.0L 4 cylinder Turbo More Info For the install guide, map guide, and the latest firmware, click here. What is a JB4? The JB4 is a plug & play tune available for turbocharged vehicles. The JB4 tuner installs between your car's sensors and the DME/ECU (computer) and manipulates vehicle performance through these connections making your vehicle much faster. While it's not the only tuning system that operates this way the JB4 separates itself from the competition with much more advanced connection points and processing including CANbus, fuel & spark control, Bluetooth to your smartphone, and a variety of innovative and advanced features not possible with any other system. BMS regularly publishes free mapping and firmware updates adding performance and features as ongoing development allows. In addition, the JB4 system is not VIN-locked to your vehicle and can quickly be removed and swapped between cars or resold at a later time. Often imitated but never duplicated the JB4 has been the gold standard in plug and play turbocharged performance tuning for over a decade and is sold in over 67 countries worldwide. Is the JB4 a real tune? Yes the JB4 is a real tune. By tapping into specific sensors and CANbus for real time vehicle data the JB4 is able to alter your boost, timing, AFR, and/or fuel trims, to a similar degree an ECU reflash would, but without the vehicle ever knowing its been tuned. The result is safe, smooth, and significant power and torque gains while retaining your factory safety systems and without having to unlock/flag your ECU. DYNO RESULTSThe JB4 is simply the best tuner for the Alfa Romeo 2.0L.

title: BMS M3/M4 S55 Aluminum Replacement Upgraded Charge Pipes
sku: BMS M3/M4 S55 CP/cold pipe Combo
descriptionEn: Upgraded metal charge pipes and j-pipe that won't fail BMW's S55 motor is a modern marvel but one weakness we've identified is the boost tubes or charge pipes that connect the turbochargers to the intercooler. Made of thin plastic these factory parts are prone to snapping apart where the flange meets the tube, splitting along the length, and/or slipping out of their intercooler couplers.The BMS S55 replacement charge pipes are made from heavy-duty aluminum and are designed with CNC flanges and a protruding lip for a secure OEM like fit. They are finished in a wrinkle black powder coat to match the engine bay and we've also incorporated a pre-capped 1/8" NPT bung into each pipe. Includes replacement heavy duty couplers, hose clamps, and all hardware required for the installation.Vehicle Fitment BMW M2• 2018-2021 F87 M2 Competition (S55 Engine)BMW M3• 2015-2020 F80 M3BMW M4• 2015-2020 F82 M4, M4 GTS, F33 M4 Convertible What's included with the charge pipes (2) BMS metal charge pipes (4) heavy-duty 2.25" hose clamps (2) heavy-duty 2.25" silicone couplers (2) 1/8 NPT bungs (2) M6x1.0x20mm screws What's included with the J-pipe (1) heavy-duty 3.25" silicone coupler (1) charge pipe clip (1) charge pipe o-ring (1) 1/8" NPT bung Install Video Clean factory like install with injection bungs.
